title: Machine Learning-Based Bitcoin Trading Under Transaction Costs: Evidence From Walk-Forward Forecasting
summary: This paper investigates whether machine learning forecasts of hourly BTC-USDT returns can be converted into economically meaningful trading performance after transaction costs. Using approximately 70,000 hourly observations from 2018-2026, XGBoost, LSTM, and iTransformer are evaluated in a 27-fold walk-forward protocol. All three models produce positive gross trading performance in selected configurations, but naive sign-based strategies fail once transaction costs of ten basis points are imposed. A cost-aware execution filter, which prevents trades only when the forecast magnitude exceeds a transaction-cost-based threshold, sharply reduces turnover and restores profitability in selected configurations. The strongest long-only XGBoost strategy produces annualised returns above 65% with a Sharpe ratio above one. Additional tests show that technical indicators improve performance in selected cases, EGARCH-derived features do not provide uniformly robust gains, and XGBoost is descriptively stronger than the neural alternatives, although bootstrap evidence does not support formal statistical dominance. Loss-function and model-selection effects are secondary and statistically fragile. The results show that the main obstacle in hourly cryptocurrency trading is not only weak predictability, but also the way forecasts are converted into trades.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了XGBoost、LSTM和iTransformer三种模型对BTC-USDT小时收益率进行预测，并考察了交易成本对盈利的影响。结果显示，考虑10个基点交易成本后，朴素符号策略失效；通过成本感知执行过滤器可恢复部分策略盈利，最强XGBoost策略年化收益率超65%，夏普比率大于1。
AI.motivation: 探究机器学习预测能否在扣除交易成本后转化为有经济意义的加密货币交易策略，核心矛盾在于预测精度与交易成本之间的权衡。
AI.method: 使用2018-2026年约7万小时数据，采用27折滚动时间窗验证；评估XGBoost、LSTM、iTransformer三种模型；引入成本感知执行过滤器（仅当预测幅度超过交易成本阈值时才执行交易）。
AI.result: 三种模型在特定配置下均有正向毛收益，但10个基点交易成本使朴素符号策略失效；成本感知过滤器降低换手率并恢复盈利；最优XGBoost长仓策略年化回报超65%，夏普比率超1；技术指标在特定情况下提升表现，EGARCH特征提升不稳健，XGBoost描述性优于神经网络但无统计显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 加密货币小时级交易的主要障碍不仅在于预测能力的微弱，更在于将预测转换为交易的方式。成本感知的交易执行机制是提升净收益的关键。

title: Strategic Users in a Priority Queue with Bulk Service on Blockchains
summary: This paper analyzes transaction fees on blockchains by considering that they form a priority queue and users play a queueing game. Using an M/G^K/1 priority queue model, we provide new insights into the dynamics governing transaction fees and their impact on user behavior. We derive semi-closed form expressions for steady-state quantities and extend the relationship between user delay costs and transaction fees to general block generation times. We apply the model to the Bitcoin network and simulate user responses under various scenarios. Cross-chain analysis across Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin reveals similarities in normalized cost structures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过优先队列和排队博弈理论分析区块链交易费用，建立M/G^K/1优先队列模型，推导稳态半闭式表达式，并将用户延迟成本与交易费用的关系推广至一般区块生成时间。通过在比特币网络上的模拟及跨链分析（比特币、狗狗币、莱特币），揭示了标准化成本结构的相似性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏从排队论和博弈论角度系统分析区块链交易费用的动态机制，特别是用户延迟成本与交易费用之间的理论关系尚未被充分刻画。
AI.method: 采用M/G^K/1优先队列模型，推导稳态的半闭式表达式，将用户延迟成本与交易费用关系推广至一般区块生成时间，并在比特币网络上进行多场景模拟及跨链比较分析。
AI.result: 获得了交易费用稳态量的半闭式解，发现了不同区块链（比特币、狗狗币、莱特币）在标准化成本结构上的相似性。
AI.conclusion: 排队博弈模型能有效解释区块链交易费用形成机制，跨链成本结构的相似性表明该方法具有普适性。

title: Reflexivity as Prompt: Does Awareness of Self-Reinforcing Market Dynamics Improve LLMs as Financial Market Forecasters?
summary: We study how frontier large language models (LLMs) behave as financial forecasters during boom-bust market cycles when made progressively aware of Soros's theory of reflexivity. Standard AI-assisted forecasting treats the market as an exogenous system. Reflexivity theory holds otherwise: prices shape fundamentals, and every forecaster is a participative agent in the loop it analyzes. We evaluate three frontier models - GPT5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 3 Pro - under four accumulating zero-shot conditions across two historically distinct episodes: the dot-com bubble (1996-2001) and the global financial crisis (2004-2009). The primary metric is directional forecasting accuracy; we also report the Sharpe ratio of an implied long/cash strategy to capture the risk-adjusted economic value of the forecasts. All inputs are anonymized and normalized to guard against memorization. We find that conditions incorporating reflexivity awareness improve forecasting accuracy differently across models and context windows, revealing that the same theoretical awareness can produce qualitatively different forecasting behavior across frontier LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本研究测试了GPT5、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 3 Pro三种前沿大语言模型在了解Soros反身性理论后，对互联网泡沫和全球金融危机两个历史周期进行金融预测的表现。结果显示，引入反身性意识能提升预测准确性，但不同模型和上下文窗口下的改善效果存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 传统AI辅助预测将市场视为外生系统，忽视预测者本身就是市场的参与者和影响者。作者希望探究当大语言模型被赋予反身性理论（即价格塑造基本面，预测者处于参与回路中）意识后，其金融预测行为会发生怎样的变化。
AI.method: 选取三种前沿LLMs（GPT5、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3 Pro），在两种历史周期（互联网泡沫1996-2001和全球金融危机2004-2009）中，设置四种逐步累加的零样本条件（逐步引入反身性意识）。使用方向性预测准确率作为主要指标，同时采用隐含多头/现金策略的夏普比率衡量风险调整后的经济价值。所有输入均经过匿名化和标准化处理防止记忆效应。
AI.result: 纳入反身性意识的条件能提升方向性预测准确率，但提升效果在不同模型和上下文窗口间呈现显著差异。相同的理论意识在不同前沿LLMs中产生了定性不同的预测行为。
AI.conclusion: 反身性理论意识确实能改善LLMs的金融预测能力，但这一效果具有模型特异性和上下文依赖性。这意味着未来在将LLMs应用于金融预测时，不能简单地将"给予理论意识"视为统一有效的策略，需要因模型制宜。

title: Avellaneda-Stoikov and Cartea-Jaimungal as One Framework: A Forced Uniqueness Theorem for Inventory Market Making
summary: In inventory market making, the running-penalty coefficient $φ$ of the Cartea-Jaimungal framework and the risk-aversion parameter $γ$ of the Avellaneda-Stoikov framework are typically treated as independent free parameters, calibrated separately. We show that they are in fact not independent. A small set of axioms on the market maker's dynamic preference functional, namely cash-additivity, normalization, concavity, strong dynamic consistency, and law-invariance, forces the preference functional to be the entropic certainty-equivalent on liquidation-adjusted terminal wealth, parametrized by a single positive scalar $γ$. The Avellaneda-Stoikov framework is the unique representative of this axiom class. The Cartea-Jaimungal framework is its second-order Taylor expansion in inventory magnitude, with the running coefficient forced to $φ= γσ^2/2$ and (under a mild regularity condition on the liquidation cost) the terminal coefficient forced to $α= \frac{1}{2}L''(0)$. The two frameworks, typically presented as competing alternatives with the choice between them driven by tractability, are different manifestations of a single underlying object. The forced relation is invertible, $γ= 2φ/σ^2$, giving a consistency cross-check on independently calibrated desk parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，库存做市中Cartea-Jaimungal框架的惩罚系数φ和Avellaneda-Stoikov框架的风险厌恶参数γ并非独立自由参数，而由一组公理强制关联为γ=2φ/σ²。两个框架本质上是同一底层对象的不同表现形式。
AI.motivation: 解决两个主流做市框架中关键参数被独立标定、但实际存在内在关联的问题，揭示其数学上的统一性。
AI.method: 通过建立一组关于做市商动态偏好泛函的公理（现金可加性、归一化、凹性、强动态一致性、律不变性），证明唯有熵确定性等价（Avellaneda-Stoikov框架）满足这些公理，并推导出Cartea-Jaimungal框架为其在库存量上的二阶泰勒展开，进而导出参数间的强制关系。
AI.result: 建立了φ与γ之间的强制关系：φ=γσ²/2，且终端系数α=½L''(0)。两个框架是同一底层对象的不同表现形式，关系可逆。
AI.conclusion: 两个看似竞争、基于可处理性选择的做市框架实为统一，参数间的强制关系可用于独立标定参数的一致性交叉检验。

title: Regime-Adaptive Continual Learning for Portfolio Management
summary: Financial markets are inherently non-stationary, exhibiting frequent regime shifts and structural changes that render traditional Portfolio Management (PM) approaches ineffective. Existing remedies, such as rolling-window retraining and naive online fine-tuning, are hindered by high computational costs and insufficient knowledge utilization, respectively, resulting in low returns and limited adaptability. Continual learning (CL) offers a promising paradigm by enabling trading agents to accumulate and transfer knowledge across sequential tasks. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Re}gime-aware \textbf{C}ontinual \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{P}ortfolio management (\textbf{ReCAP}), a novel framework that integrates CL into PM to address the challenges of dynamic financial environments. ReCAP employs an adaptive regime detection module to segment historical market data into variable-length regimes, enabling regime-specific learning of policy vectors and the construction of a policy library. During continual trading, a regime-gate module adaptively combines policy vectors from the library based on the current market state, facilitating rapid adaptation to newly detected regimes. Only the regime-gate and the current regime's policy vector are continually updated to preserve useful knowledge effectively. Extensive experiments on five real-world datasets demonstrate that ReCAP consistently outperforms popular baselines, achieving superior returns in long-term investment horizons and rapid adaptation to regime shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReCAP框架，将持续学习（CL）融入投资组合管理（PM），通过自适应机制检测市场制度、构建政策库，并利用制度门控模块实现快速适应，在五个真实数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 金融市场具有非平稳性，传统投资组合管理方法（如滚动窗口重训练、在线微调）存在计算成本高、知识利用不足等问题，导致收益率低且适应性差。
AI.method: 提出ReCAP框架：1）自适应制度检测模块将历史数据分割为变长制度区间，进行制度特定的策略学习并构建策略库；2）在连续交易中，制度门控模块根据当前市场状态自适应组合策略库中的策略向量；3）仅持续更新制度门控和当前制度的策略向量，以有效保留有用知识。
AI.result: 在五个真实数据集上，ReCAP在长期投资回报和制度转变的快速适应方面均一致优于多种主流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ReCAP通过持续学习有效解决了金融市场的非平稳性和制度转换问题，实现了高性能回报和快速适应能力。

title: A Formally Verified Library of Mathematical Finance in Lean 4
comment: 7 pages. Lean 4 artifact (Apache-2.0): https://github.com/raphaelrrcoelho/formal-mathfin ; archived at doi:10.5281/zenodo.20477782
summary: We describe a library of mathematical finance built in the Lean 4 proof assistant, on top of Mathlib and the BrownianMotion package. It is broad: more than two hundred sorry-free theorems across eleven areas, from the measure-theoretic foundations of continuous-time stochastic calculus through derivative pricing to applied risk, portfolio, and fixed-income theory, and, to our knowledge, the most comprehensive machine-checked development of mathematical finance to date. Breadth is the setting, not the point. Two things make it more than a catalogue. It reaches into the continuous theory far enough to construct the L2 Itô integral as a bounded linear isometry and to derive, rather than assume, the risk-neutral pricing measure. And it audits its own faithfulness: every result is classified by how its Lean statement relates to the mathematics it claims, and a build-enforced gate pins the axioms each proof actually uses, so a reader can see precisely what has been proved and what has only been proved under added hypotheses. We close with a candid finding: a formal base over classical financial mathematics yields certified unification of known results rather than new financial theory. The contribution is therefore methodological and infrastructural, reusable verified foundations for mathematical finance, together with the faithfulness audit.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于Lean 4证明助手构建的数学金融库，涵盖连续时间随机微积分到衍生品定价等11个领域，包含200多个无错误定理，并引入了忠实性审计机制。
AI.motivation: 填补机器验证的数学金融领域空白，提供可复用的形式化基础，并审计形式化证明与原始数学表述之间的忠实程度。
AI.method: 在Lean 4中基于Mathlib和BrownianMotion包构建库；将每个定理的形式化陈述与原始数学主张进行对比分类；通过构建强制（build-enforced gate）记录每个证明实际使用的公理假设。
AI.result: 构建了涉及11个领域、200多个无错误定理的金融数学库；实现了L2 Itô积分的有界线性等距构造并推导了风险中性定价测度；对每个结果进行了忠实性分类。
AI.conclusion: 形式化验证为经典金融数学提供了经过认证的已知结果统一，而非产生新的金融理论。贡献在于方法论和基础设施层面——可复用的已验证金融数学基础及忠实性审计机制。

title: Learning from Mistakes: Can LLM Self-Recover after Misalignment?
comment: AAAI'26 Workshop (WS37), Machine Ethics: from formal methods to emergent machine ethics, January 20--27, 2026, Singapore
summary: Responsible AI initiatives place great emphasis on the safety of Large Language Model (LLM)-based systems. In particular, it has become standard practice to subject these models to an alignment procedure aimed at preventing harmful outputs. However, once aligned, a model is not guaranteed to maintain this alignment throughout its lifecycle. Moreover, the likelihood of misalignment increases as malicious actors may deliberately employ jailbreaking techniques to compromise LLM safety. To counter this, much research has focused on improving alignment methods and post-processing filters. In this paper, we introduce a new perspective on advancing LLM alignment: rather than developing stronger alignment techniques, we investigate the model's intrinsic ability to recover its alignment after corruption. We propose a methodology for modeling the safety trajectories of user-assistant interactions and for detecting recovery trends within them. We apply this approach to a jailbreaking scenario, presenting a preliminary recovery analysis based on a dataset of adversarial multi-turn dialogues and examining the influence of the content moderation model chosen for safety evaluation. Project page with an interactive data visualizer is available at https://lab-rococo-sapienza.github.io/LearningfromMistakes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出新视角：不依赖更强的对齐技术，而是研究LLM在安全受损后能否自发恢复其对齐状态。作者提出了一种建模用户-助手交互安全轨迹的方法，用于检测回复中的恢复趋势，并在多轮对抗对话数据集上进行了初步分析。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐技术无法保证模型在整个生命周期内维持安全性，且恶意攻击（如越狱）会进一步破坏对齐。作者认为与其开发更强的对齐方法，不如探究模型自身修复安全性的内在能力。
AI.method: 提出一种建模用户-助手交互安全轨迹的方法，用于检测恢复趋势；基于多轮对抗对话数据集进行初步恢复分析，并考察不同内容审核模型对安全评估的影响。
AI.result: 在越狱场景下，通过对抗性多轮对话数据集验证了所提方法的可行性，展示了模型在安全受损后存在恢复趋势，并分析了安全评估模型选择对结果的影响。
AI.conclusion: 从"被动防御"转向"主动修复"的新思路，为LLM对齐研究提供了补充视角；未来可进一步探索模型安全恢复的内在机制。

title: The Brøndsted-Rockafellar theorem in geodesic spaces
summary: We present a constructive version of the Brøndsted-Rockafellar theorem in general geodesic metric spaces. Applications include a constructive form of the Caristi theorem and quantitative relations between metric slope error bounds and the global growth of functionals.

AI.tldr: 本文在一般测地度量空间中提出了Brøndsted-Rockafellar定理的构造性版本，并应用于构造性Caristi定理以及度量斜率误差界与泛函全局增长之间的定量关系。
AI.motivation: 将经典的Brøndsted-Rockafellar定理推广到一般测地度量空间，并给出构造性证明，为后续应用提供基础。
AI.method: 采用构造性方法，在测地度量空间中重新构建Brøndsted-Rockafellar定理的证明，并利用该结果推导Caristi定理的构造形式以及度量斜率误差界与泛函全局增长之间的定量关系。
AI.result: 得到了Brøndsted-Rockafellar定理在测地度量空间中的构造性版本，以及Caristi定理的构造形式，并建立了度量斜率误差界与泛函全局增长之间的定量联系。
AI.conclusion: 本文的工作为测地度量空间中的变分分析和优化理论提供了构造性工具，拓展了经典结果的应用范围。

title: Hashprice modulates the electricity demand response of Bitcoin miners
comment: This manuscript has supplementary information in the accompanying PDF
summary: Large, fast-controllable loads such as Bitcoin mining facilities are increasingly viewed as potential sources of flexibility in modern power systems, yet the conditions under which this flexibility is realized remain incompletely understood. Using the Texas power market as an empirical setting, we examine how Bitcoin-mining load responds to two distinct electricity-sector cost channels: contemporaneous wholesale electricity prices and incentives created by coincident-peak-based transmission charges. We find that mining load responds to both cost channels in a manner consistent with miners operating around a breakeven point. At the aggregate level, we observe that mining load decreases as electricity-sector costs rise, but the strength of this response depends on hashprice, a measure of expected mining revenue from the crypto-financial sector. When hashprice is higher, aggregate load responsiveness is weaker. This mechanism is especially evident in the wholesale-price response. Mining load remains largely online at low prices and begins to decline only when electricity costs become large relative to expected mining revenue, with higher hashprice shifting the implied curtailment threshold toward higher wholesale prices. These findings indicate that Bitcoin-mining demand response to electricity-sector costs is economically state-dependent and shaped by revenue conditions in the crypto-financial sector. Treating such loads as stable demand-response resources may therefore overstate available grid flexibility, with implications for power-system planning, market design, and reliability assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文以德州电力市场为实证场景，研究了比特币矿场负荷对批发电价和输电费用两种电力成本渠道的响应，发现其响应行为取决于加密金融端的哈希价格（预期收入），高哈希价格时负荷对电价上涨的敏感度降低，表明比特币挖矿的需求响应具有经济状态依赖性。
AI.motivation: 大型可控负荷（如比特币矿场）被视为现代电力系统的灵活性资源，但其灵活性实现条件尚不完全清晰，需系统理解其响应机制。
AI.method: 以德州电力市场为实证场景，分析比特币矿场负荷对批发电价和基于峰值重合的输电费用两种成本渠道的响应，并引入哈希价格衡量预期挖矿收入。
AI.result: 矿场负荷随电力成本上升而下降，但该响应强度取决于哈希价格：哈希价格越高，负荷对电价上涨的响应越弱。低电价时矿场持续在线，仅在电力成本相对预期收入较大时负荷才开始下降。
AI.conclusion: 比特币挖矿的需求响应具有经济状态依赖性，受到加密金融端收入条件的显著影响。将此类负荷视为稳定的需求响应资源可能高估电网可用灵活性，对电力系统规划、市场设计和可靠性评估具有重要启示。

title: Bitcoin Price Prediction: Peer-Reviewed Evidence and Social Media Discourse
summary: Bitcoin price prediction has attracted hundreds of academic papers and continuous social media debate, yet the field lacks consensus on even basic questions: can any model beat a naive "today's price" baseline at horizons of one to six months? We survey the peer-reviewed landscape, categorize papers by evaluation methodology, and contrast academic findings with informal but substantive discourse on X/Twitter. The picture that emerges is sobering. At short-to-medium horizons, no peer-reviewed study has shown robust superiority over the naive baseline across multiple market regimes. Daily predictability is real but does not extend to hourly or monthly horizons, and may not survive transaction costs. The stock-to-flow model has failed formal out-of-sample testing, and Metcalfe's Law valuations have been challenged as spurious. The Bitcoin price power law, while empirically compelling, has not been subjected to formal distributional tests. Meanwhile, social media practitioners raise valid statistical critiques -- ordinary least squares (OLS) violations, backtest overfitting, spurious regressions -- that the academic literature has not formalized. We identify open research directions and propose concrete methodological standards for future work -- walk-forward evaluation, multi-regime holdout windows, naive baseline comparison, inclusion of zero in hyperparameter grids, and Diebold-Mariano significance testing -- arguing that the field's primary need is not more models but better evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了比特币价格预测领域的学术论文，发现大多数模型在中短期（1-6个月）窗口内未能稳健超越"今日价格"基准。日常可预测性存在，但不扩展到小时或月度周期，且可能无法覆盖交易成本。stock-to-flow模型在正式样本外测试中失败，Metcalfe定律估值被质疑为虚假相关。社交媒体实践者提出的OLS违反、回测过拟合等统计批评尚未被学界正式化。作者提出walk-forward评估、多区间保留、基准比较、零值纳入超参数网格和Diebold-Mariano显著性检验等具体方法论标准。
AI.motivation: 比特币价格预测领域已有大量论文和社交媒体讨论，但缺乏基本共识——没有任何模型能在1-6个月窗口内稳健击败"今日价格"基准。本文旨在系统审视同行评审文献，对比学术发现与非正式但实质性的社交媒体讨论，并识别开放研究方向和提出方法论标准。
AI.method: 对同行评审的比特币价格预测文献进行系统调查，按评估方法学分类，并与X/Twitter上的非正式但实质性讨论进行对比分析。
AI.result: 在中短期窗口内，没有同行评审研究显示出对"今日价格"基准的稳健优越性。日常可预测性存在但并不扩展到小时或月度周期，且可能无法覆盖交易成本。stock-to-flow模型在正式样本外测试中失败；Metcalfe定律估值被挑战为虚假；比特币价格幂律虽经验上引人注目，但未经过正式分布检验。
AI.conclusion: 该领域最主要的不是更多的预测模型，而是更好的评估方法。作者提出walk-forward评估、多区间保留窗口、基准比较、零值纳入超参数网格和Diebold-Mariano显著性检验等具体方法论标准。

title: Interpreting FCDNNs via RG on Exponential Family
summary: We consider establishing the interpretability theory of deep learning through constructing a corresponding relationship between the renormalization group (RG) method in statistical physics and the training process of deep neural networks (DNNs). We have proved the constructed relationship using the one-dimensional Ising model as the input data. In this paper we generalize our results to the case of continuous input data, which is a necessary preparation for applying the corresponding framework to real-world data. To be representative, we consider a class of data distribution in the exponential family. We prove that when the parameters of fully connected (FC) DNNs achieve their optimal value after training, the characteristic parameters of the feature layer output of DNNs are equal to the fixed points of the characteristic parameters of input data under RG method for continuous fields. This conclusion shows that the training process of DNNs is equivalent to RG calculation on this kind of data and therefore the network can extract main features from the input data just like RG. Also, the equivalence further validates the correspondence framework we have established, providing an explanation for the outstanding performance of DNNs on real-world data.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，对于指数族连续输入数据，训练好的全连接DNN特征层输出的特征参数等于RG方法下的不动点，从而建立了DNN训练过程与RG计算的等价性，为深度学习可解释性提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 建立深度学习的可解释性理论，通过将统计物理中的重整化群(RG)方法与深度神经网络(DNN)的训练过程建立对应关系，为DNN在真实数据上的优异表现提供理论解释。
AI.method: 以一维Ising模型为基础，将结果推广到连续输入数据情形；考虑指数族数据分布；证明全连接DNN在最优参数下，特征层输出的特征参数等于连续场RG方法下的不动点。
AI.result: 证明了对于指数族连续数据，训练后的DNN特征层参数与RG方法的不动点相等，验证了DNN训练与RG计算的等价性。
AI.conclusion: DNN训练过程等价于对输入数据进行RG计算，网络能像RG一样从输入数据中提取主要特征；该等价性为建立的对应框架提供了验证，解释了DNN在真实数据上的优异表现。

title: Macro-aware time series forecasting via hierarchical mixed-frequency attention models
summary: Deep learning models show promise in financial forecasting, yet their generalization is often undermined by small datasets, noisy signals, and non-stationarity. While meta-learning and related techniques mitigate some of these issues, they typically do not account for a core limitation in macro-financial prediction: the scarcity of distinct macroeconomic regimes that drive asset returns. We introduce HANET (Hierarchical Attention Network), a hybrid LSTM-based architecture that integrates macroeconomic domain knowledge through attention over long-run macro contexts while preserving high-frequency market dynamics. HANET organizes information in a hierarchical mixed-frequency structure, with daily asset-return signals nested within monthly macroeconomic windows, and introduces a Hierarchical Cross-Attention mechanism that reconciles low-frequency macro signals with high-frequency returns without discarding granular daily information. By framing regime selection as attention over macroeconomic contexts, the model adapts to scarce and shifting regimes. Empirically, across 55 liquid futures spanning multiple asset classes, HANET consistently outperforms neural forecasters that ignore macroeconomic information, particularly during turbulent periods, improving risk-adjusted returns and mitigating losses. Ablation studies show that these gains rely on structured macro conditioning rather than naive feature augmentation: an LSTM with the same macro representation performs poorly, and shuffling macro contexts substantially degrades performance. Finally, HANET provides interpretability through attention weights, highlighting which historical regimes are most influential for each forecast and linking macro conditions to portfolio outcomes. These results establish HANET as a systematic approach to integrating macroeconomic information into attention-based deep learning for financial forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HANET，一种层次化注意力网络，通过将宏观经济知识与高频市场数据在混合频率结构中融合，利用层次化交叉注意力机制解决宏观金融预测中数据稀缺、噪声大和非平稳性等问题。在55种期货上的实验表明，该方法显著优于忽视宏观信息的模型，尤其在市场动荡时期表现突出，并提供了可解释的注意力权重。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习金融预测模型在小样本、噪声信号和非平稳性下泛化能力差，而元学习等方法未能解决宏观金融预测的核心问题——驱动资产回报的不同宏观经济体制的稀缺性。
AI.method: 提出HANET架构：基于LSTM的层次化混合频率结构，将日度资产回报信号嵌套在月度宏观经济窗口内；引入层次化交叉注意力机制，将低频宏观信号与高频回报对齐，通过注意力机制实现体制选择。
AI.result: 在55种流动性期货（涵盖多种资产类别）上，HANET在风险调整回报和减少损失方面持续优于忽略宏观信息的神经预测模型，尤其在市场动荡期间表现更佳；消融实验表明收益来自结构化宏观条件而非简单特征增强。
AI.conclusion: HANET提供了一种将宏观经济信息系统性地整合到基于注意力的深度学习金融预测中的方法，同时具备可解释性，能够揭示对每个预测最有影响的历史体制。

title: Multiplicative Langevin Process for Volatilities Produces Observed Q-Variance Regularities
summary: Q-variance (so-called) posits a statistical relationship $\mathbf{E}(σ^2 | z) = σ_0^2 + \tfrac{1}{2}z^2$ between an asset's volatility $σ^2$, as observed in a time interval $T$, and its (suitably scaled) return $z$ in the same interval. We here show that this relationship is {\em exactly equivalent} to to positing an Inverse Gamma probability distribution for $σ^2$ itself. We then show that such a distribution is exactly generated by a multiplicative Langevin process with an arbitrary, settable coherence time $τ_c$, so that very nearly the same Q-variance relationship will hold for all $T \ll τ_c$.

AI.tldr: 本文证明Q-variance关系（资产收益与波动率的统计关系）等价于波动率服从逆伽马分布，并且可以通过具有可调节相干时间的乘法朗之万过程精确生成，该关系在时间区间远小于相干时间时近似成立。
AI.motivation: 揭示Q-variance这一经验统计关系背后的概率分布基础，并为其提供一个可解释的随机过程生成机制。
AI.method: 通过数学推导证明Q-variance关系与逆伽马分布的等价性，并利用乘法朗之万过程来生成该分布，推导其与观测时间区间T的关系。
AI.result: Q-variance关系等价于波动率服从逆伽马分布；该分布可由具有任意可调相干时间的乘法朗之万过程精确生成；当T远小于相干时间时，Q-variance关系近似成立。
AI.conclusion: Q-variance关系有严格的概率论基础，其背后的逆伽马分布可由一个具有物理意义的随机过程生成，且该关系对时间尺度的适用性由相干时间决定。

title: Contraction Analysis of Time-Delay Systems
summary: In this paper, we investigate contraction analysis for nonlinear time-delay systems described by functional differential equations. We first extend the concept of Lyapunov-Krasovskii functionals within the differential framework. We then show that its existence is equivalent to that of an incremental Lyapunov-Krasovskii functional and guarantees uniform incremental exponential stability. Next, we extend the concept of Lyapunov-Razumikhin functions within the differential framework, whose existence also ensures uniform incremental exponential stability. As an application of our results, we formulate stabilizing feedback control design for nonlinear time-delay systems with single delays in terms of linear matrix inequalities.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非线性时滞系统，在微分框架下扩展了Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函和Lyapunov-Razumikhin函数的概念，证明了它们的存在性等价于一致增量指数稳定性，并应用于单时滞系统的LMI镇定控制设计。
AI.motivation: 非线性时滞系统广泛存在于实际工程中（如网络控制、通信系统等），其稳定性分析具有重要意义。然而，现有的收缩分析（contraction analysis）方法主要针对无时滞系统，缺乏针对时滞系统的系统性理论框架。
AI.method: 1) 在微分框架下扩展Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函概念，建立其与增量Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函的等价性；2) 在微分框架下扩展Lyapunov-Razumikhin函数概念；3) 利用线性矩阵不等式（LMI）将理论结果应用于单时滞系统的镇定反馈控制设计。
AI.result: 证明了微分Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函和微分Lyapunov-Razumikhin函数的存在性均能保证系统的一致增量指数稳定性；基于此推导出以LMI形式表达的镇定控制律设计条件。
AI.conclusion: 成功将收缩分析理论从无时滞系统推广到非线性时滞系统，建立了微分Lyapunov方法与时滞系统稳定性分析之间的桥梁，并提供了可计算的控制设计工具。

title: DraDDP: A Multimodal Multi-Party Dialogue Discourse Parsing Dataset
summary: Multi-party dialogue discourse parsing aims to identify dependency structures and relation types between utterances in conversations. Previous studies are mostly limited to textual modality or two-party dialogue, failing to meet the multimodal and multi-party settings. In this paper, we construct the first publicly available English multimodal dataset DraDDP for multi-party dialogue discourse parsing, based on American TV dramas. DraDDP contains 495 dialogue segments with 6,374 utterances and 9.1 hours of parallel video content, covering rich multi-party interaction scenarios. Moreover, we establish comprehensive benchmarks by evaluating this task on DraDDP and conducting in-depth analysis on the impact of different modalities. Experimental results demonstrate the value of multimodal information in capturing dialogue structures and relation types. We will publicly release the dataset, annotation guidelines, and code to promote future research in multimodal dialogue understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了首个多模态多人对话语篇解析数据集DraDDP（基于美剧），并验证了多模态信息对捕捉对话结构和关系类型的价值。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多局限于文本模态或两人对话，无法满足多模态和多人对话场景的需求，缺乏公开的多模态多人对话语篇解析数据集。
AI.method: 基于美国电视剧构建包含495个对话片段、6,374条话语和9.1小时平行视频的DraDDP数据集，并在该数据集上进行多模态基准评估与分析。
AI.result: 实验结果表明多模态信息在捕捉对话结构和关系类型方面具有显著价值。
AI.conclusion: 多模态信息有助于多人对话语篇解析任务，数据集和代码将公开以推动领域研究。

title: Position Paper: Post-Solve Robustness in Decision Engines: Feasible Regions and Smoothness Under Perturbations
summary: Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) decision engines routinely output nominally optimal plans for high-stakes industrial systems. Yet deployment rarely matches solve-time assumptions: small perturbations in costs, demands, or resource availability can invalidate feasibility or trigger discontinuous shifts to qualitatively different solutions. We argue that this post-solve robustness gap is a missing layer in today's optimization pipelines and a missing evaluation dimension for learning-enabled decision systems. Rather than replacing robust optimization or stochastic programming, the proposed layer audits a solved incumbent and returns solver-backed evidence about how far that solution can be trusted. We formalize two central objects: (i) an $ε$-near-optimal feasible neighborhood in parameter space, capturing when an incumbent remains feasible and near-optimal under perturbations, and (ii) solution smoothness in decision space, capturing whether nearby alternatives with small combinatorial edits remain competitive. We then synthesize the most relevant partial answers from sensitivity and stability analysis, robust optimization, neighborhood search, adversarial testing, and learning-based enhancements, and articulate an agenda for a unified post-solve robustness layer. Concretely, we call for certified inner approximations around the incumbent, probabilistic robustness estimation with calibrated uncertainty, adversarial robustness margins, and learning-based prediction and explanation aligned with solver-backed verification. We conclude with a compact reporting template and evaluation protocol that would make robustness a first-class output of decision engines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在MILP求解后增加鲁棒性审计层的框架，通过形式化ε-近优可行邻域和解平滑度两个核心概念，整合敏感性分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索等方法，使鲁棒性成为决策引擎的一等输出。
AI.motivation: 当前MILP求解器输出的名义最优解在实际部署中常因参数微小扰动（成本、需求、资源等）而失效或跳变至完全不同的解，存在"求解后鲁棒性鸿沟"，而现有优化管线缺少对这一问题的系统性评估与保障机制。
AI.method: 提出统一的后求解鲁棒性层：(i)形式化ε-近优可行邻域(参数空间)和决策空间的解平滑度；(ii)整合敏感性分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索、对抗测试、学习增强等方法；(iii)提出认证内逼近、概率鲁棒性估计、对抗鲁棒性边界、基于学习的预测与解释四大技术路线。
AI.result: 给出了紧凑的报告模板和评估协议，使鲁棒性成为决策引擎的一等输出，但本文是前瞻性议程综述，缺乏具体实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 求解后的鲁棒性审计层是当前优化管线中缺失的关键环节，应作为学习驱动决策系统的评估新维度，未来需统一认证内逼近、概率估计、对抗测试和学习增强等方法，实现可信任的工业决策。

title: BitsMoE: Efficient Spectral Energy-Guided Bit Allocation for MoE LLM Quantization
comment: 29 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables. Code and models are available at https://github.com/zjiayu064/BitsMoE
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language models reduce per-token computation through sparse expert activation, but their deployment remains memory-intensive because all expert weights must be kept resident in memory. Existing MoE compression methods struggle in the ultra-low-bit regime: pruning irreversibly removes model capacity, while coarse-grained quantization fails to allocate bits according to heterogeneous expert and weight-direction importance. We propose BitsMoE, a spectral-energy-guided bit-allocation framework for MoE LLM quantization. BitsMoE decomposes each MoE layer by SVD into a shared basis and expert-specific spectral factors, retaining the shared basis without quantization to preserve common cross-expert structure and using the expert-specific factors as fine-grained quantization units. To determine the bit-width of each unit, BitsMoE formulates spectrum-wise mixed-precision quantization as an activation-aware reconstruction surrogate and solves an integer linear program that minimizes estimated reconstruction loss under a fixed bit budget. Experiments across multiple MoE LLMs show that BitsMoE substantially reduces downstream task accuracy degradation in ultra-low-bit regimes. Under 2-bit quantization on Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base, BitsMoE accelerates quantization by 12.3$\times$, improves average accuracy by 27.83 percentage points, and increases decoding speed by 1.76$\times$ over GPTQ. Our model and code are publicly available at https://github.com/zjiayu064/BitsMoE.

AI.tldr: BitsMoE 提出了一种基于谱能量引导的位分配框架，通过SVD分解将MoE层拆分为共享基（不量化）和专家特定谱因子（作为细粒度量化单元），并利用整数线性规划在固定位预算下最小化估计重构损失，在超低位宽场景下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE模型部署内存消耗大，已有的压缩方法（剪枝、粗粒度量化）在超低位宽场景下效果不佳，无法根据专家和权重方向的重要性异质性分配位宽。
AI.method: 1) 对每个MoE层进行SVD分解，得到共享基（不量化保留跨专家共同结构）和专家特定谱因子（作为细粒度量化单元）；2) 将谱感知混合精度量化建模为激活感知的重建代理问题；3) 通过整数线性规划在固定位预算下最小化估计重构损失来确定每个单元的位宽。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base上2-bit量化：量化加速12.3倍，平均准确率提升27.83个百分点，解码速度提升1.76倍（对比GPTQ）。
AI.conclusion: BitsMoE通过谱能量引导的位分配策略，有效解决了MoE模型在超低位宽量化中的性能退化问题，实现了精度与效率的更好权衡。

title: Post Selection Estimation of Sharpe Ratios
summary: We consider the problem of estimating the true Sharpe ratio of an asset selected for having the highest observed in-sample Sharpe ratio among many assets. We discuss estimators based on the polyhedral lemma, James Stein shrinkage, debiasing the expected maximum Sharpe ratio, thresholding and empirical Bayes. We test these estimators in simulations, computing bias and root mean square error across different values of sample size, number of assets, and spread and shape of population Sharpe ratios. We also compute rank correlation of the estimators against the underlying quantity, simulating how these estimators might be used to compare or rank the output of different teams which perform this selection process. We find that the James Stein estimator provides the best performance across many different realistic values of the relevant parameters, followed by the GMLEB estimator of Jiang and Zhang. These results are fairly robust to correlation of asset returns, with some caveats.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何估计从众多资产中选出的最高样本夏普比率所对应的真实夏普比率，比较了多种估计方法，发现James Stein估计器在多种现实参数下表现最佳，其次是GMLEB估计器。
AI.motivation: 在金融实践中，人们常从大量资产中选出历史表现最好的资产，但其样本内最高夏普比率存在严重的向上偏差（选择偏差），导致对真实夏普比率的高估。本文旨在找到纠正该偏差的最佳估计方法。
AI.method: 作者比较了基于多面体引理、James Stein收缩、期望最大夏普比率去偏、阈值法和经验贝叶斯（包括GMLEB）等多种估计器，通过模拟实验在不同样本量、资产数量、总体夏普比率分布及相关性下评估偏差和均方根误差。
AI.result: James Stein估计器在多种参数设定下表现最佳，GMLEB估计器次之。这些结果在资产收益率存在相关性时仍然较为稳健（存在一定限制条件）。
AI.conclusion: 对于从大量资产中选取最高夏普比率时的选择偏差纠正问题，James Stein方法是最优的实用选择，其次是经验贝叶斯方法。相关性对结果有一定影响但总体稳健。

title: A phenomenon of AI-conformity: how algorithms change human moral decision-making
summary: Social conformity is a well-documented phenomenon in which individuals shift their opinions towards those of a social majority. As artificial intelligence (AI) becomes increasingly integrated into everyday life it may also create a novel source of influence giving rise to algorithmic conformity, mechanisms of which are poorly understood. The present study examined whether AI judgements affect moral decision-making in humans (n=165) adapting the classical Asch paradigm. Participants completed a series of moral dilemmas under three different conditions: in presence of social majority, with an AI model providing brief answers and with an AI model providing both answers and explanations of its choices. In all conditions the presented responses contradicted generally accepted moral norms. The results indicated that an AI model with a reasoning component affected the opinion of participants to a degree comparable to that of a human majority. These findings suggest that even moral judgements, despite their sensitivity and personal significance, may be susceptible to algorithmic conformity. However, the mechanism underlying algorithmic conformity appears to differ from the social one. Overall, the study challenges the assumption that moral decision-making lies in "AI inadmissibility zone" - a sphere that is considered as an area in which only human-made decisions are acceptable and highlights the need for a further investigation of this phenomenon as AI-based recommendations become increasingly embedded into human decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本研究改编经典阿希范式，发现AI（尤其带解释的AI）对人类道德判断的影响程度与人类多数意见相当，表明道德决策也会受到算法从众的影响，且其机制与社会从众不同。
AI.motivation: 探究AI作为新型影响源是否会导致"算法从众"现象，尤其是AI的判断是否会影响人类的道德决策——这一通常被认为应属于"AI不可介入区"的敏感领域。
AI.method: 招募165名被试，呈现一系列道德两难困境，设置三种条件：（1）有社会多数意见在场；（2）AI模型仅提供简短回答；（3）AI模型同时提供回答和推理解释。所有条件下，呈现的回答均与社会公认道德规范相悖。
AI.result: 带有推理成分的AI模型对参与者意见的影响程度与人类多数意见的影响相当。
AI.conclusion: 道德判断也可能受到算法从众的影响，但底层机制与社会从众不同；挑战了道德决策属于"AI不可介入区"的假设，需进一步研究这一现象。

title: Clustering-enhanced adaptive Benders decomposition for energy systems planning optimization
summary: High-resolution energy system capacity expansion models (CEMs) for energy transition planning often result in large-scale mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) formulations. Benders decomposition (BD) offers a scalable solution approach by iteratively solving a master problem (MP) for investment decisions and multiple subproblems (SPs) for operational decisions. However, accumulated Benders cuts generated by the SPs can make MP solution a major computational bottleneck. Incomplete SP parallelization can also introduce further bottlenecks when SPs exceed available CPUs. We develop clustering-enhanced BD methods to address these challenges, by using clustering to group similar SPs for: a) aggregated Benders cut construction and b) identification of representative SPs to be solved most frequently. For grouped-cuts, we examine two adaptive formulations based on dual variables and a fixed-grouping formulation based on exogenous time-series inputs. We evaluate these methods in an electricity-sector CEM across varying system sizes, temporal SP lengths, inter-SP coupling strengths represented by CO2 policy, computational resources, and stochastic settings. Relative to a benchmark regularized multi-cut formulation, adaptive grouped cuts outperform fixed grouping and provide substantial benefits under weak inter-temporal coupling. The largest gains occur in larger systems with shorter SP horizons, where the MP accounts for a greater share of runtime. Their effectiveness declines under strong inter-temporal coupling, such as annual CO2 emissions limits, where the benchmark multi-cut performs best. The representative-SP method outperforms the benchmark under limited parallelization when SP solution dominates runtime. Overall, the preferred BD strategy depends on inter-SP coupling strength and whether computational burden lies in the MP or the SPs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于聚类的Benders分解增强方法，通过将相似子问题聚类来构建聚合Benders割或识别代表性子问题，从而解决高分辨率能源系统容量扩展模型中Benders分解的计算瓶颈问题。实验表明，自适应分组割在弱耦合条件下优势明显，代表性子问题方法在并行资源有限时效果最佳，最优策略取决于耦合强度与计算瓶颈位置。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率能源系统容量扩展模型(CEM)常导致大规模混合整数线性规划(MILP)问题。Benders分解虽提供可扩展方案，但累积的Benders割使主问题成为计算瓶颈，且子问题并行化不充分时也会产生瓶颈。作者旨在通过聚类技术解决这两类计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出两种聚类增强的Benders分解方法：(1) 聚类相似子问题构建聚合Benders割（含自适应分组和固定分组两种变体）；(2) 识别代表性子问题以优先求解。在电力系统CEM中评估不同系统规模、子问题时间长度、耦合强度（CO2政策）、计算资源和随机设置下的性能。
AI.result: 自适应分组割优于固定分组，在弱时间耦合下收益显著。大规模系统+短子问题周期时MP占主导，分组割效果最佳。强耦合（如年度CO2排放限制）下，标准多割法表现最好。代表性子问题法在并行资源有限时超越基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 最优BD策略取决于子问题间耦合强度以及计算瓶颈位于主问题还是子问题，为能源系统规划中的Benders分解应用提供了选择指导。

title: Certificates without Electrons? Theory and Evidence on Impacts from AI-Driven Power Demand
summary: Data centers now account for 4.4% of United States electricity demand, yet the grid-level effectiveness of the renewable energy certificates (RECs) and power purchase agreements (PPAs) hyperscalers use to claim carbon neutrality remains unclear. We develop a game-theoretic model in which a data center operator chooses among RECs, PPAs, and behind-the-meter colocation while generators make entry decisions under endogenous financing costs. The model identifies a timing wedge -- the mismatch between consumption and credited renewable generation -- as a central mechanism through which AI demand degrades reliability, raises prices, and increases emissions even when RECs cover 100% of annual consumption. Colocation with storage addresses this wedge directly and induces the greatest renewable entry by eliminating generator revenue risk. We test these predictions by exploiting the staggered release of large language models as a natural experiment, using difference-in-differences on a novel dataset linking AI activity to local grid outcomes. AI demand significantly increases fossil generation, wholesale prices (up to 25% in treated PJM zones), and outage frequency (0.5--1 additional outages per year) near data centers, with impacts scaling in model size. Data centers with on-site generation exhibit a sign reversal in power-quality effects, consistent with the model's prediction that behind-the-meter capacity absorbs demand spikes. Counterfactual analyses show that edge inference, spatial reallocation, and colocated storage each substantially mitigate grid impacts, while REC-only strategies do not. Together, our results demonstrate that the externalities of AI to the grid are tightly coupled to procurement design and the spatial organization of data center infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文通过博弈论模型和自然实验方法，揭示了数据中心使用可再生能源证书（RECs）和购电协议（PPAs）宣称碳中和的局限性，指出这些方式存在"时间错配"问题，无法有效缓解AI负载对电网的冲击；而共置储能、边缘推理等策略能显著降低负面影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管超大规模云服务商通过RECs和PPAs宣称碳中和，但它们在电网层面的实际有效性尚不清楚，尤其在高能耗AI需求激增的背景下，迫切需要评估这些碳中和方法对电网可靠性、电价和排放的真实影响。
AI.method: 构建博弈论模型（数据中心运营商在RECs、PPAs和共置储能之间选择，发电商在内生融资成本下做出进入决策），并利用大语言模型分阶段发布作为自然实验，采用双重差分法对AI活动与地方电网结果数据进行分析。
AI.result: AI需求显著增加了化石燃料发电量、批发电价（处理后的PJM区域最高上涨25%）和停电频率（每年增加0.5-1次）；拥有现场发电的数据中心在电能质量效应上出现符号逆转；共置储能、边缘推理和空间再分配能大幅缓解电网影响，而仅靠RECs策略无效。
AI.conclusion: AI对电网的外部性与采购设计及数据中心基础设施的空间组织密切相关，仅依赖RECs无法解决AI带来的电网问题，需要采取共置储能等实质性措施。

title: Auditing Asset-Specific Preferences in Financial Large Language Models: Evidence from Bitcoin Representations and Portfolio Allocation
summary:
Large language models now power robo-advisors and trading agents, yet whether they carry built-in biases toward specific assets is largely untested. We ask three questions: do LLMs systematically prefer certain financial instruments; can an internal representation with causal leverage over those preferences be identified; and does that representation affect downstream financial decisions?
  We develop a three-level audit protocol and apply it to Bitcoin. First, a behavioral audit of eight frontier LLMs shows that Bitcoin's ranking among money-like instruments is frame-dependent: models place it around rank 5 of 8 as "reliable money" but near the top under crisis and autonomous-agent frames, and an attribute-swap experiment confirms rankings track functional properties, not names. Second, we open a model's internals: a search across thousands of sparse-autoencoder features in Gemma 3 identifies a dominant Bitcoin-selective feature. Amplifying it shifts the model toward the asset and suppressing it shifts the model away, even when "Bitcoin" never appears in the prompt. Third, we test financial consequences: amplification raises Bitcoin's portfolio share by 5.2 percentage points while suppression lowers it by 4.6 pp, with amplification reallocating within crypto and suppression cutting total crypto exposure.
  We characterize this as bounded behavioral leverage (leverage meaning causal influence over outputs, not financial leverage): an identifiable internal feature can be perturbed to move financial choices, but only within measurable limits. The framework links internal representations to external recommendations, validated with random controls and mechanism boundaries. As LLMs become autonomous financial agents, this is a first step toward a behavioral layer for emerging know-your-agent (KYA) standards: knowing what an agent prefers, and how far that preference can be moved.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大型语言模型对比特币存在内置偏好，该偏好由模型内部一个可识别的稀疏自编码器特征驱动，通过放大或抑制该特征可以显著影响模型的投资组合分配决策（幅度约5个百分点），但影响存在可测量的边界。研究为"了解你的智能体"标准提供了首个行为层分析框架。
AI.motivation: LLM正被用于智能投顾和交易代理，但它们是否对特定资产存在系统性内置偏好尚不清楚。作者希望验证：LLM是否偏好某些金融工具、能否定位模型内部对此偏好的因果表征、以及该表征是否影响下游金融决策。
AI.method: 三层次审计协议：(1)行为层——对8个前沿LLM进行比特币偏好行为审计，包含框架依赖测试和属性交换实验；(2)内部表征层——在Gemma 3中搜索数千个稀疏自编码器特征，找到主导性的比特币选择特征，并通过放大/抑制进行因果验证；(3)金融后果层——测试该特征扰动如何影响投资组合中比特币的配置比例。
AI.result: 比特币排名具有框架依赖性（"可靠货币"框架下排第5/8，危机和自主代理框架下排名靠前）；识别出一个比特币选择性特征；放大该特征使比特币投资组合份额增加5.2个百分点，抑制则降低4.6个百分点，且放大效应限于加密货币内部重新分配，抑制效应则削减整体加密敞口。
AI.conclusion: LLM存在可被因果识别的内置资产偏好（"有界行为杠杆"），该偏好可被操控但存在可测量边界。该框架为新兴的"了解你的智能体"标准提供了将内部表征与外部推荐行为联系起来的方法，对LLM作为自主金融代理的监管具有重要意义。

title: Out-of-Distribution generalization of quantile regression with heavy tailed inputs: an SVM approach
summary:
We study quantile regression in an extrapolation regime where the covariate takes unusually large values. Under regular variation assumptions, extreme observations can be effectively characterized through their angular components, enabling learning strategies that focus on the angle of the most extreme observations. This approach is formalized through the minimization of an asymptotic conditional risk that localizes learning in the tail of the covariate distribution.
  We propose a novel Support Vector Machine (SVM) framework for extreme quantile regression, leveraging reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces to handle high-dimensional and nonlinear settings. Our method also accommodates unbounded response variables and avoids restrictive transformations. We establish finite-sample learning guarantees under mild regularity assumptions.
  The proposed framework unifies ideas from statistical learning and multivariate extremes, providing a tractable and theoretically grounded approach to extrapolation. We complement our theoretical findings with an empirical study on river flow data from the Danube, demonstrating the practical relevance of our methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SVM的极值分位数回归框架，利用再生核希尔伯特空间在高维和非线性设定下进行外推学习，并通过协变量尾部角度信息实现极端分位数估计，在理论上提供了有限样本保证，在多瑙河河流数据上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统分位数回归在协变量取极端值（外推场景）时表现不佳，而现有的极值方法往往对响应变量有严格的分布假设或需要单调变换。作者希望结合统计学习与多元极值理论，提出一个能在高维、非线性、响应变量无界场景下有效进行极端分位数回归的通用框架。
AI.method: 在正则变化假设下，通过协变量的角度分量刻画极端观测；将极端分位数回归转化为尾部条件风险的渐近最小化问题；基于再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）构建支持向量机（SVM）框架，使得该方法能处理高维和非线性问题，且无需对响应变量做有界或单调变换限制。
AI.result: 在温和的正则性假设下建立了有限样本学习保证；在多瑙河河流流量数据集上进行了实证研究，展示了所提方法在实际应用中的良好表现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作统一了统计学习与多元极值理论的思想，为极端分位数回归提供了一个可计算且理论完备的外推学习方案。

title: A Per-Component Diagnostic Protocol for Neural HJB-PIDE Solvers under Control-Dependent Lévy Jumps
summary: We propose a five-step diagnostic protocol for residual-trained neural HJB-PIDE solvers with control-dependent Lévy jumps, targeting a general failure mode of neural PDE methods: a learned solution can match headline scalar diagnostics while miscomputing an operator inside its training loss. The protocol pairs each neural solve with at least one from-scratch independent reference, decomposes the Hamiltonian into drift, diffusion, compensator, and nonlocal-integral components across a u-grid, and compares the value function and its low-order derivatives over a (t,x) grid before any argmax comparison. Applied to a standard CRRA-Merton-Variance-Gamma benchmark, it isolates a missing 1/2-mixture factor in the neural method's importance-proposal density that scaled the nonlocal integral by exactly half - a textbook signature of a constant proposal scale error, invisible to longer training, grid refinement, and truncation sweeps. With the bug corrected, four references - two finite-difference solvers with disjoint discretizations, the neural solver, and a semi-analytic scalar baseline obtained from CRRA homogeneity - agree on the optimal control to within ~2%. The constant-coefficient CRRA benchmark collapses by homogeneity to a scalar maximization, so the scalar baseline is the efficient method here; the contribution is the protocol, applicable in principle to non-homogeneous and higher-dimensional settings where neural HJB-PIDE solvers are genuinely needed. The episode is a concrete instance of a broader neural-PDE verification failure: pointwise agreement of a learned value or control can coexist with a systematically wrong nonlocal operator, so per-component and surface-level checks are needed before trusting the argmax policy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个五步诊断协议，用于检测残差训练神经HJB-PIDE求解器中的控制依赖Lévy跳跃问题。该协议能发现神经网络求解器在学习价值函数时隐藏的算子计算错误（如非局部积分缩放因子错误），即使标量诊断指标看似正常。通过CRRA-Merton-Variance-Gamma基准测试验证，修复错误后四种独立求解器在最优控制上一致到~2%。核心贡献是诊断协议本身，而非特定求解器。
AI.motivation: 神经PDE方法存在一种通用故障模式：学习到的解可能在标量诊断指标上表现良好，但损失函数内部的算子计算却是错误的。这种错误在传统验证手段（延长训练、网格细化等）下无法被发现，需要系统性的诊断协议来识别。
AI.method: 五步诊断协议：(1) 每次神经求解至少配对一个独立从头计算的参考解；(2) 将Hamiltonian分解为漂移、扩散、补偿和非局部积分四个分量，在u网格上评估；(3) 在(t,x)网格上比较值函数及其低阶导数；(4) 在argmax比较之前完成以上检查；(5) 通过CRRA-Merton-Variance-Gamma基准测试验证，发现神经方法的重要性提议密度缺失1/2混合因子导致非局部积分缩放错误。
AI.result: 诊断协议成功识别出神经求解器中隐藏的常数提议尺度错误（缺失1/2因子）。修复后，四种独立求解器（两个不同离散化的有限差分求解器、神经求解器、基于CRRA齐次性的半解析标量基线）在最优控制上一致到约2%。
AI.conclusion: 神经PDE验证存在更广泛的失败模式：学习到的价值函数或控制可以在点上相符，但非局部算子可能系统性错误。因此，在信任argmax策略之前，需要进行逐分量和表面级别的检查。该诊断协议原则上可推广到非齐次和高维设置，这正是神经HJB-PIDE求解器真正需要的场景。

title: VIX options in Bergomi models
summary: We present a study of the leading-order asymptotics for VIX option prices in Bergomi models in the short-maturity and small volatility-of-volatility regimes. Both out-of-the-money (OTM) and at-the-money (ATM) asymptotics are considered for one-factor, two-factor Bergomi and $N$-factor models. The leading-order asymptotics are obtained in closed-form, which are translated into predictions for the small-maturity asymptotics of the VIX implied volatility. Numerical illustrations are provided to illustrate the efficiency of the closed-form asymptotic formulas.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Bergomi模型中VIX期权价格在短期限和小波动率波动率条件下的渐近行为，给出了单因子、双因子和多因子模型的闭式渐近解，并验证了数值有效性。
AI.motivation: 填补Bergomi模型下VIX期权定价在短期限和小波动率波动率联合渐近分析方面的理论空白，为隐含波动率曲面提供解析预测。
AI.method: 采用领先阶渐近展开方法，分别分析OTM和ATM情形下的VIX期权价格，推导出闭式渐近公式，并展示数值算例验证精度。
AI.result: 给出了单因子、双因子及N因子Bergomi模型下VIX期权价格和隐含波动率的领先阶闭式渐近表达式，数值结果证明了公式的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的闭式渐近公式能够高效预测VIX隐含波动率的短期行为，为实际定价和风险管理提供理论依据。

title: Predicted-Flow Control Barrier Functions for Real-Time Safe Optimal Control
summary: Control barrier functions (CBFs) provide real-time safety guarantees through pointwise conditions on the state. However, synthesizing a valid CBF is difficult and the resulting controllers are myopic. To address myopia, this article introduces predicted-flow control barrier functions (P-CBFs), which generalize the CBF from a function of the current state to a functional of a predicted flow under a parametrized control plan over a finite prediction horizon. For safety, a P-CBF can certify that the predicted flow is in a safe set over the entire prediction horizon. However, candidate P-CBFs suffer from the same challenge as candidate CBFs, namely, control constraints make it difficult to guarantee that the P-CBF is valid. This article resolves this challenge by introducing a terminal candidate P-CBF requiring that the predicted flow end in a backup safe set at the terminal time, and a planning-time shift that modulates the prediction horizon, providing an additional degree of freedom to ensure feasibility. The real-time control and the evolution of the control-plan parameter and planning-time shift are determined jointly by a single convex optimization that is guaranteed to be feasible and renders the associated safe set forward invariant. The resulting safe optimal flow control provides a safety certificate over the entire prediction horizon and unifies finite-horizon integral-cost optimization with safety certification. This optimization reduces to a quadratic program (QP) if the control constraints are a convex polytope. The QP implementation, termed FlowBarrier, is validated on a nonholonomic ground robot navigating a dense environment. FlowBarrier is compared to nonlinear model predictive control and two CBF-based safety filter methods across 100 trials, where FlowBarrier achieves the highest goal-reaching rate, zero safety violations, and the lowest computation time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出预测流控制屏障函数(P-CBFs)，通过将CBF从当前状态函数推广到预测流泛函，结合终端候选P-CBF和规划时间偏移，实现安全最优流控制。该方法通过单一凸优化保证可行性和前向不变性，在非完整地面机器人导航中实现零安全违规、最高目标达成率和最低计算时间。
AI.motivation: 传统CBF合成困难且控制器短视(仅关注当前状态)，无法考虑未来预测轨迹的安全性，需要一种能提供预测时域内安全保证的方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出P-CBF将CBF从当前状态函数扩展为预测流泛函；2) 引入终端候选P-CBF要求预测流终点落在备份安全集内；3) 引入规划时间偏移调节预测时域；4) 将实时控制、控制参数和规划时间偏移联合优化为一个凸优化问题(控制约束为凸多面体时简化为QP)。
AI.result: 在非完整地面机器人导航的100次试验中，FlowBarrier相比非线性MPC和两种CBF安全滤波方法，实现了最高的目标达成率、零安全违规和最低计算时间。
AI.conclusion: P-CBF框架统一了有限时域积分成本优化与安全认证，通过凸优化保证可行性，为预测时域内提供完整的安全证书，兼顾了安全性与前瞻性。

title: Toward Robust In-Context Learning: Leveraging Out-of-distribution Proxies for Target Inaccessible Demonstration Retrieval
summary: Although studies have demonstrated that Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform well on Out-of-Distribution (OOD) tasks, their advantage tends to diminish as the distribution shift becomes more severe. Consequently, researchers aim to retrieve distributionally similar and informative demonstrations from the available source domain to boost the inference capabilities of LLMs. However, in practical scenarios where the target domain is inaccessible, evaluating the unknown distribution is challenging, which indirectly impacts the quality of the selected demonstrations. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{DOPA}, a demonstration search framework that incorporates an OOD proxy to approximate the inaccessible target domain and guide the retrieval process. Building on proxy-based evaluation, DOPA further introduces a Mahalanobis distance-based global diversity constraint to ensure sufficient diversity among the retrieved demonstrations. Experimental results on multiple LLMs and tasks demonstrate that DOPA effectively enhances robustness in OOD settings\footnote{https://github.com/bort64/ood\_code}.

AI.tldr: 提出DOPA框架，通过OOD代理近似不可访问的目标域来检索分布相似且多样化的示例，提升LLM在分布偏移场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示LLM在OOD任务上表现良好，但分布偏移严重时优势减弱。实际场景中目标域不可访问，难以评估未知分布，影响示例检索质量。
AI.method: 提出DOPA框架，引入OOD代理（Proxy）近似目标域指导检索，并加入基于马氏距离的全局多样性约束，确保检索示例的多样性。
AI.result: 在多个LLM和任务上实验，DOPA有效增强了OOD场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DOPA通过代理评估和多样性约束，提升了LLM在目标域不可见时的分布外泛化能力。

title: Emergent Collaborative Deliberation in Multi-Model AI Systems: A BFT-Derived Protocol for Epistemic Synthesis
summary: We present the Consilium Protocol, a Byzantine Fault Tolerance-derived architecture for structured multi-model AI deliberation that treats inter-model disagreement as epistemic signal rather than error. The protocol assigns engineered cognitive personas to language models -- separating what a model is from how it reasons -- and introduces an In-Sample/Out-of-Sample validation framework adapted from quantitative finance to distinguish training-data consensus from empirically grounded conclusions. Across 1,478 deliberation sessions spanning 32 topics in 10 domain categories, we demonstrate that (1) the cognitive persona, not the underlying model, determines epistemic behavior: free edge-inference models costing 0.0002 USD per batch produced comparable analytical output to frontier models costing 10.69 USD; (2) RLHF alignment training creates measurable, domain-specific epistemic blind spots -- contested policy topics exhibit 12.3 percentage points less adversarial challenge than settled science topics, and AI safety topics show asymmetric bias ($Δ$=11.6%) where models challenge claims that AI is dangerous far more vigorously than claims that AI risk is overstated; (3) the protocol exhibits no directional bias of its own (immigration $Δ$=2.3%, renewables $Δ$=1.2%); and (4) out-of-sample evidence retrieval validated 239 claims with 100% evidence retrieval and surfaced 167 blind-spot discoveries invisible to training-data deliberation. Run-to-run reproducibility across randomized model$\times$persona assignments averages $\pm$2.2% standard deviation. Total cost for the complete battery including all overhead: 217 USD. We release the protocol specification under MIT license to enable independent verification.

AI.tldr: Consilium协议是一种基于拜占庭容错的架构，通过赋予语言模型认知人格并将模型本身与推理方式分离，实现结构化多模型AI deliberation。实验表明：认知人格而非底层模型决定认知行为，RLHF校准产生领域特定的认知盲点，协议本身无方向性偏差，且样本外证据检索可发现训练数据无法揭示的盲点。全部实验成本仅217美元。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统在跨模型协作时往往将模型间的分歧视为错误或噪声，缺乏系统性的方法将分歧转化为有意义的认知信号。同时，RLHF校准可能导致模型在某些领域产生系统性认知偏差，需要一个框架来识别和量化这些偏差。
AI.method: 提出Consilium Protocol，采用拜占庭容错衍生架构进行多模型AI deliberation；为语言模型分配认知人格（将模型与推理方式解耦）；引入从量化金融领域改编的In-Sample/Out-of-Sample验证框架，区分训练数据共识与实证结论。
AI.result: (1) 成本仅0.0002美元/批的边缘模型与成本10.69美元的顶级模型分析质量相当；(2) RLHF校准在争议政策话题上比既定科学话题的对抗性挑战少12.3个百分点，AI安全话题存在11.6%的不对称偏差；(3) 协议本身无方向性偏差；(4) 样本外证据检索100%验证239项主张，发现167个训练数据无法揭示的盲点；运行间标准差±2.2%；总成本217美元。
AI.conclusion: Consilium Protocol提供了一种低成本、可复现的框架，能够系统性地识别AI模型的认知偏差，将模型间分歧转化为有价值的认知信号，并通过MIT开源协议促进独立验证。

title: DAStatFormer: A Hybrid Multibranch Transformer with Statistical Feature Integration for DAS-Based Pattern Recognitions
summary: Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS) enables large-scale monitoring through optical fibers, but its high dimensionality and complex spatio-temporal patterns make event classification demanding. Existing deep learning approaches-CNNs, recurrent models, and Transformer variants-either fail to capture long-range dependencies or require processing raw DAS matrices at prohibitive cost. We propose DAStatFormer, a hybrid multibranch Transformer that combines compact multidomain statistical features with Gated Transformer Networks. Instead of raw signals, we extract 24 ANOVA-selected attributes per channel from the temporal, waveform, and spectral domains, reducing data size by orders of magnitude while preserving discriminative information. Each domain is processed via dedicated step-wise and channel-wise attention branches, fused by an adaptive gating mechanism. Experiments on the open $Φ$-OTDR benchmark and a real-scenario DAS dataset show that DAS-tatFormer achieves up to 99.4% accuracy and near-perfect real-world performance, while using significantly fewer parameters and lower inference cost than models such as DASFormer and DeepViT. These results demonstrate its suitability for scalable, real-time DAS-based monitoring. We release our code at https://github.com/MichelD-git/DAStatFormer

AI.tldr: DAStatFormer是一种混合多分支Transformer，通过提取多域统计特征（时域、波形、频谱）替代原始DAS信号，结合门控注意力机制，实现高效高精度的分布式声学传感事件分类，在公开数据集上达到99.4%准确率，显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: DAS数据维度高、时空模式复杂，现有深度学习方法（CNN、RNN、Transformer变体）要么无法捕捉长程依赖，要么处理原始DAS矩阵计算成本过高，亟需一种既能保持高判别性又大幅降低数据规模的轻量级方案。
AI.method: 提出DAStatFormer混合多分支Transformer架构：(1) 从时域、波形域、频谱域提取24个ANOVA选择的统计特征，替代原始DAS信号；(2) 每个域通过专用的逐步注意力（step-wise）和逐通道注意力（channel-wise）分支处理；(3) 采用自适应门控机制融合多域特征。
AI.result: 在公开Φ-OTDR基准和真实场景DAS数据集上，DAStatFormer达到99.4%准确率，真实场景表现接近完美；相比DASFormer、DeepViT等模型，参数量和推理成本显著更低。
AI.conclusion: DAStatFormer证明了统计特征替代原始信号与门控Transformer结合的有效性，为可扩展、实时的DAS监测提供了可行的轻量级解决方案。

title: Boom, Bubble, or Buildout? A Multi-Method Evaluation of Whether Artificial Intelligence Is in an Ongoing Financial Bubble
summary: The rapid expansion of artificial intelligence (AI) investment has revived a recurrent question in financial economics: are AI-related assets experiencing a bubble, or is the market capitaliz- ing a durable general-purpose technology? This paper develops a hybrid review and diagnostic framework for evaluating whether AI is in an ongoing financial bubble as of May 2026. The analysis begins from asset-pricing foundations in state prices, stochastic discount factors, martingale valuation, and pricing kernels, then connects these foundations to rational bubbles, behavioral bubbles, technology manias, and modern econometric bubble-detection methods. Current evidence shows both genuine fundamentals and bubble-like fragilities. On the fundamental side, realized revenue growth, enterprise adoption, and productivity evidence support a nontrivial share of AI valuations. On the fragile side, capital expenditure has accelerated faster than observed monetization in some layers, private- market valuations are concentrated in a small number of firms, and investor narratives often capitalize future productivity gains before they have appeared in cash flows. The paper proposes a five-pillar diagnostic framework that combines fundamental valuation, residual-exuberance tests, SADF/GSADF explosive-root procedures, LPPL/HLPPL price-pattern diagnostics, sen- timent and issuance measures, and capex-payback analysis. The central conclusion is that AI is best understood as a real technological revolution with localized bubble dynamics rather than as either a pure speculative mania or a bubble-free productivity miracle.

AI.tldr: 本文构建混合评估框架，分析截至2026年5月AI资产是否处于金融泡沫。核心结论：AI是真实技术革命，但存在局部泡沫动态，既非纯粹投机狂热，也非无泡沫的生产力奇迹。
AI.motivation: 回答金融经济学中反复出现的问题：AI相关资产是处于泡沫中，还是市场在资本化一项持久的通用技术？
AI.method: 提出五支柱诊断框架：(1)基本面估值；(2)残差过度检验；(3)SADF/GSADF爆炸根检验；(4)LPPL/HLPPL价格模式诊断；(5)资本支出回报分析。结合资产定价理论基础与理性/行为泡沫理论。
AI.result: 基本面有依据：收入增长、企业采用、生产率证据支持部分估值；脆弱面：资本支出增速超过变现速度、私募估值集中在少数公司、投资者叙事提前资本化未来收益。
AI.conclusion: AI是真实技术革命，伴随局部泡沫动态，属于"有泡沫的技术革命"而非纯粹的投机狂热或无泡沫的生产力奇迹。

title: From Parliamentary Rhetoric to Enacted Law: An NLP Pipeline for Semantic Auditing of the Greek Legislative Process
summary:
The Greek legislative framework is characterized by intricate cross-referencing, frequent amendments, and limited machine-readable access, hindering transparency and civic engagement. Traditional bulk-archiving approaches are computationally expensive and fail to capture political relevance. We present a multimodal computational pipeline that bridges parliamentary discourse with enacted legislation. Applying Natural Language Processing (NLP) to 2025 Hellenic Parliament transcripts, we extracted 534 unique law citations and used debate frequency as an empirical signal to identify politically salient laws. A headless browser architecture enables automated acquisition of official Government Gazette documents despite anti-scraping barriers.
  Using Large Language Models (LLMs), we conduct a semantic audit of legislative quality. Our analysis reveals an "Illusion of Simplicity", where laws framed as simplifications exhibit high structural complexity and ambiguity. A typology of 312 ambiguity instances shows that 45 percent stem from vague terminology and 25 percent from deferred executive delegation. We introduce the Political Discrepancy Index (PDI), evaluating alignment between ministerial promises and enacted law. Across three high-frequency laws (4808/2021, 4412/2016, 4662/2020), the dominant outcome is Deferral, with commitments shifted to future Ministerial Decisions.
  Cross-reference network analysis confirms a highly entangled legal system, with foundational provisions among the most frequently amended. The pipeline produces a semantically linked dataset and an interactive auditing interface for scalable analysis of legislative processes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态计算管道，通过NLP分析希腊议会辩论记录，提取法律引用并评估立法质量，揭示了“简化错觉”和“政治差异指数”，证明希腊法律体系存在高度复杂性和承诺延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 希腊立法框架存在复杂的交叉引用、频繁修订、机器可读性差等问题，传统批量归档方法计算成本高且无法捕捉政治相关性，阻碍透明度和公民参与。
AI.method: 1) 对2025年希腊议会记录应用NLP提取534条法律引用，以辩论频率作为政治显著性信号；2) 使用无头浏览器架构自动获取官方政府公报；3) 利用LLM进行语义审计；4) 构建交叉引用网络分析；5) 提出政治差异指数（PDI）评估部长承诺与颁布法律的一致性。
AI.result: 揭示了“简化错觉”（被框架为简化的法律实际高度复杂）；识别312个歧义实例（45%源于模糊术语，25%源于行政授权延迟）；PDI评估显示三部高频法律的主要结果是“延迟”；交叉引用网络证实法律体系高度纠缠，基础条款被频繁修订。
AI.conclusion: 该管道生成了语义链接数据集和交互式审计界面，为立法过程的可扩展分析提供了工具，有助于提升透明度和公民参与。

title: Constructive interpolation and generalization rates for neural ODEs: a control perspective
summary: We study supervised regression with neural ODEs (NODEs) from a control-theoretic perspective to derive explicit population-risk bounds. We focus on a widely used class of non-autonomous models with constant parameters and explicit time dependence, which we call semi-autonomous NODEs (SA-NODEs). We constructively prove that SA-NODEs are capable of \emph{exact} interpolation of admissible finite datasets, and even satisfy a stronger property that we call \emph{simultaneous cell controllability} (SCC): their flows can map prescribed disjoint cells into arbitrarily small target balls. This property is the mechanism that upgrades interpolation into quantitative generalization, by allowing SA-NODEs to emulate piecewise-constant nonparametric estimators. Consequently, our risk bounds recover the rates of histogram and nearest-neighbor estimators, provided the network width satisfies a conservative scaling with the sample size. Numerical experiments show that trained SA-NODEs achieve competitive -- often lower -- test errors than these baselines. Finally, we show that the explicit time dependence is essential. Although two-layer autonomous NODEs can interpolate geometrically nondegenerate datasets, structural obstructions prevent them from achieving SCC. These limitations, further confirmed numerically, support the view that SA-NODEs provide a minimal effective architecture for learning.

AI.tldr: 本文从控制论视角研究神经ODE（Neural ODE）在监督回归任务中的泛化能力，证明了半自神经ODE（SA-NODE）具有精确插值和"同时单元可控性"（SCC）性质，从而能够实现与直方图估计器和最近邻估计器相当的泛化风险界。实验表明SA-NODE达到具有竞争力的测试误差，且显式时间依赖性是关键因素。
AI.motivation: 现有神经ODE的理论分析多关注近似能力或特定架构，缺乏从控制论角度对其泛化性能的系统性理论刻画，特别是缺乏明确的种群风险（population risk）边界。
AI.method: 1) 提出SA-NODE（半自神经ODE）模型——非自治系统，参数恒定但具有显式时间依赖；2) 构造性证明SA-NODE可实现精确插值和SCC（同时单元可控性）；3) 利用SCC性质使SA-NODE模拟分段常数非参数估计器，导出风险界；4) 对比证明两层自治NODE在某些几何非退化数据集上也可插值，但存在结构性障碍无法实现SCC。
AI.result: 1) SA-NODE具有精确插值和同时单元可控性(SCC)；2) 其泛化风险界恢复直方图估计和最近邻估计的收敛率（网络宽度与样本量需满足保守缩放条件）；3) 实验显示SA-NODE的测试误差达到或低于基线方法；4) 显式时间依赖是必要的，两层自治NODE无法实现SCC。
AI.conclusion: SA-NODE可作为最小有效学习架构，在理论保证和实际性能之间取得良好平衡。显式时间依赖性对实现SCC和强泛化性能至关重要。

title: Digital Maturity and Technical Efficiency in NHS Acute Trusts: Cross-Sectional Evidence from England
summary:
Whether investment in digital health technology is associated with differences in hospital productivity is a question of substantial policy relevance, yet interpretation is constrained by challenges in causal identification and prior evidence is mixed. Technical efficiency in NHS acute hospital trusts in England is estimated using Bayesian stochastic frontier analysis. A four-input Cobb--Douglas production function incorporating clinical full-time equivalents, administrative full-time equivalents, non-labour expenditure, and physical capital derived from audited NHS accounts is fitted to 111 acute non-specialist trusts in 2024/25. Digital maturity, measured by the NHS Digital Maturity Assessment, is included in a trust-specific inefficiency equation alongside population deprivation, teaching status, and financial position controls.
  The composite digital maturity score is estimated to be negatively associated with technical inefficiency (\(\hatγ = -0.612\), 95\% credible interval \([-1.289, +0.005]\), \(P(γ< 0) = 0.974\)). Trusts in the highest digital maturity quartile are estimated to operate at 98.0\% of their production frontier compared with 93.2\% for the lowest quartile. This gap corresponds to approximately £20 million of additional cost-weighted activity per trust at mean output levels, or £1.1 billion in aggregate. Estimates are robust to functional form but are sensitive to the most conservative prior specification. Pillar-level analysis suggests that population health management and care pathway optimisation domains exhibit stronger associations with efficiency than other domains. Catchment deprivation is not estimated to have an independent association with efficiency after controlling for digital maturity.

AI.tldr: 本文利用贝叶斯随机前沿分析，估计了英国NHS急性医院数字成熟度与技术效率的关系。高数字成熟度四分位医院平均效率为98.0%，低四分位为93.2%，差距对应约11亿英镑的总体产出差异。数字成熟度与低技术无效率显著相关（后验概率97.4%），人口健康管理和护理路径优化领域关联最强。
AI.motivation: 数字健康技术投资是否影响医院生产率，是一个具有重大政策相关性的问题，但因果识别困难且已有证据混杂，亟需更严谨的实证分析。
AI.method: 使用贝叶斯随机前沿分析，对111家NHS急性非专科医院拟合四投入Cobb-Douglas生产函数（临床FTE、行政FTE、非劳动力支出、物质资本），将数字成熟度（NHS Digital Maturity Assessment）纳入无效率方程，控制区域剥夺、教学地位和财务状况。
AI.result: 数字成熟度评分与技术无效率负相关（γ̂ = -0.612, 95% CI [-1.289, +0.005], P(γ<0)=0.974）。高数字成熟度四分位医院平均效率98.0%，低四分位93.2%，差距约合每家医院2000万英镑成本加权活动量，总体约11亿英镑。结果对函数形式稳健，但对最保守先验敏感。人口健康管理和护理路径优化领域关联更强。区域剥夺在控制数字成熟度后无独立关联。
AI.conclusion: 数字成熟度与医院技术效率存在正向关联，尤其是在人口健康管理和护理路径优化方面，提示数字健康投资可能提升医院生产率，但因果推断仍需谨慎。

title: Is Zero-Shot Super-Resolution Possible in Operator Learning?
summary: Neural operators are often reported to exhibit zero-shot super-resolution, a phenomenon in which a model trained on coarse grids produces accurate predictions on finer testing grids without additional retraining. Despite strong empirical evidence, the theoretical foundations of this phenomenon remain unclear. In this work, we provide a systematic theoretical study of zero-shot super-resolution in operator learning. We first show that zero-shot super-resolution can be information-theoretically impossible even in benign settings such as when the input functions are available over the entire continuum and the ground truth is a simple rank-one linear operator. We then identify H{\" o}lder smoothness of the output functions as a sufficient condition for zero-shot super-resolution and derive corresponding generalization bounds. Finally, we also validate the identified failure modes through experimental results.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了神经算子零样本超分辨率的理论基础，指出即使在高斯设置下（如输入函数在连续域上可用、真实算子为简单秩一线性算子），零样本超分辨率在信息论意义上也不可能实现；同时发现输出函数的Hölder光滑性是其充分条件，并给出了泛化界及实验验证。
AI.motivation: 神经算子常被报道具有零样本超分辨率能力（粗网格训练、细网格测试仍准确），但缺乏理论解释，作者旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 1) 信息论下界分析：证明零样本超分辨率在简单场景（连续输入、秩一线性算子）下理论上不可能；2) 充分条件推导：提出输出函数的Hölder光滑性作为零样本超分辨率的充分条件，并导出泛化界；3) 实验验证失败模式。
AI.result: 1) 零样本超分辨率在信息论意义下不可能（即使对简单线性算子）；2) Hölder光滑性是零样本超分辨率的充分条件；3) 实验验证了理论识别的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 零样本超分辨率并非无条件成立，需要输出函数具有足够的正则性（Hölder光滑性）才能保证；理论揭示了该现象的局限性，为未来算子学习的设计提供了指导。

title: Generalized Model Predictive Path Integral Control as Expectation--Maximization
summary: Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control is a powerful sampling-based method for solving stochastic optimal control problems and has enabled real-time control in complex robotic systems. Despite its empirical success, its theoretical understanding remains limited. In this work, we show that MPPI can be interpreted as a special case of the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm applied to a probabilistic inference formulation of optimal control. This perspective leads to a generalized EM-MPPI framework that extends MPPI beyond the commonly used Gaussian parameterization. We analyze the convergence behavior of this algorithm and characterize the local convergence rate in terms of the covariance of the posterior trajectory distribution and the exploration distribution. For exponential-family distributions, we establish a sufficient increase property of the log-likelihood when the log-partition function is strongly convex. Specializing the analysis to Gaussian MPPI yields explicit global and local convergence characterizations. The code for the experiments will be available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文证明MPPI控制可被解释为EM算法在最优控制概率推断中的特例，并提出广义EM-MPPI框架，分析了收敛性并给出了局部收敛率表征。
AI.motivation: MPPI方法在实际应用中表现优异，但其理论基础仍不充分，缺乏对其收敛行为的理论理解。
AI.method: 将MPPI重新解释为EM算法在概率推断最优控制框架下的特例，提出广义EM-MPPI；利用指数族分布和对数配分函数的强凸性分析收敛性。
AI.result: 建立了EM-MPPI的局部收敛率与后验轨迹分布协方差及探索分布的关系；对指数族分布证明了对数似然的充分增长性质；高斯MPPI得到了显式的全局和局部收敛刻画。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作从EM视角统一了MPPI的理论基础，并为超越高斯参数化的扩展提供了收敛保障。

title: AEyeDE: An Attention-Based Attribution Framework for AI-Generated Text Detection
summary: Detecting AI-generated text is becoming increasingly challenging as modern language models approach human-level fluency and can evade detectors that rely on surface statistics or likelihood-based signals. We propose \textsc{AEyeDE}, an attribution-driven approach to human-AI authorship detection that leverages model attention as a discriminative signal. Specifically, we extract attention-based attribution matrices for both human- and AI-generated text using a \emph{proxy} Transformer model with white-box access and train a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network to learn representations from these attribution maps. Across encoder-decoder translation settings, our method consistently outperforms a text-only baseline. In decoder-only settings, it performs strongly in generator-specific detection, remains competitive on standard benchmarks, and shows robustness under cross-dataset transfer and alternative-spelling perturbations. We further show that attention maps exhibit recurring local structures whose relative frequencies differ consistently between human- and AI-generated text across datasets and proxy models. These findings suggest that attention-based attribution maps provide a complementary and interpretable signal for AI-generated text detection. We will make the code publicly available to support future research.

AI.tldr: 提出AEyeDE方法，利用Transformer注意力矩阵作为信号，通过CNN学习区分人类与AI生成文本，在多种设置下表现优异且具有可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现代语言模型生成的文本越来越难以与人类写作区分，现有依赖表面统计或似然信号的检测方法容易被绕过，亟需更鲁棒且可解释的检测手段。
AI.method: 使用代理Transformer模型提取人类和AI文本的注意力归因矩阵，然后训练轻量级CNN从这些注意力图中学习判别性表征，进行二分类检测。
AI.result: 在编码器-解码器翻译设置中持续优于文本基线；在解码器设置中，生成器特定检测表现强，标准基准有竞争力；跨数据集迁移和拼写扰动下具鲁棒性；注意力图显示人类与AI文本存在一致的局部结构频率差异。
AI.conclusion: 注意力归因图为AI文本检测提供了互补且可解释的信号，有望成为现有方法的有效补充。

title: Deliberative Curation: A Protocol for Multi-Agent Knowledge Bases
comment: 29 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables. Open-source implementation available at https://github.com/StevenJohnson998/AIngram
summary:
As AI agents transition from isolated tools to collaborative participants in shared knowledge ecosystems, governing collective knowledge curation becomes a critical challenge. Human platform governance mechanisms do not transfer directly: agent statelessness undermines deterrence-based sanctions, model homogeneity violates independence assumptions underlying crowd wisdom, and sycophancy collapses deliberative consensus.
  We propose a deliberative curation protocol combining three governance layers: (1) a knowledge artifact lifecycle formalized as a labeled transition system; (2) reputation-weighted deliberative voting integrating Beta Reputation with EigenTrust amplification; and (3) graduated sanctions adapted for stateless agents, including broken agent handling distinguishing malfunction from adversarial behavior.
  We evaluate the protocol through agent-based simulation with 100 agents across seven behavioral archetypes under two adversity scenarios (30 seeds, paired t-tests). The protocol trades modest precision under benign conditions for substantially better resilience under adversity: 0.826 vs 0.791 for majority vote under moderate adversity (p<0.001), widening to 0.807 vs 0.740 under stress (p<0.001). The protocol degrades roughly three times more slowly than majority vote. Ablation analysis identifies commit-reveal vote concealment as the most impactful single component (8.2-8.6pp precision improvement, p<0.001), outperforming reputation weighting and deliberation combined. Graduated sanctions were not exercised in simulation and remain empirically unvalidated.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向AI智能体协作知识生态的 deliberative curation protocol（审议式策展协议），通过三元治理层（知识生命周期形式化、声誉加权审议投票、分级制裁）提升集体知识策展的鲁棒性。基于100个智能体、7种行为原型、两种对抗场景的仿真实验表明，该协议在良性条件下精度略有牺牲，但在中度和高度对抗下精度显著优于多数投票（0.826 vs 0.791, 0.807 vs 0.740, p<0.001），退化速度约为多数投票的1/3。消融实验发现commit-reveal投票隐藏机制贡献最大（8.2-8.6pp），而分级制裁在仿真中未被触发。
AI.motivation: AI智能体从孤立工具演变为共享知识生态中的协作参与者后，集体知识策展（collective knowledge curation）成为关键挑战。人类平台治理机制（如威慑制裁、群体智慧假设、审议共识）因智能体的无状态性、模型同质性和谄媚倾向（sycophancy）而失效，亟需专门面向AI智能体的治理协议。
AI.method: 提出审议式策展协议，包含三层治理：（1）知识制品生命周期，形式化为标记转换系统（labeled transition system）；（2）声誉加权审议投票，融合Beta声誉模型与EigenTrust放大机制；（3）分级制裁（graduated sanctions），针对无状态智能体适配，区分故障（malfunction）与恶意行为（adversarial behavior）。通过100个智能体、7种行为原型、两种对抗场景（30次随机种子，配对t检验）的基于智能体的仿真进行评估。
AI.result: 协议在良性条件下精度略低于多数投票，但在对抗条件下显著更优：中度对抗0.826 vs 0.791（p<0.001），高度对抗0.807 vs 0.740（p<0.001）；协议退化速度约为多数投票的1/3。消融实验表明commit-reveal投票隐藏机制贡献最大（8.2-8.6pp精度提升，p<0.001），优于声誉加权和审议机制。分级制裁在仿真中未被实际触发，仍缺乏实证验证。
AI.conclusion: 该协议在对抗环境下显著优于多数投票基线，验证了针对AI智能体特点设计的治理机制的有效性，但分级制裁的实际效果仍需进一步验证，且良性条件下的精度略降是值得关注的权衡。

title: Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models with Applications to Overhead Images
summary: Explainability of deep learning algorithms is critical for computer-vision applications with high-stake decisions. Concept bottleneck models (CBM) have recently shown promising performance to provide explainable and accurate predictions for classification problems, based on a bottleneck of high-level concepts. Existing CBM methods rely on a linear aggregation of the concept scores to compute predictions. However, a large number of concepts is often used in this linear approach, which undermines explainability and favors information leakage. In general, the underlying relation between concepts and output logits is not linear. Therefore, we introduce Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models (HCBM), which build on the Hoeffding functional decomposition of gradient-boosted trees to provide non-linear and sparse aggregations of concept scores, and generate compact predictions using prime implicants. HCBM are proved to be robust to interconcept leakage, and outperform standard linear CBM in practice, as shown in extensive experiments. Beyond classification, HCBM can be adapted to object detection, and we focus on a challenging case with overhead images to show the high performance of HCBM in these settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hoeffding概念瓶颈模型(HCBM)，利用梯度提升树的Hoeffding函数分解实现非线性、稀疏的概念聚合，相比传统线性CBM方法更鲁棒、更可解释，在分类和目标检测任务上均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型(CBM)使用线性聚合概念分数，需要大量概念导致可解释性下降和信息泄露问题，且概念与输出之间的真实关系往往是非线性的。
AI.method: 基于Hoeffding函数分解梯度提升树，实现概念分数的非线性和稀疏聚合，并利用素蕴含项(prime implicants)生成紧凑的预测结果。
AI.result: HCBM对概念间信息泄露具有鲁棒性，在广泛实验中优于标准线性CBM，并可扩展至目标检测任务，在航拍图像等挑战性场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 非线性稀疏聚合方法相比线性聚合更能平衡可解释性与预测性能，HCBM为可解释深度学习提供了更优的范式。

title: Metaverse in Smart Cities: Transforming Urban Life and Governance
summary:
The integration of metaverse technologies within Smart Cities is transforming urban governance and citizen engagement. Despite the increasing academic and industry interest, research on the practical applications of the metaverse in SCs remains fragmented.
  This study addresses this gap through a systematic literature review on how metaverse-driven solutions impact economic transformation, governance, mobility, sustainability, and social interactions in urban environments. The study synthesizes findings from existing applications and case studies, such as Metaverse Seoul, Dubai's Metaverse Strategy, Virtual Helsinki, and Tampere's CitiVerse initiative, to illustrate the diverse ways in which cities are leveraging metaverse technologies. These applications demonstrate the metaverse's potential in digital governance, Artificial Intelligence (AI)-driven urban planning, e-participation, transportation optimization, and climate resilience strategies. This research contributes to the field by providing a comprehensive framework for understanding the benefits and challenges of metaverse-driven SC models.
  The findings suggest that while metaverse adoption in SCs presents significant advantages in efficiency, participation, and innovation, it also entails challenges related to technological accessibility, governance frameworks, and security measures that must be addressed for broad uptake. The study's impact extends to policymakers, urban planners, and technology developers by offering strategic insights for responsible and inclusive metaverse adoption. Ultimately, this study provides a structured roadmap for integrating metaverse technologies into smart urban ecosystems, ensuring their long-term viability, accessibility, and effectiveness in shaping the cities of the future.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统文献综述，分析了元宇宙技术（如Metaverse Seoul、迪拜元宇宙战略等案例）在智慧城市中的实际应用，探讨了其在经济转型、治理、交通、可持续性和社交互动方面的影响，并提出了一个理解其优势与挑战的综合框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管学术界和产业界对元宇宙与智慧城市结合的兴趣日益增长，但关于元宇宙在智慧城市中的实际应用研究仍然零散、不系统。本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用系统文献综述方法，综合分析了现有应用和案例研究（如Metaverse Seoul、迪拜元宇宙战略、Virtual Helsinki、Tampere的CitiVerse等），归纳元宇宙驱动的解决方案对智慧城市各方面的影响。
AI.result: 元宇宙在智慧城市中的采用在效率、参与度和创新方面具有显著优势，但也面临技术可及性、治理框架和安全措施等挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为政策制定者、城市规划者和技术开发者提供了负责任且包容性的元宇宙采用战略见解，并给出了将元宇宙技术整合到智慧城市生态系统中的结构化路线图。

title: Verifiable Criteria and Properties for Interval $B_π^{R^I}$-Tensors
summary: This paper introduces interval $B_π^{R^I}$-tensors as a natural extension of $B_π^{R}$-tensors to the interval setting. We provide two practical verifiable criteria for an interval tensor to be an interval $B_π^{R^I}$-tensor, one based on endpoint inequalities and another constructing an explicit vector $π$. Connections with interval $P$-tensors, positive definite interval tensors, and interval $Z$-tensors are established. Applications in polynomial optimization and interval tensor complementarity problems are briefly discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文将 \(B_{\pi}^{R}\)-张量扩展至区间张量，提出区间 \(B_{\pi}^{R^{I}}\)-张量，给出两种可验证判定准则，并探讨其与区间 \(P\)-张量、正定区间张量、区间 \(Z\)-张量的关系，最后简述其在多项式优化和区间张量互补问题中的应用。
AI.motivation: 将 \(B_{\pi}^{R}\)-张量的概念从确定性张量推广到区间张量场景，填补区间张量理论在该类特殊结构张量上的空白。
AI.method: - 定义区间 \(B_{\pi}^{R^{I}}\)-张量；\n- 提出两种可验证的判定准则：(1) 基于端点不等式；(2) 构造显式向量 \(\pi\)；\n- 建立与区间 \(P\)-张量、正定区间张量、区间 \(Z\)-张量的联系。
AI.result: 给出了两种实用的可验证判别方法，并建立了与多种区间张量类之间的关系。
AI.conclusion: 区间 \(B_{\pi}^{R^{I}}\)-张量具有理论意义，并在多项式优化和区间张量互补问题中具有应用前景。

title: Data-Automated Policy Learning for Nonlinear Welfare
summary: This paper explores policy learning from observational data, focusing on a nonlinear welfare criterion in a binary treatment setting. The nonlinear criterion is inspired by scenarios where policymakers prioritize specific population segments. We model this criterion using a utility function that encompasses potential outcomes and intermediate parameters, with the latter capturing higher moments of the outcome distributions. When formulated in the context of observational data, both the intermediate parameters and the welfare criterion depend on the propensity score, which we estimate using machine-learning techniques. To address bias in machine learning estimates, we introduce a novel reweighting-based debiasing approach that offers a promising alternative to traditional orthogonality-based methods.
