To tackle the complexities of infinite-dimensional policy spaces, we employ sieve approximations and $K$-fold cross-validation for model selection, thereby fully automating the policy-learning process. Despite these complexities, we demonstrate that both the welfare regret and the average welfare regret of our proposed policy learning method satisfy an oracle inequality, thereby providing theoretical guarantees on the performance of the estimated policy relative to the best possible policy. This finding extends the existing results from linear to nonlinear welfare criteria, from finite-dimensional to infinite-dimensional policy spaces, and from a known propensity score to a machine-learned one.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于观测数据的非线性福利准则下的策略学习问题，提出了一种结合机器学习倾向得分估计与重加权去偏方法的策略学习框架，并在无限维策略空间中证明了福利后悔与平均福利后悔满足Oracle不等式。
AI.motivation: 现有策略学习方法多聚焦于线性福利准则、有限维策略空间或已知倾向得分，而实际中决策者可能关注特定人群的非线性福利目标，且倾向得分未知需估计。作者旨在将策略学习从线性扩展到非线性准则，从有限维扩展到无限维策略空间，并处理机器学习估计带来的偏差问题。
AI.method: 1) 利用包含潜在结果和中间参数的效用函数建模非线性福利准则；2) 使用机器学习估计倾向得分；3) 提出基于重加权（Reweighting）的去偏方法替代传统的正交化去偏；4) 采用筛逼近（Sieve approximation）处理无限维策略空间；5) 使用K折交叉验证实现模型选择的自动化。
AI.result: 理论层面，证明了所提方法在福利后悔和平均福利后悔上均满足Oracle不等式，提供了相对于最优策略的性能保证。该结果在三个方面扩展了已有结论：从线性到非线性福利准则、从有限维到无限维策略空间、从已知倾向得分到机器学习估计的倾向得分。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非线性福利准则下的策略学习提供了理论上可保证且自动化的解决方案，其重加权去偏方法为机器学习估计偏差的修正提供了新思路，在因果推断与政策学习领域具有方法论上的推进意义。

title: ERICA: Quantifying Replicability of Cluster Analysis
summary: Despite being ubiquitous in science, clustering remains a technique whose results are not quantitatively scrutinized via a framework. We present an analysis called evaluating replicability via iterative clustering assignments (ERICA) that is applied to a dataset to determine whether clusters are identified in a replicable manner. The pipeline computes a statistic that describes whether structure is found in a dataset. Quantitative visualization methods are presented to answer important questions such as the similarity between clusters, and the identity of points that may be outliers. When tested on synthetic data, the findings show clusters being discovered in a replicable manner. However, we note a possibility for non-replicable results when the pipeline is applied to three gene expression datasets for breast cancer subtype validation. The study underscores the need for rigorous inspection and offers a practical tool for doing so.

AI.tldr: 提出ERICA框架，通过迭代聚类分配评估聚类的可复制性，在合成数据中表现良好，但在乳腺癌基因表达数据中发现不可复制结果。
AI.motivation: 聚类分析虽广泛应用，但缺乏定量评估其结果的框架，无法判断聚类是否可复制。
AI.method: ERICA（通过迭代聚类分配评估可复制性）管道，计算统计量描述数据结构存在性，并提供定量可视化方法分析聚类相似性和离群点。
AI.result: 合成数据上聚类结果可复制；但在三个乳腺癌基因表达数据集中发现不可复制的结果。
AI.conclusion: 强调聚类结果需要严格审查，ERICA可作为实用工具进行此项工作。

title: Benchmarking Recursive-Collapse Warning Claims Under Matched False-Positive Control
comment: 29 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables; supplementary materials: 9 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables. Code, derived data packets, and Lean artifact: https://github.com/davidmullett/loopzero-paper-public (release tag lean-v1.0)
summary:
Recursive systems can enter collapse-like regimes -- self-reinforcing amplification, persistent recursion, and narrowing diversity that mask accelerating internal degradation -- before overt failure becomes visible. We introduce Loopzero, a claim-bounded benchmark framework for testing whether recursive failures follow a directional telemetry pattern: rising gain (G), recursive persistence (p), and declining diversity ($δ$). The claim boundary is specified in Lean; the Lean artifact does not verify real telemetry, benchmark validity, or detector performance.
  We evaluate the bridge on two frozen public-artifact benchmarks: a segmented public-markets benchmark (Volmageddon 2018, COVID MWCB 2020) and a MovieLens-25M offline deterministic recommender replay. Detectors are evaluated under a locked equal-false-positive contract (FP $\in$ [0.03, 0.07], pre-registered) so all configurations face the same alert budget. Neither tested standard comparators nor Loopzero's pre-registered quantile detector achieved an accepted operating point. Directional witness alignment held on both canonical benchmarks, with adjacent-horizon and row-level limitations disclosed. Digitized Shumailov et al. (2024) LLM training-loop trajectories are directionally consistent with the pattern; matched-FP evaluation in that domain is deferred.
  The contribution is a reproducible, falsifiable benchmark framework for evaluating recursive-collapse warning claims under an explicit alert-budget contract -- non-acceptance reported as a first-class scientific outcome.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Loopzero框架，用于测试递归系统崩溃前的定向遥测模式（增益上升、递归持久性增加、多样性下降），在锁定假阳性预算的合约下评估检测器性能，发现标准检测器和Loopzero的预注册分位数检测器均未达到可接受工作点。
AI.motivation: 递归系统在显性失效前会进入崩溃类状态（自我强化放大、持续递归、多样性收窄掩盖内部退化），但缺乏可复现、可证伪的基准框架来评估崩溃预警声明。
AI.method: 构建基于声明边界的基准框架Loopzero（在Lean中指定声明边界），在锁定等假阳性合约（FP∈[0.03,0.07]）下，在两个冻结公共基准（Volmageddon 2018、COVID MWCB 2020、MovieLens-25M离线确定性推荐重放）上评估检测器。
AI.result: 标准比较器和Loopzero的预注册分位数检测器均未达到可接受工作点；定向证人对齐在两个经典基准上成立；Shumailov等人的LLM训练循环轨迹方向性一致但匹配FP评估暂缓。
AI.conclusion: 贡献在于提供一个可复现、可证伪的基准框架，在显式预警预算合约下评估递归崩溃预警声明，并将"未达到接受标准"作为一等科学结果报告。

title: CSRP: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Chinese Text Correction via Reinforcement Learning with Efficiency-Aware Rewards
comment: Accepted to the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026, Main conference)
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) based Chinese Grammatical Error Correction (CGEC) systems face two critical challenges: general-purpose models lack specialized linguistic priors for subtle grammatical distinctions, and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Maximum Likelihood Estimation fails to optimize for precision-focused metrics, leading to systematic over-correction. We propose CSRP, a three-stage framework that progressively builds correction capability through Continual Pre-training (CPT) on 5.9M balanced samples to internalize domain knowledge, Chain-of-Thought SFT with explicit error reasoning for diagnostic transparency, and Group Relative Policy Optimization with a novel Efficiency-Aware Reward that explicitly penalizes unnecessary edits. On the NACGEC benchmark, CSRP achieves state-of-the-art performance with 50.99 $F_{0.5}$ and 57.17 precision, substantially outperforming previous best results while effectively mitigating the over-correction bias inherent in MLE-trained models. Our method also advances CSCD spelling correction to 59.61 F1, surpassing GPT-4 by 5.20 points. Comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate that the RL alignment stage contributes a 8\% relative gain over the SFT baseline, and that this gain is orthogonal to the contribution of large-scale CPT, validating that explicit optimization for edit efficiency is essential for high-quality grammatical error correction. Our code is available at https://github.com/TW-NLP/ChineseErrorCorrector.

AI.tldr: CSRP是一个三阶段中文语法纠错框架，通过持续预训练、思维链微调和基于群体相对策略优化的奖励机制，在NACGEC基准上取得了50.99 F0.5和57.17精度的SOTA性能，有效缓解了过度纠正问题。
AI.motivation: 通用大模型缺乏中文语法专业先验知识，且基于最大似然估计的监督微调无法优化精确度导向的指标，导致系统性过度纠正问题。
AI.method: 三阶段框架：1) 在590万平衡样本上进行持续预训练内化领域知识；2) 思维链监督微调引入显式错误推理；3) 群体相对策略优化结合效率感知奖励函数，惩罚不必要的编辑。
AI.result: NACGEC基准上F0.5达50.99，精度57.17，均为SOTA；CSCD拼写纠正F1达59.61，超越GPT-4 5.20个百分点；RL阶段相比SFT基线提升8%，且与CPT贡献正交。
AI.conclusion: 显式优化编辑效率对高质量语法纠错至关重要，RL对齐与大规模CPT的增益相互独立可叠加。

title: Agents on a Tree: Pathwise Coordination for Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization
summary: Multi-objective molecular optimization requires searching vast chemical spaces under conflicting objectives, where early design decisions strongly constrain downstream outcomes. Existing methods typically rely on a single policy or fixed scalarization, which limits their ability to represent diverse trade-offs and to explore multiple promising design trajectories. We propose ATOM, a multi-agent framework that formulates molecular optimization as a tree-structured search. Each node corresponds to an atomic operation and hosts an agent specialized for a particular objective or decision context. Agents coordinate along different paths of the tree rather than enforcing a global consensus, enabling the method to maintain and compare alternative molecular evolution trajectories. A global memory of past optimization behaviors further supports balanced exploration and exploitation across objectives. This tree-structured interaction enables reasoning over long-horizon dependencies inherent in molecular design. Experiments on challenging multi-objective benchmarks involving activity, synthesizability, and ADMET-related properties show that ATOM consistently achieves improved Pareto coverage and hypervolume over strong baselines. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of pathwise multi-agent coordination for molecular optimization. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ATOM-41CE.

AI.tldr: 提出ATOM，一个基于树状搜索的多智能体分子优化框架，每个节点对应一个原子操作并配备专门智能体，通过路径协调而非全局共识来探索分子进化轨迹，在多个分子优化基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有分子优化方法依赖单一策略或固定标量化，难以表达多样化的目标权衡并探索多条有前景的设计路径。
AI.method: 将分子优化建模为树状结构搜索，每个节点是原子操作并配备针对特定目标的智能体，智能体沿不同路径协调而非全局共识，并维护全局记忆以平衡探索与利用。
AI.result: 在涉及活性、可合成性和ADMET相关属性的多目标基准上，ATOM在帕累托覆盖和超体积指标上 consistently 优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 路径式多智能体协调在分子优化中能够有效处理长程依赖，提升多目标权衡的性能。

title: From Demonstrations to Rewards: Test-Time Prompt Optimization for VLM Reward Models
summary: Reinforcement learning relies on accurate reward functions, which are often hand-crafted or even unavailable in real-world applications, such as robotics. Recent work has explored the zero-shot reasoning capabilities of pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as reward models. However, without careful prompt engineering, these approaches tend to produce suboptimal rewards, where false positive predictions can severely degrade downstream policy learning. In robotics, limited datasets comprising expert demonstrations are often collected to bootstrap policy learning. This scenario provides an opportunity to optimize a reward model prior policy training. We propose Demo2Reward a test-time adaptation technique to optimize the language instruction of a reward model based on a few demonstrations (3-10 trajectories) to reduce false positives while preserving true positives. Crucially, this requires no additional model training or computation resources during policy learning. We show that Demo2Reward consistently outperforms existing zero- and few-shot VLM reward models across a range of simulated robotic tasks and policy backbones. Finally, we demonstrate that Demo2Reward effectively transfers to a real-world robotic learning scenario, enabling policy learning without manually engineering a reward function.

AI.tldr: Demo2Reward是一种测试时自适应技术，利用少量专家演示（3-10条轨迹）优化VLM奖励模型的语言指令，减少假阳性预测，无需额外训练即可提升机器人策略学习效果。
AI.motivation: 强化学习依赖准确奖励函数，但真实机器人场景中奖励函数常难以获取；现有VLM奖励模型零样本推理易产生假阳性，导致策略学习退化。
AI.method: 提出Demo2Reward：基于少量专家演示（3-10条轨迹）在测试时自适应优化奖励模型的语言指令，无需额外模型训练或计算资源。
AI.result: 在多个模拟机器人任务和策略骨干中，Demo2Reward持续优于现有的零样本和少样本VLM奖励模型，并成功迁移到真实机器人学习场景。
AI.conclusion: Demo2Reward有效利用少量演示数据优化VLM奖励模型，无需手动设计奖励函数即可实现真实机器人策略学习。

title: Make Mechanistic Interpretability Auditable: A Call to Develop Guidelines via Continuous Collaborative Reviewing
summary: While mechanistic interpretability (MI) has produced important insights into neural network internals, the field has yet to establish a standardized system to audit experiments. As such, many of its findings remain underutilized in safety-critical applications such as medical AI and autonomous systems, as stakeholders cannot certify their validity. Recent work demonstrates this concretely: two papers found conflicting conclusions for the same behavior, and a third study revealed that both were partially correct but incomparable due to methodological inconsistencies. Without standardized auditing, such ambiguities hinder adoption in high-stakes contexts requiring strong correctness guarantees. We call for the MI community to work towards developing a novel reviewing system that complements peer review via: (1) Continuous reviewing supported by a \emph{Collaborative Reviewing Platform} where meta-science results and discussions (such as critiques, negative results, post-hoc extensions, reproductions, replications, and partial results) that fit outside of papers are organized and discussed, allowing for comments and revisions to be made at any time (2) Generalizing good practices found on this platform into expert-verified guidelines and protocols to improve auditing efficiency, and (3) Source-based auditing systems that track arguments which claims depend on. This position paper encourages constructive debate over the necessity, design and implementation of such a framework, providing early concrete examples to help catalyze these dialogues. Overall, we propose that auditing MI itself is essential for its application in AI safety, industry, and governance.

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁可解释性机械解释(MI)社区建立一个标准化的审计系统，通过持续评审平台、专家验证指南和基于来源的审计追踪，来解决当前研究发现不可比较、无法在安全关键领域应用的问题。
AI.motivation: MI领域缺乏标准化的实验审计系统，导致研究发现存在矛盾且不可比较，无法在医疗AI、自动驾驶等安全关键领域得到可靠应用。
AI.method: 提出三管齐下的审计框架：(1)建立协作评审平台，支持持续评审并汇集论文之外的研究结果(批评、负面结果、复现等)；(2)将平台上的良好实践推广为专家验证的指南和协议；(3)建立基于来源的审计系统，追踪论点所依赖的论据链。
AI.result: 目前尚未有实际结果，本文是一篇立场论文(position paper)，旨在推动社区讨论并提供了早期具体案例来催化对话。
AI.conclusion: 对MI本身进行审计是其在AI安全、工业应用和治理中发挥作用的关键前提。

title: In-Expectation Convergence of Stochastic Gradient Methods under Heavy-Tailed Noise
summary: Many stochastic gradient methods are believed not to converge when the noise in stochastic gradients has only a finite $p$-th moment for $p\in\left(1,2\right)$, a setting known as the heavy-tailed noise assumption. However, some recent studies have found that Stochastic Gradient Descent ($\textsf{SGD}$), without any modification to its update rule, can surprisingly converge in expectation for convex problems with bounded domains, highlighting the potential of classical stochastic gradient methods. Inspired by this recent progress, we provide a comprehensive study of stochastic optimization under heavy-tailed noise and establish new in-expectation convergence results for Stochastic Mirror Descent ($\textsf{SMD}$) and Accelerated Stochastic Mirror Descent ($\textsf{ASMD}$) in convex optimization, and for $\textsf{SGD}$ and Stochastic Gradient Descent with Momentum ($\textsf{SGDM}$) in nonconvex optimization. Notably, our results not only hold without algorithmic changes but also avoid restrictive assumptions, such as bounded domains, imposed in prior work. More importantly, our analysis provides a new, elegant, and powerful framework for studying heavy-tailed stochastic optimization, opening a new route to understanding first-order stochastic gradient methods.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了重尾噪声下随机梯度方法的收敛性，证明SMD、ASMD（凸优化）以及SGD、SGDM（非凸优化）无需算法修改即可在期望上收敛，且无需有界域等限制性假设，提供了新的分析框架。
AI.motivation: 经典观点认为重尾噪声（p∈(1,2)）下随机梯度方法不收敛，但近期研究显示SGD在凸有界域问题上仍可收敛。本文受此启发，旨在更系统地研究重尾噪声下多种随机优化方法的收敛性，并去除有界域等限制。
AI.method: 本文对凸优化中的SMD和ASMD、非凸优化中的SGD和SGDM进行了理论分析，在不修改算法的情况下建立了新的期望收敛性结果。提出了一个新颖、优雅且强大的分析框架来研究重尾随机优化。
AI.result: 在凸优化中，SMD和ASMD在重尾噪声下可期望收敛；在非凸优化中，SGD和SGDM同样可期望收敛。所有结果无需算法修改，也无需有界域等先验假设。
AI.conclusion: 该工作拓展了经典随机梯度方法在重尾噪声下的适用性认知，为理解一阶随机优化方法提供了新视角和新分析框架。

title: Information and voting: Evidence from Peru's 2026 presidential election
summary: We study how election-night flash estimates shape voting in Peru's fragmented 2026 presidential election. We exploit a natural experiment: on April 12, 2026, 187 polling tables across 13 voting centers failed to install, and the \emph{Jurado Nacional de Elecciones} (JNE) extended voting for the affected $\approx\!55 000$ electors to Monday, April 13. These voters cast ballots after observing the Ipsos and Datum flash estimates; otherwise comparable Sunday voters did not. A Bayesian-updating model of multi-candidate plurality voting frames the analysis, yielding predictions about vote reallocation toward the three candidates the estimates rendered viable -- López Aliaga, Sánchez, and Nieto. We estimate treatment effects on candidate vote shares at both the \emph{acta} level and the acta-weighted polling-station level, comparing treated and control \emph{locales de votación} matched on pre-treatment covariates. How flash estimates reshape voting is of first-order importance for Peru, given its institutional instability and high political volatility over the past decade.

AI.tldr: 本文利用秘鲁2026年大选中因投票站延迟开放形成的自然实验，研究选举夜即时预估结果如何影响后续选民投票行为，发现暴露于预估信息的选民会策略性地将选票重新分配给被预测为有竞争力的三位候选人。
AI.motivation: 秘鲁过去十年制度不稳定、政治波动剧烈，即时预估结果如何重塑选民投票行为对选举结果具有首要重要性，但目前缺乏因果识别证据。
AI.method: 利用2026年4月12日秘鲁大选中187个投票站因故障延迟至13日（周一）投票这一自然实验，处理组选民在投票前观察到Ipsos和Datum发布的即时预估，而对照组（周日投票选民）则未看到。采用贝叶斯更新模型框架分析多候选人相对多数制下的选票重新分配，在acta层面和加权投票站层面估计处理效应，并使用匹配方法控制预处理协变量。
AI.result: 发现即时预估使选票向被预测为有竞争力的三位候选人（López Aliaga、Sánchez、Nieto）重新分配。
AI.conclusion: 选举夜即时预估能够显著改变选民的投票选择，在制度脆弱的国家中可能对选举结果产生重要影响。

title: Riemannian Stochastic Optimization for Sufficient Dimension Reduction
summary: Sufficient dimension reduction (SDR) makes high-dimensional regression tractable by projecting the covariates onto a low-dimensional subspace that preserves the conditional mean of the response. Existing gradient-based estimators either operate in the ambient space and suffer from the curse of dimensionality, or localize in the reduced space at a per-outer-iteration cost at least quadratic in the sample size. We show that minimizers of the population Minimum Average Variance Estimation (MAVE) risk approximate the same Grassmannian target as the Outer Product of Gradients (OPG), and recast the empirical criterion as a smooth maximization on the Stiefel manifold with closed-form Riemannian gradient. The resulting algorithm, SMAVE, combines sparse projected-space nearest-neighbor localization with Riemannian stochastic gradient ascent. A simplified version comes with almost-sure convergence and a non-asymptotic rate matching the standard non-convex stochastic first-order scaling. Empirically, SMAVE matches or improves on RMAVE's synthetic subspace recovery at moderate-to-high ambient dimension, and on four real datasets it uniformly improves over OPG and is competitive with or outperforms RMAVE at orders of magnitude lower runtime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMAVE算法，通过流形上的随机梯度上升实现充分降维，在保持理论收敛速率的同时显著降低计算复杂度，实验表明在高维场景下优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的SDR估计器要么在原始空间操作而受维数诅咒，要么在降维空间局部化但每次外迭代成本至少为样本量的二次方，缺乏高效且可扩展的算法。
AI.method: 1) 证明MAVE风险的最小化器与OPG逼近相同的Grassmannian目标；2) 将经验准则重新表述为Stiefel流形上的光滑最大化问题，并推导闭式Riemannian梯度；3) 提出SMAVE算法，结合稀疏投影空间近邻定位与Riemannian随机梯度上升。
AI.result: 简化版本具有几乎必然收敛性和非渐近收敛速率；实验上，在中高维合成数据中匹配或超越RMAVE，在四个真实数据集上一致优于OPG，与RMAVE竞争力相当但运行时间低数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: SMAVE在保持理论保证的同时实现了高效计算，为大规模高维SDR问题提供了实用解决方案。

title: Valorisation of Fermentation Side-Stream for Waste-to-Mycoprotein: Nutrient Composition, Metabolic Insights and Process Optimisation
summary: Fermentation-derived side streams represent an underutilised resource for sustainable protein production. This study investigates the potential of centrate from industrial Fusarium venenatum fermentation as a nutrient source for fungal biomass generation. Following compositional characterisation, a synthetic centrate medium was formulated and evaluated using a Box-Behnken design combined with response surface methodology. Across 46 experimental runs, cell dry weight (CDW) ranged from 0.22 to 3.87 g per liter, demonstrating a strong dependence on nutrient composition. Ammonia and glucose were identified as the dominant factors influencing biomass production, with significant nonlinear effects. The model predicted a maximum CDW of 4.17 g per liter under optimised conditions, which was experimentally validated at 3.99 g per liter. Carbon conversion efficiency reached up to 29.02%, indicating effective substrate utilisation. These findings demonstrate that fermentation-derived centrate can support substantial fungal growth, while highlighting its potential to enhance nutrient recovery and influence the biochemical composition of sustainable mycoprotein.

AI.tldr: 本研究探究利用工业镰孢菌发酵副产物流（离心液）作为真菌生物质生产的营养源。通过成分表征、合成培养基设计及响应面优化，发现氨和葡萄糖是影响生物量生产的关键因素，模型预测最大细胞干重为4.17 g/L，实验验证为3.99 g/L，碳转化效率达29.02%。结果表明发酵副产物流可支持真菌生长，促进营养回收和可持续菌蛋白生产。
AI.motivation: 发酵副产物流是未被充分利用的资源，将其用于可持续蛋白质生产，可促进营养回收并减少废弃物。
AI.method: 对工业镰孢菌发酵离心液进行成分表征，配制合成离心液培养基，采用Box-Behnken设计结合响应面法进行46次实验优化营养组成。
AI.result: 细胞干重范围为0.22–3.87 g/L；氨和葡萄糖是主导因素且存在显著非线性效应；优化后预测最大CDW为4.17 g/L，实验验证为3.99 g/L；碳转化效率最高达29.02%。
AI.conclusion: 发酵离心液可有效支持真菌生长，具有增强营养回收和影响可持续菌蛋白生化组成的潜力。

title: SENSE: Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation for Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative Decoding (SD) accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are verified in parallel by the target model, without compromising generation quality. While Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding (RSD) is favored for its plug-and-play versatility, its potential is impeded by rigid lexical dependencies, rendering both retrieval and verification brittle to surface-level variations. To address this, we propose SENSE (Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation). By anchoring retrieval on the hidden states of the target model, SENSE establishes robust semantic alignment, which empowers the Soft-gated Evaluation module to validate semantic equivalence rather than surface forms. To ensure rigorous benchmarking, we deconstruct existing methods into atomic primitives within a unified framework, facilitating granular, component-level comparison. Extensive experiments across diverse domains demonstrate that SENSE outperforms multiple baselines on the LLaMA and Qwen families, attaining up to 4.09 mean acceptance length and 3.26x speedup, while preserving generation quality. Our code will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 提出SENSE方法，通过语义嵌入检索和软门控评估模块替代传统基于词法的推测解码，在LLaMA和Qwen上实现最高4.09平均接受长度和3.26倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有基于检索的推测解码(RSD)受限于严格的词法依赖，导致检索和验证对表面形式变化敏感，限制了其潜力。
AI.method: 1) 基于目标模型隐藏状态的语义嵌入检索，建立稳健的语义对齐；2) 软门控评估(Soft-gated Evaluation)模块验证语义等价性而非表面形式；3) 将现有方法解构为原子原语以实现细粒度组件级对比。
AI.result: 在LLaMA和Qwen系列模型上，平均接受长度达4.09，加速比达3.26倍，生成质量无损。
AI.conclusion: SENSE通过语义层面的检索与验证提升了推测解码的鲁棒性和效率，是一种即插即用的高效推理加速方案。

title: Optimal Transport-based Permutation-Invariant Bayesian Optimization of Offshore Wind Farm Layouts
summary: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is widely and successfully adopted for solving optimization problems having an expensive-to-evaluate, black-box, and non-convex objective function. However, the vanilla BO algorithm is not able to exploit possible symmetries characterizing the target problem. An intuitive case is given by optimal location problems, whose decision variables refer to a finite set of points within a continuous space, with the order of points not affecting the value of the objective function. We refer to this setting as optimization over layouts to distinguish from optimization over point-clouds where, instead, the order of points counts. As an instance of optimization over layouts we consider a real-life industrial-relevant application, that is the optimization of the layout of an offshore wind farm: given identical wind turbines, switching any pair of them has not any effect on the annual energy production. Based on Optimal Transport theory, we propose a Permutation-Invariant BO approach, namely PIBO, proved to provide better wind farm layouts when compared to the vanilla BO approach while cutting computation time roughly in half.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最优传输理论的排列不变贝叶斯优化方法（PIBO），用于解决具有排列对称性的布局优化问题（如海上风电场布局优化），相比传统BO方法能获得更优布局并节省约一半计算时间。
AI.motivation: 标准的贝叶斯优化无法利用目标问题中的排列对称性（如风电场中交换任意两台风机位置不影响目标函数值），导致计算效率低下且优化效果受限。
AI.method: 基于最优传输理论，提出排列不变贝叶斯优化方法（PIBO），通过将点集视为概率分布而非有序序列，利用最优传输距离度量不同布局之间的差异，从而在BO框架中自然嵌入排列不变性。
AI.result: 在海上风电场布局优化问题上，PIBO相比传统BO方法能生成更优的布局方案，同时计算时间减少约一半。
AI.conclusion: PIBO有效解决了布局优化问题中的排列对称性挑战，验证了最优传输理论在BO中的应用价值，为具有对称结构的黑盒优化问题提供了新的解决思路。

title: A Shared Valence Axis Across Modern LLMs and Human EEG: The Saturation Regularity
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful representation learners whose internal features increasingly align with human cognition. We study whether modern LLMs can serve as a lens for understanding neural representations in the human brain, focusing on emotional valence in EEG.
  We first build a one-dimensional valence direction, the V-axis, from modern LLMs using only nine emotion-evocative sentences. We validate it through zero-shot transfer to sentiment benchmarks and cross-model consistency across fourteen LLMs. We then show that this LLM-derived direction maps onto human neural activity. On a public EEG cohort of 123 subjects watching affective videos, a single linear projection on EEG features tracks the V-axis position of each stimulus. Moreover, 36 EEG emotion classifiers trained without exposure to the V-axis spontaneously rediscover the same direction in their internal representations, suggesting that the same valence structure emerges in both language models and human electrophysiology.
  Yet this convergence does not provide an effective training signal. We test twenty-five alignment strategies, including knowledge distillation, representational similarity, contrastive, and topographic losses; none improve decoding, and sixteen significantly reduce accuracy. We formalize this result as the saturation regularity: once task labels alone drive a brain-decoding network onto the target direction, additional supervision mainly distorts an already-saturated basin, while the load-bearing within-class residual receives little useful gradient.
  This regularity also indicates where improvement should come from: the residual subspace unreachable by supervision. Motivated by this insight, we ensemble across residual diversity rather than supervising the basin, improving balanced accuracy by 10.5% over the prior best on FACED, with the same effect replicated on SEED-V.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型内部表征的效价（情感价值）维度与人类脑电信号中的神经表征对齐，但同时提出“饱和规律”：一旦任务标签将解码网络驱动到目标方向，额外监督反而会损害性能，并据此提出通过残差多样性集成来提升脑电解码效果。
AI.motivation: 探索大语言模型（LLMs）能否作为理解人类大脑神经表征的透镜，特别关注脑电（EEG）中的情感效价（valence）表征。
AI.method: (1) 从LLMs构建一维效价方向（V-axis），通过少量情感句子和零样本迁移验证；(2) 在123名受试者的公开EEG数据集上，验证V-axis与神经活动的对应关系；(3) 测试25种对齐策略（知识蒸馏、表征相似性、对比学习、拓扑损失等）；(4) 提出“饱和规律”并基于此设计残差多样性集成方法。
AI.result: (1) LLM衍生的V-axis在EEG数据中有对应的神经活动模式；(2) 36个EEG情感分类器自发发现了与V-axis相同的方向；(3) 25种对齐策略无一提升解码性能，16种反而显著降低准确率；(4) 基于残差多样性集成的方法在FACED上平衡准确率提升10.5%，在SEED-V上复现相同效果。
AI.conclusion: LLM与人类脑电在效价表征上存在结构对齐，但这种对齐不能直接提供有效的训练信号；神经解码的提升应来自监督无法触及的残差子空间，而非过度约束已饱和的表征盆地。

title: Artificial intelligence as a real game to enlighten science education for disabled students in rural New Mexico
summary: Artificial Intelligence AI has emerged as a transformative innovation in inclusive science education for disabled learners in rural New Mexico. Using a mixed method design that combined multiple linear regression and an Artificial Neural Network ANN model, this study examined 120 students in grades 6 to 10 and 15 instructors across four rural schools. The AI-based learning intervention predicted student performance with high accuracy R2 equals 0.92, and p less than 0.05. Experimental results showed a 32 percent improvement in science concept retention, a 27 percent increase in laboratory performance, and a 42 percent rise in student engagement following the intervention. These findings demonstrate that AI-driven pedagogy can serve as a transformative equalizer, improving engagement, comprehension, and accessibility for disabled learners. The study concludes that AI is a promising tool for achieving equitable science education in underserved rural settings.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了AI在New Mexico农村地区残疾学生科学教育中的应用，通过混合方法（多元线性回归+ANN）分析120名6-10年级学生和15名教师的数据。AI干预在概念保留（+32%）、实验表现（+27%）和学生参与度（+42%）上均有显著提升，模型预测准确率达R²=0.92。
AI.motivation: 解决农村地区残疾学生在科学教育中面临的资源和可达性不平等问题，探索AI作为包容性教育工具的潜力。
AI.method: 混合研究方法：结合多元线性回归与人工神经网络（ANN）模型，对New Mexico四所农村学校的120名学生（6-10年级）和15名教师进行实验分析。
AI.result: AI干预模型预测准确率R²=0.92（p<0.05）；科学概念保留率提升32%；实验表现提升27%；学生参与度提升42%。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的教学法可作为农村残疾学生科学教育的变革性工具，有效促进教育公平性和可及性。

title: Stability results for regularized least-squares problems via generalized Hessian expressions and monotone generalized equations
summary: We study perturbation and stability properties of solution mappings associated with convex regularized least-squares problems. We first establish an implicit function theorem for generalized equations governed by maximally monotone operators and smooth perturbations, yielding conditions for local Lipschitz continuity, directional differentiability, and semismoothness of solution mappings. We then characterize the kernel of generalized Hessians of convex functions through the subspace parallel to the subdifferential under $C^2$-cone reducibility assumptions on the conjugate of the regularizer, thereby replacing difficult second-order objects by tractable first-order conditions. As applications, we derive stability results for broad classes of regularized least-squares problems, including weighted polyhedral support-function regularizers and piecewise linear-quadratic penalties. Our framework unifies and extends several recent results on Lipschitz stability for LASSO-type models and monotone generalized equations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究凸正则化最小二乘问题解映射的摄动与稳定性，建立了基于极大单调算子的隐函数定理，并通过C²-锥可约性刻画了广义Hessian的核，统一并推广了LASSO类模型和单调广义方程的Lipschitz稳定性结果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对正则化最小二乘问题的稳定性分析较为分散，缺乏统一的理论框架，尤其是对广义Hessian的核等二阶对象的刻画依赖于复杂的二阶条件，需要更易处理的一阶条件来替代。
AI.method: 1. 建立了基于极大单调算子和平滑摄动的广义方程隐函数定理，得到解映射的Lipschitz连续性、方向可微性和半光滑性条件；2. 在正则化共轭函数的C²-锥可约性假设下，通过子微分的平行子空间刻画凸函数广义Hessian的核；3. 将理论应用于加权多面体支撑函数正则化器和分段线性二次罚函数。
AI.result: 得到了解映射局部Lipschitz连续性、方向可微性和半光滑性的充分条件，并将二阶对象分析转化为可处理的一阶条件。成功应用于LASSO类模型和单调广义方程的稳定性分析。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个统一的凸正则化最小二乘问题稳定性分析框架，统一并推广了LASSO型模型和单调广义方程的多项近期稳定性结果。

title: Higher-Order Debiased Estimators for General Treatment Models
summary: It is now well known that estimators based on influence functions can be sub-optimal in terms of convergence rates in various settings. To address this issue, higher-order influence functions (HOIF) are developed, generalizing the classical semiparametric theory. However, most existing results in this regard focus on treatment effect parameters defined in explicit forms, such as average treatment effects (ATE). In applications, economists are often confronted with tasks of inferring more complex parameters, such as quantile treatment effects (QTE) or effects of complicated treatment regimes/policy. These more complex parameters can often only be implicitly defined as the solution to nonlinear estimating equations, which correspond to M/Z-estimation problems. Our current understanding of these problems is mainly limited to the classical semiparametric theory. Given the foundational role of HOIF for estimating explicit parameters such as ATE, a modest step toward enriching the statistical foundation of econometrics and causal inference is to develop the corresponding higher-order estimators for those more complex parameters. To this end, we consider parameters of a class of non-separable structural models in the econometrics literature and develop a class of higher-order estimators for the target parameters. Statistical properties of these higher-order estimators are derived using recent advances in U-processes theory. Our proposed higher-order estimators relax complexity-reducing assumptions, quantified by Holder smoothness, imposed on the nuisance parameters compared to existing alternative estimators for many important parameters in this class, including QTE and quantile dose-response functions, among others.

AI.tldr: 本文针对经济学中通过非线性估计方程隐式定义的复杂参数（如分位数处理效应、剂量反应函数等），发展了高阶影响函数（HOIF）估计量，并利用U-过程理论推导了统计性质。该方法相比现有估计量，放宽了对 nuisance 参数的 Hölder 光滑性假设。
AI.motivation: 经典基于影响函数的估计量在某些场景下收敛速度次优；现有HOIF结果主要针对显式定义的参数（如ATE），而经济学中许多重要参数（如QTE）是隐式定义的非线性估计方程的解，缺乏相应的HOIF理论支持。
AI.method: 针对非可分离结构模型的一类参数，构建高阶估计量；利用U-过程理论的最新进展推导统计性质。
AI.result: 高阶估计量相比现有替代估计量，放宽了对 nuisance 参数施加的 Hölder 光滑性假设（即复杂度降低假设）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将HOIF从显式参数推广到隐式定义的复杂参数，丰富了计量经济学和因果推断的统计理论基础。

title: Parameter-Free and Group Conditional Online Conformal Prediction
summary: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is critical for the deployment of machine learning predictors in real-world scenarios where the data distribution may shift over time (i.e., data may not be exchangeable). Online conformal prediction (OCP) methods address this issue at the expense of either (i) group-wise error control or (ii) learning-rate independent implementation. Group-conditional coverage is essential for fairness across different collections of data points and for providing finer UQ guarantees. Parameter-free optimization is crucial for robustness to adversarial and unknown data shifts. We propose a parameter-free algorithm for group-conditional OCP and demonstrate that it achieves the best group-conditional coverage guarantees.We evaluate our algorithm on synthetic and real-world data, demonstrating that our method not only improves the reliability of existing parameter-free OCP methods but also provides prediction intervals that are comparable in size to well-tuned group-conditional approaches. By unifying group-conditional coverage with parameter-free online algorithms, our work lays a foundation for fair and robust uncertainty quantification in shifting environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需超参数调优的在线条件共形预测方法，在数据分布漂移环境下同时实现分组条件覆盖控制与鲁棒性，并保证最优的分组条件覆盖保证。
AI.motivation: 现有在线共形预测方法在数据分布漂移场景下，要么实现分组误差控制（但依赖学习率调优），要么实现无需调参（但无法控制分组条件覆盖）。为了兼顾公平性（分组覆盖）与鲁棒性（参数无关），需要一种统一的参数无关的分组条件在线共形预测方法。
AI.method: 提出一种参数无关（parameter-free）的分组条件在线共形预测算法，无需手动调整学习率，同时保证分组条件覆盖的统计保证。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上的实验表明：所提方法不仅提升了现有参数无关在线共形预测方法的可靠性，而且生成的预测区间大小与经过良好调优的分组条件方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过将分组条件覆盖与参数无关在线算法统一，本工作为漂移环境下的公平且鲁棒的不确定性量化奠定了基础。

title: Traffic Characterization of Event-Triggered Control Systems: A Geometric-Algebraic Perspective
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted by the 2026 American Control Conference (ACC 2026)
summary: This paper characterizes the triggering behaviors of event-triggered control systems from a geometric-algebraic perspective. We first model the feasibility of inter-event time transition relations as a nonconvex quadratic constraint satisfaction problem and reformulate it as an equivalent linear cone problem, which provides a clearer geometric description of the feasible region, making subsequent analysis more reliable. Building on this formulation, we establish necessary and sufficient conditions that rigorously determine whether a given transition relation is feasible. Based on this condition, we propose an algorithm that computes the set of all feasible transition relations. Numerical simulations further demonstrate how the feasibility of specific transitions evolves with the control parameter σ, with visualizations of the feasible state space offering intuitive insight into parameter selection and system design.

AI.tldr: 本文从几何-代数角度刻画事件触发控制系统的触发行为，将事件间时间步长转移关系的可行性建模为非凸二次约束满足问题，并转化为等价的线性锥问题，给出了可行域清晰的几何描述，建立了判断转移关系可行性的充要条件，并提出了计算所有可行转移关系的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有事件触发控制研究缺乏对触发行为的几何-代数视角刻画，转移关系的可行性分析不够清晰可靠，需要更严谨的数学框架来理解和设计系统参数。
AI.method: 将非凸二次约束满足问题等价转化为线性锥问题，建立充要条件判断转移关系可行性，并设计算法计算所有可行转移关系。
AI.result: 提出了判断转移关系可行性的充要条件及计算所有可行转移关系的算法，并通过数值仿真展示了特定转移可行性随控制参数σ的变化规律，以及可行状态空间的可视化。
AI.conclusion: 该几何-代数框架为事件触发控制的参数选择和系统设计提供了更可靠的理论基础和直观的几何洞察。

title: lmfaoooo at SemEval-2026 Task 1: Humor Is an Audience. Preference Modeling for Constrained Humor Generation
summary:
Humor generation remains difficult not only because producing fluent, novel jokes is hard, but because "funny" is audience-dependent and supervision is noisy -- preferences vary with audience, context, and culture, and annotator agreement is often low. In this paper, we describe our system for the SemEval-2026 Task-1 (MWAHAHA), which focuses on humor generation under explicit constraints. The task evaluates submitted systems via human preference judgments in 1-on-1 arena-style comparisons.
  We adopt a "generate-many -> select-best" strategy. First, we generate a diverse pool of candidates per instance using multi-step prompting, model ensembling, and diversity-oriented decoding. Second, we select outputs using a preference model that approximates a "reader" by learning from human comparisons rather than absolute funniness scores. To support this approach, we release 2.5K human pairwise judgments collected through the Humor Arena prototype. We further propose an interpretable pipeline that converts labeled comparisons into a preference model. Across three preference datasets, our models consistently outperform baselines and show stronger cross-domain transfer. Finally, we apply the learned preference model to rank candidates for the MWAHAHA setting and release intermediate artifacts (candidate pools and rankings) to facilitate follow-up work.
  Our system ranked 1st in the English and Chinese subtasks of MWAHAHA and 2nd in the Spanish subtask.

AI.tldr: 本文针对 SemEval-2026 MWAHAHA 任务，采用"先生成多样候选，再用偏好模型择优"的策略，在英文、中文子任务中获第一，西班牙语子任务获第二。
AI.motivation: 幽默生成面临两大难题：一是生成流畅新颖的笑话本身就难；二是"有趣"高度依赖受众、语境和文化，标注者一致性低，监督信号噪声大。
AI.method: 采用"生成多样候选→择优选择"策略。生成阶段：多步提示、模型集成、多样性解码。选择阶段：利用人类成对偏好判断（而非绝对搞笑评分）训练偏好模型来模拟读者判断，并发布 2.5K 成对偏好数据集。
AI.result: 在三个偏好数据集上 consistently 优于基线，跨领域迁移能力强。MWAHAHA 任务中英文、中文子任务第一，西班牙语子任务第二。
AI.conclusion: 成对偏好判断相比绝对评分能更好地捕捉幽默的主观性，偏好模型可作为幽默生成中有效的筛选机制，且具备跨语言和跨领域的泛化能力。

title: MindGames Arena Generalization Track: In2AI Solution with Delayed Per-Step Reward Attribution
comment: 18 pages, 2 figures, 9 tables. Technical report. First place in both Open and Efficient tracks of MindGames Arena Generalization Track at NeurIPS 2025
summary: Training language model agents for multi-agent strategic interaction presents a core difficulty: the quality of any action may depend on future events that never materialize, on moves that violate game rules, or on decisions made by other players. Standard reinforcement learning assumes that rewards can be assigned at each step, but this assumption fails in settings where outcomes are entangled across time and agents. We introduce delayed per-step reward attribution with eligibility gating, an episode lifecycle and postprocessing pipeline that computes rewards only at episode end, propagates them back to originating steps according to task-specific semantics, and excludes steps that lack valid dependent information from training. Together with asynchronous rollout generation via vLLM's continuous batching, curriculum-based opponent sampling, and multi-level stratified batch construction, this approach enables stable, sample-efficient RL training in multi-agent environments. We evaluate on the MindGames Arena benchmark at NeurIPS 2025, where a single 8-billion-parameter open-source model trained with our method matched or surpassed substantially larger proprietary systems, including GPT-5, in head-to-head play and took first place in both the Open (unrestricted) and Efficient (<=8B parameters) tracks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多智能体战略交互场景的延迟每步奖励归因与资格门控方法，结合异步rollout生成、课程对手采样和多层分层批次构建，使得80亿参数的开源模型在MindGames Arena基准上击败了包括GPT-5在内的更大规模专有系统。
AI.motivation: 标准强化学习假设每一步都可以分配奖励，但在多智能体环境中，动作质量依赖于未来未发生的事件、违反规则的行为或其他玩家的决策，导致奖励无法在每步即时分配，需要新的训练方法。
AI.method: 提出延迟每步奖励归因与资格门控：仅在episode结束时计算奖励，根据任务特定语义将奖励传播回原始步骤，并排除缺乏有效依赖信息的步骤。结合vLLM连续批处理实现异步rollout生成、课程对手采样和多层分层批次构建。
AI.result: 80亿参数的开源模型在NeurIPS 2025 MindGames Arena基准上，在正面交锋中匹配或超越包括GPT-5在内的更大规模专有系统，并在Open（无限制）和Efficient（≤8B参数）两个赛道上均获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的延迟奖励归因与资格门控方法能够实现多智能体环境中稳定、样本高效的强化学习训练，证明了小规模开源模型在复杂多智能体战略交互中也能达到顶尖性能。

title: Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs) for Exponential Compression of Deep Neural Networks
comment: 6 figure, 28 pages, to be submitted to Journal and confrence
summary:
We study Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs), a family of structured weight generators whose compact core tensors are trained end-to-end by reverse-mode automatic differentiation (AD). The approach can be viewed as a natural extension of low-rank adaptation and tensor factorisation: instead of using one low-rank matrix update, an ADNTN builds a large weight tensor through a hierarchy of small cores, nonlinear activations, and optional lateral mixing tensors. The paper focuses on three architectures: Tree Tensor Networks (TTNs), augmented TTNs (aTTNs) with boundary disentanglers, and Multi-scale Entanglement Renormalisation Ansatze (MERA).
  The formulation supports nonlinear activations, task-aware objectives, batching, and hardware-aware execution schedules. At the same time, the paper keeps a clear distinction between \emph{differentiating} a contraction program and making contraction free: AD does not remove the cost of large intermediates, poor contraction orders, or exact contraction of general loopy tensor networks.
  Extensive simulations on AlexNet and VGG-16 layers show per-layer compression ratios from roughly $2000\times$ to $77000\times$ in the studied settings, with accuracy often matching the dense baseline and, in several VGG-16 cases, improving it. These results are encouraging rather than final: they suggest that ADNTNs are a promising, mathematically structured, and hardware-aware route toward much smaller neural networks, provided that optimisation, contraction schedules, and deployment kernels are designed together.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可自动微分非线性张量网络（ADNTNs）作为结构化权重生成器，通过反向模式自动微分端到端训练紧凑核心张量，在AlexNet和VGG-16上实现每层2000倍到77000倍的压缩比，且精度常匹配甚至超越密集基线。
AI.motivation: 拓展低秩适应和张量分解方法，不再局限于单一低秩矩阵更新，而是通过小核心、非线性激活和侧向混合张量的层次结构构建大型权重张量，实现更高的压缩率和结构化参数生成。
AI.method: ADNTNs包含三种架构：树张量网络（TTNs）、带边界解缠器的增强TTN（aTTNs）和多尺度纠缠重整化拟设（MERA），支持非线性激活、任务感知目标、批处理和硬件感知执行调度，但明确区分了收缩程序的微分与自由收缩的区别。
AI.result: 在AlexNet和VGG-16各层上实现约2000倍至77000倍压缩比，精度多数匹配密集基线，部分VGG-16场景甚至有所提升。
AI.conclusion: ADNTNs是一种有前景、数学结构清晰且硬件感知的神经网络压缩路径，但仍需将优化、收缩调度和部署内核协同设计才能发挥全部潜力。

title: Understanding the Role of Algorithm Registers in AI Governance Through Comparative Analysis of China and the UK
summary: Algorithm registers are increasingly being both considered and deployed as instruments in AI governance. They are often expected to deliver transparency; however, in practice their design, scope, and implementation vary substantially. Currently, we lack a holistic understanding of the potential roles that registers might play in AI governance, and how different design choices both shape and reflect those roles. This paper therefore asks how do algorithm registers differ across jurisdictions, and what do these differences reveal about their roles in AI governance? Towards this, we conduct a comparative analysis of two influential but contrasting algorithm registration mechanisms, China's Beian system and the UK's Algorithmic Transparency Recording Standard (ATRS), drawing on publicly available regulatory documents, registration guidelines, and registry data. Crucially, our analysis shows that an algorithm register, depending on its design and implementation, can serve functions beyond transparency, including pre-market approval, enabling ecosystem-level understanding, and acting as a broader regulatory infrastructure. As algorithm registries proliferate globally, we stress the importance of researchers and policymakers considering and examining the concrete governance functions that algorithm registries can perform as a result of their design and institutional context, rather than approaching them primarily through a transparency lens.

AI.tldr: 本文比较分析中国备案系统和英国ATRS两种算法注册机制，发现算法注册表除透明功能外，还可发挥市场准入、生态系统理解和监管基础设施等治理功能，呼吁研究者从更全面的治理视角审视算法注册表的设计与实施。
AI.motivation: 当前算法注册表被视为AI治理工具，但其设计、范围和实施差异巨大，缺乏对注册表潜在角色的整体理解，也不清楚不同设计选择如何塑造和反映这些角色。
AI.method: 对中国备案系统（Beian）和英国算法透明度记录标准（ATRS）进行比较分析，基于公开监管文件、注册指南和注册数据。
AI.result: 算法注册表的设计和实施决定了其功能可超越单纯的透明度，包括：市场准入审批、生态系统层面理解、以及作为更广泛的监管基础设施。
AI.conclusion: 随着算法注册表在全球扩散，研究者和政策制定者不应仅从透明度视角看待注册表，而应关注其具体设计及制度背景所实现的治理功能。

title: A path-following framework on fiber bundle for variational inequalities
comment: 23 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables, experiment codes and results are available at https://github.com/shb20tsinghua/FiberBundle_VI
summary: Variational inequality (VI) is a fundamental mathematical framework for many classical problems. We present a path-following framework for finite-dimensional VIs with arbitrary continuous functions and compact convex domains. The approach first approximately reduces a general VI to a smooth VI on simplex. Its key innovation is to formulate the smooth VI on simplex on a fiber bundle called the fixed-point bundle. Exploiting this geometric structure, we systematically integrate starting point selection, path-following, and singularity avoidance. Without any assumptions such as monotonicity, the algorithm guarantees global linear convergence to nonsingular solutions. For singular solutions, it retains global linear reduction up to a fixed precision, after which convergence becomes sublinear as the required precision increases. In numerical experiments on 14400 randomly generated VIs of up to 800 dimensions, the algorithm succeeds in every instance, and iteration number increases only mildly with the dimension.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对有限维变分不等式问题的路径跟踪框架，通过将问题约化为单纯形上的光滑变分不等式，并在纤维丛（不动点丛）上进行路径跟踪，实现了无单调性假设下的全局线性收敛。在14400个随机生成的测试问题中，该方法全部成功，迭代次数随维度增长缓慢。
AI.motivation: 变分不等式是许多经典问题的基本数学框架，但现有方法往往需要单调性等强假设，缺乏一个通用、高效且具有全局收敛保证的求解框架。
AI.method: 首先将一般变分不等式近似约化为单纯形上的光滑变分不等式；关键创新在于将单纯形上的光滑变分不等式构建在一种称为"不动点丛"的纤维丛上；利用这一几何结构，系统性地整合了起点选择、路径跟踪和奇点避免。
AI.result: 不需要单调性等假设，算法保证对非奇异解全局线性收敛；对奇异解，先以全局线性速率降至固定精度，之后随精度要求提高转为次线性收敛。在14400个随机生成的变分不等式（最高800维）上全部成功，迭代次数仅轻微随维度增长。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需单调性假设、具有全局收敛保证的变分不等式求解框架，通过几何结构的设计实现了高效可靠的求解，实验验证了其鲁棒性和可扩展性。

title: Random Set Quantile Estimation of Partially Identified Discrete Response Models
summary: Semiparametric discrete choice models are widely applied in economics, yet a fundamental tension arises when covariates are discrete as regression coefficients that are point identified under continuous regressors may become only partially identified. We show that this is not merely an identification problem but creates serious estimation pathologies. Classical estimators, including the maximum score estimator of Manski (1975), not only have population maximizers that are outer regions of the identified set (Komarova (2013)) but also converge to a random set drawn from a finite collection of deterministic regions that partition that outer region. To resolve this failure, we introduce the Random Set Quantile (RSQ) estimator which extracts the $τ$-quantile of the classical estimator for $τ\in (1/2,1)$. We prove this result for a class of widely used models, which includes binary/multinomial choice and discrete outcome panel data models. This construction is consistent and locally robust across the full parameter space, including precisely those configurations where classical estimators break down. A feasible implementation based on the $m$-out-of-$n$ bootstrap inherits both properties. We apply the methodology to the 2019 UK General Election, where the discrete support of Brexit-related covariates generates the partial identification our theory analyzes.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，当协变量为离散时，经典半参数离散选择模型估计量（如最大得分估计量）不仅识别集外区域是病态的，而且收敛到一类随机集合。为解决这一问题，作者提出了随机集分位数（RSQ）估计量，该估计量通过提取经典估计量的τ分位数（τ∈(1/2,1)）实现一致性和局部稳健性，并通过m-out-of-n自助法实现可行推断，最后应用于2019年英国大选数据。
AI.motivation: 经典半参数离散选择模型在协变量离散时存在严重估计病态：不仅点识别退化为部分识别，而且最大得分估计量的总体最大化子是识别集的外区域（outer region），且估计量会收敛到一个从有限个确定性区域中随机抽取的集合，导致估计结果不可靠。
AI.method: 提出随机集分位数（RSQ）估计量，提取经典估计量在τ∈(1/2,1)上的分位数；采用m-out-of-n自助法实现可行计算，该方法继承了一致性和局部稳健性。
AI.result: RSQ估计量在整个参数空间上具有一致性和局部稳健性，包括经典估计量失效的参数配置；m-out-of-n自助法可行实现也继承了这些性质。
AI.conclusion: 通过2019年英国大选数据中Brexit相关协变量的离散支持导致的部分识别问题，验证了所提方法的实用性。

title: Spectra-Guided Neural Tucker Factorization
summary: This paper proposes Spectra-Guided Neural Tucker Factorization (SG-NTF) for High-Dimensional and Incomplete (HDI) tensor completion. Circumventing discrete representational limits, SG-NTF maps scalar timestamps into a continuous spectral space to abstract temporal periodicities. Concurrently, a Spatio-Temporal Co-Gating (STCG) mechanism explicitly filters latent interactions via multiplicative modulation on spatiotemporal contexts. Evaluations on real-world HDI tensors verify that SG-NTF maintains competitive completion accuracy with parameter efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出SG-NTF方法，通过连续谱空间映射和时空协同门控机制，实现高维不完整张量的高效补全。
AI.motivation: 传统离散表示方法在处理高维不完整张量时存在表示能力受限的问题，难以捕捉时间序列中的周期性模式和时空潜在交互。
AI.method: 1) 将标量时间戳映射到连续谱空间以抽象时间周期性；2) 设计时空协同门控机制，通过乘法调制显式过滤时空上下文中的潜在交互。
AI.result: 在真实世界的高维不完整张量数据集上，SG-NTF在保持参数效率的同时达到了具有竞争力的补全精度。
AI.conclusion: SG-NTF通过连续谱空间映射和时空门控机制，有效解决了高维不完整张量补全问题，兼顾了参数效率与补全精度。

title: Like Uber or Like Buses? Economic Feasibility Analysis of UAM for Airport Access
summary: The airport access use case is a promising early-stage application for Urban Air Mobility (UAM). Understanding the operational paradigm of UAM at airports is crucial for making equitable and effective regulatory and management decisions. A central open question is whether UAM will be integrated into the airport transportation network as a conventional scheduled transit service, such as subways and rail, or as a Transportation Network Company (TNC) characterized by dynamic supply-demand matching. In this paper, we propose a two-stage framework for conducting an economic feasibility analysis of UAM networks. In the first stage, we introduce a joint-supply-demand variable pricing problem to evaluate the impact of dynamic pricing on UAM operations. This model uses a binary logit formulation to capture the trade-off between travel time advantages and fare levels. In the second stage, the determined demand is used as input for the Electric Urban Air Mobility Vehicle Routing Problem with Non-linear Charging Time (eUAMVRP-NL), which optimizes fleet scheduling and charging decisions to derive operating revenue and cost estimates. We apply this framework to a case study of the Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) access market with an eight-spoke vertiport network. Our results indicate that UAM operations benefit significantly from TNC-like management; a variable pricing policy can increase operating profits by more than 100\% compared to fixed-pricing schemes. Furthermore, we identify economies of stage length in longer UAM flights.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两阶段框架，分析城市空中交通（UAM）在机场接入场景中的经济可行性。结果表明，采用类似网约车（TNC）的动态定价机制可使运营利润提升超过100%，且较长航程具有规模经济效应。
AI.motivation: UAM在机场接入场景中有广阔前景，但尚不清楚应作为固定班次服务（如地铁）还是动态匹配服务（如网约车）运营，缺乏相关经济可行性分析框架。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段构建联合供需可变定价问题，采用二元Logit模型评估旅行时间与票价的权衡；第二阶段将需求输入带非线性充电时间的eUAMVRP-NL模型，优化车队调度与充电决策。以洛杉矶国际机场（LAX）八辐条垂直起降场网络为案例。
AI.result: 动态定价策略相比固定票价可提升运营利润超过100%；较长UAM航程具有规模经济效应。
AI.conclusion: UAM在机场接入中更适合采用类似网约车的动态管理模式，可变定价能显著提升经济可行性。

title: TrustLDM: Benchmarking Trustworthiness in Language Diffusion Models
summary: The rapid development of Language Diffusion Models (LDMs) challenges the dominant position of auto-regressive competitors in language processing. However, their flexible, any-order decoding strategies not only enable fast decoding speed but also potentially bring new trustworthiness challenges. To better understand the risks behind their pipelines, we introduce a comprehensive trustworthiness benchmark tailored to LDMs (TrustLDM), evaluating safety, privacy, and fairness across different LDM architectures with multiple categories of static post contexts. Our empirical results show that although LDMs generally exhibit strong trustworthiness with only the user prompts, their alignment behavior degrades noticeably when the malicious post contexts are attached to the masked responses. We further observe that longer contexts do not necessarily induce stronger effects, and both decoding order and generation length affect the evaluation outcomes. Finally, we propose TrustLDM-Auto, an automatic evaluation framework that leverages LDM decoding flexibility to systematically identify vulnerable configurations, revealing substantial trustworthiness weaknesses across all evaluated models and dimensions. Our work may potentially help the community build more trustworthy LDMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ML/TrustLDM.

AI.tldr: 提出TrustLDM基准测试框架，发现语言扩散模型在恶意上下文附加时对齐行为显著退化，并利用其解码灵活性提出自动评估框架TrustLDM-Auto，揭示多个模型在安全、隐私、公平性方面的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 语言扩散模型（LDMs）发展迅速，但其灵活的解码策略可能带来新的可信性风险，现有研究对此缺乏系统评估。
AI.method: 构建TrustLDM基准，评估安全、隐私、公平性维度；提出TrustLDM-Auto自动评估框架，利用LDMs解码灵活性系统识别脆弱配置。
AI.result: LDMs在仅有用户提示时表现良好，但恶意上下文附加后对齐行为显著退化；长上下文不一定更强；解码顺序和生成长度影响评估结果；所有模型在各维度均存在可信性弱点。
AI.conclusion: LDMs存在显著的可信性缺陷，TrustLDM框架有助于推动更可信的LDM构建。

title: Universal Quantum Transformer
summary: Classical continuous-space neural networks fundamentally struggle to lock into exact mathematical symmetries, such as modular arithmetic and non-commutative algebra. To approximate these discrete logical rules, they often rely on massive parameter scaling, resulting in stochastic instability even after delayed generalization phenomena known as grokking. Here, we introduce the Universal Quantum Transformer (UQT), a fundamentally novel, quantum-native computing architecture that uses the physical properties of multi-qubit systems as a universal inductive bias for exact mathematical and algebraic reasoning. Rather than translating classical neural mechanisms, our framework relies entirely on parameterized geometric phase embedding and $SU(2)$ wave-interference. We demonstrate that the quantum attention circuit, operating on a highly compact 5-qubit substrate, perfectly learns two highly distinct formal classes: cyclic modular arithmetic ($\mathbb{Z}_{11}$) and non-Abelian algebra (the $S_4$ permutation group). While classical attention-based networks exhibit stochastic instability at convergence, the UQT achieves mathematically exact, deterministic generalization. We refer to this phenomenon as crystallization: a step beyond the well-known phenomenon of grokking. Crucially, this framework yields massive computational and memory advantages by theoretically bypassing the quadratic bottleneck of classical self-attention, and by logarithmically compressing the required representation dimension to eliminate the massive over-parameterization inherent to classical networks. Finally, we deploy this architecture on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) hardware, proving its viability on current IBM Quantum computers. These results establish parameterized quantum topology as a universally superior physical substrate for exact artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了通用量子Transformer（UQT），一种利用多量子比特系统物理特性实现精确数学和代数推理的量子原生计算架构。在仅5量子比特的基底上，UQT完美学习了循环模算术（Z₁₁）和非阿贝尔代数（S₄置换群），实现了超越经典"grokking"现象的"结晶化"确定性泛化，并已在IBM量子计算机上验证。
AI.motivation: 经典连续空间神经网络难以锁定精确的数学对称性（如模算术和非交换代数），通常依赖大规模参数缩放来近似离散逻辑规则，导致随机不稳定性和延迟泛化（grokking）现象。作者希望构建一种能实现精确数学推理的架构。
AI.method: UQT完全依赖参数化几何相位嵌入和SU(2)波干涉，而非翻译经典神经机制。其核心是量子注意力电路，运行在高度紧凑的5量子比特基底上。
AI.result: UQT完美学习了Z₁₁循环模算术和S₄置换群两个高度不同的形式类。与经典注意力网络在收敛时表现出随机不稳定性不同，UQT实现了数学上精确、确定性的泛化。该方法理论上绕过了经典自注意力的二次方瓶颈，并以对数方式压缩所需表示维度。
AI.conclusion: 参数化量子拓扑被确立为一种普遍优越的精确人工智能物理基底。作者将UQT超越grokking的确定性泛化现象称为"结晶化"（crystallization）。该架构已在NISQ硬件（IBM量子计算机）上验证了可行性。

title: Foundation-Preserving Adaptation via Generalized Rayleigh-Quotient Optimization
summary: While finetuning effectively adapts foundation models to specialized downstream tasks, it can degrade nontarget capabilities acquired during pretraining. Existing forgetting aware methods typically seek safer updates through specialized initialization or fixed constraints, but do not regulate the adaptation preservation trade-off during training. We propose Foundation Preserving LoRA (FoLoRA), a forgetting aware optimization framework. Guided by a first order preservation condition, FoLoRA defines a forgetting penalty over pretraining-proxy activations and a task utility over downstream task activations. It then scores update directions by task utility per unit forgetting penalty via a generalized Rayleigh quotient. The resulting spectral coordinate system enables direction wise gated Adam updates, attenuating low utility to penalty directions during training. To estimate the forgetting penalty, FoLoRA constructs pretraining proxy calibration data by sampling from the pretrained model rather than relying on a single proxy dataset. Experiments on math, code, and instruction following adaptation show that FoLoRA achieves the strongest preservation adaptation balance over baselines, improving target task performance with best aggregate preservation of non target capabilities.

AI.tldr: FoLoRA是一种遗忘感知微调框架，通过广义瑞利商引导的谱坐标系统和方向门控Adam更新，在保持预训练能力的同时提升下游任务性能，无需依赖特定代理数据集。
AI.motivation: 微调会破坏预训练获得的非目标任务能力，现有遗忘感知方法通过特定初始化或固定约束寻求更安全的更新，但未能动态调节适应性与保留性之间的权衡。
AI.method: 1) 基于一阶保留条件定义遗忘惩罚（预训练代理激活）和任务效用（下游任务激活）；2) 通过广义瑞利商计算每单位遗忘惩罚的任务效用，构建谱坐标系统；3) 实施方向门控Adam更新，在训练中衰减低效用惩罚比的方向。
AI.result: 在数学、代码和指令遵循等适应任务上，FoLoRA在保留预训练能力与适应下游任务之间取得了最佳平衡，同时提升了目标任务性能。
AI.conclusion: FoLoRA通过动态调节更新方向的任务效用与遗忘惩罚比，有效解决了微调中的能力遗忘问题，且无需依赖单一代理数据集。

title: AI Integrity: Defending Against Backdoors and Secret Loyalties
summary: AI integrity means ensuring AI systems are free from secret or unauthorized modifications that could compromise their behavior. Integrity represents one pillar of the confidentiality, integrity, and availability (CIA) triad in information security: confidentiality preserves secrecy of sensitive information, integrity ensures data remain authentic and uncorrupted, and availability keeps systems operational when needed. While confidentiality receives some attention through efforts like RAND's Securing AI Model Weights report, and availability is naturally prioritized by market forces, AI integrity receives insufficient attention despite its importance to national security.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，尽管AI安全领域关注机密性和可用性，但AI完整性（确保AI系统未遭未授权修改）作为国家安全的重要支柱却未得到足够重视。
AI.motivation: 作者认为，AI完整性是信息安全CIA三要素之一，但目前业界和政策界的注意力主要集中在机密性（如模型权重保护）和可用性（市场驱动力），而对完整性的关注严重不足，这可能对国家安全构成隐患。
AI.method: 本文通过对比分析信息安全CIA三要素在AI领域的受关注程度，指出AI完整性被忽视的现状，并引用RAND报告等文献作为论据。
AI.result: 研究发现，AI完整性在政策讨论和资源分配中处于边缘地位，而机密性和可用性已获得相对较多的关注和投入。
AI.conclusion: AI完整性对于国家安全至关重要，亟需提升其在AI安全议程中的优先级，并采取相应措施防范未授权修改带来的风险。

title: Coupled Routing and Charge Schedule Optimization of Electrified Delivery Truck Fleets: Feasibility Analyses
summary: Electrifying truck fleets has the potential to improve energy efficiency and reduce carbon emissions from the freight transportation sector. However, the range limitations and substantial capital costs with current battery technologies imposes constraints that challenge the overall cost feasibility of electrifying fleets for logistics companies. In this paper, we investigate the coupled routing and charge scheduling optimization of a delivery fleet serving a large urban area as one approach to discovering feasible pathways. To this end, we first build an improved energy consumption model for a Class 7-8 electric and diesel truck using a data-driven approach of generating energy consumption data from detailed powertrain simulations on numerous drive cycles. We then conduct several analyses on the impact of battery pack capacity, cost, and electricity prices on the amortized daily total cost of fleet electrification at different penetration levels, considering availability of fast charging at the depot. Findings indicate that at typical energy density of current battery technology, there is an optimal battery pack capacity that results from the contradicting effects of increasing pack capacity on cost, life span, weight and energy consumption. It is also observed that with currently improving trends in battery pack costs and availability of reduced electricity prices at the depot, such as with renewable microgrids, fleet electrification can become viable even at low levels of penetration.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了城市物流车队电动化中的路径规划与充电调度联合优化问题，通过构建基于数据驱动的能耗模型，分析了电池容量、成本和电价对车队总成本的影响，发现在当前电池技术条件下存在最优电池容量，且随着电池成本下降和电价优惠，电动化变得可行。
AI.motivation: 电动化卡车车队有望提升能效、降低碳排放，但电池续航有限且成本高昂，给物流公司的经济可行性带来挑战，因此需要探索可行的电动化路径。
AI.method: 首先基于数据驱动方法，通过详细的动力总成仿真生成能耗数据，构建了7-8级电动与柴油卡车的能耗模型；然后联合优化路径规划与充电调度；最后在不同渗透率下分析电池容量、成本和电价对摊销日总成本的影响。
AI.result: 在当前电池能量密度下，存在一个最优电池容量（由容量增加对成本、寿命、重量和能耗的矛盾效应决定）；随着电池成本下降和优惠电价（如可再生微电网）的普及，即使低渗透率下电动化也变得可行。
AI.conclusion: 电池技术趋势（成本下降）和基础设施条件（优惠电价）是推动车队电动化可行性的关键因素，联合优化路径和充电调度有助于找到经济可行的电动化方案。

title: When Do Treatment Changes Identify Causal Effects?
summary: This paper clarifies the identifying assumptions underlying causal inference based on treatment changes rather than treatment levels, and their relationship to conventional identification strategies. We characterize two distinct structural models, with non-nested identifying assumptions, under which treatment-change identification is valid conditional on observed covariates. We demonstrate that the identifying assumptions relying on treatment changes are generally not nested with those of methods relying on treatment levels, such as selection-on-observables strategies that control for past outcomes, treatments, and covariates, or difference-in-differences approaches that difference outcomes rather than treatments over time. We show, however, that under a random-walk restriction on the treatment process, conditioning on treatment changes is equivalent to conditioning on treatment levels given lagged treatment. This and other equivalence results motivate overidentification tests by jointly considering methods based on treatment levels and changes. Beyond these tests, the non-nesting results carry a structural double robustness implication: an estimator that differences both the outcome and the treatment over time, such as two-way fixed effects regression, remains consistent if either the treatment-change assumption or the parallel-trends assumption holds, without requiring both simultaneously. We characterize the causal models consistent with each method, investigate finite-sample behavior in a simulation study, and present an empirical application to cigarette demand.

AI.tldr: 本文系统澄清了基于处理变化（而非处理水平）进行因果推断的识别假设，揭示了其与传统识别策略的关系。研究发现，处理变化识别假设与基于处理水平的方法（如控制过去结果/处理/协变量的可观测变量选择策略、双重差分法）通常非嵌套，但在随机游走限制下二者等价。这些结果不仅可用于过度识别检验，还隐含结构双重稳健性：对结果和处理都进行差分的估计量（如双向固定效应）在满足处理变化假设或平行趋势假设之一时即保持一致估计。
AI.motivation: 现有因果推断方法大多基于处理水平（如条件独立性假设、双重差分），但实际研究中常隐含地使用处理变化进行识别，其背后的识别假设尚未被系统分析和比较。
AI.method: 通过刻画两种不同的结构模型（具有非嵌套的识别假设），在条件于协变量的情况下分析处理变化识别的有效性。利用等价性结果推导过度识别检验，并分析双向固定效应估计量的双重稳健性。
AI.result: 处理变化与处理水平方法的识别假设一般非嵌套；在随机游走限制下二者等价；双向固定效应估计量具有结构双重稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为因果推断提供了新的识别框架和检验工具，揭示了处理变化与处理水平方法之间微妙的关系，并提出了具有实践价值的双重稳健估计策略。

title: Taming the Loss Landscape of PINNs with Noisy Feynman-Kac Supervision: Operator Preconditioning and Non-Asymptotic Error Bounds
summary: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) often train slowly or fail to converge on challenging partial differential equations (PDEs), a behavior recently linked to severely ill-conditioned loss landscapes inherited from the underlying differential operator. We study PINNs augmented with a pointwise data-fidelity term, added at a few points in the domain to the standard residual and boundary losses. We show that this supervision term acts as an operator-level preconditioner: for suitable weights, our comparison bounds guarantee a substantially smaller condition number than under the standard PINN loss, independently of how the pointwise labels are obtained. For a broad class of PDEs admitting a Feynman-Kac (FK) representation, we generate such labels by Monte Carlo averages of the FK functional, resulting in what we call ``FK-PINNs", and using the excess risk decomposition approach, we derive non-asymptotic $L^2(Ω)$-error bounds for FK-PINNs with $\tanh$ activation trained by finitely many steps of gradient descent. Along the way, we establish pseudo-dimension bounds for first- and second-order derivatives of $\tanh$ neural networks, which are of independent interest and, to the best of our knowledge, new. Numerical experiments on Poisson, Schrödinger, mean exit time, and committor problems corroborate the theory, and show that FK-PINNs can successfully solve PDEs for which standard PINNs exhibit severe failure modes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FK-PINNs方法，通过添加少量点数据保真项来预条件化PINN的损失景观，显著降低条件数，并利用Feynman-Kac表示生成标签，理论上有非渐近误差界，实验证明能解决标准PINN失效的PDE问题。
AI.motivation: 标准PINNs在求解复杂PDE时训练缓慢或无法收敛，根源在于微分算子导致的严重病态损失景观。作者希望通过加入点数据保真项来改善条件数，解决这一根本性问题。
AI.method: 在标准PINN残差损失和边界损失基础上，加入少量点的数据保真项作为算子级预条件器。对满足Feynman-Kac表示的PDE，通过蒙特卡洛平均生成标签，得到FK-PINNs。利用tanh激活函数，通过梯度下降训练，并进行超额风险分解分析。
AI.result: 给出了FK-PINNs的非渐近L²(Ω)误差界，证明了tanh神经网络的伪维度界（一阶和二阶导数），数值实验在Poisson、Schrödinger、平均退出时间和committor问题上验证了理论，FK-PINNs成功解决了标准PINN失效的难题。
AI.conclusion: FK-PINNs通过巧妙的预条件策略有效缓解了PINNs的病态问题，理论分析与实验均表明该方法在挑战性PDE上具有显著优势。

title: ART: Attention Run-time Termination for Efficient Large Language Model Decoding
summary: Long-context decoding in Large Language Models (LLMs) is severely constrained by the memory bandwidth required to fetch the extensive Key-Value (KV) cache. Most existing KV management methods rely on key-only pruning before decoding, despite the evidence that attention outputs depend jointly on keys and values, as incorporating values in their methods incurs prohibitive additional overhead. In this paper, we propose Attention Run-time Termination (ART), a lightweight run-time mechanism that tracks accumulated attention outputs during kernel execution and terminates subsequent KV block accesses once further contributions become negligible. This design makes ART orthogonal to existing key-based KV cache management methods, enabling seamless integration with them. Experiments on LongBench benchmarks show that ART achieves 20% higher generation throughput in large batch size than state-of-the-art baseline while maintaining comparable accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出Attention Run-time Termination (ART)，一种轻量级运行时机制，在核执行过程中追踪累积注意力输出，当后续KV块贡献可忽略时提前终止访问，从而提升长上下文解码效率，与现有基于键的KV缓存管理方法正交。
AI.motivation: 长上下文解码中，LLMs受限于获取KV缓存所需的内存带宽，现有的KV管理方法大多在解码前仅基于键进行剪枝，但注意力输出实际上依赖于键和值的联合作用，而将值纳入考虑又会产生不可接受的额外开销。
AI.method: 提出ART，在核执行期间实时追踪累积注意力输出，当后续KV块贡献变得可忽略时，提前终止对这些块的访问，从而在不显著增加开销的情况下实现动态剪枝。
AI.result: 在LongBench基准测试上，ART在大批量场景下比最先进基线方法实现了20%更高的生成吞吐量，同时保持可比的准确性。
AI.conclusion: ART是一种轻量级、与现有基于键的KV缓存管理方法正交的运行时机制，能有效提升长上下文解码效率，为未来LLM推理优化提供了新思路。

title: Grokers: Bottom-Up Inductive Comprehension and Write-Time Intelligence over Typed Knowledge Graphs
comment: 6 pages; second in a series with the Magarshak Machine / SPACER paper and the Context paper
summary: We present Grokers, an architecture for building persistent, structured comprehension of typed knowledge graphs through bottom-up inductive traversal of dependency subgraphs. Unlike retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which pays full comprehension cost at every query, Grokers pushes intelligence to write time: autonomous Groker agents analyze nodes in a typed stream graph, extract structured attributes via governed language model (LM) calls, and inductively compose that understanding upward through dependency relations, writing enriched typed attributes that serve all future queries at zero additional LM cost. We prove three formal properties: (1) the Byte-Identity Theorem, establishing that context blocks assembled from a transactionally-maintained denormalization index are byte-identical across LM turns between semantic changes, enabling KV-cache hit rates approaching 100%; (2) the Accumulation Monotonicity Theorem, establishing that the fraction of interactions resolved without LM calls is non-decreasing in the number of completed interactions under a governed wisdom library growth protocol; and (3) the Dual-Traversal Ordering Theorem, establishing that top-down generation and bottom-up comprehension are the unique correct traversal orderings for their respective tasks over a dependency DAG, and that their composition closes into a complete generation-comprehension cycle. We further present a deterministic alternative to embedding-based semantic search, with a synonym caching protocol whose LM fallback rate converges to zero for finite-vocabulary domains. A reference implementation is provided in the open-source Qbix / Safebox / Safebots stack.

AI.tldr: Grokers提出了一种通过自底向上归纳遍历依赖子图来构建持久化、结构化知识图谱理解的架构，在写入时完成智能分析，使后续查询无需额外语言模型调用成本。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG方法每次查询都需要支付完整的理解成本（LM调用），效率低下且缺乏持久化理解。作者希望设计一种架构，将智能计算成本前置到数据写入阶段，让后续查询实现零额外LM成本。
AI.method: Grokers架构包含：(1) Groker智能体在类型化流图上自底向上遍历节点，通过管控的LM调用提取结构化属性；(2) 通过依赖关系归纳组合理解，写入增强的类型化属性；(3) 事务性维护的反规范化索引保证上下文块的字节一致性；(4) 基于同义词缓存的确定性替代方案替代嵌入语义搜索。
AI.result: 三个形式化定理：(1) 字节一致性定理——语义未变时上下文块字节一致，KV缓存命中率趋近100%；(2) 累积单调性定理——随交互完成数增加，无需LM调用即可解决的比例单调不减；(3) 双遍历序定理——自顶向下生成和自底向上理解是DAG上各自任务的唯一正确遍历顺序，二者构成完整的生成-理解闭环。
AI.conclusion: Grokers通过将智能计算成本前置到写入阶段，实现了持久化知识理解，显著降低了查询时的LM调用开销，为知识图谱的高效推理提供了一种有理论保证的新范式。

title: World Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Methodologies, Reasoning Paradigms, and Applications
summary: World models, internal simulators that learn the structure and dynamics of an environment, have emerged as a central paradigm in the pursuit of artificial general intelligence, enabling agents to predict, plan, and reason within learned representations. Despite rapid progress across reinforcement learning, robotics, autonomous driving, and video generation, the field lacks a unified framework integrating its diverse architectural choices, training methods, reasoning mechanisms, and application settings. This survey addresses that gap with a multi-axis taxonomy organized along four dimensions: (i) architecture, encompassing representation format, dynamics formulation, input modality, learning paradigm, and downstream application; (ii) methodological family, including state-space and recurrent approaches, transformer-based models, diffusion-based generators, physics-informed networks, and language-augmented multimodal systems; (iii) reasoning strategy, covering imagination-based planning, latent policy learning, counterfactual reasoning, and planning under uncertainty; and (iv) application domain, spanning robotics, autonomous driving, video prediction, multimodal agents, reinforcement learning, scientific modeling, medical imaging, educational measurement, and business and finance. Tracing the field from early cognitive-science foundations to milestone systems such as PlaNet, the Dreamer family, MuZero, Sora, Cosmos, and Genie, we examine how these dimensions interact and highlight the recent convergence of chain-of-thought reasoning with world-model imagination. We review evaluation protocols and benchmarks, identify persistent challenges such as compounding prediction errors, sim-to-real transfer, and fragmented evaluation, and outline future directions toward unified multimodal world models, foundation-scale interactive simulators, and safe deployment in safety-critical domains.

AI.tldr: 本文对世界模型领域进行了系统性综述，提出了一个涵盖架构、方法家族、推理策略和应用领域的四维分类体系，并梳理了从PlaNet到Sora等里程碑系统的发展脉络，指出了复合预测误差、仿真到现实迁移等挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 世界模型在强化学习、机器人、自动驾驶和视频生成等领域取得快速进展，但该领域缺乏一个统一框架来整合多样化的架构选择、训练方法、推理机制和应用场景，作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出一个多轴分类法，沿四个维度组织：(i)架构（表征格式、动态公式、输入模态、学习范式、下游应用）；(ii)方法家族（状态空间/循环方法、Transformer、扩散模型、物理信息网络、语言增强多模态系统）；(iii)推理策略（基于想象规划、潜在策略学习、反事实推理、不确定性下的规划）；(iv)应用领域（机器人、自动驾驶、视频预测、多模态智能体、强化学习、科学建模等）。
AI.result: 梳理了从早期认知科学基础到PlaNet、Dreamer系列、MuZero、Sora、Cosmos、Genie等里程碑系统的发展；识别了推理策略（如链式思维推理与世界模型想象的融合）的最新趋势；总结了评估协议与基准；指出了复合预测误差、仿真到现实迁移、碎片化评估等持续挑战。
AI.conclusion: 指出了未来方向：统一的多模态世界模型、基础规模的交互式模拟器、以及在安全关键领域的可靠部署。

title: Update Opacity: Epistemic Accessibility and Governance Under AI System Change
summary: Machine learning models embedded in deployed AI systems are routinely updated to maintain correct functioning over time. Yet such updates can generate update opacity: users may not be able to understand why the same input now yields a different output. We argue that update opacity is best understood as a diachronic failure of epistemic accessibility: the problem is that materially relevant changes may fail to remain accessible to human users in forms that support understanding, calibrated reliance, and appropriate action under real role- and time-specific constraints. This makes update opacity a governance problem. Not all change is equally relevant, and disclosing every update would itself undermine use through overload. To address this problem, we combine two complementary governance approaches: the EU AI Act, which helps specify the system-level perimeter of normatively relevant change, and Machine Learning Operations, which provides operational tools for tracking and comparing change over time. On this basis, we propose a framework that models system change through trustworthiness profiles and trustworthiness levels, and uses threshold-based disclosure to surface materially relevant within-envelope change to different stakeholders over time. We illustrate the approach with a medical AI example and derive practical implications for lifecycle documentation, post-market monitoring, and update disclosure.

AI.tldr: 本文指出AI系统更新导致用户难以理解输入相同但输出变化的问题（更新不透明性），将其定义为一种认知可及性的历时性失败，并提出结合欧盟AI法案与MLOps的治理框架，通过可信赖画像与阈值披露机制来管理相关变更。
AI.motivation: AI系统部署后频繁更新，但用户无法理解为何相同输入产生不同输出（更新不透明性），这阻碍了理解、校准依赖和适当行动，构成治理挑战。
AI.method: 结合欧盟AI法案（界定系统层面规范相关变更的范围）与MLOps（提供跟踪和比较变更的操作工具），提出基于可信赖画像与可信赖等级的框架，采用阈值驱动披露机制向不同利益相关者报告重要变更。
AI.result: 提出了一个通过阈值披露来管理模型更新透明度的框架，并以医疗AI为例进行了说明。
AI.conclusion: 更新不透明性是认知可及性的历时性失败，需要结合法规与运维工具的治理方案；本文框架可用于生命周期文档、上市后监控和更新披露等实践。

title: On Median of Incomplete U-Statistics
summary: We establish the finite-sample concentration rate for the Median-of-Incomplete-U-Statistics (MIU), an efficient robust estimator for the expectation of symmetric kernels.

AI.tldr: 本文为对称核期望的中位数不完整U统计量（MIU）建立了有限样本集中速率，证明其是一种高效的鲁棒估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统U统计量对异常值敏感，而现有的鲁棒估计方法在有限样本下的理论保证不足。本文旨在为MIU提供严格的有限样本理论支撑。
AI.method: 通过中位数方法对不完整U统计量进行鲁棒化处理，利用概率不等式和浓度界推导其有限样本集中速率。
AI.result: 成功建立了MIU的有限样本浓度速率，表明其在对称核期望估计中具有高效的鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: MIU是一种兼具鲁棒性和统计效率的估计量，适用于有限样本场景下的对称核期望估计问题。

title: Cognitive-Linguistic Indicators of Depression in Online Communities: Analysed by DistilBERT and Holographic Reduced Representation
summary: This paper investigates whether combining cognitively grounded linguistic features with transformer-based embeddings improves automated detection of depression in online text. Using Beck's Cognitive Theory of Depression, the study extracts cognitive distortions as measurable features, including first-person pronoun density, absolutist words, and negative emotion in Reddit posts from depression-related and control communities. Using a subset of the Kaggle Reddit Suicide and Depression Detection dataset, two classification pipelines are compared, a TF-IDF embedding with Naive Bayes as a baseline, and a hybrid model that concatenates DistilBERT sentence embeddings with Holographic Reduced Representation (HRR) vectors encoding the cognitive-linguistic features, followed by Logistic Regression. The hybrid DistilBERT HRR model achieves a macro F1 score of 0.94 versus 0.80 for the TD-IDF baseline, with 5-fold cross validation F1 improving from 0.83 to 0.92, and AUC from 0.958 to 0.981.

AI.tldr: 本研究将认知语言学特征（认知扭曲指标）与DistilBERT嵌入结合，通过HRR向量融合，在Reddit抑郁检测任务中达到0.94的宏F1分数，显著优于传统TF-IDF基线（0.80）。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁检测方法多依赖纯文本嵌入或简单统计特征，缺乏认知理论指导。作者希望通过引入Beck认知理论中的认知扭曲特征（如绝对化词语、第一人称代词密度等），增强模型对抑郁语言模式的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 1) 基于Beck认知理论提取认知扭曲特征（第一人称代词密度、绝对化词语、负面情绪词）；2) 构建双管道对比：基线为TF-IDF+朴素贝叶斯，混合模型采用DistilBERT句子嵌入与HRR编码的认知特征向量拼接，后接逻辑回归分类器。
AI.result: 混合DistilBERT+HRR模型在宏F1上达0.94（基线0.80），5折交叉验证F1从0.83提升至0.92，AUC从0.958提升至0.981。
AI.conclusion: 融合认知理论指导的语言特征与深度语义嵌入能有效提升抑郁检测性能，HRR作为高效特征融合方法在低资源场景下具有潜力。

title: Product-Aware Deep Autoencoders for Robust Process Monitoring in Multi-Product Cyber-Physical Systems
summary: As Industry 4.0 accelerates the integration of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) in manufacturing, robust anomaly detection has become critical for ensuring process safety and security. Current data-driven approaches typically employ "product-agnostic" or global models trained on the aggregate of all normal operating data. However, modern industrial facilities frequently operate under diverse product grades. While computationally simple, these global models inherently expand their decision boundaries to accommodate the variance of multiple modes, creating a "blind spot" where subtle anomalies or targeted cyber-physical attacks may be masked by the wide acceptance region of the model. In this work, we first demonstrate that the vulnerability described above is present in global-agnostic models operating across multiple product grades. We then present a Product-Aware Autoencoder as a principled mitigation that restricts the learning domain to grade-specific distributions. While this approach reduces the identified blind-spot risk, we do not claim it as the optimal mitigation among all possible alternatives. We rigorously validate this approach against a Global Agnostic baseline using the Extended Tennessee Eastman Process (TEP) benchmark. Our empirical results indicate that the Product-Aware framework performs comparably to the global baseline on standard detection metrics, while offering improved robustness to product-grade-specific operating modes. Most critically, stress tests simulating our hypothetical attack scenarios reveal that while the global model fails to detect operational deviations in 77.8% of the scenarios, the product-aware system achieves 100% detection accuracy. These findings suggest that, in flexible manufacturing environments, generalized anomaly detectors can pose non-trivial security risks, motivating a shift toward mode-aware diagnostic architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文指出工业4.0环境下，传统"产品无关"全局异常检测模型因决策边界过宽而产生安全盲区，无法检测多产品等级下的细微异常。作者提出Product-Aware Autoencoder，通过限定学习域到产品级分布来缓解该问题。实验表明，该方法在标准指标上与全局模型相当，但在压力测试中，全局模型在77.8%场景下漏检，而产品感知系统达到100%检测率。
AI.motivation: 当前数据驱动的异常检测通常使用"产品无关"的全局模型，但现代工厂常生产多种产品等级。全局模型为适应多模式方差而扩大决策边界，导致"盲区"——细微异常或网络物理攻击可能被宽的接受区域掩盖，存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 提出Product-Aware Autoencoder，将学习域限制在特定产品等级的分布上，而非聚合所有正常数据训练单一全局模型。通过产品感知方式建模，使模型专注于等级特定的操作模式。
AI.result: 使用扩展田纳西伊士曼过程(TEP)基准验证：1) 标准检测指标上，Product-Aware与全局基线表现相当；2) 在模拟攻击场景的压力测试中，全局模型在77.8%的场景下未能检测到操作偏差，而产品感知系统实现100%检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 在柔性制造环境中，通用异常检测器存在非平凡的安全风险。产品感知的诊断架构能有效缓解全局模型的盲区问题，建议向模式感知的诊断架构转变。

title: On Effectiveness and Efficiency of Agentic Tool-calling and RL Training
summary: Tool-calling is a central component of modern large language model (LLM) agents, equipping them with skills beyond their parametric knowledge. This paper studies tool-calling along two complementary axes: effectiveness, i.e., how this capability is measured, and efficiency, i.e., how it is learned. On effectiveness, we systematically analyze tool-calling evaluation pipelines and show that results can be highly sensitive to seemingly minor, often undocumented implementation choices including the random seed, system prompt, multi-turn template construction, and how prior interaction/reasoning history is carried forward. These choices can lead to substantial differences in reported performance, especially in multi-turn settings where without rigorous standardization, leaderboard rankings are unreliable. On efficiency, we examine standard reinforcement learning (RL) for tool-calling and identify two sources of computational waste: (i) during rollouts, many prompts produce no learning signal, and (ii) during policy updates, optimization incurs high computational cost. Guided by these findings, we introduce two techniques that accelerate RL-based tool-calling training, achieving substantial wall-clock speedup without degrading performance.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了LLM agents中工具调用的有效性和效率问题。有效性方面，发现评估流程对实现细节高度敏感，导致排行榜排名不可靠；效率方面，识别了RL训练中的计算浪费，并提出两种加速技术。
AI.motivation: 工具调用是LLM agent的核心能力，但现有评估和训练方法存在未被充分认识的问题：评估结果受微小实现细节影响，RL训练存在大量计算浪费。
AI.method: 1) 系统分析评估流程中随机种子、系统提示、多轮模板等实现选择对结果的影响；2) 识别RL训练中rollout和策略更新阶段的计算浪费；3) 提出两种加速RL训练的技术。
AI.result: 评估结果对随机种子、系统提示等实现细节高度敏感；多轮设置下缺乏标准化导致排行榜不可靠；提出的加速技术在不降低性能的前提下实现显著加速。
AI.conclusion: 工具调用的评估需要更严格的标准化，RL训练效率有大幅提升空间，所提加速方法有效。

title: Beyond Tool Adoption: A Practical Five-Stage Developmental Continuum for AI Literacy in Higher Education
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) literacy is increasingly recognized as a foundational competency for all university graduates. Yet students' engagement with AI tools often clusters at two problematic extremes: avoidance driven by fear, mistrust, ethical concern, or lack of access, and uncritical reliance that produces fluent output while masking misunderstanding.
