Existing AI literacy frameworks provide valuable competency definitions, but most offer limited guidance for diagnosing where learners begin and how they progress toward responsible, critical engagement. This paper proposes a five-stage AI Literacy Continuum -- 1) Not Yet Engaged, 2) Uncritical Use, 3) Informed Use, 4) Critical Evaluation, and 5) Improvement -- that describes developmental orientations toward AI use in higher education. The continuum complements dimensional frameworks by providing educators with a practical diagnostic and instructional pathway aligned with international frameworks, including UNESCO and OECD. We present a design-based implementation case from North Carolina State University, where credit-bearing courses and intensive hands-on workshops engaged more than 330 participants between Fall 2024 and Spring 2026. Because the implementation did not use a validated pre/post instrument or comparison group, we frame the findings as observational and practice-based: participants exhibited behaviors consistent with movement from non-engagement or uncritical use toward informed engagement, while sustained and discipline-embedded experiences produced stronger evidence of critical evaluation and improvement-oriented practice. We discuss curricular pathways, equity considerations, assessment strategies, and argue that AI literacy should be understood not as tool adoption alone but as a developmental capacity to understand, evaluate, and responsibly apply AI systems in disciplinary and societal contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个五阶段AI素养连续体模型，从“未参与”到“改进”，用于诊断和指导大学生对AI的批判性、负责任的使用，并通过北卡罗来纳州立大学的实践案例（330+参与者）提供观察性证据。
AI.motivation: 现有AI素养框架提供了有价值的能力定义，但缺乏对学习者起点和发展路径的诊断指导；学生在使用AI时往往陷入“因恐惧回避”或“不加批判依赖”两个极端，亟需一个阶段性的发展框架来促进负责任的、批判性的AI参与。
AI.method: 提出五阶段AI素养连续体（未参与→不加批判使用→知情使用→批判性评估→改进）；采用设计导向的实施方案，在北卡罗来纳州立大学开展学分课程和强化工作坊，涵盖330+参与者；基于观察和实践报告发现，未使用已验证的前后测工具或对照组。
AI.result: 参与者行为显示从非参与或不加批判使用向知情参与的转变；持续且嵌入学科的经验更能产生批判性评估和改进导向实践的证据。
AI.conclusion: AI素养应被理解为一种发展性能力，而非单纯的工具采纳；需考虑课程路径、公平性、评估策略，并与UNESCO、OECD等国际框架对接。

title: Statistical Testing on Directed Graphs by Surrogate Data Generation
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Signal and Information Processing over Networks
summary: In recent years, graph signal processing has emerged as a powerful framework at the intersection of signal processing and graph theory, providing tools for the analysis of signals defined on nodes while accounting for their relationships represented by edges. These tools have been successfully applied to various settings, including statistical hypothesis testing. In particular, non-parametric approaches based on surrogate generation have been proposed for signals on undirected graphs. However, they are yet to be extended to directed graphs. In this work, we first revisit the notion of stationary graph signals on directed graphs. Specifically, and through the eigendecomposition of the graph shift operator, we define directed graph wide-sense stationary signals. Then, we propose a new framework to generate surrogate graph signals that preserve covariance structure under stationarity assumptions. Null distributions of the test metric can then be constructed from these surrogates and serve as a reference for the empirical data. Finally, we provide guiding examples and an application on real data, in which we compare the performance of our framework with existing techniques for undirected graphs or based on naive permutation, demonstrating feasibility and superiority of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 本文将有向图上的平稳图信号概念进行重新定义，并基于此提出一种新的替代数据生成框架，用于有向图信号的非参数统计假设检验，实验证明该方法优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有基于替代数据生成的非参数统计假设检验方法仅适用于无向图，尚未推广到有向图，作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 首先通过图移位算子的特征分解重新定义有向图上的宽平稳信号；然后提出一种保留协方差结构的替代图信号生成框架；利用这些替代样本构建检验指标的零分布，作为经验数据的参考。
AI.result: 通过引导性示例和真实数据应用，与现有无向图方法及朴素置换方法对比，证明所提框架的可行性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 成功将有向图纳入图信号非参数假设检验框架，提出的替代生成方法能有效保留协方差结构，在实际应用中表现更优。

title: A Multi-Domain Red Teaming Framework for Safety, Robustness, and Fairness Evaluation of Medical Large Language Models
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures. To be presented at the Text2Story 2026 Workshop (Delft, The Netherlands, 29 March 2026); CEUR Workshop Proceedings (forthcoming). Affiliation: John Snow Labs Inc
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across healthcare, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture model behavior under adversarial or ethically complex conditions common in clinical practice. We developed a multi-domain red teaming framework evaluating eleven contemporary LLMs across 690 clinically grounded scenarios spanning nine domains and over 150 subcategories. Scenarios incorporated adversarial transformations, and responses were assessed using a seven-dimension rubric with LLM-assisted scoring and human-in-the-loop validation. Results revealed substantial performance variance, with mean scores ranging from 0.791 to 0.984. Critically, several high-performing systems produced complete failures in individual safety-critical scenarios, demonstrating that aggregate accuracy masks clinically meaningful risk. The highest-performing systems (X-BAI, GPT-5, Claude Opus 4.1) achieved scores above 0.97 with low variance, while performance varied significantly across domains. Equity-related tasks showed 10-20% error amplification with demographic modifications, and human reviewers identified clinically relevant failures missed by automated evaluation. Our findings demonstrate that performance variance and worst-case failures provide more clinically meaningful reliability indicators than mean accuracy alone, and that hybrid evaluation approaches combining automation with clinician oversight are essential for credible safety assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个多领域红队测试框架，评估了11个LLM在690个临床场景下的表现，发现平均准确率掩盖了关键的安全风险，并提出了结合自动化与临床专家审核的混合评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试无法捕捉LLM在临床实践中常见的对抗性或伦理复杂场景下的行为，缺乏对模型安全风险的可靠评估。
AI.method: 构建多领域红队测试框架，涵盖9个领域150多个子类别共690个临床场景，引入对抗性变换，采用七维度评分体系并结合LLM辅助打分与人工审核验证。
AI.result: 模型平均得分范围0.791-0.984，高分系统在个别安全关键场景出现完全失败；公平性相关任务在人口统计信息修改后错误率放大10-20%；人工审核发现了自动化评估遗漏的临床相关失败。
AI.conclusion: 性能方差和最坏情况失败比平均准确率更能反映临床可靠性，混合评估（自动化+临床专家审核）对可信的安全评估至关重要。

title: On the evolution of the concept of probability as a mirror of the evolution of reason
summary: Over the centuries, probability theory has grown from the calculus of games of chance into a central framework for reasoning under uncertainty. This article interprets that evolution not merely as a mathematical history, but as a transformation of rationality itself. From Pascal and Fermat's combinatorial symmetry to the inductive logic of Bayes and Laplace, from Poisson's statistics of events to Kolmogorov's axiomatic formalization, probability progressively incorporated uncertainty, time, and coherence into scientific judgment. This trajectory reaches a mature epistemological form in modern Bayesian inference, especially in Tarantola's view of probability as a logic of information, where prior knowledge and data are combined coherently. Yet this framework also exposes a limit: probability quantifies uncertainty about well-defined propositions, but does not by itself formalize the vagueness of the concepts used to describe them. The article therefore examines how rationality extends beyond probability. Fuzzy logic is presented as a rigorous language for graded meaning and qualitative judgment, while deep learning is analyzed as a distinct, powerful mode of prediction based on geometric interpolation and optimization rather than explicit inference. By situating probability, fuzzy logic, and deep learning in a common historical and epistemological perspective, the article clarifies their roles and limits. It argues that contemporary scientific rationality cannot be reduced to data-driven performance alone, but requires the explicit articulation of uncertainty, vagueness, and inference.

AI.tldr: 本文追溯概率论从赌博计数到现代科学推理的演变，认为其本质是理性形式的转变。通过分析概率论、模糊逻辑和深度学习三者的历史与认识论定位，论证当代科学理性不能仅依赖数据驱动，而需明确表达不确定性、模糊性和推理过程。
AI.motivation: 超越概率论的数学史叙事，将其视为理性本身的转型过程，并探讨概率论在形式化概念模糊性方面的局限，从而引出对模糊逻辑和深度学习等补充框架的认识论审视。
AI.method: 采用历史-认识论的分析方法，梳理概率论从帕斯卡、费马到柯尔莫哥洛夫、再到贝叶斯推断（特别是Tarantola的概率即信息逻辑观）的发展脉络，并将其与模糊逻辑（作为分级意义的形式语言）和深度学习（作为基于几何插值与优化的预测模式）进行对比分析。
AI.result: 概率论有效量化了关于明确定义命题的不确定性，但无法形式化描述这些概念本身的模糊性；模糊逻辑提供了处理分级意义和定性判断的严谨语言；深度学习则代表了基于几何插值和优化的独特、强大的预测模式，而非显式推理。
AI.conclusion: 当代科学理性不能简化为数据驱动的性能表现，而需要明确地整合不确定性（概率论）、模糊性（模糊逻辑）和推理（深度学习作为补充）这三重维度。

title: Generative AI and Digital Ecosystem Resilience: A Proactive Lifecycle-Based Survey
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Accepted for publication in IEEE Access (May 2026)
summary: The proliferation of adversarial synthetic content, accelerated by Generative AI (GenAI) is rendering traditional reactive detection methods ineffective. This survey synthesizes emerging research to demonstrate a paradigm shift toward the proactive detection of emerging inauthentic narratives. In this survey, we adopt a unified, lifecycle-based taxonomy to combine socio-technical lifecycle models of adversarial campaigns with advanced computational methodologies for emerging inauthentic narrative detection. By structuring the analysis around the C5 Interaction Model (Context, Causes, Content, Cycle of Amplification, Consequences), we integrate different research streams from machine learning and social science. To differentiate spread patterns of synthetic amplification from authentic baseline traffic, this paper surveys state-of-the-art techniques for modeling the creation, seeding, and propagation of fresh narratives, including the analysis of Coordinated Inauthentic Behavior (CIB), epidemiological modeling, and Hawkes process. This survey also provides a systematic review of proactive detection methods for adversarial threats at different stages in the C5 interaction model, specifically, anomaly detection in high-dimensional embedding spaces, unsupervised coordination detection on multi-layer graphs, and agentic AI systems. Finally, this survey addresses challenges posed by GenAI, including the difficulty of tracking rapidly changing threats and multi-level distributional drift, and it outlines a future research agenda focused on detecting anomalous clusters and building anticipatory and resilient systems. This survey provides a comprehensive, lifecycle-based review of methods for the proactive detection of emerging synthetic threats for more resilient information ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了从传统被动检测向主动检测新兴虚假叙事的范式转变，基于C5交互模型（背景、原因、内容、放大循环、后果）的生命周期分类法，整合了机器学习与社会科学方法，系统回顾了对抗性合成内容（如协调不真实行为、流行病学建模、霍克斯过程）的主动检测技术，并讨论了生成式AI带来的挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI加速了对抗性合成内容的扩散，传统的被动式检测方法已不足以应对，亟需转向能够主动检测新兴虚假叙事的方法论。
AI.method: 采用统一的、基于生命周期的分类法，以C5交互模型为核心框架，整合机器学习和社会科学研究流，系统综述了创建、播种和传播新叙事的建模技术（如CIB分析、流行病学建模、霍克斯过程），以及不同阶段的主动检测方法（高维嵌入空间异常检测、多层图无监督协调检测、智能体AI系统）。
AI.result: 提供了对主动检测对抗性合成内容方法的系统性回顾，涵盖从叙事创建到传播放大的全生命周期，并分析了生成式AI带来的新挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需要转向构建具有预见性和韧性的信息系统，未来研究应聚焦于检测异常簇和开发主动防御系统，以应对生成式AI驱动的快速变化威胁和多层次分布漂移。

title: Statistical Analysis of using the Shapley Value for Sensor Anomaly Localization with Accurate Classifiers
summary: Recent publications have suggested using the Shap- ley value for sensor anomaly/attack localization. We study the performance of such an approach by using mathematically de- fined optimum binary classifiers in the Shapley value calculation. To judge localization performance, we study the ability of the Shapley value of a given sensor observation to determine if that observation is anomalous. First, we prove that for cases with independent sensor observations, an optimized anomaly test using the Shapley value is equivalent to an optimized lower-complexity anomaly test using a single term in the Shapley value calculation, yielding the exact same probability of error. For some popular dependent observation cases involving two sensors, including correlated bivariate Gaussian/Laplacian probability density functions and constant/Gaussian at- tacks/anomalies, we prove that these two tests are fundamentally different, yielding different decision regions and error probabil- ities. Further, we prove that the Shapley value test is sometimes strictly inferior to the other (single term in Shapley calculation) test in certain statistically dependent bivariate Gaussian scenarios with large correlation magnitude and additive attacks/anomalies, while it is strictly superior in others, depending on the sign of the correlation. One can combine these two approaches to obtain a strictly better approach in these cases. These results, which provide the first theoretical statistical analysis of Shapley-based localization, seem very interesting based on the wide acceptance of the Shapley value by many researchers and should encourage further research on this topic. Numerical results are provided which illustrate our findings.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对基于Shapley值的传感器异常定位方法进行了理论统计分析。通过数学定义的二分类器，证明了在独立观测下Shapley值测试等价于低复杂度单术语测试；而在依赖观测下两者本质不同，且在不同相关场景下各有优劣，可结合两者获得更优性能。
AI.motivation: 近期的研究提出使用Shapley值进行传感器异常/攻击定位，但缺乏系统的理论性能分析。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过数学上定义的二分类器严格分析Shapley值在异常定位中的理论表现。
AI.method: 利用数学定义的最优二分类器计算Shapley值，比较基于Shapley值的异常检测与基于Shapley计算中单个术语的低复杂度异常检测的性能差异。考虑了独立观测和依赖观测（相关双变量高斯/拉普拉斯分布）两种情况，并进行了理论证明与数值验证。
AI.result: 1）独立观测下，Shapley值测试等价于单术语测试，误差概率相同；2）依赖观测下两者产生不同决策区域和误差概率；3）在大相关性幅度的双变量高斯场景中，Shapley值测试有时严格劣于单术语测试，有时严格优于，取决于相关性的正负；4）两种方法可结合获得更优结果。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次对Shapley值在传感器异常定位中的性能进行了严格的理论统计分析，揭示了其在依赖观测情况下的局限性，并指出结合不同方法可进一步提升性能。这一发现对于广泛接受Shapley值的研究社区具有重要意义，应鼓励进一步研究。

title: State-Space Modelling and Analysis
summary: Control science is a core representative of the third industrial revolution and is so important to modern civilization. Control systems are the main subject of control science and may involve many aspects of consideration, such as hardware consideration, software consideration, operation consideration, maintenance consideration, economy consideration, society consideration. However, besides all such aspects of consideration, one aspect that is most essential to the control system is methodology consideration in mathematical sense, knowledge on which is what we refer to as control theory. Besides its importance from the mathematical perspective, control theory is even more charming as it is deeply rooted in practical applications. Charms of control theory consist in both know-why and know-how and it is the fusion of control theory and practical applications that highlights such charms. Control theory for practical applications, especially when somewhat with so-called ``advanced'' flavour, involves several fundamental aspects. This article introduces the State-Space Modelling and Analysis aspect of Advanced Control Theory for Practical Applications [1,2].

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了先进控制理论中状态空间建模与分析这一基础方面，强调控制理论是数学方法论与实践应用深度融合的产物。
AI.motivation: 控制科学是现代文明的核心，控制理论在数学视角和实践应用中都具有重要意义，为了展示控制理论在实践中的魅力，需要介绍其基本方面。
AI.method: 从控制科学的重要性出发，引出控制系统的多维度考量，聚焦于方法论层面的数学考量——即控制理论，进而介绍状态空间建模与分析这一基础方面。
AI.result: 明确了控制理论的核心在于知因（know-why）与知术（know-how）的结合，并指出了状态空间建模与分析是先进控制理论实际应用的基础方面。
AI.conclusion: 控制理论的魅力在于理论（数学方法论）与实践（实际应用）的融合，状态空间建模与分析是这一融合的关键切入点。

title: TCAR-Gen: Temporal Graph Retrieval with Evidence Fusion for Knowledge-Grounded Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation systems struggle with temporal reasoning and evidence fusion when answering complex questions over historical criminal case narratives. Existing approaches either retrieve independently of query semantics or fail to integrate multiple evidence sources coherently. We propose Temporal Context Augmented Retrieval Generation (TCAR-Gen), a framework that combines query-conditioned graph neural networks, temporal evidence fusion, and chain-of-trees reasoning to ground answer generation in retrieved evidence. On the Victorian Crime Diaries benchmark, TCAR-Gen achieves 0.3738 Recall@5, outperforming Vanilla RAG, Temporal RAG, GraphRAG-C, and GraphRAG-T across seven query types including multi-hop reasoning and counterfactual questions. Ablation studies reveal that the context graph, temporal penalty mechanism, and query conditioning are critical components. Cross-model evaluation across five language model (GPT-OSS 20B to TinyLlama 1.1B) demonstrates that TCAR-Gen maintains robust retrieval coverage at smaller model scales, though generation quality degrades substantially with reduced model capacity. Our work shows that explicit temporal modelling and multi-branch evidence fusion are essential for faithful, reasoning-intensive question answering over knowledge-grounded corpora.

AI.tldr: 提出TCAR-Gen框架，结合图神经网络、时序证据融合和链树推理，在历史犯罪叙事数据集上显著优于现有RAG方法，并揭示了时序建模和多源证据融合的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统在处理复杂历史犯罪案件的时间推理和证据融合时表现不佳，要么检索与查询语义无关，要么无法连贯整合多源证据。
AI.method: 提出TCAR-Gen框架，包含三个核心组件：查询条件图神经网络（query-conditioned GNN）、时序证据融合（temporal evidence fusion）和链树推理（chain-of-trees reasoning），将答案生成建立在检索证据之上。
AI.result: 在Victorian Crime Diaries基准上，TCAR-Gen的Recall@5达到0.3738，超越Vanilla RAG、Temporal RAG、GraphRAG-C和GraphRAG-T等基线；消融实验表明上下文图、时序惩罚机制和查询条件化是关键组件；跨模型评估显示小规模模型检索鲁棒性保持但生成质量下降。
AI.conclusion: 显式时序建模和多分支证据融合对于基于知识图谱的推理密集型问答任务至关重要，能够实现更忠实、更可靠的答案生成。

title: Evaluating Interactive Reasoning in Large Language Models: A Hierarchical Benchmark with Executable Games
summary: We introduce a multi-turn interactive framework for reasoning evaluation that treats reasoning as active evidence acquisition and belief updating. Wherein, LLMs receive only the task rules, must issue targeted queries to a hidden environment, integrate partial observations over time, and decide when to submit a final answer. Beyond standard success rate and interaction efficiency, we evaluate contextual robustness under controlled contextual perturbations, and metacognitive adaptation through counterfactual revision and necessity judgment. We instantiate the framework as a benchmark of 474 executable games, each evaluated under five fixed configuration search spaces corresponding to five difficulty levels, and evaluate a broad set of frontier LLMs. Results show that the benchmark is highly discriminative, exposing large differences not only in success rate but also in interaction efficiency. Moreover, we empirically show that contextual perturbations cause moderate but consistent declines, whereas counterfactual revision and necessity judgment lead to much larger drops.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多轮交互式推理评估框架，将推理视为主动证据获取和信念更新的过程。LLMs需主动查询隐藏环境、整合部分观测并决定何时给出答案。基于474个可执行游戏构建基准，评估了多个前沿LLM，发现该基准在成功率和交互效率上具有高度区分性，且上下文扰动和反事实修订会显著影响模型表现。
AI.motivation: 现有推理评估多聚焦于单步或静态推理，缺乏对模型在主动信息获取、不确定性管理以及元认知适应等动态交互能力方面的系统评估。
AI.method: 构建了多轮交互式推理框架，LLMs仅接收任务规则，需主动向隐藏环境发出查询、整合部分观测、决定何时提交答案。基准包含474个可执行游戏，每个游戏有5个难度级别的配置搜索空间，评估指标包括成功率、交互效率、上下文鲁棒性（在受控上下文扰动下）以及元认知适应（反事实修订和必要性判断）。
AI.result: 基准在成功率和交互效率上对前沿LLMs具有高度区分性。上下文扰动导致中等但一致的性能下降，而反事实修订和必要性判断导致更大的性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 该交互式推理框架能更全面地评估LLMs的推理能力，揭示了静态评估中难以观察的差异，特别是元认知适应能力的不足是当前模型的显著短板。

title: Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows
summary: While the rapid adoption of multimodal generative models offers immense potential, it has also increased the risks of harmful content synthesis, deepfakes, and copyright infringements. To address these challenges, concept erasure has emerged as a prospective safeguard. However, as the field gradually transitions from U-Net-based diffusion models to Rectified Flow Transformers, erasure research has struggled to keep pace. In this work, we introduce GEM, a simple but highly effective erasure framework for Rectified Flow models. As part of our contribution, we establish a principled bridge between trajectory-based unlearning grounded in Generative Flow Networks and classic teacher-guided erasure: we translate trajectory-based signals into a teacher-guided flow-matching setup that unifies the strengths of both paradigms. Concretely, a teacher provides complementary attraction and repulsion signals that we combine into a single geometric guidance objective, yielding targeted suppression of unwanted concepts while preserving benign generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GEM框架，用于Rectified Flow模型的概念擦除，通过将轨迹信号转化为教师引导的流匹配设置，实现有害概念抑制与良性生成保留。
AI.motivation: 多模态生成模型快速普及带来有害内容合成、深度伪造和版权侵权等风险，而现有概念擦除研究主要针对U-Net扩散模型，未能跟上向Rectified Flow Transformer的转型步伐。
AI.method: 建立生成流网络轨迹取消学习与经典教师引导擦除之间的桥梁，将轨迹信号转化为教师引导的流匹配设置；教师提供互补的吸引和排斥信号，组合成单一几何引导目标。
AI.result: 实现对目标有害概念的精确抑制，同时保持良性内容生成能力不受影响。
AI.conclusion: GEM是首个针对Rectified Flow模型的高效擦除框架，统一了轨迹取消学习与教师引导擦除两种范式的优势。

title: Tracing GenAI Literacy: Uncovering Student-AI Interaction Patterns in Academic Writing through Epistemic Network Analysis
summary: As Generative AI (GenAI) becomes integral to education, fostering GenAI literacy is critical. However, current assessments largely rely on self-reported scales, lacking insights into how literacy manifests in actual learning processes. This study leverages Learning Analytics (LA) to bridge this gap. We collected interaction logs from 162 university students engaged in a GenAI-assisted abstract writing task. Using Epistemic Network Analysis (ENA), we modeled and compared the questioning strategies of students with varying GenAI literacy levels. Preliminary results reveal distinct interaction signatures: high-literacy students engage in iterative refinement and strategic questioning, while low-literacy students rely on direct generation commands. This work contributes to the workshop by demonstrating how process data can characterize GenAI literacy, paving the way for data-driven literacy assessment and real-time interventions.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过收集162名大学生的交互日志数据，利用学习分析和认知网络分析（ENA），对比了不同生成式AI素养水平学生的提问策略。结果表明，高素养学生倾向于迭代优化和策略性提问，而低素养学生更依赖直接生成命令。研究展示了如何通过过程数据来表征GenAI素养，为数据驱动的素养评估和实时干预提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 当前GenAI素养评估主要依赖自我报告量表，缺乏对实际学习过程中素养表现的深入理解。本研究旨在利用学习分析（LA）技术填补这一空白，通过分析实际交互过程数据来揭示不同素养水平学生的行为特征。
AI.method: 收集162名大学生在GenAI辅助摘要写作任务中的交互日志，运用认知网络分析（ENA）对学生的提问策略进行建模和比较。
AI.result: 高GenAI素养学生展现出迭代优化和策略性提问的交互模式；低GenAI素养学生则更多依赖直接的生成式命令。
AI.conclusion: 过程数据可以有效表征GenAI素养，为数据驱动的素养评估和实时干预奠定基础。

authors: Martha L. Sabogal De La Pava
title: When Shortages Lead to Export Restrictions: A Computational Study
summary: Globalization has enabled companies to leverage cost efficiencies; however, it has increased exposure to disruption risks that threaten supply stability. Among these, export bans have emerged as a systemic challenge, often arising as a secondary effect of conventional supply capacity disruptions. The pharmaceutical industry is particularly vulnerable to bans because of the criticality of keeping life-saving medications available, yet such disruptions also jeopardize patient health globally as well as challenge company operations. This paper proposes a supply chain design model that incorporates the relationship between conventional disruption risks (quality-related capacity failures and natural disasters) and export bans that may be induced when the drug is projected to be in short supply. The model is a two-stage stochastic mixed integer program, where the systemic setting yields a second-stage problem with one binary variable and continuous variables. The structure motivates the study of three tailored solution methods: the Alternating Integer L-shaped Cut, Alternating Disjunctive Cut, and Alternating Bilinear Cut methods. In the nearly-continuous second stage context, the Alternating Integer L-shaped cuts perform best. Using an oncology drug case study, we study effects of systemic, induced risk and quantify the value of incorporating disruptions into supply chain design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个考虑出口禁令（作为传统 disruptions 的次级效应）的药品供应链设计模型，采用两阶段随机混合整数规划，并开发了三种求解方法，其中 Alternating Integer L-shaped Cut 方法表现最佳。通过肿瘤药物案例研究，量化了将系统性风险纳入供应链设计的价值。
AI.motivation: 全球化在带来成本效益的同时也增加了供应链中断风险，出口禁令作为系统性挑战在制药业尤为突出，威胁救命药物的可及性。现有模型忽视了出口禁令与传统中断风险之间的关联关系。
AI.method: 建立两阶段随机混合整数规划模型，其中第二阶段包含一个二进制变量和连续变量。设计了三种定制化求解方法：交替整数L形切割法、交替析取切割法和交替双线性切割法。
AI.result: 在近乎连续的第二阶段背景下，交替整数L形切割法表现最佳。通过肿瘤药物案例研究，验证了模型的有效性并量化了纳入中断风险的价值。
AI.conclusion: 将出口禁令作为系统性诱导风险纳入供应链设计是必要的，所提模型和方法能够有效支撑制药企业在全球化背景下的韧性供应链决策。

title: Bandit Simulation for Average Reward Inference
summary: Multi-arm bandit algorithms are increasingly used in online platforms, clinical trials, and social science experiments, but valid statistical inference on their performance remains an open challenge. After deploying bandits, a natural question is whether one can construct a confidence interval for its mean reward and assess whether it reliably outperforms a baseline policy. The total reward achieved in any single bandit deployment is random, and deploying a bandit twice on the same population typically yields different reward trajectories due to stochastic rewards. Standard statistical inference methods cannot be used because bandit algorithms introduce complex dependencies in the collected data, which violate the i.i.d. assumption underlying many classical approaches. Moreover, existing inference methods for adaptively collected data only apply to estimands that do not depend on the data-collection algorithm (such as the mean reward under a fixed action). We propose Bandit Simulation for Inference (BSI), a framework that fits a simulator of the bandit environment from observed data--either on-policy or off-policy--and uses it to estimate the mean reward under any evaluation policy, including adaptive blackbox algorithms. BSI formally propagates uncertainty in the estimated simulator parameters into the confidence interval construction. Furthermore, for BSI to be valid, it requires only weak exploration assumptions on the behavior policy and avoids importance weighting. We prove that BSI yields asymptotically valid confidence intervals, and demonstrate empirically that it maintains nominal coverage in settings where standard off-policy evaluation methods fail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BSI框架，通过拟合模拟器来估计自适应算法（如多臂赌博机）的均值奖励，并构建有效的置信区间，解决了传统方法无法处理算法自适应性和数据依赖性的问题。
AI.motivation: 多臂赌博机算法在在线平台、临床试验等领域广泛应用，但在部署后如何对其均值奖励进行有效的统计推断（如构建置信区间）仍是一个开放挑战，因为自适应数据收集破坏了经典方法的i.i.d.假设。
AI.method: 提出BSI（Bandit Simulation for Inference）框架：从观测数据（on-policy或off-policy）中拟合赌博机环境的模拟器，利用该模拟器估计评估策略（包括自适应黑箱算法）的均值奖励，并形式化地将模拟器参数估计的不确定性传播到置信区间构建中。
AI.result: 理论证明了BSI能够生成渐近有效的置信区间；实验表明在标准离线策略评估方法失效的场景下，BSI仍能保持名义覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: BSI为自适应算法的统计推断提供了一种有效且实用的解决方案，仅需对行为策略有弱探索假设，且无需重要性加权。

title: Control of Flight
summary: The main focus of this talk is to present mathematical fundamentals, state-of-the-art, technical challenges and open problems in control of flight for atmospheric vehicles, such as aircraft and other aerial platforms. Reduced order modeling and flight simulation key features for control applications will be discussed. The emphasis is on the theoretical and engineering aspects of creating and transitioning to practice guidance and flight control systems with guarantees of closed-loop stability, robustness and performance.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了大气飞行器（如飞机等）飞行控制中的数学基础、最新技术、技术挑战和开放问题，重点讨论了降阶建模、飞行仿真以及具有闭环稳定性、鲁棒性和性能保证的制导与飞行控制系统的理论与实践。
AI.motivation: 大气飞行器飞行控制系统需要在复杂环境下实现稳定、鲁棒和高性能的控制，但目前仍面临诸多理论和技术挑战，亟需系统梳理数学基础、前沿技术和开放问题，以推动理论向工程实践的转化。
AI.method: 通过综述飞行控制的数学基础与最新进展，讨论降阶建模和飞行仿真在控制应用中的关键特性，重点分析制导与飞行控制系统的闭环稳定性、鲁棒性和性能保证的理论与工程实现路径。
AI.result: 系统梳理了大气飞行器飞行控制领域的核心数学工具、技术现状、关键挑战及开放性问题，明确了降阶建模和仿真在控制设计中的重要作用。
AI.conclusion: 飞行控制领域需要进一步弥合理论与工程实践之间的差距，特别是在保证闭环系统稳定性、鲁棒性和性能方面，降阶建模和仿真技术是实现这一目标的关键环节。

title: LLMs for Cardiovascular Risk Prediction from Structured Clinical Data
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Systems, Blockchain, and Communication Technologies
summary: Coronary artery disease (CAD) remains one of the leading causes of death globally, highlighting the need for reliable predictive systems to support early diagnosis and risk assessment. While traditional machine learning models perform well on structured clinical data, large language models (LLMs) present new possibilities to interpret medical information expressed in natural language. In this work, we develop a hybrid framework that bridges structured clinical data and natural-language representations for CAD prediction. Using a publicly available dataset of 1,190 patient records with 11 clinical attributes, structured variables are converted into interpretable feature representations and synthetic clinical narratives using LLMs. A validation pipeline performs reverse extraction of clinical variables and computes a consistency score with the original records, achieving an average fidelity of 94.61%. We then evaluate four conventional machine learning models and compare their performance with LLM-based classification under zero-shot and few-shot prompting settings. We use two LLMs here, GPT and Gemini. Experimental results show that Random Forest achieves the highest accuracy. Despite this advantage, LLM-based classification remains beneficial in real-world clinical settings. This is because LLMs operate directly on natural language patient descriptions, meaning that sensitive numerical patient data such as exact lab values, blood pressure readings, and diagnostic codes are kept private. Findings suggest that combining structured clinical data with LLM-generated narratives can enable new directions for hybrid clinical prediction systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合框架，将结构化临床数据与大语言模型（LLM）生成的自然语言叙述相结合，用于冠心病预测。随机森林取得最高准确率，但LLM方法因能保护敏感数值隐私而在临床中仍有价值。
AI.motivation: 冠心病仍是全球主要死因之一，需要可靠的预测系统支持早期诊断。传统机器学习模型在结构化数据上表现良好，但大语言模型能解释自然语言中的医学信息，两者结合有望提升预测能力。
AI.method: 使用1190名患者的11个临床属性数据集，将结构化变量转换为LLM可解释的特征表示和合成临床叙述。通过验证流水线反向提取临床变量并计算一致性评分（平均94.61%）。评估四种传统机器学习模型与两种LLM（GPT、Gemini）在零样本和少样本提示下的分类性能。
AI.result: 随机森林达到最高准确率。LLM分类虽准确率不及传统模型，但能直接处理自然语言描述，保护敏感数值数据（如实验室值、血压读数、诊断代码）的隐私。
AI.conclusion: 将结构化临床数据与LLM生成的叙述相结合，可为混合临床预测系统开辟新方向。

title: A Multi-AI-agent Framework Enabling End-to-end Finite Element Analysis for Solid Mechanics Problems
summary: Finite element analysis (FEA) is the most important numerical approach for solid mechanics. Challenges of FEA include a steep learning curve for entry-level users and potential false simulations due to incorrect definitions of key simulation components, such as boundary conditions, load cases, and solution variables. Years of engineering experience are usually necessary for real-world problem-solving. To address these issues, we present AbaqusAgent, a multi-agent framework grounded in large language models (LLMs) for solid mechanics analyses. AbaqusAgent is developed to facilitate analysis case generation and execution using Abaqus, one of the most widely used FEA packages, by turning users' natural-language instructions into executed FEA analyses and result visualization. AbaqusAgent is composed of six agents, including interpreter, architect, input writer, runner, reviewer, and visualizer agents, encompassing all the essential pre-processing and post-processing steps of standard FEA analyses. A wide variety of 50 solid mechanics problems have been successfully validated, achieving an overall success rate of 86%. Beyond improving the efficiency of FEA for solid mechanics problems and lowering the barrier to computational mechanics education, AbaqusAgent advances the human-simulation interaction paradigm and enables integration with AI-empowered optimization and material characterization workflows. The code is available at https://github.com/LIRAM-LIN/AbaqusAgent

AI.tldr: 本文提出AbaqusAgent——一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，能够将用户自然语言指令转化为Abaqus有限元分析的完整流程（包括前处理、求解和后处理），在50个固体力学问题上达到86%的成功率，显著降低了FEA使用门槛。
AI.motivation: 传统有限元分析存在学习曲线陡峭、关键参数（边界条件、载荷等）易定义错误导致虚假仿真、需要多年工程经验才能解决实际问题等痛点，亟需一种能降低使用门槛、提高效率的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含六个智能体（解释器、架构师、输入文件编写器、运行器、审查器、可视化器）的多智能体框架，各智能体分别负责自然语言理解、模型架构设计、Abaqus输入文件生成、仿真执行、结果审查和可视化，覆盖标准FEA的全流程。
AI.result: 在50个涵盖广泛类别的固体力学问题上进行了验证，整体成功率达到86%，能够自动生成并执行有效的FEA分析及结果可视化。
AI.conclusion: AbaqusAgent不仅提高了固体力学FEA的效率并降低了计算力学教育门槛，还推动了人-仿真交互范式的进步，并可集成到AI驱动的优化和材料表征工作流中。

title: Adaptive data selection improves wearable prediction under low baseline performance
summary: Adaptive sensing strategies that selectively sample data are increasingly used in wearable health systems to improve prediction performance under limited data budgets, yet their benefits across individuals remain poorly understood. Here, we evaluate adaptive selection of time windows for model training under fixed measurement budgets across multiple sensing modalities, including heart rate, activity, and ecological momentary assessment (EMA), in a longitudinal wearable dataset. We quantify performance gains relative to random sampling using both area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) and F1 score. Adaptive strategies yield substantial improvements in AUROC for participants with low baseline performance (with gains up to 0.7), while offering limited or negative gains for participants with strong baselines. Across modalities, adaptive gain is strongly inversely correlated with baseline performance (Pearson r = -0.67; Spearman p = -0.62). At the participant level, most individuals benefit in AUROC (60-80% across modalities), although improvements in F1 are smaller and less consistent. These findings show that adaptive sensing is not uniformly beneficial, but instead provides the greatest value in underperforming settings. Our results support selective deployment strategies that tailor adaptive sensing based on baseline performance to improve efficiency in wearable health monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了可穿戴健康系统中自适应感知策略的效果，发现其对基线性能较低的参与者提升显著（AUROC提升高达0.7），而对基线较好的参与者提升有限甚至为负。自适应增益与基线性能呈强负相关（Pearson r = -0.67），建议根据基线性能选择性部署自适应感知。
AI.motivation: 自适应感知策略虽被广泛用于可穿戴健康系统以在有限数据预算下提升预测性能，但其在不同个体间的收益差异尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在纵向可穿戴数据集中，针对心率、活动、生态瞬时评估（EMA）等多种传感模态，评估在固定测量预算下自适应选择训练时间窗口的策略，并与随机采样对比，使用AUROC和F1分数量化性能增益。
AI.result: 自适应策略对基线性能低的参与者AUROC提升高达0.7；对基线强的参与者增益有限或为负。自适应增益与基线性能呈强负相关（Pearson r = -0.67; Spearman p = -0.62）。多数参与者AUROC受益（60-80%），但F1提升较小且不一致。
AI.conclusion: 自适应感知并非普遍有益，其在表现不佳的场景中价值最大。建议根据基线性能选择性部署自适应感知策略，以提高可穿戴健康监测的效率。

title: Improving Hospital Process Management through Process Mining: A Case Study on COVID-19 Clinical Pathways
summary: This study analyzes COVID-19 care pathways using the COVID Data for Shared Learning dataset. We build a transparent, reproducible pipeline that transforms heterogeneous clinical tables into a process-mining-ready event log and applies discovery, declarative conformance checking, and outcome analysis. The reconstructed pathways highlight the monitoring backbone of inpatient care, variability at the Emergency department-admission interface, and outcome differences driven by age and exposure to intensive care units. These insights support triage standardization, capacity planning, and step-down coordination from intensive care units to lower-acuity wards, showing how process mining can inform evidence-based hospital governance.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用COVID数据构建了一条透明、可复现的流水线，将异构临床数据转化为流程挖掘就绪的事件日志，并对COVID-19护理路径进行发现、声明性合规性检查及结果分析，揭示了住院护理的监测主干、急诊-入院接口的变异，以及年龄和ICU暴露导致的结果差异，从而支持分诊标准化、容量规划和ICU到普通病房的降级协调。
AI.motivation: 现有临床数据异构分散，缺乏对COVID-19护理路径系统性的流程挖掘分析，难以从数据中提取可操作的流程洞察来支持医院治理和资源规划。
AI.method: 构建一条透明可复现的数据处理流水线，将异构临床表格转换为流程挖掘就绪的事件日志；随后应用流程发现、声明性合规性检查和结果分析三种方法对护理路径进行建模和评估。
AI.result: 重建的护理路径展现了住院护理的监测主干结构；发现了急诊-入院接口处的路径变异；并确认了年龄和ICU暴露是影响护理结果差异的关键驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 流程挖掘能够从真实临床数据中提取可操作的流程洞察，为分诊标准化、容量规划和ICU向低等级病房的降级协调提供证据支持，助力循证医院治理。

title: Nonsmooth High-Order Averaging Theory with Application to Extremum Seeking Optimization and Control
summary: In this paper, we introduce a higher-order averaging theory and method for a wide range of nonsmooth systems that are generally characterized by the classical averaging canonical form. Utilizing tools from generalized derivatives theory, we provide a nonsmooth near-identity transformation analogous to the one in smooth averaging theory. Additionally, we exploit sharp calculus rules from lexicographic differentiation theory to provide a closed formula for nonsmooth first-order averaging, and for the first time in the literature, nonsmooth second-order averaging. In fact, our approach recovers the smooth averaging results, without needing to check, if the system under consideration is smooth. Equipped with a nonsmooth second-order averaging theory, we generalize literature results and introduce a class of control-affine extremum seeking systems that tolerate nonsmoothness in the vector fields and/or the objective function by analyzing its stability based on a closed formula analogous to first-order Lie bracket approximations available in the smooth literature. We provide numerical simulation results involving complicated nonsmooth functions to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于非光滑系统的高阶平均化理论和方法，利用广义导数和词典微分理论，首次实现了非光滑系统的二阶平均化，并应用于极值搜索控制系统中。
AI.motivation: 现有平均化理论主要针对光滑系统，而非光滑系统（如含摩擦、切换、不连续函数等）在实际工程中广泛存在，缺乏高阶平均化理论工具。
AI.method: 利用广义导数理论构造非光滑近恒等变换；借助词典微分理论的尖刻演算规则，推导出非光滑一阶和二阶平均化的闭式公式；该公式在系统光滑时自动退化到经典光滑结果。
AI.result: 首次在文献中实现了非光滑系统的二阶平均化理论；提出了能容忍向量场/目标函数非光滑性的控制仿射极值搜索系统；通过数值仿真验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该非光滑高阶平均化理论推广了经典光滑平均化结果，为非光滑系统的稳定性分析和控制器设计提供了新工具。

title: Efficient Synthetic Network Generation via Latent Embedding Reconstruction
summary: Network data are ubiquitous across the social sciences, biology, and information systems. Generating realistic synthetic network data has broad applications from network simulation to scientific discovery. However, many existing black-box approaches for network generation tend to overfit observed data while overlooking characteristic network structure, and incur substantial computational overhead at scale. These practical challenges call for synthetic network generation methods that are both efficient and capable of capturing structural properties of networks. In this paper, we introduce Synthetic Network Generation via Latent Embedding Reconstruction (SyNGLER), a general and efficient framework for synthetic network generation that builds on latent space network models. Given an observed network, SyNGLER first learns low-dimensional latent node embeddings via a latent space network model and then reconstructs the latent space by building a distribution-free generator over these embeddings. For generation, SyNGLER first samples (or resamples) node embeddings from the generator in the latent space and then produces synthetic networks using the latent space network model. Through the latent space framework, SyNGLER preserves unique characteristics in networks such as sparsity and node degree heterogeneity, while allowing for efficient training with lower computational cost than many existing deep architectures. We provide theoretical guarantees by developing consistency results on the distance between the true and synthetic edge distributions. Empirical studies further demonstrate the effectiveness of SyNGLER, which efficiently produces networks that better preserve key network characteristics such as network moments and degree distributions compared with existing approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/FeifanJiang/syngler.

AI.tldr: SyNGLER 是一个基于潜在空间网络模型的高效合成网络生成框架，通过学习低维节点嵌入并构建无分布生成器来生成保留网络结构特性的合成网络，具有理论保证且计算成本低于现有深度方法。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒网络生成方法容易过拟合、忽视网络结构特性，且大规模计算开销大，缺乏兼顾效率与结构保真度的合成网络生成方法。
AI.method: 首先通过潜在空间网络模型学习低维节点嵌入，然后在这些嵌入上构建无分布生成器以重构潜在空间；生成时从生成器中采样节点嵌入，再通过潜在空间网络模型生产合成网络。
AI.result: 理论方面证明了真实与合成网络边缘分布之间距离的一致性；实验表明 SyNGLER 能高效生成网络，且在保持网络矩、度分布等关键特性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SyNGLER 提供了一种高效、通用且有理论保障的合成网络生成方案，能有效保留网络的稀疏性和节点度异质性等特征。

title: A Framework for Motion Planning with Temporal Logic Precedence Specifications via Augmented Graphs of Convex Sets
summary: We present a framework for planning trajectories that avoid obstacles and satisfy logical precedence constraints expressed with a fragment of signal temporal logic (STL). Our approach models environments containing obstacles, keys, and doors, where collecting a key unlocks its associated door and potentially opens shorter paths to a goal. Based on an exact convex partitioning of the free space that encodes connectivity among convex free space, key, and door regions, we construct an augmented graph of convex sets (GCS) whose layered structure exactly encodes the key-door precedence logic. A shortest path in the augmented GCS simultaneously selects an optimal key collection sequence and computes an optimal continuous trajectory, providing an exact solution up to a finite Bézier curve parameterization.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于增强型凸集图（GCS）的轨迹规划框架，通过分层结构精确编码钥匙-门优先逻辑，在障碍物环境中同时优化钥匙收集序列和连续轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理带有钥匙-门等逻辑约束的避障轨迹规划时，往往将离散决策（选钥匙顺序）和连续轨迹优化分离处理，导致次优解或计算复杂。作者希望建立一个统一框架，同时解决离散逻辑约束和连续运动规划问题。
AI.method: 1) 对自由空间进行精确凸分割，编码凸空间、钥匙区域、门区域之间的连通性；2) 构建增强型凸集图（GCS），其分层结构精确编码钥匙-门的前置逻辑关系；3) 在增强GCS中求解最短路径，同时选择最优钥匙收集序列并计算最优连续轨迹；4) 轨迹使用贝塞尔曲线参数化，提供有限参数化下的精确解。
AI.result: 该方法能够同时优化钥匙收集的离散序列和连续轨迹，在贝塞尔曲线参数化下达到精确解，有效处理带有逻辑时序约束的避障规划问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过将离散逻辑约束编码进连续优化框架，实现了轨迹规划中逻辑与几何约束的统一求解，为带有前置条件（如钥匙开门）的复杂环境规划提供了有效方案。

title: Graph-Augmented Retrieval for Cross-Entity Financial Sentiment Analysis: A Comparative Study
summary:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become foundational for grounding large language models in domain-specific corpora, yet conventional vector-based RAG systems are fundamentally limited in their ability to capture the structured, multi-entity relationships that underpin financial market analysis. This paper presents a comprehensive comparative study of a novel two-hop Graph-RAG architecture versus a standard vector-only baseline for cross-entity financial sentiment analysis. Our system constructs a sentiment-weighted knowledge graph of 59 equity entities from 255 news articles covering 10 major technology stocks, then augments dense retrieval with intensity-filtered graph traversal over INFLUENCES edges to surface relational evidence inaccessible to vector search alone.
  We evaluate both architectures on 100 grounded queries (30 Direct, 70 Relational) using semantic similarity, entity recall, RAGAS metrics, latency benchmarks, and ablation studies. Graph-RAG achieves a statistically significant improvement in entity recall (+6.4%, p < 0.001, Wilcoxon signed-rank) and delivers substantially more relevant answers for complex multi-entity queries (+11.7% Answer Relevancy), with gains concentrating in relational question types (+16.1%). Critically, these improvements come at no measurable cost to answer quality (delta = +0.001 semantic similarity, Cohen's d = 0.078), with a modest 22.6% increase in mean latency offset by an 80% reduction in latency variance.
  An ablation study on the graph traversal intensity threshold reveals an inverted-U relationship with answer quality, identifying tau = 0.5 as optimal over the production default of tau = 0.7. These findings characterize a precision-for-coverage trade-off inherent to graph-augmented retrieval and provide actionable architectural guidance for practitioners building RAG systems for multi-entity financial analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了Graph-RAG与标准向量RAG在跨实体金融情感分析中的表现。Graph-RAG通过构建包含59个股票实体和255篇新闻文章的情感加权知识图谱，结合密度检索与图遍历，在实体召回率上提升6.4%，在复杂多实体查询的答案相关性上提升11.7%，且答案质量无损失，仅增加22.6%的平均延迟但延迟方差降低80%。消融实验发现图遍历强度阈值与答案质量呈倒U型关系，最佳阈值为tau=0.5。
AI.motivation: 传统基于向量的RAG系统难以捕捉金融市场分析中结构化的多实体关系，限制了其在跨实体金融情感分析中的表现。
AI.method: 构建情感加权知识图谱（59个股票实体，255篇新闻），提出两跳Graph-RAG架构，将密度检索与强度过滤的图遍历（INFLUENCES边）相结合，在100个查询（30个直接、70个关系型）上进行评估，使用语义相似度、实体召回率、RAGAS指标、延迟基准和消融研究。
AI.result: Graph-RAG在实体召回率上提升6.4%（p<0.001），复杂多实体查询答案相关性提升11.7%（关系型问题提升16.1%），答案质量几乎无差异（语义相似度差+0.001，Cohen's d=0.078），平均延迟增加22.6%但延迟方差降低80%。消融实验发现图遍历阈值tau=0.5最优（而非默认的0.7），呈现倒U型关系。
AI.conclusion: 图增强检索存在精度-覆盖率的权衡，最佳阈值tau=0.5为生产系统提供了可行的架构指导，证明Graph-RAG在金融多实体分析中具有显著优势且几乎不影响答案质量。

title: CAST: Non-Privileged Clipped Asymmetric Self-Teaching with Advantage Flipping for GRPO
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), especially Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has been widely used to improve reasoning in large language models. However, outcome-level rewards provide only sparse supervision, and group-relative advantages vanish when all sampled trajectories for a prompt are either correct or incorrect. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) offers dense token-level guidance, but its token preferences are not necessarily aligned with trajectory correctness; empirical diagnostics show that OPSD signals behave differently on correct and incorrect rollouts, with teacher-positive and teacher-negative gap signals exhibiting different noise profiles. These diagnostics are conducted under an OPSD-style privileged teacher context for analysis only, whereas CAST training uses answer-free self-teacher scoring.Motivated by these observations, this work proposes CAST, an answer-free self-distillation method for GRPO-style RLVR. CAST keeps the verifier-grounded GRPO objective, but uses a stop-gradient self-teacher to shape token-level advantages according to trajectory correctness. Unlike prior self-distilled RLVR methods, CAST does not require reference-solution-conditioned teacher scoring, keeps the self-teacher log-probability gap active throughout training, and applies bidirectional local advantage sign reversal: teacher-negative tokens in correct trajectories can receive negative token-level advantages, while teacher-positive tokens in incorrect trajectories can receive bounded positive local advantages. For zero-variance all-correct and all-wrong groups, CAST assigns bounded sign-constrained base advantages, so these otherwise zero-gradient groups can contribute verifier-signed token feedback. Experiments on mathematical reasoning show that CAST improves RLVR training while retaining a lightweight, verifier-grounded trajectory-level objective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAST方法，在GRPO强化学习框架下通过无答案的自我蒸馏机制，为每个token提供更细粒度的奖励信号，解决传统GRPO在全部正确或全部错误轨迹上梯度消失的问题，提升数学推理能力。
AI.motivation: GRPO等RLVR方法存在两个问题：(1) 结果级奖励过于稀疏，监督不足；(2) 当所有采样轨迹全对或全错时，组内相对优势消失，梯度为零。现有OPSD方法虽提供token级稠密信号，但其token偏好不与轨迹正确性对齐，信号存在噪声。
AI.method: CAST在GRPO框架下引入stop-gradient自教师模型，根据轨迹正确性塑造token级优势：(1) 自教师无需参考答案条件；(2) 全程保持自教师log-probability gap活跃；(3) 双向局部优势符号反转：正确轨迹中的教师负向token获得负优势，错误轨迹中的教师正向token获得有界正优势；(4) 对全对/全错组分配有界符号约束的基础优势。
AI.result: 在数学推理任务上的实验表明，CAST能够提升GRPO训练效果，同时保持轻量级、由验证器约束的轨迹级目标。
AI.conclusion: CAST通过自蒸馏与符号约束的优势分配，有效解决了GRPO中稀疏监督和零梯度问题，是一种改进的RLVR训练方法。

title: BudgetDraft: Acceptance-Aware Multi-View Training for Sparse-KV Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding speeds up autoregressive decoding by using a drafter to propose multiple tokens that a verifier validates in parallel. In resource-constrained deployments, the drafter uses a sparse KV cache to limit peak GPU memory and end-to-end latency under a fixed KV budget, while the verifier keeps a full KV cache. Mid-to-long context inference (4K--16K context length) is common in real applications. However, naive sparse/full speculative decoding suffers from the sparse/full mismatch as context length grows, causing the acceptance rate to drop quickly. We propose BudgetDraft, a multi-view sparse training method for sparse drafting in mid-to-long inference. The drafter is exposed to multiple sampled KV budgets during training and learns to align each sparse view with one shared full-cache teacher target. BudgetDraft combines an acceptance-aware loss on a full-cache branch with a multi-view loss on a sparse-cache branch, producing a single budget-robust drafter that recovers acceptance across sparsity levels without extra inference-time components. Experimental results on PG-19, LongBench, and LWM show that BudgetDraft achieves up to 6.55x, 4.46x, and 2.10x end-to-end speedup vs AR at 4K, 8K, and 16K context lengths, while keeping the inference pipeline memory-friendly.

AI.tldr: BudgetDraft提出了一种多视图稀疏训练方法，通过让草稿模型在训练时接触多种KV缓存预算，并学习将每个稀疏视图与共享的全缓存教师目标对齐，解决了中长上下文推理中稀疏/全缓存不匹配导致的接受率下降问题，在4K/8K/16K上下文长度下分别实现最高6.55x/4.46x/2.10x的端到端加速。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的部署场景中，投机解码的草稿模型使用稀疏KV缓存以限制峰值GPU内存和延迟，但中长上下文（4K-16K）推理时，稀疏与全缓存的"不匹配"导致token接受率随上下文长度增长而急剧下降，严重影响加速效果。
AI.method: 提出BudgetDraft多视图稀疏训练方法：(1) 训练时对草稿模型暴露多种采样的KV预算；(2) 使用全缓存教师目标对齐每个稀疏视图；(3) 结合全缓存分支的接受感知损失与稀疏缓存分支的多视图损失，训练出单一鲁棒的草稿模型。
AI.result: 在PG-19、LongBench和LWM数据集上，4K/8K/16K上下文长度下分别获得最高6.55x/4.46x/2.10x的端到端加速，且无需额外的推理时组件。
AI.conclusion: BudgetDraft通过训练时多视图稀疏对齐，有效缓解了中长上下文推理中稀疏与全缓存的匹配问题，在不增加推理开销的前提下实现了显著加速，保持了内存友好的推理管线。

title: TransResAI: A Compound AI System for Coastal Transportation Resilience
summary: Coastal flooding increasingly threatens transportation infrastructure, yet the analytical tools needed for resilience management remain difficult for many non-specialist practitioners to use. This study presents TransResAI, a compound AI system that supports analysis of flood-aware transportation resilience via natural-language interactions. The system integrates a locally deployable Large Language Model (LLM) with modules for task decomposition, secure code generation, geospatial analysis, retrieval-augmented generation, and interactive map rendering. TransResAI links MATSim flood-scenario simulation outputs, OpenStreetMap-derived flood-risk networks, equity-focused demographic indicators, and regional documents in Hampton Roads, Virginia. A structured user study with domain experts demonstrated that TransResAI reduced task completion time by 80-88% relative to conventional GIS workflows, compressing analytical tasks from a mean of 197.1 seconds to 29.7 seconds and visualization tasks from 364.0 seconds to 46.1 seconds, while maintaining mean accuracy of 4.60/5.00 and task completion rates exceeding 94%. These findings demonstrate that compound AI architectures bridge the gap between general-purpose language models and specialized domain knowledge, as well as the quantitative rigor required for infrastructure resilience, providing transportation agencies and communities with faster, more accessible analytical tools for decision-making under growing climate uncertainty.

AI.tldr: TransResAI是一个复合AI系统，通过自然语言交互支持洪水感知的交通韧性分析，集成大语言模型与任务分解、代码生成、地理空间分析等模块。在汉普顿路地区的用户研究中，相比传统GIS工作流，任务完成时间缩短80-88%，准确率保持4.60/5.00，完成率超过94%。
AI.motivation: 沿海洪水日益威胁交通基础设施，但现有韧性管理分析工具对非专业从业者难以使用，缺乏易用且强大的分析手段。
AI.method: 构建TransResAI复合AI系统：集成可本地部署的LLM，包含任务分解、安全代码生成、地理空间分析、检索增强生成和交互式地图渲染模块；连接MATSim洪水模拟、OSM洪水风险网络、公平性人口指标和区域文档；通过结构化用户研究评估性能。
AI.result: 分析任务从197.1秒降至29.7秒，可视化任务从364.0秒降至46.1秒；准确率4.60/5.00，任务完成率超过94%。
AI.conclusion: 复合AI架构弥合了通用语言模型与专业领域知识之间的鸿沟，为交通机构和社区提供了更快、更易用的决策分析工具，助力应对气候不确定性下的基础设施韧性管理。

title: Exact-Penalty Prox-Linear Methods for Bilevel Optimization with $\ell_1$ Lower-Level Gradient Penalty
summary:
Bilevel optimization is a fundamental framework for hierarchical decision-making, but its solution is challenging due to the implicit and typically set-valued nature of the lower-level optimality condition. In this paper,
  we study bilevel optimization problems through an exact-penalty reformulation based on the $\ell_1$-norm of the lower-level gradient. Under suitable regularity assumptions,
  we show that this penalty defines a distance-bound function and yields an exact penalty property for sufficiently large penalty parameters.
  To solve the resulting nonsmooth penalized problem, we propose an exact-penalty prox-linear (EPPL) method and establish a stationarity-oriented convergence guarantee. We further specialize the method to the simple bilevel setting, where the subproblem admits an explicit dual reformulation as a box-constrained quadratic program. This structure leads to a dual spectral projected gradient method with closed-form primal recovery, for which convergence of the inner dual iterates is proved.
  Numerical experiments on a minimum-norm least-squares bilevel model show that the proposed method is effective in reducing both the lower-level and upper-level gaps to high accuracy.
  Compared with several existing methods, the proposed approach attains the best final solution accuracy on the tested instance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ℓ1范数精确罚函数的双层优化方法(EPPL)，通过将双层问题转化为非光滑罚问题，并利用对偶谱投影梯度法求解子问题，在最小范数最小二乘双层模型上取得了高精度解。
AI.motivation: 双层优化问题中下层最优性条件具有隐式和集值性质，导致求解困难，现有方法在精度和效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出基于ℓ1范数下层梯度的精确罚函数重构，在正则性假设下证明其距离界性质和精确罚特性；设计精确罚近线性(EPPL)方法求解非光滑罚问题，针对简单双层场景推导出对偶谱投影梯度法，实现闭式原像恢复。
AI.result: 在最小范数最小二乘双层模型上，EPPL方法能同时高效降低下层和上层间隙至较高精度，相比现有方法达到最佳最终解精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提精确罚方法在双层优化中有效且精度优越，理论上的收敛性保证和实验验证支撑了方法的实用性。

title: Practical and Optimal Algorithm for Linear Contextual Bandits with Rare Parameter Updates
summary: We study linear contextual bandits under rare parameter updates: the learner may incorporate reward feedback into its parameter estimate only at a small number of update times, while still observing contexts online and selecting actions sequentially. This viewpoint clarifies a practical distinction that is often blurred in the literature: many "strictly batched" methods additionally restrict within-interval context adaptivity, meaning that the action rule inside an interval cannot depend on the sequence of realized contexts/actions in that interval (beyond the current round's context). For linear contextual bandits, we propose two practical algorithms with only $O(\log\log T)$ parameter updates. Our first algorithm BLCE-G attains minimax-optimal regret (up to polylogarithmic factors in $T$) simultaneously in both the small-$K$ and large-$K$ regimes under a static schedule. Our second algorithm BLCE removes the near G-optimal design step -- a dominant computational bottleneck in prior strictly batched static-grid methods -- yet preserves minimax-optimal regret and achieves the lowest known runtime complexity among optimal algorithms. We further extend these rare-update and computational principles to generalized linear contextual bandits. Overall, our results yield statistically optimal algorithms under $O(\log\log T)$ parameter updates that are also computationally efficient in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性上下文盗匪问题中参数罕见更新场景，提出两种仅需O(log log T)次参数更新的算法BLCE-G和BLCE，在静态调度下达到极小极大最优遗憾，且BLCE算法去除了计算瓶颈，实现了最优算法中最低的运行时间复杂度，并推广到广义线性上下文盗匪。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中"严格批处理"方法往往同时限制区间内的上下文自适应性，而实际应用中参数更新频率与上下文自适应性的区别常被模糊化。本文旨在解开这一混淆，在仅允许少量参数更新的条件下设计统计最优且计算高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出两种算法：(1) BLCE-G，采用静态调度，在小K和大K两种情境下均达到极小极大最优遗憾；(2) BLCE，移除BLCE-G中近G-最优设计步骤这一计算瓶颈，保留极小极大最优遗憾且具有已知最低运行时间复杂度，并进一步将原理推广到广义线性上下文盗匪。
AI.result: BLCE-G在仅O(log log T)次参数更新下，在两种情境下均达到极小极大最优遗憾（忽略多对数因子）；BLCE在相同更新次数下保持最优遗憾，且运行时间复杂度为已知最优算法中最低。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明在参数罕见更新（O(log log T)次）条件下仍能实现统计最优的遗憾，同时兼顾计算效率，为线性及广义线性上下文盗匪提供实用的高效算法。

title: Lipschitz-Enforced Machine Learning Framework for Accelerating Transient Stability Analysis of Networked Grid-Interactive Inverters
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Power Electronics
summary: The growing penetration of grid-connected inverters renders Transient Stability Analysis (TSA) increasingly challenging in modern power systems. Existing TSA methodologies encounter an intrinsic trade-off between accuracy and scalability when dealing with these networked inverter-based resources (IBRs). To bridge this gap, this paper proposes a Lipschitz-enforced machine learning framework that leverages Lipschitz continuity to restructure the transient stability certification mechanism. By replacing computationally intensive verification procedures with a deterministic and efficient algebraic check, the proposed method enables rigorous stability guarantees for complex multi-inverter systems, effectively bypassing the complexity limits of traditional analytical approximations. Validated on networked Grid-Forming (GFM) inverter systems, the proposed framework accelerates the training process by over 5 times compared to existing methods. Notably, the proposed framework substantially outperforms traditional transient stability analysis approaches (e.g., Linear Matrix Inequality and Sum-of-Squares methods) by capturing up to 30\% larger Regions of Attraction (ROA), effectively shattering the conservativeness bottleneck that has long constrained traditional analytical tools. This advancement provides a scalable and theoretically rigorous solution for the TSA of networked IBRs in modern power grids.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Lipschitz约束的机器学习框架，通过将瞬态稳定性认证机制重构为确定性代数额检查，绕过传统方法的计算复杂性与保守性瓶颈，在多逆变器系统中实现了训练速度提升5倍以上，并将吸引域扩大30%。
AI.motivation: 现有瞬态稳定性分析方法在应对并网逆变器渗透率增长时，面临精度与可扩展性之间的固有权衡，线性矩阵不等式和平方和方法等传统工具存在严重的保守性瓶颈。
AI.method: 利用Lipschitz连续性重新构建瞬态稳定性认证机制，将计算密集的验证过程替换为确定性且高效的代数检查，形成一种Lipschitz约束的机器学习框架。
AI.result: 在网络化构网型逆变器系统上，训练速度提升5倍以上；相比LMI和SOS等传统方法，吸引域扩大30%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为现代电网中网络化逆变器资源的瞬态稳定性分析提供了可扩展且理论上严格的有效解决方案，突破了传统分析工具的保守性局限。

title: DLLM-JEPA: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures for Masked Diffusion Language Models
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 13 tables. Accepted at SPIGM Workshop, ICML 2026
summary: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have reshaped self-supervised representation learning in vision. The recent LLM-JEPA ported JEPA to autoregressive language models but inherited two steep costs from the causal-attention substrate: it demands explicit multi-view data (e.g., text-code pairs), and it requires two gradient-carrying forward passes per step. We introduce DLLM-JEPA, which pairs JEPA with masked-diffusion language models to eliminate both costs at once. The bidirectional attention of diffusion models yields two semantically distinct views of the same input via different masking rates -- no explicit pairs needed -- and supports a single gradient-carrying forward pass, cutting training FLOPs by 33% relative to LLM-JEPA. DLLM-JEPA improves over diffusion-only fine-tuning in every (task, architecture) combination we evaluate: up to +18.7 pp on LLaDA-8B GSM8K and +11.4 pp on Dream-7B GSM8K, with consistent positive gains on Spider, NL-RX-SYNTH, and Django. Beyond accuracy, DLLM-JEPA exhibits a dual-win property: on LLaDA-8B with the Wide-t configuration, it simultaneously raises GSM8K accuracy (67.1 vs. 65.2, +1.8 pp), drives held-out Wikitext loss below the pre-trained base, and preserves MMLU accuracy at base level across three fine-tuning seeds -- whereas an L2-to-base parameter anchor matches baseline accuracy with no task gain. Layer-wise probing reveals the mechanism: a geometric-functional drift dissociation in which the fine-tuned backbone moves further from the pre-trained weights than the baseline yet forgets less on held-out Wikitext, with the amplification concentrated in middle transformer layers. The pattern appears on Dream-7B as well, indicating the phenomenon is not specific to a single backbone.

AI.tldr: DLLM-JEPA 将 JEPA 与掩码扩散语言模型结合，消除了显式多视图数据和双梯度前向传播的需求，训练 FLOPs 降低 33%，在多个基准上取得显著提升，并展现出双重优势：任务精度提升、遗忘减少，且该现象在多个骨干网络上一致出现。
AI.motivation: LLM-JEPA 虽将 JEPA 引入自回归语言模型，但继承了因果注意力的两大代价：需要显式多视图数据（如文本-代码对）和每步两次带梯度的前向传播，计算成本高且数据要求苛刻。本文旨在消除这两项成本。
AI.method: 提出 DLLM-JEPA，将 JEPA 与掩码扩散语言模型配对。利用扩散模型的双向注意力，通过不同掩码率从同一输入生成两个语义不同的视图，无需显式数据对；同时支持单次带梯度前向传播，训练 FLOPs 降低 33%。
AI.result: 在 LLaDA-8B GSM8K 上提升 +18.7 pp，Dream-7B GSM8K 上提升 +11.4 pp，并在 Spider、NL-RX-SYNTH、Django 上持续正向增益。LLaDA-8B 上 GSM8K 提升 1.8 pp，同时保持 MMLU 精度并降低 Wikitext 损失，而 L2 锚定方法仅匹配基线无任务增益。
AI.conclusion: DLLM-JEPA 有效消除了 LLM-JEPA 的两大成本，同时提升任务性能并减少遗忘。层探分析揭示了几何-功能漂移分离机制，且该现象在 Dream-7B 上同样出现，表明其并非单一骨干网络的专属特性。

title: TIGER: Traceable Inference with Graph-Based Evidence Routing for Mitigating Hallucinations in Multimodal Generation
summary: We study fact-level repair for multimodal generation, where a fluent output may contain specific facts that are not supported by the input. Existing inference-time repair methods often generate feedback by jointly conditioning on the input and the current output. This design has two limitations: hallucinated claims in the output can bias the model's interpretation of the input, and free-form feedback cannot be ranked or scheduled at the fact level. We present TIGER, an inference-time framework that redesigns feedback for localized repair. TIGER independently extracts an observation graph from the input and a claim graph from the current output, then assigns each claim a graph-conditioned risk score based on support and conflict. The model repairs selected high-risk claims while keeping the backbone frozen. We provide a convergence analysis showing that the expected total risk decreases geometrically to an explicit asymptotic bound under mild assumptions. Experiments across four cross-modal paths, including image-to-text, image+text-to-text, audio-to-text, and video-to-text, show that TIGER reduces unsupported content while preserving task quality. The gains hold across multiple backbones, and a CrisisFACTS case study suggests that the same repair mechanism can improve grounding in multi-source settings.

AI.tldr: TIGER是一个推理时修复框架，通过提取输入观测图和输出声明图，基于图条件风险评分定位并修复高风险事实错误，在多种跨模态任务中有效减少无支撑内容。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时修复方法有两个局限：(1) 联合条件化输入和输出时，输出中的幻觉会偏置模型对输入的理解；(2) 自由形式的反馈无法在事实层面进行排序和调度。
AI.method: TIGER分别从输入和输出提取观测图与声明图，基于图条件计算每个声明的风险分数（支撑与冲突），选择高风险声明进行局部修复，保持模型主干不变。
AI.result: 在图像→文本、图像+文本→文本、音频→文本、视频→文本四种跨模态路径上，TIGER减少了无支撑内容并保持了任务质量，在多个主干模型上表现一致，并在CrisisFACTS案例中验证了多源场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TIGER通过图结构化的局部修复机制，在事实层面实现了更精确的推理时修复，且提供了收敛性理论保证，证明期望总风险在温和假设下几何收敛到显式渐近界。

title: RAFT: Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting
summary: Domain-specific supervised fine-tuning (SFT) often improves in-domain performance at the cost of degrading a model's general capabilities. We view this degradation through two practical gaps in domain SFT: a supervision-compatibility gap, where domain targets differ in style and reasoning format from the original model's natural responses, and a trajectory-preservation gap, where teacher-forced SFT optimizes fixed target tokens without constraining the model's behavior on its own generated prefixes. This process fails to preserve the model's original behavior. We propose RAFT (Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting), a two-stage framework that addresses both factors. First, RAFT constructs model-compatible supervision through self-conditioned rewriting, semantic filtering, and answer fusion. Second, RAFT performs Answer-Conditioned On-Policy Distillation, where the original instruction-tuned model provides soft targets on student-generated trajectories while being conditioned on the fused answer as helpful context. We further introduce top-K temperature distillation and EMA-based adaptive loss balancing to stabilize the domain-general trade-off. Across three instruction-tuned backbones and five domains, RAFT improves average domain accuracy by 23.2% over standard SFT, while recovering part of the SFT-induced degradation on MS-Bench and IFEval, with relative improvements of 18.2% and 10.2%, respectively. These results show that coupling data refinement with trajectory-level preservation provides an effective recipe for domain fine-tuning with alleviated forgetting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAFT框架，通过数据精炼（自条件改写、语义过滤、答案融合）和轨迹级蒸馏（答案条件在线蒸馏、Top-K温度蒸馏、EMA自适应损失平衡）来解决领域微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，在五个领域上平均提升23.2%领域准确率，同时部分恢复通用能力（MS-Bench提升18.2%，IFEval提升10.2%）。
AI.motivation: 领域SFT存在两个关键问题：一是监督兼容性缺口（domain targets与原始模型自然响应的风格/格式不匹配），二是轨迹保持缺口（teacher-forcing SFT只优化固定token，不约束模型在自身生成前缀上的行为，导致原有行为被破坏）。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段数据精炼，包括自条件改写（让模型重写domain targets使其更符合自身风格）、语义过滤和答案融合；第二阶段答案条件在线蒸馏，在student生成的轨迹上用原始instruction-tuned模型提供软标签，同时以融合答案作为条件提示，并引入Top-K温度蒸馏和EMA自适应损失平衡来稳定领域-通用权衡。
AI.result: 在三个指令微调基座模型和五个领域上，RAFT比标准SFT平均提升23.2%领域准确率；在通用能力上，针对SFT导致的退化，MS-Bench相对恢复18.2%，IFEval相对恢复10.2%。
AI.conclusion: 将数据精炼与轨迹级保持相结合，是缓解领域微调中遗忘问题的有效方案。

title: Fake Plastic Voters: When Political Parties Can Use AI-Simulated Focus Groups
summary: Political parties strive to understand their electorates, and focus groups are a vital tool in these efforts. AI-enhanced simulation technologies (AESTs) enable synthetic focus groups in a fraction of the time (and cost), raising the question of when and how such simulated evidence can be used in campaign research. This paper develops a decision matrix to help party strategists match research needs to appropriate simulation technologies and to identify when to escalate to hybrid or fully human focus groups. The matrix combines three dimensions: strategic purpose, deployment risk, and empirical grounding of the simulation tool. Strategic purpose is the decisive dimension, as it determines what kind of evidence the focus group is meant to produce: observing how political meanings and identities emerge through interaction (Mode 1) or testing and refining campaign messages (Mode 2). The matrix shows that, given documented failure modes such as sycophancy, persona drift, and the suppression of minority viewpoints, AESTs cannot replace human interaction in Mode 1 at any risk level. Within Mode 2, suitability depends instead on deployment risk and on the empirical grounding. Yet even here, we caution that routine reliance on AESTs may erode the qualitative craft on which sound judgment depends.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个决策矩阵，帮助政党策略师判断何时可以使用AI模拟焦点小组（AESTs）替代真人焦点小组，指出在观察政治意义与身份通过互动产生的场景（模式1）中AESTs不可替代，而在测试和优化竞选信息（模式2）中则取决于部署风险与经验基础。
AI.motivation: 政党需要高效低成本地了解选民，传统焦点小组耗时昂贵，AI仿真技术能大幅降低时间和成本，但尚不清楚其在竞选研究中的适用边界和风险。
AI.method: 构建了一个三维决策矩阵：战略目的（模式1 vs 模式2）、部署风险、仿真工具的经验基础，通过分析已知失效模式（逢迎、角色漂移、少数观点压制）判断AESTs的适用性。
AI.result: 模式1中AESTs在任何风险水平下都无法替代真人互动；模式2中适用性取决于风险水平和经验基础；但即使适用，过度依赖AESTs可能削弱研究者所需的质性判断能力。
AI.conclusion: AI仿真焦点小组有其适用边界，不能全面替代传统方法，策略师需根据研究目的审慎选择，并警惕对质性研究能力的侵蚀风险。

title: Relaxed Control with Entropy Regularization for Itô Stochastic Systems with Input Delay
summary: This paper investigates the infinite-horizon classical stochastic optimal control problem with input delay under an entropy-regularized relaxed control framework. In particular, by constructing a relaxed system and introducing an entropy regularization term, we reformulate the classical optimal control problem into an entropy regularized formulation, and derive the optimal controller that follows a Gaussian distribution. Furthermore, we show that the optimal Gaussian control distribution converges to the optimal Dirac measure as the exploration weight tends to zero. Numerical simulation is provided to validate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了输入延迟下的无限时域经典随机最优控制问题，提出一种熵正则化松弛控制框架，推导出最优控制器服从高斯分布，并证明当探索权重趋近于零时，该分布收敛到最优Dirac测度，最后通过数值仿真验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 经典随机最优控制问题在存在输入延迟时求解困难，现有方法缺乏对探索与利用权衡的系统性处理，因此引入熵正则化松弛控制框架来解决问题。
AI.method: 构建松弛系统，引入熵正则化项，将经典最优控制问题重新表述为熵正则化形式，推导出服从高斯分布的最优控制器。
AI.result: 最优高斯控制分布在探索权重趋近于零时收敛到最优Dirac测度；数值仿真验证了该方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 熵正则化框架能有效处理输入延迟下的随机最优控制问题，提供了从随机探索到确定性控制的平滑过渡机制。

title: Efficient Approximation for Encoder--Decoder Neural Operators via Variation Spaces
summary: We study operator learning using encoder--decoder neural networks. Inspired by the function-space theory of neural networks, we introduce a variation space as an infinite-dimensional structural class for nonlinear operators. This space is defined through vector-valued measures directly on the input and output spaces. For operators in this space, we establish approximation bounds for encoder--decoder two-layer networks in the Bochner $L^q$ norm. The resulting error bound decomposes into the input encoding error, the output encoding error, and a finite-width approximation term of order $N^{-1/2}$, with a constant independent of the input and output encoding dimensions. When the input and output encoding errors decay polynomially in the encoding dimensions, these estimates yield algebraic approximation and learning rates. The results provide an theoretical guarantees for efficient neural operator learning beyond general Lipschitz or Fréchet differentiable operator classes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于编码器-解码器神经网络的算子学习方法，通过引入变分空间（variation space）作为非线性算子的无穷维结构类，建立了Bochner L^q范数下的逼近界，误差分解为输入编码误差、输出编码误差和N^{-1/2}量级的有限宽度逼近项，在编码误差多项式衰减条件下给出代数的逼近和学习率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子学习在一般Lipschitz或Fréchet可微算子类上缺乏高效的理论保证，作者旨在建立更精细的无穷维结构类（变分空间）并提供可证明的收敛率。
AI.method: 受神经网络的函数空间理论启发，通过向量值测度直接在输入和输出空间上定义变分空间；采用编码器-解码器双层网络结构进行算子逼近，在Bochner L^q范数下分析误差。
AI.result: 误差界可分解为三部分：输入编码误差、输出编码误差及N^{-1/2}阶的有限宽度逼近项（常数与编码维度无关）；当编码误差多项式衰减时，得到代数的逼近率和学习率。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为超越一般Lipschitz或Fréchet可微算子类的神经算子高效学习提供了理论保障。

title: Power Grid Infrastructure for AI Data Centers
summary: This article addresses recent advances in artificial intelligence, which have set off an astounding race among technology frontiers to build large data centers. It provides insights into impacts of large data centers on the planning and operation of the power grid.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能的最新进展如何引发科技前沿领域竞相建设大型数据中心，并分析了这些大型数据中心对电网规划和运行的深远影响。
AI.motivation: 人工智能的快速发展促使科技企业大规模建设数据中心，这些数据中心的巨大电力需求给电网带来前所未有的挑战，亟需研究其对电网规划和运行的影响。
AI.method: 文章通过分析人工智能发展现状，梳理大型数据中心的电力需求特征，评估其对电网规划（如容量扩展、选址布局）和运行（如负荷波动、稳定性）的影响。
AI.result: 揭示了大型数据中心的高能耗、高密度特性将显著改变电网负荷曲线，对电网的扩容规划、调度运行和可靠性提出更高要求。
AI.conclusion: 大型数据中心将成为未来电网的重要负荷节点，电网规划与运行需主动适应这种变化，以确保供电可靠性和经济性。

title: Agreement Metrics for LLM-as-Judge Evaluation: What to Report and Why
summary: Validating an LLM judge against human annotations usually means reporting several agreement statistics: accuracy, precision, recall, $F_1$, Cohen's $κ$, and one or more rank correlations. A survey of 24 recent LLM-as-judge papers finds metric choice entangled with the judgment scale, tie handling, invalid outputs, and abstention handling, and those choices rarely stated. For binary criteria -- the common case in rubric-based evaluation, where each criterion is graded MET or UNMET -- most of the reported numbers are redundant: Pearson's $r$, Spearman's $ρ$, Kendall's $τ_b$, the phi coefficient $φ$, and the Matthews Correlation Coefficient all reduce to a single number on non-degenerate binary data, so reporting several of them only creates an illusion of corroborating evidence. Cohen's $κ$ is the one agreement coefficient that adds information: it shares $φ$'s numerator but normalizes differently, and the gap between them measures how far the judge's positive-label rate has drifted from the human's. We then trace what changes when a judge may abstain with a CANNOT_ASSESS verdict: the three common ways of handling abstentions are not interchangeable preprocessing choices but answer different questions, and they break the binary equivalences. The same equivalences reappear, up to a negligible finite-sample correction, for multi-judge ensembles scored with Fleiss' $κ$ or Krippendorff's $α$. We close with a reporting checklist that names the judgment scale, the abstention and tie handling mode, coverage, the confusion matrix, and the aggregation level alongside any scalar agreement coefficient.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在LLM作为评判者的验证中，大多数二元分类的评估指标（如Pearson's r、Spearman's ρ、Kendall's τ_b、φ系数、MCC）本质上是冗余的，只有Cohen's κ能提供额外信息；同时提出关于评判尺度、弃权处理、混淆矩阵等的报告清单建议。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评判者验证研究中，指标选择与评判尺度、平局处理、无效输出、弃权处理纠缠不清，且这些选择很少被明确报告。作者希望厘清这些关系，消除冗余指标造成的虚假确证假象。
AI.method: 作者调查了24篇近期LLM-as-judge论文，分析了各指标在二元数据上的数学等价关系，区分了三种弃权处理方式，并延伸至多评判者集成场景。
AI.result: 在非退化二元数据上，Pearson's r、Spearman's ρ、Kendall's τ_b、φ系数、MCC都等价于同一个数；Cohen's κ与它们共享分子但归一化方式不同，二者差距反映评判者的阳性率偏移。弃权处理的三种方式不可互换，且会打破上述等价关系。
AI.conclusion: 作者建议报告时应明确包含评判尺度、弃权与平局处理方式、覆盖率、混淆矩阵、聚合层级以及至少一个标量一致性系数。

title: MindZero: Learning Online Mental Reasoning With Zero Annotations
summary: Effective real-world assistance requires AI agents with robust Theory of Mind (ToM): inferring human mental states from their behavior. Despite recent advances, several key challenges remain, including (1) online inference with robust uncertainty updates over multiple hypotheses; (2) efficient reasoning suitable for real-time assistance; and (3) the lack of ground-truth mental state annotations in real-world domains. We address these challenges by introducing MindZero, a self-supervised reinforcement learning framework that trains multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for efficient and robust online mental reasoning. During training, the model is rewarded for generating mental state hypotheses that maximize the likelihood of observed actions estimated by a planner, similar to model-based ToM reasoning. This method thus eliminates the need for explicit mental state annotations. After training, MindZero internalizes model-based reasoning into fast single-pass inference. We evaluate MindZero against baselines across challenging mental reasoning and AI assistance tasks in gridworld and household domains. We found that LLMs alone are insufficient; model-based methods improve accuracy but are slow, costly, and limited by backbone MLLM capacity. In contrast, MindZero enhances MLLMs' intrinsic ToM ability and significantly outperforms model-based methods in both accuracy and efficiency, showing that mental reasoning can be effectively learned as a self-supervised skill.

AI.tldr: MindZero是一个自监督强化学习框架，训练多模态大语言模型进行高效的在线心智推理。它无需心智状态标注，通过规划器奖励生成的心智假设来最大化观察到的行动似然，将基于模型的推理内化为快速单遍推理，在准确性和效率上均优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理在心智推理（Theory of Mind）方面面临三大挑战：(1) 在线推理中难以对多个假设进行鲁棒的不确定性更新；(2) 缺乏适合实时辅助的高效推理；(3) 真实世界领域缺乏心智状态标注的真实数据。本文旨在解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出MindZero框架，采用自监督强化学习训练多模态大语言模型。训练时，模型生成的心智状态假设通过规划器评估其最大化观察行动似然的能力作为奖励信号，从而无需显式心智状态标注。训练后，模型将基于模型的推理内化为快速单遍推理。
AI.result: 在网格世界和家庭环境的心理推理与AI辅助任务中，LLM单独推理能力不足；基于模型的方法准确但慢、昂贵且受限于底层MLLM容量。MindZero显著提升了MLLM的内在心智推理能力，在准确性和效率上均优于基于模型的方法。
AI.conclusion: 心智推理可以作为一种自监督技能被有效学习，MindZero证明了通过强化学习内化基于模型推理的可行性，为实时AI辅助中的高效在线心智推理提供了新方向。

title: Emergence of Exploration in Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning via Retrying
summary: In reinforcement learning (RL), agents benefit from exploration only because they repeatedly encounter similar states: trying different actions can improve performance or reduce uncertainty; without such retries, a greedy policy is optimal. We formalize this intuition with ReMax, an objective that evaluates a policy by the expected maximum return over $M$ samples, where $M$ is a positive integer, while accounting for return uncertainty. Optimizing this objective induces stochastic exploration as an emergent property, without explicit bonus terms. For efficient policy optimization, we derive a new policy-gradient formulation for ReMax and introduce ReMax PPO (RePPO), a PPO variant that optimizes ReMax while generalizing the discrete retry count $M$ to a continuous parameter $m > 0$, enabling fine-grained control of exploration. Empirically, RePPO promotes exploration, without any explicit exploration bonuses, on the MinAtar and Craftax benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReMax目标函数，通过期望最大收益来鼓励探索，并基于此推导出RePPO算法，在MinAtar和Craftax基准上验证了其探索能力。
AI.motivation: 在强化学习中，探索的必要性源于智能体反复遇到相似状态；本文旨在形式化这一直觉，提出无需显式探索奖励就能诱导探索的目标函数。
AI.method: 提出ReMax目标（基于M个样本的最大期望收益），推导其策略梯度公式，并引入RePPO——将离散的重试次数M推广为连续参数m>0，以实现对探索的精细控制。
AI.result: 在MinAtar和Craftax基准测试中，RePPO能够有效促进探索，且无需任何显式的探索奖励项。
AI.conclusion: ReMax和RePPO为强化学习中的探索提供了一种新颖且简洁的形式化方法，通过目标函数本身而非外部奖励机制来驱动探索行为。

title: Algorithmic Authority and the Clinical Standard of Care
summary: The integration of artificial intelligence into clinical medicine creates a fundamental tension between algorithmic probabilistic reasoning and the experiential intuition of expert physicians; applying Lawrence Lessig's \enquote{Code is Law} framework, I argue that the architecture of clinical AI systems already functions as de facto medical regulation, reshaping liability and the standard of care. Reframing AI \enquote{hallucination} as structurally analogous to well-documented human cognitive failures such as confirmation bias and premature diagnostic closure, I show that both failure modes demand a unified governance response. I therefore propose a dialectical standard of care that treats the integrated AI-physician dyad as the singular responsible diagnostic entity, mandating the synthesis of algorithmic precision with human interpretive authority within robust data governance and patient privacy frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨AI整合到临床医学中，算法概率推理与医生经验直觉之间的张力。运用Lessig的"代码即法律"框架，论证临床AI架构已作为事实上的医疗监管，重塑责任与护理标准。将AI"幻觉"类比于人类认知偏差（如确认偏误、过早诊断闭合），提出两者需要统一治理。最终提出辩证的护理标准，将AI-医生联合体视为单一责任诊断实体，要求在数据治理和隐私框架内融合算法精确性与人类解释权威。
AI.motivation: AI进入临床医学后，算法推理与医生直觉之间存在根本性张力，现有法律与监管框架未能充分应对这一张力，需要新的治理思路。
AI.method: 运用Lessig"代码即法律"框架进行理论分析，通过类比AI"幻觉"与人类认知偏差（确认偏误、过早诊断闭合），论证两者需要统一治理。
AI.result: 提出辩证的护理标准，将AI-医生联合体视为单一责任诊断实体，要求算法精确性与人类解释权威在数据治理和隐私框架内融合。
AI.conclusion: 临床AI系统架构已构成事实上的医疗监管，需要新的治理范式——将AI与医生视为统一责任主体，在数据治理与隐私保护框架下实现算法与人类判断的辩证整合。

title: A Semi-analytic Method for Rapid Coverage Analysis of a Satellite Using Piecewise Ellipse Models
summary: Satellite coverage analysis commonly relies on intensive numerical computations to evaluate access and revisit times, resulting in high computational costs, particularly in long-term performance assessment and large-scale constellation analysis involving numerous satellites. To address this issue, this paper presents a semi-analytic method for rapid coverage analysis for a satellite using piecewise ellipse models. We introduce the epoch longitude of the ascending node (ELAN), defined as the longitude of the ascending node at the beginning of each nodal period. Since the shape of the ground track over one nodal period remains invariant, target visibility within the period is uniquely determined by ELAN. By identifying the feasible range of ELAN, the proposed method excludes invisible nodal periods, thereby substantially reducing search space. Within the feasible range, we transform the visibility-boundary relationship into a modified ELAN (MELAN) and approximate it using analytically invertible piecewise ellipse models, enabling direct evaluation of the entry and exit times without repeated time-domain visibility searches. By exploiting the periodic evolution of ELAN, the proposed method efficiently computes access and revisit times over a given time horizon. Numerical case studies over a wide range of orbital configurations and target latitudes show that the proposed method achieves sub-0.1% error in most cases while significantly reducing computational effort.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分段椭圆模型的半解析方法，通过引入ELAN和MELAN概念，快速评估卫星覆盖性能，在大幅降低计算成本的同时保持极高精度（误差<0.1%）。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星覆盖分析依赖密集数值计算，评估访问和重访时间计算成本高，尤其在长期性能评估和大规模星座分析中问题突出。
AI.method: 提出半解析方法：(1) 引入ELAN（每个节点周期起始时的升交点经度），利用一个节点周期内地面轨迹形状不变性，通过ELAN唯一确定目标可见性；(2) 筛选ELAN可行范围，排除不可见节点周期，缩减搜索空间；(3) 将可见性边界关系转化为MELAN，并用解析可逆的分段椭圆模型近似，直接计算进出时间；(4) 利用ELAN周期性演化高效计算给定时间范围内的访问和重访时间。
AI.result: 在多种轨道配置和目标纬度下的数值案例表明，该方法在大多数情况下误差低于0.1%，同时显著降低了计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 提出的半解析分段椭圆模型方法能够在不牺牲精度的前提下，大幅提升卫星覆盖分析的效率，适用于长期性能评估和大规模星座分析场景。

title: Distribution-free changepoint localization after sequential change detection
summary: This paper introduces a distribution-free framework for constructing post-detection confidence sets for changepoints after stopping a sequential change detection procedure. It is well known that conformal test martingales can be used to sequentially detect changes in distribution, but by themselves provide no inference for the time at which a proclaimed change occurred. Past work on post-detection inference requires pre- and post-change classes of distributions to be known, but this paper accomplishes localization of the changepoint without any distributional assumptions. We establish finite-sample coverage guarantees (conditional on correct detection). We provide non-asymptotic bounds on the conditional expected size of the confidence sets. Under suitable asymptotic regimes, we proved that the conditional expected size of the confidence set remains uniformly bounded. and demonstrate strong empirical performance on simulated and real data. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first general distribution-free framework for sequential changepoint localization with a valid post-detection coverage guarantee.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无分布假设的框架，用于在顺序变化检测程序停止后构建变化点的后检测置信集，首次实现了无需任何分布假设的变化点定位，并提供了有限样本覆盖保证。
AI.motivation: 已有的后检测推断方法需要预先知道变化前后的分布类别，而实际应用中分布往往未知。本文旨在无需任何分布假设的情况下实现变化点的定位。
AI.method: 基于共形检验鞅（conformal test martingales）构建后检测置信集，利用无分布框架进行变化点定位，并建立有限样本覆盖保证（条件于正确检测）。
AI.result: 提供了非渐近的置信集条件期望大小上界；在合适的渐近机制下，证明了条件期望大小一致有界；在模拟和真实数据上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个具有有效后检测覆盖保证的通用无分布顺序变化点定位框架。

title: Data-Driven Min-Max MPC with Integral Quadratic Constraints
summary: Data-driven control of nonlinear systems with rigorous guarantees is a challenging control problem. Integral quadratic constraints (IQCs) provide a powerful framework for modeling nonlinearities. This paper presents a data-driven min-max model predictive control (MPC) synthesis method for unknown systems subject to (nonlinear) uncertainties using the IQC framework. The unknown system matrices are characterized by a set-membership representation using the input-state data and the knowledge of the IQCs. We derive two semidefinite programs (SDPs) that minimize an upper bound on the worst-case cost over all possible system dynamics and uncertainties. By iteratively solving these SDPs, the proposed state-feedback control law is obtained.
