We further prove that the resulting closed-loop system is exponentially stable and satisfies the input and state constraints. A numerical example demonstrates the validity of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动的极小极大模型预测控制（MPC）方法，利用积分二次约束（IQC）框架处理未知非线性系统。通过集合成员表示描述未知系统矩阵，推导了两个半定规划（SDP）来最小化最坏情况成本，并证明了闭环系统的指数稳定性与约束满足性。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动的非线性系统控制缺乏严格的保证，IQC框架虽能建模非线性，但如何将其与数据驱动控制结合仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 利用输入-状态数据和IQC知识建立系统矩阵的集合成员表示，推导两个半定规划（SDP）迭代求解上界最小化问题，从而得到状态反馈控制律。
AI.result: 所提方法能够最小化最坏情况成本上界，且闭环系统指数稳定，满足输入与状态约束，数值实验验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将IQC框架与数据驱动MPC相结合，为未知非线性系统提供了具有严格稳定性与约束保证的控制方案。

title: Enhancing BiGRU with a KAN Block for Legal Document Classification and Summarization
comment: This paper contains of 10 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables and version 2 after it review from ACL 2026
summary: This study introduces a novel architecture of KAN-based BiGRU model for the task of classification and summarization of legal documents in a low-resource multilingual setup. In order to tackle problems associated with domain language, the usage of different languages, long dependencies within context, and class imbalance, we employ the dataset composed of legal documents from Bangladesh and taken from Manupatra, which include Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali languages. Our classification task involves BiGRU model, along with Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) module, while the summarization part utilizes attention-based GRU, combined with a KAN model head. Classification model yields 67.96% of accuracy and 0.65 F1 score; while ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, and ROUGE-L measures for summarization yield 0.38, 0.23, and 0.31 F1 scores, correspondingly. Ablation study shows that the use of KAN increases classification accuracy from 57.34% to 67.96%. Moreover, our proposed technique is compared to several baselines, including classical ML algorithms and pretrained language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于KAN的BiGRU模型，用于低资源多语言法律文档的分类与摘要生成，在孟加拉国法律数据集上取得了67.96%的分类准确率和0.38/0.23/0.31的ROUGE分数。
AI.motivation: 解决低资源多语言法律文档处理中存在的领域语言、多语言混杂、长文本依赖和类别不平衡等问题。
AI.method: 分类任务采用BiGRU结合KAN模块，摘要任务采用注意力GRU加KAN模型头。
AI.result: 分类准确率67.96%，F1 0.65；摘要ROUGE-1/2/L F1分别为0.38/0.23/0.31；消融实验显示KAN使分类准确率提升10.62%。
AI.conclusion: KAN模块能显著提升低资源多语言法律文档分类与摘要的性能，但整体指标仍有提升空间。

title: Geodesic Flow Matching for Denoising High-Dimensional Structured Representations
summary: Vector Symbolic Algebras (VSAs) enable robust neurosymbolic reasoning by encoding symbolic information into high-dimensional distributed representations. For continuous domains, Spatial Semantic Pointers (SSPs) extend this framework by mapping variables onto continuous toroidal manifolds. However, standard approaches like Flow Matching assume a flat Euclidean geometry, which fails to account for the geometric constraints imposed on valid SSP states. We demonstrate that this assumption fails for SSPs: Euclidean linear interpolants ``cut through" the manifold's interior, destroying the phase and magnitude structure required for accurate decoding. To resolve this, we employ Geodesic Flow Matching, adapting Riemannian transport dynamics to strictly restrict the denoising flow to the SSP toroidal manifold. We validate this approach in a Spiking Neural SLAM system, showing that manifold-aware cleanup stabilizes path integration against drift. The method achieves a 72\% reduction in tracking error and enables a 40\% increase in neural efficiency compared to competitive baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/kremHabashy/CleanupSSP .

AI.tldr: 本文针对连续域中空间语义指针（SSP）的几何约束问题，提出利用黎曼流形上的测地线流匹配（Geodesic Flow Matching）替代传统欧几里得流匹配，从而在流形内部进行去噪清理。在脉冲神经SLAM系统中验证，该方法将跟踪误差降低了72%，神经效率提升了40%。
AI.motivation: 标准的流匹配（Flow Matching）假设平坦欧几里得几何，但SSP的状态被约束在环形流形上。欧几里得线性插值会“切割”流形内部，破坏相位和幅度结构，导致解码不准确。因此亟需一种流形感知的清理方法。
AI.method: 采用测地线流匹配（Geodesic Flow Matching），将黎曼传输动力学适配到SSP的环形流形上，严格限制去噪流在流形内进行，避免欧几里得插值带来的结构和相位破坏。
AI.result: 在脉冲神经SLAM系统中，相比竞争基线，跟踪误差降低72%，神经效率提升40%。
AI.conclusion: 流形感知的清理方法能有效稳定路径积分抵抗漂移，在神经符号连续域表示中具有显著优势。

title: ChurnNet: A Optimized Modern AI for Churn Prediction
summary: Increased competition and the growing similarity of products and services offered by retailers have lowered the barriers for customers to switch to competitors. Accurate churn prediction can be a valuable tool for driving effective personalized marketing campaigns and helping to reduce customer attrition. This study evaluates the performance of traditional machine learning techniques, namely, Random Forests, XGBoost, and Support Vector Machines, and compares them with the Unified Multi-Task Time Series Model for churn prediction, a binary time-series classification task. Despite the strong capacity of the latter to model complex temporal dynamics and inter-variable relationships, our results indicate that for churn prediction, conventional methods can still outperform it in terms of predictive performance, data efficiency, and computational resource requirements for training and deployment. These findings are consistent across multiple datasets and various churn labeling techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文比較傳統機器學習（隨機森林、XGBoost、SVM）與統一多任務時間序列模型在客戶流失預測上的表現，結果顯示傳統方法在預測性能、數據效率與計算資源需求上仍優於複雜的時間序列模型。
AI.motivation: 零售商面臨產品同質化與客戶流失問題，精準的流失預測能幫助制定個性化行銷策略以降低客戶流失率。
AI.method: 對比傳統機器學習方法（隨機森林、XGBoost、SVM）與統一多任務時間序列模型，在多個數據集及不同流失標註技術下進行二元時間序列分類任務的評估。
AI.result: 儘管時間序列模型擅長建模複雜時序動態與變量間關係，傳統方法在預測性能、數據效率及訓練/部署的計算資源需求上仍優於它，且此結果在多數據集與多標註方式下一致。
AI.conclusion: 對於客戶流失預測任務，傳統機器學習方法在實務上比複雜的時序模型更具優勢，不一定需要追求更複雜的模型架構。

title: Comprehensive AI governance requires addressing non-model gains
comment: This paper has been accepted to ICML 2026 (Position paper track): https://openreview.net/forum?id=V3O1sHpKxX
summary: Frontier AI governance often centres on the model-level governance paradigm, which assumes that a model's capability profile is primarily a function of the compute and data used during training. This position paper argues that model-level governance becomes less effective when capability progress is increasingly driven by "non-model gains"--improvements that are independent from advances in the base model. We formalise the concept of non-model gains and provide a taxonomy of three distinct vectors of capability gain: inference gain (scaling compute at test-time), systems gain (post-training enhancements such as scaffolds), and asset gain (enhancing a model with restricted assets). We demonstrate how these vectors--alongside potential future impacts from embodiment, continual learning, and AI diffusion--may undermine risk management strategies that hinge mostly on pre-deployment evaluation and mitigation. We provide an overview of governance approaches that go beyond the model level: system, entity, agent, and cloud governance. Finally, we emphasise the importance of societal resilience as a complement to these governance layers.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了前沿AI治理中仅关注模型层面的治理范式存在局限性，因为能力进步越来越多地来自“非模型增益”（如推理增益、系统增益和资产增益），而非基础模型本身的改进。作者提出需要超越模型层面，结合系统、实体、代理和云治理，并强调社会韧性的重要性。
AI.motivation: 揭示模型层面治理范式的局限性，指出随着非模型增益（如推理时计算扩展、后训练增强等）对AI能力进步的贡献越来越大，仅依赖预部署评估和缓解的风险管理策略可能失效。
AI.method: 采用立场论文形式，首先形式化定义"非模型增益"概念，构建包含推理增益、系统增益和资产增益的三类分类法，并展望具身化、持续学习和AI扩散等未来影响。随后系统梳理超越模型层面的治理方案。
AI.result: 识别出三类非模型增益向量，论证了它们如何削弱当前以模型为中心的风险管理策略的有效性，并提出了系统、实体、代理和云治理等多层补充方案。
AI.conclusion: 前沿AI治理需要从单一的模型层面范式转向多层治理架构，并辅以社会韧性建设，才能有效应对由非模型增益带来的新兴风险。

title: Time-Optimal Collision Avoidance Via a Greedy Polynomial Backward Sweep
summary: Spacecraft collision avoidance for low-thrust satellites often requires determining not only how to maneuver, but also how late a maneuver can begin while still ensuring safety. This paper presents a greedy time-optimal (GTO) backward-sweep method to find the latest maneuver initiation time. The method starts from the nominal time of closest approach and iteratively propagates the maneuver backward in time, selecting at each step the thrust direction that locally minimizes the chosen danger metric. Differential algebra is used to efficiently propagate state sensitivities and update the time of closest approach online. The method is tested on a large dataset of conjunctions, using both miss distance and probability of collision as safety metrics. The approach achieves accurate results and only a small loss of optimality relative to an optimal-control benchmark, while retaining runtimes suitable for on-board implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贪婪时间最优（GTO）后向扫描方法，用于寻找低推力卫星在避碰中可最晚开始机动的时间。该方法从标称最接近时刻开始反向传播，利用微分代数高效更新状态，在损失少量最优性的前提下实现准确结果，且运行时间适合星上部署。
AI.motivation: 低推力卫星的碰撞规避不仅需要确定如何机动，还需确定最晚可以何时开始机动以保障安全，现有方法在这方面的研究不足。
AI.method: 提出GTO后向扫描方法：从标称最接近时刻开始，反向迭代传播机动，每一步贪婪选择使危险度量局部最小的推力方向；利用微分代数高效传播状态灵敏度并在线更新最接近时刻。
AI.result: 在大量交会数据集上测试，使用最小距离和碰撞概率两种安全度量，方法准确，与最优控制基准相比仅有少量最优性损失，运行时间适合星上实现。
AI.conclusion: GTO后向扫描方法能够在保证安全的同时有效找到最晚机动时刻，兼顾了准确性与计算效率，适合星载应用。

title: On the Uncertainty Quantification Ability of Tabular Foundation Models
summary: Foundation models (FMs) have achieved substantial success in generalizing across tasks without problemspecific training or fine-tuning. However, many critical applications in mechanics and computational science require not only accurate predictions but also reliable uncertainty quantification (UQ). Herein we investigate the UQ capabilities of tabular FMs in regression tasks through a comprehensive empirical study comparing Tabular Prior-Data Fitted Networks (TabPFN) against Gaussian processes (GPs). We systematically evaluate these two methods across a host of regression problems with varying complexity, dataset sizes, and input dimensionalities. We use a default setting to build all the GPs and for a fair comparison against TabPFN v2.5. Our findings highlight an important trade-off between explicit and learned priors: while TabPFN achieves highly competitive performance for complex, high-dimensional problems with sufficient data, GPs often provide superior predictive accuracy and UQ in data-scarce settings. Moreover, when the chosen kernel constitutes a good prior for the underlying function, GP performance can substantially exceed that of TabPFN. Our results can be reproduced from https://github.com/kianswarehouse/GPvsPFN.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究比较了表格基础模型TabPFN与高斯过程在回归任务中的不确定性量化能力，发现两者存在显式先验与学习先验的权衡：TabPFN在复杂高维问题中表现优异，而GP在数据稀缺场景和良好先验匹配时更具优势。
AI.motivation: 基础模型在跨任务泛化上取得了成功，但许多力学和计算科学的关键应用不仅需要准确预测，还需要可靠的不确定性量化(UQ)。现有研究对表格基础模型在回归任务中的UQ能力了解不足，因此需要系统评估。
AI.method: 通过全面实证研究，比较TabPFN（Tabular Prior-Data Fitted Networks）与高斯过程(GP)在多种回归问题上的表现；使用默认设置构建所有GP，与TabPFN v2.5进行公平对比。
AI.result: TabPFN在复杂高维问题且有充足数据时表现极具竞争力；GP在数据稀缺场景下预测精度和UQ更优；当所选核函数与底层函数先验匹配时，GP性能可大幅超越TabPFN。
AI.conclusion: 显式先验（GP）与学习先验（TabPFN）存在重要权衡，选择哪种方法取决于数据量、问题复杂度以及先验知识的可用性。

title: Efficient Numerical Modeling of Near-Field Diffraction in ORIS-Assisted Free-Space Optical Links
summary: This paper investigates near-field propagation in optical reconfigurable intelligent surface (ORIS)-assisted free-space optical (FSO) communication systems. Unlike conventional far-field scenarios, near-field propagation involves complex diffraction effects that hinder tractable closed-form analysis. To address this issue, a numerical framework for evaluating the optical field distribution of ORIS-assisted FSO links is proposed. Specifically, two numerical approaches are considered: direct Riemann-sum evaluation and a fast Fourier transform (FFT)-based method. Although the Riemann sum approach provides accurate field estimation, it incurs extremely high computational complexity due to the fine spatial discretization of the ORIS surface required at optical wavelengths. To improve computational efficiency, the optical-field calculation is reformulated as a convolution in the spatial-frequency domain, enabling efficient FFT-based propagation analysis. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed FFT-based method achieves accuracy comparable to that of the Riemann-sum approach while significantly reducing computational complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究ORIS辅助FSO通信系统的近场传播，提出基于FFT的数值框架以替代高复杂度的黎曼求和法，在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 近场传播中的复杂衍射效应使得传统远场假设下的闭合形式分析难以适用，亟需高效且准确的数值计算方法。
AI.method: 将光场计算重写为空间-频率域的卷积形式，利用FFT实现高效传播分析；与直接黎曼求和法进行对比验证。
AI.result: 所提FFT方法在计算精度上与黎曼求和法相当，但计算复杂度显著降低。
AI.conclusion: FFT方法为ORIS辅助FSO近场传播分析提供了一种高效可行的数值方案，兼顾精度与效率。

title: RealityTest: How People Probe AI Identity and Whether Models Disclose It
summary: AI systems are increasingly deployed in conversational settings where users may be uncertain whether they are speaking with a human or an AI. Despite mounting regulatory attention to this known safety risk, existing evaluations of AI disclosure are typically English-only, based on machine-generated questions, and restricted to text. We present RealityTest to comprehensively test whether AI systems disclose their identity when asked. The benchmark is the first large-scale multimodal and multilingual evaluation, grounded in human data on how people actually encounter and question AI identity in the real-world. Alongside the benchmark, we release the underlying dataset of 3,152 identity-probing queries collected from ~750 participants across 49 countries and five languages, in text and speech scenarios. We find that only 31% of people ask about identity directly in ambiguous scenarios, and that the questions people ask are far more diverse than machine-generated queries. We test 17 text and 6 speech models, and find substantial variation in disclosure behaviour. However, a single suppression instruction reduces disclosure rates to below 30%, even in the best-performing models. Validating our investment in diverse, human-grounded evaluation data, we find that how the question is phrased and the context of the conversation matter more for disclosure than which model is being tested. Safety evaluations built on narrow or synthetic query sets risk mischaracterising how models behave in realistic deployment settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RealityTest基准，首个大规模多模态多语言AI身份披露评估，发现仅31%的人直接询问AI身份，人类问询多样性远超机器生成，且一个问题措辞和对话上下文比模型本身更能影响披露行为。
AI.motivation: 现有AI身份披露评估局限于英文、机器生成问题和纯文本场景，无法反映真实世界中用户与AI交互的多样性，监管需求迫切但缺乏贴近现实的评估工具。
AI.method: 收集来自49个国家约750名参与者的3,152条身份探查询问（文本+语音，5种语言），构建多模态多语言基准，测试17个文本模型和6个语音模型的身份披露行为。
AI.result: 仅31%的人在模糊场景中直接询问身份；人类提问多样性远超机器生成的查询；单一抑制指令可将披露率降至30%以下；提问措辞和对话上下文比模型本身对披露影响更大。
AI.conclusion: 基于狭窄或合成查询集的安全评估可能错误描述模型在真实部署中的行为，需要建立在多样化、人类基础数据上的评估体系。

title: Capability Self-Assessment: Teaching LLMs to Know Their Limits
summary: The ability to recognize one's own limitations and decide whether to solve a problem or delegate is fundamental for reliable intelligent systems. Yet we show that modern large language models systematically lack this ability: across diverse model families and scales, they overestimate their competence and attempt queries they cannot solve. We refer to this ability as Capability Self-Assessment (CSA) and formulate it as a policy-learning problem, aiming to improve self-assessment while preserving the model's original capabilities. Our results show that reinforcement learning teaches CSA effectively, significantly outperforming supervised fine-tuning while preserving original capabilities. In contrast, supervised fine-tuning severely degrades the capabilities the model is meant to assess. Moreover, learned self-assessment behavior generalizes well out of distribution, suggesting that CSA is a transferable model trait. Finally, CSA is practically useful: it improves local-cloud decision making at inference time and provides a signal for targeted data selection during training.

AI.tldr: 现代LLM系统性地缺乏能力自我评估（CSA），会高估自身能力并尝试解决无法完成的任务。强化学习可以有效教会CSA，且优于监督微调，同时保持模型原有能力。
AI.motivation: 可靠的智能系统需要能够识别自身局限并决定是自行解决问题还是委派给他人，但现有LLM缺乏这一能力，会高估自身能力。
AI.method: 将CSA形式化为策略学习问题，对比强化学习（RL）与监督微调（SFT）在提升自我评估能力上的效果。
AI.result: 强化学习显著优于监督微调，能有效学习自我评估而不损害原始能力；而监督微调严重降低了模型本应评估的能力。学习到的CSA具有良好的分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CSA是可迁移的模型特质，具有实用价值：能在推理时改善本地-云端决策，并为训练中的针对性数据选择提供信号。

title: Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Pathological Prior for EEG-based Depression Detection
summary:
Deep learning-based Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) detection using Electroencephalography (EEG) is fundamentally constrained by the "small-sample dilemma." Prevailing generative data augmentation methods not only incur heavy computational overhead but also risk introducing synthetic noise, thereby blurring classification boundaries. To challenge the traditional "data quantity first" convention, we propose a novel framework "Beyond Augmentation": Score-Guided Classification (SGC). SGC does not synthesize pseudo-samples; instead, it utilizes an unsupervised generative network architecture to model the structural and statistical anomaly degrees of samples, serving as the core "Pathological Prior". This prior, after robust normalization, is explicitly fused with deep feature representations, thereby precisely guiding the classifier's decision boundary. Furthermore, to dynamically adapt to varying channel configurations, we propose a Cross-Channel Spatial Adaptation module, utilizing a spatial mapping mechanism to effectively resolve the hardware heterogeneity of mismatched channels in multi-center datasets. Extensive experiments on the Mumtaz2016 and high-density MODMA datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and exceptional generalizability of our method under the challenging "zero data augmentation" setting and at "zero sample synthesis cost".
  Keywords: Electroencephalography (EEG), Depression Detection, Anomaly Score, Diffusion Models, Few-Shot Learning

AI.tldr: 提出Beyond Augmentation: SGC框架，不进行数据增强，而是利用无监督生成网络建模样本的异常度作为病理先验，融合深度特征引导分类边界，并设计跨通道空间适配模块解决硬件异质性，在零数据增强和零样本合成成本下实现高效MDD检测。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习EEG检测MDD面临小样本困境，传统数据增强方法计算开销大且引入合成噪声导致分类边界模糊，挑战"数据量优先"的传统观念。
AI.method: 提出Score-Guided Classification (SGC)框架：1) 利用无监督生成网络（扩散模型）建模样本的结构和统计异常度作为病理先验；2) 经过鲁棒归一化后与深度特征表示显式融合，引导分类器决策边界；3) 提出Cross-Channel Spatial Adaptation模块，通过空间映射机制解决多中心数据集中通道不匹配的硬件异质性。
AI.result: 在Mumtaz2016和高密度MODMA数据集上，在零数据增强和零样本合成成本条件下，验证了方法的有效性和出色的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SGC框架挑战了"数据量优先"的传统思路，证明在不合成伪样本的情况下，利用异常度作为病理先验可以有效地引导分类，为解决EEG小样本问题提供了新范式。

title: The Invisible Coalition Partner: How LLMs Vote When Democracy Gets Concrete
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures. Preprint. Code and data: https://github.com/joelbarmettlerUZH/invisible-coalition-partner
summary: Prior research has established that instruction-tuned large language models exhibit left-of-center political bias, measured exclusively through abstract political questionnaires. We show that this finding does not generalize to concrete policy decisions. We introduce a dual-instrument methodology grounded in Swiss democratic reality. The Smartvote questionnaire (75 abstract policy questions) is administered to 66 LLMs from 27 model families and compared to 184 elected members of the Swiss National Council, replicating the established leftward convergence (Cohen's d = 3.64, p = 0.0002). Then, novel to this work, 9 flagship LLMs are confronted with 48 real federal referenda (Volksabstimmungen) in four national languages (German, French, Italian, Romansh) under three information conditions, comparing votes to actual outcomes and party recommendations (Parolen). Three findings challenge the prevailing narrative. (1) Abstract questionnaires do not predict concrete behavior: the left-to-right agreement gradient on Smartvote shifts from left-peaked to center-peaked on Volksabstimmungen, where models align most with centrist Die Mitte and FDP rather than leftist SP and Gruene (Wilcoxon p = 0.008). (2) For some models, the language of a political question changes the answer more than the political content does: cross-linguistic consistency ranges from 50% (Mistral) to 98% (GPT-5.4). (3) Two models exhibit systematic change-aversion rather than political bias, voting Nein on 83-94% of referenda regardless of direction (binomial p < 0.0001). What prior work measured as "leftward bias" may not generalize beyond abstract instruments. On concrete policy decisions, LLMs behave less like coalition partners of the left and more like cautious civil servants: centrist, status-quo-favoring, and inconsistent across languages.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，指令微调的大语言模型在抽象政治问卷中表现出左倾偏见，但在具体政策决策（瑞士实际公投）中并不如此。模型在公投中趋向中间派，且存在跨语言不一致和系统性变革厌恶现象，挑战了"左倾偏见"的普遍结论。
AI.motivation: 已有研究表明指令微调LLM存在左倾政治偏见，但这些结论仅基于抽象政治问卷。作者质疑这一发现是否能推广到具体的政策决策场景，因此引入瑞士民主实践中的真实公投数据来检验这一假设。
AI.method: 采用双工具方法论：(1) 向66个LLM（27个模型家族）施测Smartvote抽象问卷（75题），与184名瑞士国民院议员对比；(2) 让9个旗舰LLM在4种国家语言、3种信息条件下，对48个联邦真实公投进行投票，与实际结果和政党推荐进行比较。
AI.result: (1) 抽象问卷中模型呈左倾（Cohen's d=3.64），但公投中转向中间派，与Die Mitte和FDP一致；(2) 跨语言一致性极低（Mistral仅50%）到极高（GPT-5.4达98%）；(3) 两个模型表现出系统性变革厌恶（83-94%投反对票）。
AI.conclusion: LLM的"左倾偏见"不能推广到具体政策决策。在真实政策场景中，LLM更像谨慎的中立公务员——倾向中间派、偏好现状、跨语言不一致。抽象问卷测量的"左倾"可能只是方法论假象。

title: Non-convergence Analysis of Probabilistic Direct Search
summary: We present a non-convergence theory for probabilistic direct search, a randomized derivative-free optimization method, where non-convergence means the failure to produce iterates that achieve stationarity asymptotically. The motivation is to understand whether the submartingale-like assumption in the existing convergence theory is essential or merely an artifact of the analysis techniques. For convex objectives, we prove that the probability of non-convergence is positive, provided that the polling directions satisfy a probabilistic ascent condition that is essentially the opposite of the submartingale-like convergence condition. Furthermore, we establish a lower bound for the non-convergence probability. For the typical implementation of this method, where each iteration draws a fixed number of random polling directions independently and uniformly from the unit sphere, our theory implies that the method is not globally convergent if the number of directions is below the threshold specified in the convergence theory, and the submartingale-like assumption is confirmed to be essential for convergence. Our theory is obtained by examining two random series that control the distance from any iterate to the starting point and estimating the probability for these series to stay below certain bounds.

AI.tldr: 本文证明概率直接搜索法（随机无导数优化方法）在特定条件下会以正概率不收敛，并确认了现有收敛理论中的子鞅类假设是收敛的必要条件而非分析技巧的产物。
AI.motivation: 探究现有概率直接搜索法收敛理论中的子鞅类假设是本质必要的，还是仅仅为分析技巧的人为产物。
AI.method: 通过构造两个控制迭代点到起始点距离的随机序列，并估计这些序列保持在特定界限以下的概率，从而证明非收敛概率为正的下界。
AI.result: 对于凸目标函数，若轮询方向满足概率上升条件（与子鞅类收敛条件相反），非收敛概率为正；当随机方向数低于收敛理论阈值时，方法不全局收敛。
AI.conclusion: 子鞅类假设对收敛性是本质必要的，证实了现有收敛理论的非平凡性。

title: Computation-Aware Kalman Filtering with Model Selection for Neural Dynamics
comment: 24 pages, Proceedings of 2nd International Conference on Probabilistic Numerics (2026)
summary: Due to their explicit priors and ability to model uncertainty, Bayesian methods have played a major role in dynamical latent variable modeling of single-cell neural recordings. However, modern-sized datasets have made overparameterized deep networks the preferred methods of choice due to their predictive power and favorable computational scaling. While many posterior approximations exist, all incur approximation errors. Recent work accounts for this error in the form of computational uncertainty but comes at the cost of quadratic complexity and assumes fixed model hyperparameters. Here we extend this development to model selection, including a novel training loss and optimization scheme, which yields tractable inference in large state-spaces. We introduce a framework, the Computation-Aware State-Space Model (CASSM), specifically designed for the scale-imbalanced regime, where the number of trials is significantly lower than the number of recorded neurons. In this regime, for both synthetic and real data, we show that our method is competitive with data-hungry deep networks, with significantly improved uncertainty calibration over previous attempts to scale Bayesian methods. Our experiments provide a roadmap to neuroscience researchers in choosing from a host of potential dynamical latent variable models given key dataset properties and constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CASSM框架，一种面向单细胞神经记录的可扩展贝叶斯状态空间模型，通过引入计算感知的训练损失和优化方案，在试次远少于神经元数量的规模不平衡场景下，实现了与深度网络竞争力相当的性能，同时显著改善了不确定性校准。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯方法在神经动力学生成变量建模中具有显式先验和不确定性建模的优势，但现代大规模数据集使其计算受限；而深度网络虽预测能力强、计算可扩展，但缺乏良好的不确定性量化。现有后验近似方法存在近似误差，虽有人提出计算不确定性（computational uncertainty）来弥补，但代价是二次复杂度且假设模型超参数固定。本文旨在克服这些局限，实现大规模状态空间下的可处理推理。
AI.method: 提出计算感知状态空间模型（CASSM），核心创新包括：(1) 设计一种新型训练损失函数；(2) 引入配套的优化方案，使模型选择（model selection）在大规模状态空间中变得可处理。该方法专门针对"规模不平衡"场景（试次数远少于记录神经元数）设计。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上，CASSM在规模不平衡场景下与数据需求高的深度网络模型竞争力相当；相较于以往贝叶斯方法扩展尝试，不确定性校准（uncertainty calibration）得到显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 本文为神经科学研究者提供了一份路线图，帮助根据数据集的关键属性和约束条件，从众多潜在的动力学生成变量模型中进行选择。

title: Regulating EV Charging Markets for Fairness: Incentives for Pricing and Capacity Decisions
summary: The transition to electric mobility calls for charging infrastructure that is both efficient and socially equitable. This paper examines fairness in electric vehicle (EV) charging station pricing and capacity through a game-theoretic perspective. We model a non-cooperative market in which competing charging service providers set prices and capacities while customers choose stations based on generalized cost, leading to a market equilibrium. We then benchmark this decentralized outcome against an idealized planner solution that jointly optimizes efficiency and equity. To align market outcomes with socially desirable goals, we design targeted incentives that guide operators toward more fair charger placement. Case studies demonstrate that unregulated competition tends to exacerbate disparities in charger access across demographic groups, whereas carefully calibrated incentives can reduce inequities without significant efficiency loss. The framework provides insights for policymakers on reconciling free-market dynamics with the broader societal goals of fairness in electrified mobility systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过博弈论视角研究电动汽车充电站的定价与容量公平性问题，提出了在非竞争市场下校准激励措施以减少充电设施分布不公平的方案，并验证了该方法能在不显著损失效率的前提下改善公平性。
AI.motivation: 电动汽车充电基础设施在追求效率的同时需要兼顾社会公平，但自由市场可能导致不同群体间充电设施可及性差距加大，需要研究如何通过政策干预实现公平与效率的平衡。
AI.method: 构建非合作博弈市场模型，分析充电服务商在定价和容量上的竞争行为；对比市场均衡与理想化规划者方案；设计针对性激励措施引导运营商实现公平的充电桩布局。
AI.result: 未受监管的竞争会加剧不同人口群体间充电设施可及性的差距；精心校准的激励措施能够在不显著损失效率的前提下减少不公平现象。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为政策制定者提供了在自由市场动态与更广泛社会公平目标之间进行权衡的见解，有助于推动电动出行的公平转型。

title: BOUTEF: A Multilingual Corpus for FakeNews in North Africa -- Language as a Weapon
summary: The rapid spread of fake news on social media has become a major challenge, particularly in multilingual and under-resourced contexts such as North Africa. In this paper, we introduce BOUTEF, a large-scale multilingual corpus designed to study the propagation, characteristics, and impact of fake news in Algeria and Tunisia. The corpus integrates three complementary components: fake narratives, genuine narratives, and associated user-generated comments, along with verified debunking information. It covers a wide range of languages and linguistic varieties, including MSA, Algerian and Tunisian dialects, Arabizi, French, English, and code-switched language. Building on this resource, we conduct a comprehensive empirical analysis combining quantitative and qualitative approaches. We examine thematic distributions, linguistic and rhetorical strategies, sentiment patterns, and social engagement dynamics. Statistical analyses reveal significant associations between thematic categories and message veracity, as well as strong correlations between user engagement and the visibility of fake content. Our findings show that fake news relies heavily on emotionally charged narratives, sensational framing, and hybrid linguistic practices that enhance virality and audience engagement. In contrast, debunking content adopts a more factual and verification-oriented style. Furthermore, a comparative analysis between Algeria and Tunisia highlights both shared dynamics and country-specific characteristics shaped by sociopolitical contexts. The results emphasize the role of informal language practices in the diffusion and reception of misinformation. By providing a rich, annotated, and publicly available dataset, this work contributes to advancing research on fake news detection, low-resource language processing, and the understanding of information disorders in complex linguistic environments.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍BOUTEF，一个针对阿尔及利亚和突尼斯的多语种假新闻大规模语料库，包含虚假叙事、真实叙事及用户评论。通过定量与定性分析，发现假新闻依赖情感化叙事、煽动性框架和混合语言实践增强传播力，而辟谣内容更注重事实验证。两国比较显示共享动态与国情差异。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体假新闻在多语种、低资源地区（如北非）快速传播，但缺乏大规模多语种数据集和系统性研究。现有研究多聚焦英语环境，对阿拉伯语方言、Arabizi、代码转换等复杂语言现象关注不足。
AI.method: 构建BOUTEF多语种语料库（涵盖MSA、阿尔及利亚/突尼斯方言、Arabizi、法英及代码转换语言），包含假新闻、真新闻和用户评论三层。采用定量分析（主题分布、情感模式、参与度统计）与定性分析（语言修辞策略）结合的方法，并进行阿尔及利亚与突尼斯的比较研究。
AI.result: 假新闻主题与消息真实性显著相关；用户参与度与假新闻可见性强相关；假新闻使用情感化叙事、煽动性框架和混合语言实践增强病毒式传播；辟谣内容更注重事实核查风格；两国间既有共享动态，也有受社会政治背景影响的特定差异。
AI.conclusion: 非正式语言实践在假新闻扩散和接收中起关键作用。BOUTEF数据集为假新闻检测、低资源语言处理和信息紊乱研究提供了重要资源。未来可基于此推动跨语言假新闻检测模型和区域差异研究。

title: Closed-Loop Neural Activation Control in Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF CVPR 2026 Workshop on Visual Concepts (VisCon). 25 pages, 8 figures, including supplementary material
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models can be steered at test time by intervening on semantically meaningful internal directions, but existing methods use a fixed steering coefficient, effectively operating in open loop. This is poorly suited to embodied control, where task state and concept error evolve over time, often causing overcorrection, oscillation, and reduced task success, especially for temporal behaviors such as speed and smoothness. We propose CTRL-STEER, a closed-loop framework that replaces static intervention strength with adaptive, time-varying control signals. The key idea is to decouple representation from regulation: rather than assuming temporal concepts are directly controlled by individual neurons, we steer along motion-aligned residual directions while a feedback controller adjusts intervention magnitude online. We instantiate this framework with both PID and reinforcement learning based controllers. Experiments with a fine-tuned OpenVLA policy on four LIBERO task suites show that CTRL-STEER achieves more stable concept regulation and a better steering-task success trade-off than fixed-coefficient baselines, without modifying or retraining the base model.

AI.tldr: 提出CTRL-STEER闭环框架，通过自适应时变控制信号替代固定干预系数，实现更稳定高效的概念调控，在不修改基模型情况下提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型测试时干预使用固定系数（开环控制），不适合具身控制中任务状态和概念误差随时间变化的情况，导致过度校正、振荡和任务成功率下降，尤其影响速度和平滑度等时序行为。
AI.method: 将表示与调控解耦：沿运动对齐的残差方向进行干预，同时用反馈控制器（PID和强化学习）在线调整干预强度，实现闭环控制。
AI.result: 在四个LIBERO任务套件上使用微调OpenVLA策略，CTRL-STEER比固定系数基线实现了更稳定的概念调控和更好的操控-任务成功权衡。
AI.conclusion: 闭环自适应干预优于固定开环干预，无需修改或重训练基模型即可提升具身控制的表现。

title: Agentic Transformers Provably Learn to Search via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Tree search is a central abstraction behind many language-agent reasoning and decision-making tasks: agents must explore actions, remember failures, and backtrack toward promising alternatives. Yet, we lack a theoretical understanding of how transformer-based policies acquire such search capabilities from the training dynamics of reinforcement learning (RL). We study this question in a stochastic $k$-ary tree environment, where an agentic transformer observes only its trajectory history through interaction and receives a terminal reward for reaching a hidden leaf goal node. We first construct a two-head transformer that implements randomized depth-first search (DFS): one head tracks previous actions, while the other detects failure outcomes and triggers backtracking. We then analyze the training dynamics of policy gradient under a depth-wise curriculum, showing that this same DFS mechanism emerges in stages from sparse reinforcement feedback without expert demonstrations. The resulting policy exhibits depth generalization: after training only on depth-$1$ and depth-$2$ trees, it succeeds on deeper full trees. We further show that, under imbalanced goal distributions, discounting the return leads to a ranked DFS policy that prioritizes higher-probability branches. Overall, our results identify a mechanistic normal form for transformer-based search, in which attention heads specialize and cooperate to extract decision-relevant traces from context and convert them into agentic action selection via RL training.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于Transformer的策略如何通过强化学习训练动态获得树搜索能力。在随机k叉树环境中，作者构建了一个双头Transformer实现随机深度优先搜索，并分析了策略梯度训练动态，发现该机制能从稀疏强化反馈中逐步涌现，无需专家示范。
AI.motivation: 缺乏对Transformer策略如何通过强化学习训练动态获得搜索能力的理论理解。
AI.method: 构建双头Transformer（一个头追踪历史动作，另一个头检测失败并触发回溯），在随机k叉树环境下使用策略梯度与深度课程学习进行训练。
AI.result: DFS机制在训练中逐步涌现；仅训练深度1和2的树即可泛化到更深的全树；在非平衡目标分布下，折扣回报导致排序DFS策略，优先搜索高概率分支。
AI.conclusion: 识别了基于Transformer的搜索的机制性规范形式：注意力头分工协作，从上下文中提取决策相关轨迹，通过RL训练转化为智能体动作选择。

title: Measuring and Mitigating Bias in Code Generated by Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are widely recognised for their applications in natural language generation and are increasingly used for code generation tasks. However, concerns about bias in their generated outputs remain significant. This paper focuses on GPT-4o and Gemini, mainstream tools for code generation, and proposes a framework for evaluating bias in LLM-generated code, specifically examining the influence of protected attributes, prompts and web-search capability. We use two metrics: the code bias score (CBS) and the attribute change ratio (ACR), to quantify the prevalence of bias and the degree of influence of different attributes, respectively. In addition, we investigate four lightweight mitigation strategies: Few-Shot, Chain-of-Thought, Few-Shot Chain-of-Thought, and Multi-agent, aimed at mitigating bias in generated code. Our findings reveal that bias remains prevalent across different protected attributes and datasets even after applying mitigation strategies, highlighting the need for more effective approaches to reduce bias in AI-driven code generation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对GPT-4o和Gemini两个主流代码生成工具，提出评估LLM生成代码中偏见的框架，使用CBS和ACR两个指标量化偏见，并测试了四种轻量级缓解策略，发现偏见仍然普遍存在。
AI.motivation: LLM在代码生成中广泛应用，但其输出中的偏见问题尚未得到充分关注和系统性评估，需要量化和缓解代码生成中的偏见。
AI.method: 提出评估框架，使用代码偏见分数(CBS)和属性变化比率(ACR)两个指标，研究受保护属性、提示词和网络搜索能力的影响，并测试Few-Shot、Chain-of-Thought、Few-Shot Chain-of-Thought和多智能体四种轻量级缓解策略。
AI.result: 即使应用了缓解策略，偏见在不同受保护属性和数据集上仍然普遍存在，现有轻量级方法不足以有效消除偏见。
AI.conclusion: 需要更有效的方法来减少AI驱动代码生成系统中的偏见，当前轻量级缓解策略效果有限。

title: Global Convergence of a Line-Search Filter Differential Dynamic Programming Method
summary: In this article, we establish the global convergence properties of the FilterDDP algorithm, which extends the discrete-time differential dynamic programming (DDP) algorithm of Mayne and Jacobson [\emph{International Journal of Control}, 3, (1966), pp. 85-95] to handle nonlinear constraints over states and controls, in addition to the dynamics. FilterDDP adopts a line-search filter procedure for step acceptance. However, instead of a damped Newton step applied in the general nonlinear programming setting, the computation of a trial point involves applying a backward recursion and a forward simulation. We establish the global convergence of FilterDDP by showing that for a subset of constrained optimal control problems, the this backward-forward procedure satisfies the same properties as a Newton step for the purpose of establishing global convergence of a line-search filter method, following the analysis of Wächter and Biegler [\emph{SIAM Journal on Optimization}, 16 (2005), pp. 1-31].

AI.tldr: 本文证明了FilterDDP算法的全局收敛性，该算法将离散时间微分动态规划（DDP）扩展到处理非线性约束，采用线搜索过滤过程，并通过后向递归和前向模拟计算试验点，在特定约束最优控制问题子集上满足类似牛顿步的性质。
AI.motivation: 原始的DDP算法只能处理无约束或仅受动力学约束的最优控制问题，无法应对状态和控制上的非线性约束。作者希望将DDP扩展以处理这些实际应用中常见的约束，并保证算法的全局收敛性。
AI.method: FilterDDP算法在离散时间DDP基础上引入线搜索过滤过程（line-search filter procedure）进行步长接受，区别于传统非线性规划中的阻尼牛顿法，其试验点通过后向递归（backward recursion）和前向模拟（forward simulation）计算。作者借鉴Wächter和Biegler的线搜索过滤方法分析框架，证明该后向-前向过程在约束最优控制问题的子集上满足与牛顿步相同的性质，从而建立全局收敛性。
AI.result: 证明了FilterDDP算法在特定约束最优控制问题子集上具有全局收敛性。
AI.conclusion: FilterDDP成功将DDP扩展到处理非线性约束，且其特殊的后向-前向计算过程在特定问题类别中具有与牛顿步同等的收敛保证，为基于DDP的约束最优控制方法提供了理论基础。

title: Self-Regulating Annealing in Heavy-Tailed Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as a leading framework for deep generative modeling. While the standard Gaussian formulation is theoretically convenient, its suitability for heavy-tailed datasets remains unclear. To address this, heavy-tailed diffusion models (HTDMs) extend the standard formulation by replacing the Gaussian distribution with a Student's t-distribution, thereby improving tail fidelity on heavy-tailed datasets. Although stochastic differential equation (SDE)-based sampling is possible in HTDMs, it has not been fully explored. In this paper, we propose an SDE-based sampler for HTDMs that explicitly incorporates a state-dependent diffusion coefficient. This state dependence naturally induces a self-regulating annealing mechanism by adaptively modulating the effective noise scale. We theoretically explore this mechanism and experimentally verify its necessity for reproducing samples from a heavy-tailed distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机微分方程（SDE）的采样器用于重尾扩散模型（HTDMs），该采样器显式引入状态依赖的扩散系数，通过自适应调节有效噪声尺度实现自调节退火机制，并在理论和实验上验证了其对重尾分布采样的必要性。
AI.motivation: 标准高斯扩散模型在理论上便捷，但处理重尾数据集时效果不佳。HTDMs虽用Student's t分布替代高斯分布提升了尾部保真度，但其SDE采样尚未被充分探索，因此需要开发专门的SDE采样器。
AI.method: 提出一种状态依赖扩散系数的SDE采样器，该系数随状态自适应变化，天然形成一种自调节退火机制，动态调制有效噪声尺度以适应重尾分布的特性。
AI.result: 从理论上探索了自调节退火机制的工作原理，并通过实验验证了该机制对从重尾分布中复现样本是必要的。
AI.conclusion: 状态依赖的扩散系数及其产生的自调节退火机制是HTDMs成功采样的关键，为处理重尾数据的深度生成建模提供了有效的SDE框架。

title: A Koopman Set-Membership Approach for Nonlinear Data-Driven Control with Stability Guarantees
summary: This paper proposes a data-driven controller design method for unknown nonlinear systems based on a Koopman bilinear realization. Using Koopman operator theory, the nonlinear system can be represented as a bilinear discrete-time system with a residual error term. The residual error is proportionally bounded by the norm of the lifted state and input, while the system matrices of the bilinear model are unknown. Assuming that bounds on the residual error are available, the unknown system matrices are characterized via a set-membership representation using the collected input-state data pairs of the nonlinear system. A data-driven controller design method is proposed to ensure stability for all bilinear systems within this set-membership description and for all admissible residual errors. More specifically, we design a rational state-feedback controller that stabilizes the bilinear model with residual error and, consequently, the original nonlinear system, by solving a sum-of-squares (SOS) program. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated through numerical examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Koopman双线性实现的数据驱动控制器设计方法，用于未知非线性系统。通过Koopman算子理论将非线性系统表示为带残差项的双线性离散时间系统，利用集合成员描述刻画未知系统矩阵，并设计有理状态反馈控制器保证稳定性，最后通过SOS程序求解并验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性系统控制方法往往需要精确的数学模型，而实际系统模型难以获取。Koopman算子理论虽可将非线性系统线性化，但存在近似误差且控制器设计缺乏鲁棒性保证。本文旨在利用数据驱动方法，在存在残差误差的情况下，为未知非线性系统提供一种具有稳定性保证的控制器设计框架。
AI.method: 利用Koopman算子理论将未知非线性系统表示为带残差的双线性离散时间系统；基于输入-状态数据对，利用集合成员描述方法表征未知系统矩阵；假设残差误差有界，将控制器设计转化为针对所有允许残差和双线性模型的稳定性问题；通过设计有理状态反馈控制器，并求解SOS（平方和）程序实现稳定性保证。
AI.result: 通过数值算例证明了所提方法的有效性，表明所设计的控制器能够稳定含残差的双线性模型，进而稳定原始非线性系统。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的数据驱动Koopman双线性控制方法能够在模型未知且存在残差误差的情况下，通过集合成员描述和SOS优化，为非线性系统提供具有鲁棒稳定性保证的控制器，为数据驱动非线性控制提供了新的理论工具。

title: DeSQ: Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation
summary: Dominant approaches to Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) fall into two categories. First is the generation of a formal query that suffers from brittleness and limited explainability, and the second is direct answer retrieval through KB exploration that is computationally costly and prone to hallucination. To combine the strengths of both paradigms while mitigating their respective weaknesses, we introduce DeSQ (Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation), a KB-agnostic framework that operates in three stages. First, it decomposes complex questions into Atomic Constraints (ACs) that mirror the relational structure of the underlying KB. Second, it generates a two-part structured output: (a) Mapping of each AC to its corresponding SPARQL Fragment, using standardized variable and URIs placeholders, and (b) URIs Grounding block describing each placeholder. Third, it assembles these fragments into a complete SPARQL query. DeSQ surpasses state-of-the-art approaches on four out of five major benchmarks and demonstrates superior robustness to lexical variation. Beyond performance gains, our framework greatly simplifies evaluation by eliminating the need for a live KB endpoint, and its structured output enables fine-grained error analysis, allowing more targeted interventions for improvement.

AI.tldr: DeSQ是一种KB无关的框架，通过将复杂问题分解为原子约束并逐步生成SPARQL查询片段，最终组装为完整查询，在五个基准测试中的四个上超越了现有方法，并展现出更好的鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有KBQA方法分为两类：形式化查询生成（脆弱且可解释性差）和直接答案检索（计算成本高且易产生幻觉）。作者希望结合两者优势，同时克服各自缺点。
AI.method: DeSQ分三阶段：1) 将复杂问题分解为与KB关系结构对应的原子约束(ACs)；2) 生成结构化输出，包括将AC映射为SPARQL片段（使用标准化变量和URI占位符）以及URI接地块；3) 将各片段组装为完整SPARQL查询。
AI.result: 在五个主要基准测试中的四个上超越了现有最优方法，展现出对词汇变化的优越鲁棒性。此外，消除了对实时KB端点的需求，简化了评估流程。
AI.conclusion: DeSQ通过结构化输出支持细粒度错误分析和针对性改进，在性能、鲁棒性和可解释性上均有显著优势。

title: Robust Shielding for Safe Reinforcement Learning
summary: Shielding is an effective approach to formally guarantee the safety of reinforcement learning agents in Markov decision processes (MDPs). However, existing shielding techniques typically assume knowledge of the safety-relevant transition dynamics - a requirement that is seldom met in practice. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel shielding framework for robust MDPs (RMDPs), i.e., MDPs with sets of transition probabilities. We define safety as the satisfaction of a linear temporal logic (LTL) formula with a certain threshold probability under the worst-case transition probabilities of the RMDP. We prove that our shielding framework is both sound and optimal for the RMDP: every policy admissible by the shield is safe, and conversely, every safe RMDP policy is admissible by the shield. We combine our approach with existing sampling methods for learning transition probabilities of MDPs with probably approximately correct (PAC) guarantees. This combination enables the construction of shields for MDPs that, with high confidence, guarantee safety while remaining minimally restrictive. Our experiments show that our shields for learned RMDPs guarantee safety in unknown MDPs while recovering strong expected return as the number of samples increases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程（RMDP）的屏蔽框架，能在未知转移概率下形式化保证强化学习代理的安全性，并证明其具有可靠性和最优性。结合PAC采样方法，可在保证安全性的同时最小化限制性，实验表明该方法在未知MDP中能有效保障安全并随样本量增加恢复期望回报。
AI.motivation: 现有屏蔽技术通常假设已知与安全相关的转移动态，但这在实践中很少满足。本文旨在解决这一局限性，提出针对RMDP的屏蔽框架。
AI.method: 将安全性定义为在RMDP的最坏情况转移概率下，以一定阈值概率满足线性时序逻辑（LTL）公式。证明屏蔽框架对RMDP是可靠且最优的，并结合PAC保障的采样方法学习MDP的转移概率。
AI.result: 实验表明，针对学习到的RMDP构建的屏蔽器能够在未知MDP中保证安全性，且随着样本数量增加，能够恢复较强的期望回报。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效克服了传统屏蔽技术对已知转移动态的依赖，能够在不确定环境中形式化保障强化学习代理的安全性，为安全强化学习提供了理论保证和实用方案。

title: AI-Guided Design and Optimization of Graphite-Based Anodes via Iterative Experimental Feedback
summary: This study presents an iterative AI-guided workflow that accelerates graphite-based anode development by improving both formulation feasibility and process robustness. Sequential learning via AI/ML-guided multiobjective inverse design for anode optimization was implemented using the Citrine Platform. Starting from a noisy, incomplete dataset, the Citrine Platform was used to generate early surrogate models, which despite low predictive certainty highlighted missing process constraints. By iteratively adding feasibility labels and boundary condition failures, the workflow rapidly converged toward manufacturable, higher-performing formulations. Fabrication reliability improved from frequent process failures to 100% successful cell production, while the fraction of cells delivering $\geq$ 350 mAh g$^{-1}$ increased from 28.4% to 84.8%, with capacity retention rising from 42.1% to 97.3%. These results demonstrate that structured, feedback-driven AI workflows can transform imperfect industrial data into actionable guidance, enabling faster, more reproducible optimization of battery electrode manufacturing.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于AI的迭代工作流，通过多目标逆向设计优化石墨负极配方，将电池制造成功率提升至100%，高容量电池比例从28.4%提升至84.8%，容量保持率从42.1%提升至97.3%。
AI.motivation: 传统电池电极开发依赖经验试错，过程噪音大、数据不完整，且缺乏系统性优化方法，导致制造工艺不稳定、性能难以提升。
AI.method: 基于Citrine平台实施AI/ML引导的多目标逆向设计，从噪音大、不完整的数据集出发，通过迭代添加可行性标签和边界条件约束，逐步优化代理模型，收敛至可制造的高性能配方。
AI.result: 制造可靠性从频繁失败提升至100%成功；容量≥350 mAh g⁻¹的电池比例从28.4%提升至84.8%；容量保持率从42.1%提升至97.3%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的、反馈驱动的AI工作流能够将不完美的工业数据转化为可操作的指导，实现电池电极制造的更快、更可重复的优化。

title: Business Utility of Large Language Models as Exploratory Data Analysis Agents
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in analytical workflows, but their suitability as exploratory data analysis (EDA) agents in business settings remains uncertain. In practice, a deployable EDA agent must provide not only useful average performance but also sufficient repeatability to support trust in its outputs. We evaluate this requirement in a controlled, business-relevant benchmark built on an agent-based supply chain simulation. The task is to identify supplier-product combinations responsible for low quality and downstream sales loss by reasoning from indirect operational traces rather than from explicit labels. Fifteen model-variant configurations from eight model families were evaluated under four experimental conditions that varied data representation, prompt clarity, and signal strength, with five trajectories per condition. Outputs were scored against deterministic ground truth using the Jaccard index and assessed through a framework that combines mean score (ms), coefficient of variation (CV), exploratory cross-condition significance tests, and Business utility, a risk-adjusted metric that we propose to summarise quality and repeatability in a single operational measure. The results show that most configurations are not reliable enough for autonomous EDA use, even when their average scores appear acceptable. GPT-5.4 with extra-high reasoning effort achieved the strongest overall profile, with an experiment-averaged ms of 0.8748 and an experiment-averaged Business utility of 0.6952, while the next-best configurations lost substantially more utility after variability discounting. Our findings suggest that evaluation of EDA agents should treat average quality, repeatability, and condition sensitivity as complementary dimensions of operational trustworthiness.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了LLM作为EDA代理在商业场景中的可靠性，发现多数配置不够稳定，GPT-5.4（高推理努力）表现最佳，提出应将平均质量、可重复性和条件敏感性作为评估的互补维度。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多用于分析工作流，但作为商业EDA代理的平均性能和可重复性（信任基础）尚未得到充分评估。
AI.method: 基于供应链仿真构建受控基准，评估15种模型配置（8个模型家族）在4种实验条件下的表现，使用Jaccard指数评分，并提出了结合平均得分、变异系数、显著性检验和Business utility的综合评估框架。
AI.result: 大多数配置不够可靠，GPT-5.4（高推理努力）表现最佳，实验平均ms=0.8748，平均Business utility=0.6952。
AI.conclusion: 评估EDA代理应将平均质量、可重复性和条件敏感性作为操作可信赖性的互补维度。

title: Inexactly Smooth Performance Estimation and New Optimized Gradient Methods
summary: We consider a general class of ``inexactly smooth'' convex functions, providing a universal model capturing as special cases $L$-smooth, $M$-Lipschitz, and Hölder smooth functions, and any combination thereof. Such functions possess a calculus closely following that of smooth functions. Our main results provide inexactly smooth functions with interpolation theorems that are necessary and sufficient up to modest universal constants. These enable analysis of first-order methods for any inexactly smooth convex problem class via solving convex Performance Estimation Problems (PEPs). Further, these enable the extension of Drori and Taylor's constructive approach to algorithm design. From this, we derive an exactly minimax optimal method for $(β,0)$-Hölder smooth problems, methods with the best-known convergence guarantees up to constants for any $(β,p)$-Hölder smooth convex minimization, and a new universal fast backtracking method for any inexactly smooth convex problem.

AI.tldr: 本文针对“不精确光滑”凸函数提出统一模型，涵盖L-光滑、M-Lipschitz、Hölder光滑函数等特例，给出必要且充分的插值定理（仅差常数因子），从而支持通过性能估计问题（PEP）分析一阶方法，并拓展了Drori-Taylor的算法设计框架。由此导出Hölder光滑问题的精确极小极大最优方法、最佳已知收敛保证的算法，以及适用于任何不精确光滑凸问题的通用快速回溯方法。
AI.motivation: 现有凸优化理论分别处理L-光滑、M-Lipschitz、Hölder光滑等不同函数类，缺乏统一的分析框架。本文旨在建立一个通用的“不精确光滑”凸函数模型，统一涵盖上述特例，并为其提供插值定理，使得一阶方法的分析和算法设计能够在一个统一的框架下进行。
AI.method: 定义“不精确光滑”凸函数类，建立其微分学；推导该函数类的插值定理（必要且充分，仅差通用常数）；利用插值定理将一阶方法分析转化为凸性能估计问题（PEP）；基于Drori-Taylor的构造性方法设计最优算法。
AI.result: ① 对(β,0)-Hölder光滑问题给出了精确极小极大最优方法；② 对任何(β,p)-Hölder光滑凸极小化问题给出了常数意义下最佳已知收敛保证的方法；③ 提出了适用于任何不精确光滑凸问题的通用快速回溯方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的不精确光滑凸函数统一模型及其插值定理为一阶方法的分析与设计提供了有效的通用框架，导出的算法在Hölder光滑类上达到或逼近最优收敛性能。

title: Provable Data Scaling Law for Meta Learning via Complexity Minimization
summary: Pre-training has become a fundamental paradigm in modern machine learning, with one of its key empirical benefits being reduced downstream sample complexity as the scale of pre-training data increases. However, existing theoretical frameworks for pre-training do not fully explain this phenomenon. In this paper, we introduce complexity minimization, a novel meta-representation learning framework designed to enable theoretical analysis of this scaling behavior, which learns representations by evaluating the downstream model complexity best suited to each domain and minimizing the worst-case such complexity across source domains. Our end-to-end theoretical analysis, spanning pre-training through downstream regression, shows that this framework provably captures this scaling behavior; in particular, we show that the error rate of few-shot adaptation improves as the amount of meta-training data grows. Empirically, we demonstrate that incorporating complexity regularization into existing meta-learning methods consistently improves downstream sample efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“复杂度最小化”的元表示学习框架，从理论上证明了预训练数据规模增大能降低下游样本复杂度，并通过实验验证了复杂度正则化能提升元学习方法的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练理论框架无法解释预训练数据规模增大如何降低下游样本复杂度这一关键经验现象，需要新的理论框架来揭示其内在机理。
AI.method: 提出复杂度最小化框架，通过评估每个领域最适合的下游模型复杂度并最小化源域间的最大复杂度来学习表示；给出了从预训练到下游回归的端到端理论分析。
AI.result: 理论上证明了少样本适应的错误率随元训练数据量增长而下降；实验上表明在现有元学习方法中引入复杂度正则化可一致提升下游样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 复杂度最小化框架成功捕捉了预训练数据规模增大带来的下游样本复杂度降低现象，为预训练的缩放行为提供了理论支撑，且复杂度正则化在实践中有效。

title: Hosting Capacity Assessment and Enhancement for Edge Data Centers in Active Distribution Networks
summary: With the increasing demand for edge computing and AI-driven workloads, integrating small and medium-sized edge data centers into distribution networks has become increasingly important. This paper investigates the hosting capacity of distribution networks for data center integration and identifies the key physical mechanisms that limit the maximum allowable data center load. The baseline analysis shows that data center hosting capacity varies significantly across candidate buses due to network topology and electrical distance. Three dominant limiting mechanisms are identified: current-constrained locations, voltage-constrained locations, and mixed-constrained locations where both current loading and voltage deviation jointly affect hosting capacity. To increase the hosting capacity, this study evaluates multiple flexible resources, including battery energy storage systems (BESS), dispatchable distributed generators (DDG), and static synchronous compensators (STATCOM). Numerical results demonstrate that these resources provide complementary benefits through active power support, sustained local generation, and reactive power compensation, effectively expanding data center hosting capacity in distribution systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了配电网对边缘数据中心的承载能力，识别了三种限制机制（电流限制、电压限制和混合限制），并评估了BESS、DDG和STATCOM等柔性资源对提升承载能力的互补效益。
AI.motivation: 随着边缘计算和AI负载需求增长，中小型边缘数据中心接入配电网日益重要，但现有研究缺乏对数据中心承载能力的物理限制机制的系统分析。
AI.method: 通过基线分析识别不同节点承载能力的差异，划分三种限制机制（电流限制型、电压限制型、混合限制型），并评估BESS、DDG、STATCOM三种柔性资源的提升效果。
AI.result: 承载能力因网络拓扑和电气距离在不同节点差异显著；BESS、DDG和STATCOM分别通过有功支撑、持续发电和无功补偿提供互补性效益，有效扩展了承载能力。
AI.conclusion: 多种柔性资源协同配置可有效突破配电网对数据中心的承载瓶颈，为边缘数据中心的合理规划与接入提供理论依据。

title: Effects of Varying LLM Access on Essay Writing Behavior
summary: Investigating the degree to which large language models (LLMs) affect teaching and learning in universities can help identify strategies for integrating LLMs in a way that supports, rather than undermines, student learning outcomes. This study examined how varying levels of LLM assistance affect writing performance, engagement, and perceived authorship. We report a pilot study in which 24 college students were randomly assigned to write a short essay with no LLM access, limited access (<=3 prompts, responses capped at 100 words), or unlimited access. Overall essay quality was statistically indistinguishable across groups. Yet writing behavior and perceived authorship diverged sharply: students with limited access reported higher ownership (62.5% would submit the essay as independent work, vs. 25% in the unlimited group), stronger organizational gains, and more strategic, revision-focused prompting. The unlimited group spent more time writing, produced essays more similar to LLM output, and reported reduced creative expression. Our findings suggest that constraining, rather than banning, LLM access may preserve authorship confidence while retaining the scaffolding benefits of AI assistance.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过24名大学生的写作实验发现，不同级别的LLM辅助（无访问、有限访问、无限制访问）对文章质量无显著影响，但在写作行为和作者认同感上存在显著差异：有限访问组的学生表现出更高的作者所有权感和策略性使用LLM的倾向，而无限制访问组则更依赖LLM且创造性表达降低。
AI.motivation: 探究大型语言模型（LLMs）对大学教学和学习的影响程度，以识别如何在支持学生学习成果的前提下整合LLMs，而非削弱学生的学习效果。
AI.method: 开展了一项包含24名大学生的pilot研究，随机分配到三组：无LLM访问组、有限访问组（最多3次提示，每次回复限制100词）、无限制访问组。通过比较各组写作质量、写作行为和感知作者身份等指标进行分析。
AI.result: 各组间的整体论文质量在统计上无显著差异。但有限访问组学生报告更高的作者所有权感（62.5%愿意将作品作为独立作业提交，而在无限制组中仅为25%），更强的组织能力提升感，以及更策略性、以修改为导向的提示使用行为。无限制访问组则花费更多写作时间，产出内容更接近LLM输出，且创造性表达降低。
AI.conclusion: 限制而非禁止LLM访问，可能有助于在保留AI辅助的脚手架式支持优势的同时，维持学生的作者自信心。

title: On Wednesdays, We Ask Questions: Optimizing "Active Listening" in Automated Legal Triage and Referral
comment: Working paper submitted as accepted to AIDA2J workshop at International Conference for AI and Law in Singapore, June 2026
summary: The FETCH classifier generates follow-up questions to help refine the best match for the applicant's legal problem, using a low-cost ensemble of LLMs. In this paper, we describe an expert attorney and LLM-assisted evaluation of the follow-up question approach in FETCH and show that while low-cost LLMs perform well at classification tasks, generating high-quality plain-language questions in this setting appears to require a more sophisticated and higher-cost model. Through discussion with legal intake workers, we propose a rubric for the evaluation of legal intake classification questions, and we find that prompt engineering alone is not enough to improve question quality for intake purposes. We also find that LLM-as-judge and human ratings diverge. We demonstrate that with the addition of a single high-cost model, GPT-5, the classifier can elicit relevant information from applicants for legal help, and that the questions lead to more accurate performance at classification tasks. We also find uneven fact elicitation across different categories, including domestic violence, at odds with family law screening protocols, suggesting the value of including dedicated screening panels for certain areas of law.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了FETCH分类器中基于低成本LLM集成的后续提问方法，发现虽然低成本模型在分类任务上表现良好，但生成高质量、通俗易懂的法律问题仍需使用更复杂的高成本模型（如GPT-5）。研究表明，仅靠提示工程无法提升问题质量，且LLM与人类评分存在分歧。添加GPT-5后，分类器能更有效地获取相关信息并提升分类准确性，但在某些法律领域（如家庭暴力）的事实获取不均衡，提示需要引入专门的筛查机制。
AI.motivation: 在法律援助场景中，如何有效、低成本地通过后续提问收集申请人法律问题的关键信息，以提升分类准确率。
AI.method: 使用专家律师和LLM辅助评估方法，对FETCH分类器中的后续提问进行评价；提出面向法律接案分类问题的评估标准（rubric）；对比低成本LLM与高成本LLM（GPT-5）在提问质量和分类准确率上的表现。
AI.result: 低成本LLM在分类任务上表现良好，但无法生成高质量的法律通俗问题；仅靠prompt工程无法提升问题质量；LLM评分与人类评分存在差异；引入GPT-5后问题质量和分类准确率显著提升；不同法律类别（如家庭暴力）的事实获取存在不均匀性。
AI.conclusion: 生成高质量法律接案问题需要高成本LLM模型支持；建议为特定法律领域（如家庭暴力）设计专门的筛查面板以弥补通用模型的不均衡表现。

title: Learning to Construct Practical Agentic Systems
summary: Automated design and optimization of agentic LLM-based systems leads to sophisticated systems that substantially improve result quality over off-the-shelf agentic patterns. However, studies of fielded agentic systems show that production systems focus much more on issues such as simplicity, controllability, and predictability of inference costs. In this paper we propose principled approaches to designing and optimizing practical agentic systems. We describe an agent framework that enables designers to enforce modularity in agentic systems, by defining "pseudo-tools" that call LLMs recursively on a restricted context. Using this framework we hand-engineer agents for a diverse set of tasks, and show that relative to dynamically-planned workflows, hand-constructed fixed workflows are generally cheaper and more accurate. We then propose novel learning methods for the agentic components required by this framework, namely pseudo-tools and fixed workflows. These learning methods generally outperform hand-engineered agents. We also exploit the modularity of the framework to apply multi-objective optimization methods to jointly optimize cost and response quality and blend the results of multiple learning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化智能体框架，通过"伪工具"实现LLM递归调用，研究发现固定工作流比动态规划更经济准确，并提出了针对伪工具和固定工作流的学习方法及多目标优化策略。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体系统研究多聚焦于结果质量提升，但实际生产系统更关注简洁性、可控性和推理成本的可预测性，两者之间存在脱节。
AI.method: 提出模块化智能体框架，引入"伪工具"概念在受限上下文中递归调用LLM；采用手工设计固定工作流与动态规划工作流对比；开发针对伪工具和固定工作流的学习方法；利用框架模块化特性进行多目标优化。
AI.result: 手工设计的固定工作流比动态规划工作流更便宜且更准确；提出的学习方法总体优于手工设计的智能体；多目标优化方法能联合优化成本与响应质量。
AI.conclusion: 面向实际生产环境的智能体系统设计应注重模块化、可控性和成本效率，所提框架和学习方法为构建实用型LLM智能体系统提供了有效途径。

title: Student Competency Assessment and Presentation Methods Based on Algorithm Courses
comment: Published in: 2025 IEEE Frontiers in Education Conference (FIE). 9 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables. Author accepted manuscript
summary:
This full research paper describes the assessment and presentation of student competencies in algorithm courses, grounded in the CC2020 competency model. With the growing emphasis on bridging the gap between academic training and industry demands, competency-based education, which integrates knowledge, skills, and dispositions, has become pivotal in computer science education. To bridge the gap, we need to develop a comprehensive framework to evaluate competencies (knowledge, skills, and dispositions) in computer science education.
  The research aims to analyze learning behavior patterns, design methods for competency assessment in algorithm courses, and evaluate the difficulty of course experiments to inform curriculum design. We collected programming experiment and written assignment data from 169 students, adapting it to the xAPI specification for unified analysis. In this work, Markov process modeling was employed to analyze behavioral sequences, revealing cognitive patterns during programming tasks. Multiple methods were applied to quantify competencies (knowledge, skills, dispositions) and identify distinct student clusters. Course difficulty was quantified using proactiveness metrics derived from submission timeliness.
  This work contributes a scalable framework for competency assessment in algorithm courses and offers actionable insights for personalized teaching and curriculum optimization. Practically, it enables instructors to tailor interventions based on student clusters and optimize task difficulty. Future work will integrate more students' performance to validate competency models and extend the framework to broader computer science curricula.

AI.tldr: 本文基于CC2020能力模型，通过收集169名学生的编程实验和作业数据，运用马尔可夫过程建模分析行为序列，量化知识、技能和态度三方面能力，并评估课程难度，构建了一个可扩展的算法课程能力评估框架，为个性化教学和课程优化提供 actionable 的见解。
AI.motivation: 缩小学术训练与行业需求之间的差距，在计算机科学教育中推进基于能力的教育（整合知识、技能和态度），需要开发一个综合框架来评估学生在算法课程中的能力。
AI.method: 收集169名学生的编程实验和书面作业数据，适配xAPI规范；采用马尔可夫过程建模分析行为序列，揭示编程任务中的认知模式；运用多种方法量化知识、技能和态度能力并识别学生聚类；基于提交及时性指标量化课程难度。
AI.result: 成功构建了可扩展的算法课程能力评估框架，识别出不同学生聚类，量化了课程难度，揭示了编程任务中的认知行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可为个性化教学和课程优化提供实用指导，使教师能够根据学生聚类定制干预措施并优化任务难度。未来将整合更多学生数据验证能力模型，并将框架扩展到更广泛的计算机科学课程中。

title: An arc-search BFGS algorithm for unconstrained nonlinear optimization problems
summary: The classical BFGS algorithm performs excellently for convex optimization problems. However, for non-convex problems, the classical BFGS method may fail to converge reliably. To overcome this limitation, researchers have developed modified BFGS methods that are applicable to both convex and non-convex optimization problems. Among these methods, a robust BFGS algorithm has been shown to achieve global convergence and fast local convergence, with a superlinear convergence rate, for both convex and non-convex nonlinear optimization problems under mild assumptions. In this paper, we propose an arc-search BFGS algorithm that aims to further improve the computational efficiency of the robust BFGS method while preserving its desirable convergence properties. Numerical experiments are carried out, and performance comparisons between the proposed algorithm and state-of-the-art algorithms are reported to demonstrate the advantages of the arc-search BFGS algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弧搜索BFGS算法，在保持鲁棒BFGS方法全局收敛和超线性收敛速度的同时，进一步提高计算效率，并通过数值实验验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 经典BFGS算法在非凸优化问题中可能无法可靠收敛，而现有的鲁棒BFGS方法虽然解决了这一问题，但计算效率仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 提出弧搜索BFGS算法（Arc-search BFGS），在鲁棒BFGS方法的基础上引入弧搜索策略以提升计算效率，同时保持全局收敛性和超线性收敛速度。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提出的弧搜索BFGS算法与现有最优算法相比，在计算效率上具有明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 弧搜索BFGS算法在保持鲁棒BFGS方法优良收敛性质的前提下，显著提升了计算效率，是一种适用于凸和非凸优化问题的有效方法。

title: Convex Distance Operator Transport: A Convex and Geometry-Preserving Formulation
comment: This paper is 41 pages long, contains 6 figures, and has been accepted to ICML 2026
summary: We introduce Convex Distance Operator Transport (CDOT), the first convex optimal transport framework that aligns distributions across heterogeneous domains by jointly preserving feature correspondence and intrinsic geometric structure. Specifically, CDOT employs an operator-based regularization that aligns aggregated distance structures by introducing distance and conditional expectation operators. Consequently, the proposed regularization improves the robustness to local geometric variations. We further prove that the resulting CDOT discrepancy is a valid pseudometric on the space of attributed compact metric-measure spaces. In addition, we characterize the relationship between CDOT and Gromov--Wasserstein (GW) through a new notion of dispersion gap, formally elucidating the geometric source of non-convexity in GW compared to the convexity of CDOT. In the finite-sample regime, we derive a non-asymptotic risk bound decomposed into optimization and statistical errors, establishing risk consistency under a globally convergent Frank--Wolfe algorithm. Experiments on synthetic point clouds, brain connectomes, and graph classification benchmarks demonstrate better performance over existing methods, with stable and reliable behavior in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CDOT，首个凸最优传输框架，通过算子正则化对齐跨域分布，兼具特征对应与几何结构保持，理论证明其伪度量性质及与Gromov-Wasserstein的关系，并在多个任务上取得优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有最优传输方法（如Gromov-Wasserstein）存在非凸性问题，导致优化不稳定且对局部几何变化敏感。本文旨在设计一个凸的、几何鲁棒的跨域对齐框架。
AI.method: 提出CDOT框架：引入距离算子和条件期望算子作为正则化项，聚合距离结构信息；证明CDOT散度是带属性紧度量-测度空间上的有效伪度量；通过"弥散间隙"概念刻画CDOT与GW的非凸性来源；在有限样本下给出非渐近风险界。
AI.result: 在合成点云、脑连接组和图分类基准上，CDOT优于现有方法；优化稳定可靠；理论给出了风险一致性保证。
AI.conclusion: CDOT是首个凸的最优传输框架，兼具理论完备性和实际有效性，为跨域分布对齐提供了新的几何鲁棒方案。

title: Making Aggregations Reliable: Realizability Guarantees for Battery Fleets with Heterogeneous Power and Energy Limits
summary: Aggregated battery energy storage systems (BESS) enable large fleets of heterogeneous battery elements to participate in system-level optimization and electricity markets. Scheduling each element independently is computationally impractical at scale. While many aggregate battery models rely on convex relaxations, they often ignore element complementarity constraints, leading to dispatch solutions that may be infeasible when implemented on individual battery elements. This paper develops a realizable composite battery model for parameter-heterogeneous BESS fleets that guarantees feasibility at the element-level while preserving computational tractability. We derive simple linear conditions under which aggregate charging and discharging trajectories can be safely disaggregated while respecting individual power limits, energy limits, and complementarity constraints under a priority-based controller. Numerical experiments in a unit-commitment setting demonstrate that the proposed realizable composite battery formulation produces feasible dispatch solutions. Solve times are effectively independent of system size, unlike micro-model mixed-integer formulations. Solutions obtained from the proposed formulation converge to the optimal benchmark as control granularity is refined. Additional studies illustrate the robustness of the framework to moderate violations of key modeling assumptions, including heterogeneous power-to-energy ratios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可实现的复合电池模型，能在保证计算效率的同时，确保异构电池储能系统集群的调度方案在元件层面可行，并满足互补约束。
AI.motivation: 现有聚合电池模型常忽略元件间的互补约束，导致调度方案在实际执行时不可行；而独立调度每个元件在计算上不切实际。
AI.method: 推导了简单的线性条件，在基于优先级的控制器下，确保充放电轨迹可安全分解，满足功率、能量和互补约束。
AI.result: 在机组组合场景中，所提模型产生可行调度方案，求解时间与系统规模无关，且随控制粒度细化趋近最优基准。
AI.conclusion: 该框架对异质性假设的适度偏离具有鲁棒性，为大规模异构BESS集群的高效、可行调度提供了实用方案。

title: Parameter Alignment Mitigates Catastrophic Forgetting in Multilingual Expert Language Models
summary: While continual pretraining~(CPT) is a practical way to extend large language models to new languages, naïve finetuning on targeted data erodes existing capabilities through catastrophic forgetting. Organizing training around language families reduces cross-language interference but cannot alone prevent forgetting of the general knowledge needed for downstream tasks. We link this forgetting to parameter drift in multilingual CPT and present a suite of five layer-aware parameter alignment strategies: hard layer freezing, soft regularization, post-hoc weight reversion, and model merging. We systematically compare our alignment strategies against two unregularized CPT baselines on benchmarks spanning 32 training languages from five language families, plus held-out languages, across four evaluation axes: perplexity, reading comprehension, physical reasoning, and translation. Parameter alignment substantially reduces forgetting at minimal cost to language acquisition: layer freezing and regularization best preserve comprehension, whereas post-hoc reversion yields the strongest translation gains. Together, these results map the acquisition--forgetting frontier for family-expert CPT and offer practical deployment guidelines pairing each strategy to the tasks it best serves.

AI.tldr: 本文提出五种层感知参数对齐策略（层冻结、软正则化、事后权重回退、模型合并）来缓解多语言持续预训练中的灾难性遗忘，在32种语言上实验表明这些策略能有效减少遗忘，不同策略在不同任务上各有优势。
AI.motivation: 多语言持续预训练中，简单微调会导致灾难性遗忘，破坏模型已有的通用知识。按语系组织训练虽能减少跨语言干扰，但无法防止下游任务所需通用知识的遗忘。
AI.method: 作者将遗忘问题归因于多语言CPT中的参数漂移，并提出五种层感知参数对齐策略：硬层冻结、软正则化、事后权重回退和模型合并，并在32种训练语言（5个语系）及保留语言上系统比较。
AI.result: 参数对齐显著减少遗忘，且语言习得代价极小。层冻结和正则化最擅长保持理解能力，事后权重回退则在翻译任务上取得最强增益。
AI.conclusion: 结果绘制了语系专家CPT的习得-遗忘前沿，并为不同策略的最佳适用任务提供了实用部署指南。

title: Evaluating Bivariate Causal Statements Based on Mutual Compatibility
summary: For many real-world systems, causal ground truth is difficult to obtain, making claims about causal effects hard to assess. We develop methods for evaluating collections of $\binom{n}{2}$ bivariate causal statements over a set of $n$ variables. In the setting of acyclic linear statements, any such collection can be extended to a unique multivariate causal model, but we argue that this induced model is implausible if it imposes substantial additional confounding to explain observed correlations. We introduce a compatibility score that quantifies this notion of plausibility, notably without relying on the faithfulness assumption. Additionally, we define an incompatibility score for purely graphical bivariate causal statements, based on global consistency constraints that are derived from acyclicity and faithfulness assumptions. We give theoretical and empirical evidence that both scores can successfully distinguish correct from incorrect causal statements in generic settings. Moreover, we demonstrate the practical applicability of our methods by analyzing causal claims made by large language models. Our work aims to provide a foundation for assessing the reliability of causal information derived from human experts or artificial intelligence in settings where alternative forms of validation are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种评分方法来评估二元因果关系陈述的可信度：兼容性评分（不依赖忠实性假设）和不兼容性评分（依赖忠实性假设），并在理论和实证上证明其有效性，最后应用于分析大语言模型生成的因果主张。
AI.motivation: 现实系统中因果真相难以获取，导致因果主张难以验证，因此需要一种无需ground truth即可评估因果陈述可靠性的方法。
AI.method: 针对无环线性系统，将二元因果陈述扩展为唯一的多变量因果模型，通过兼容性评分评估模型引入额外混杂的程度；同时基于无环性和忠实性假设推导全局一致性约束，定义不兼容性评分用于纯图式二元因果陈述。
AI.result: 理论和实证结果均表明两种评分在通用设置下能有效区分正确与错误的因果陈述，并在大语言模型生成的因果主张上验证了实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为缺乏外部验证手段时评估人类专家或AI提供的因果信息可靠性奠定了基础。

title: BAGEN: Are LLM Agents Budget-Aware?
summary: While agents are increasingly spending more resources, today agent cost is mostly measured only after execution. A Budget-Aware Agent (BAGEN) should treat budget as an active control signal, rather than a passive cost metric. We first systematically define budget estimation as internal budgets (from agent computation) and external budgets (from agent actions). We then formalize budget-awareness as progressive interval estimation: at each step of a plan, an agent should predict an upper and lower bound on remaining budget, and alert when completion is unlikely. Scoring with a rollout-replay protocol, we find consistent failure patterns on four environments and five frontier agents: (1) strong agents do not necessarily have strong budget-awareness, with correlation r=0.35. (2) frontier models are consistently over-optimistic, continue spending on tasks that are unlikely to succeed, instead of alerting the user early. (3) budget-aware signal is actionable and trainable. Early stop saves 28-64% tokens on failed trajectories, and SFT+RL strengthens early stop and alert behavior. (4) precise interval calibration remains challenging, with interval coverage capping at 47% after SFT+RL. Project page: https://ragen-ai.github.io/bagen/

AI.tldr: 本文提出预算感知智能体（BAGEN）概念，将预算从被动成本度量转为主动控制信号。通过定义内/外部预算、形式化渐进区间估计方法，发现前沿模型存在过度乐观、缺乏预算感知的问题（相关性仅r=0.35），但预算感知信号可训练，早停可节省28-64% tokens，不过精确区间校准仍具挑战（覆盖率上限47%）。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体的成本仅在执行后被动度量，缺乏在运行过程中将预算作为主动控制信号进行预估和预警的机制，导致资源浪费和任务失败时未及时告知用户。
AI.method: 系统定义预算为内部（计算成本）和外部（动作成本），将预算感知形式化为渐进区间估计（每步预测剩余预算上下界，在完成可能性低时发出警报），并使用rollout-replay协议进行评分。
AI.result: (1) 强智能体不一定有强预算感知（r=0.35）；(2) 前沿模型过度乐观，在不可能成功的任务上持续花费；(3) 早停可节省28-64% tokens，SFT+RL可增强早停和警报行为；(4) 精确区间校准困难，覆盖率上限仅47%。
AI.conclusion: 预算感知信号是可行动且可训练的，但精确的区间校准仍是开放挑战，未来需进一步改进。

title: Next-Billion AI Index: The compass for AI utility and adoption in the global majority
summary: Generative AI assessments remain dominated by frontier capability benchmarks that often fail to capture whether systems can be sustainably deployed, adapted, and trusted in locally grounded and infrastructure-constrained settings. This paper introduces the Next Billion AI Index (nexbax), which we believe is the first diagnostic framework to treat economic viability, operational deployability, and governance alignment as co-equal determinants of AI utility in next-billion-user contexts. Rather than treating usefulness as a single outcome, nexbax operationalizes the preconditions for useful AI through 10 dimensions organized under three themes: Effective Efficiency, Operational Practicality, and Societal Integrity. These dimensions assess whether systems are economically viable, deployable under infrastructure and workflow constraints, and aligned with local needs, user expectations, and collaborative development practices. We pair the framework with rubrics for weak, moderate, and strong performance, and conduct a formative expert evaluation through eleven semi-structured interviews with founders, developers, product leaders, and technical practitioners building AI systems for next-billion markets. Participants found the index useful for reasoning about adoption trade-offs and effective at capturing factors shaping real-world AI uptake -- particularly cost, usability, reliability, and trust. They also identified the need for contextual explanations, domain-specific evidence, and broader stakeholder validation. Nexbax is therefore proposed not as a universal score of social value, but as a diagnostic for artificial useful intelligence: a way to make visible the technical, economic, and governance properties that make inclusive AI deployment more viable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"下一个十亿AI指数"(nexbax)，一个将经济可行性、运营可部署性和治理对齐视为同等重要因素的新诊断框架，用于评估AI在基础设施受限环境中的实用性。该框架涵盖三个主题（有效效率、运营实用性、社会完整性）下的10个维度，并基于11位从业者访谈进行形成性评估。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式AI评估过度依赖前沿能力基准，未能捕捉系统在本地化、基础设施受限环境中可持续部署、适应和获得信任的能力。作者旨在开发一个将经济、运营和治理因素作为实用性先决条件的诊断框架，弥补这一评估空白。
AI.method: 提出nexbax框架，包含三个主题（有效效率、运营实用性、社会完整性）下的10个维度，配套弱/中/强三级评分标准；通过11场半结构化访谈（对象包括创始人、开发者、产品领导者和技术实践者）进行形成性专家评估。
AI.result: 参与者认为该指数有助于推理采用权衡，能有效捕捉影响AI实际应用的因素（特别是成本、可用性、可靠性和信任）；同时指出需要情境化解释、领域特定证据以及更广泛的利益相关者验证。
AI.conclusion: Nexbax不是通用的社会价值评分，而是一个诊断工具，用于揭示影响包容性AI部署的技术、经济和治理属性，使"人工有用智能"的可行性变得更加可见。

title: Inexact Proximal Point and Tseng Algorithms with Nonsummable Errors to Solve Monotone Inclusions
summary: In this paper, we establish, for the first time in the literature, the convergence of the practical versions of the Inexact Proximal Point Algorithm (IPPA) and the Inexact Tseng Algorithm (ITA) for computing approximate solutions to monotone inclusions in Hilbert spaces under the the presence of nonsummable errors. Our ap- proach relies on Tikhonov regularization, the contraction property of the associated monotone operators, and the recently developed R-continuity theory. The proposed techniques and results can be extended to analyze various important inexact algorithms in optimization-related problems with nonsummable errors.

AI.tldr: 本文首次在文献中证明了在非可和误差条件下，非精确近端点算法（IPPA）和非精确Tseng算法（ITA）在希尔伯特空间中对单调包含问题的收敛性，利用了Tikhonov正则化、单调算子的收缩性质以及R-连续性理论。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中，非精确近端点算法和非精确Tseng算法在非可和误差条件下的收敛性尚未建立，这限制了它们在实际优化问题中的应用。
AI.method: 结合Tikhonov正则化、单调算子的收缩性质以及新发展的R-连续性理论，分析非精确近端点算法（IPPA）和非精确Tseng算法（ITA）在非可和误差下的收敛行为。
AI.result: 首次证明了IPPA和ITA在非可和误差条件下在希尔伯特空间中对单调包含问题的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的技术和结果可推广到分析优化相关问题中其他重要的非精确算法在非可和误差下的收敛性。

title: It does what it says on the tin: safe synthetic data from coarsened margins
summary: This paper proposes a method of creating synthetic data (SD) that will have two important advantages for the user compared to other methods currently available. The first is transparency; unlike other methods, the person in receipt of the SD will know which of the relationships between variables in the original data will be approximately maintained in the SD. The second is a guarantee that the SD is derived from information that has already been judged to be free of disclosure risk. This is achieved by first defining and calculating the margins where relationships between variables will be maintained in the SD. Each margin will then be subject to statistical disclosure control (SDC) to the standards defined by the data custodian, e.g. top-coding and bottom-coding, combination of small categories and/or modifying small counts. Further adjustment of the curated margins is advised by coarsening all counts in the table to multiples of the disclosure limit. These adjusted margins are used to create SD by the Iterative Proportional Fitting (IPF) algorithm. The practical steps involved in creating such SD are illustrated using data from the 1901 Census of Scotland.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种合成数据（SD）生成方法，通过先定义并计算原始数据中变量关系的边际，对这些边际进行统计披露控制（SDC）处理（如顶部/底部编码、合并小类别、修改小计数等），再使用迭代比例拟合（IPF）算法生成合成数据。该方法具有透明性和低披露风险的优点，并以1901年苏格兰人口普查数据为例进行了演示。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据方法存在两个不足：用户不清楚原始数据中哪些变量关系在合成数据中被保留，以及合成数据可能存在披露风险。本文旨在解决这两个问题，提供透明且低风险的合成数据生成方法。
AI.method: 1. 定义并计算需要保留变量关系的边际；2. 对每个边际应用统计披露控制（SDC），包括顶部/底部编码、合并小类别、修改小计数等；3. 将所有计数调整为披露限制的倍数（粗化）；4. 使用调整后的边际，通过迭代比例拟合（IPF）算法生成合成数据。
AI.result: 以1901年苏格兰人口普查数据为例，展示了该方法的实际操作步骤，证明生成的合成数据能够保留用户所需的变量关系，且所有信息均经过披露风险审查。
AI.conclusion: 该方法相比现有方法有两个关键优势：透明性（用户明确知道哪些变量关系被保留）和低披露风险（数据源自已通过披露控制的边际信息）。

title: Secure RSMA-based Visible Light Networks under Spatial Correlation
summary: This paper investigates the secrecy sum rate (SSR) of rate-splitting multiple access (RSMA)-based visible light communication (VLC) systems considering internal eavesdropping, where legitimate users may intercept private data intended for others. We formulate an optimization problem to maximize the SSR of the system, which is inherently non-convex due to the complex coupling of the objective function and constraints. To this end, two different approaches based on the convex-concave procedure (CCCP) and semidefinite relaxation (SDR) are leveraged to solve the non-convex parameterized problem. A central focus of this work is the investigation of channel similarity (CS), which serves as a metric for quantifying spatial correlation, and its impact on SSR performance. To mitigate the performance degradation caused by high spatial correlation, we propose a channel similarity reduction (CSR) clustering strategy that proactively minimizes CS to restore the system's degrees of freedom (DoF). Numerical results are provided to demonstrate the performance of the two proposed algorithms under various levels of CS. More importantly, the findings reveal that our proposed CSR-clustering strategy significantly outperforms existing baselines, effectively overcoming the secrecy performance ceiling caused by high spatial correlation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于速率分割多址接入（RSMA）的可见光通信（VLC）系统中，考虑内部窃听时的保密和速率（SSR）最大化问题，提出基于CCCP和SDR的两种非凸优化求解方法，并设计信道相似度降低（CSR）聚类策略来缓解高空间相关性导致的性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 在VLC系统中，由于用户间存在内部窃听风险，且信道空间相关性会严重制约系统的保密性能，现有方法难以有效解决高空间相关性下的保密速率瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 1）将SSR最大化问题建模为非凸参数优化问题；2）分别采用凸凹过程（CCCP）和半定松弛（SDR）两种方法求解；3）提出信道相似度降低（CSR）聚类策略，通过主动降低信道相似度来恢复系统自由度。
AI.result: 两种算法在不同信道相似度水平下均表现出有效性能；提出的CSR聚类策略显著优于现有基线方法，成功突破了高空间相关性导致的保密性能上限。
AI.conclusion: 通过主动降低信道相似度的聚类策略可以有效缓解空间相关性对RSMA-VLC系统保密性能的不利影响，为提升VLC物理层安全性提供了新思路。

title: Model-Based Quality Assessment for Massively Multilingual Parallel Data
summary: Large-scale multilingual bitext often contains two distinct problems: non-parallel sentence pairs and low-quality translations. We decompose model-based assessment for such data into two independent components: parallelism assessment with multilingual embeddings and reference-free quality estimation (QE). For parallelism, we benchmark four embedding models on FLORES-200 and BOUQuET retrieval tasks, covering 6,654 source--target directions in our target language-pair inventory. For QE, we evaluate nine reference-free evaluators on professional FLORES-200 translations across 41,412 ordered source--target directions. Results show that no model is universally reliable across translation directions. Naive QE ensembles dilute strong model signals, while documented target-language coverage is strongly associated with higher QE scores. Overall, these findings suggest that multilingual parallel-data assessment is best approached as a direction-aware routing and calibration problem, where no single universal metric is expected to suffice across all languages.

AI.tldr: 大规模多语言双语句对数据存在两个问题：非平行句对和低质量翻译。本文将模型评估分解为平行性评估（多语言嵌入）和参考无关质量估计（QE）。实验表明无模型在所有翻译方向上通用，建议采用方向感知的路由与校准方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模多语言双语句对数据中普遍存在非平行句对和低质量翻译问题，亟需有效的自动化评估方法来筛选高质量数据。
AI.method: 将模型评估分解为两个独立组件：1）平行性评估：使用多语言嵌入模型；2）参考无关质量估计（QE）。在FLORES-200和BOUQuET任务上对4种嵌入模型和9种QE评估器进行系统评测。
AI.result: 无模型在所有翻译方向上通用；简单集成QE会弱化强模型信号；目标语言覆盖范围与高QE分数强相关。
AI.conclusion: 多语言平行数据评估应作为方向感知的路由与校准问题来处理，不存在单一通用指标适用于所有语言。

title: Model-Native Computing Architecture: Envisioning Future System Architecture Through the Lens of Computer Architecture
summary:
Large language models are undergoing a transition from model technology to system technology.
