As developers use Codex, Claude Code, AutoGPT, and related agents to write code, manage projects, and execute multi-step tasks, recurring engineering problems such as cache reuse, context management, agent scheduling, and permission control increasingly resemble classical computer systems problems. This paper develops that analogy as a visionary survey. We map concepts from computer architecture to the emerging model-native stack and review work on LLM-as-OS, memory management, agent frameworks, tool protocols, multi-agent coordination, cognitive architectures, and safety governance. We argue that these strands address different layers of the same system but lack a unified model.
  To fill this gap, we propose the Intelligent Computing Architecture Model (ICAM), a six-layer framework for model-native computing with explicit interface contracts and design axioms. ICAM resolves the apparent tension over whether an LLM is more like a CPU or an operating system through a dual-plane view: a probabilistic execution plane concerned with what can be computed, and a deterministic control plane concerned with what should be computed. We further introduce three design laws: the Semantic Locality Law for KV-cache reuse and inference speedup, the Context Budget Law for effective working sets under finite windows and attention decay, and the Agent Speedup Law for diminishing returns in multi-agent collaboration. We validate these laws against published system-level data and relate them to recent evidence on agentic software practices. We conclude by identifying where the analogy breaks down and outlining a research roadmap for model-native computing. This is a conceptual and survey contribution; it does not report new experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出智能计算架构模型（ICAM），将大型语言模型系统与计算机体系结构进行类比，构建了一个六层框架来统一理解LLM作为系统技术的各个方面，并提出了三条设计定律（语义局部性定律、上下文预算定律、代理加速定律）。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM正从模型技术转向系统技术，但缓存复用、上下文管理、代理调度、权限控制等工程问题缺乏统一的理论模型。不同研究方向（如LLM-as-OS、记忆管理、代理框架、多智能体协作、安全治理等）各自处理系统不同层次，但缺少一个统一的框架将它们整合起来。
AI.method: 通过愿景式综述方法，将计算机体系结构的概念映射到LLM原生计算栈。提出ICAM六层框架（包含明确的接口契约和设计公理），引入双平面视图（概率执行平面 vs. 确定性控制平面），并归纳三条设计定律用已发表的系统级数据进行验证。
AI.result: 提出了ICAM六层框架，解决了"LLM更像CPU还是操作系统"的争议（双平面视图），形式化了三条设计定律（语义局部性定律、上下文预算定律、代理加速定律），并用已有系统数据进行了初步验证。
AI.conclusion: 该类比在特定边界处失效，研究为模型原生计算提供了路线图。这是一篇概念性和综述性贡献，不涉及新实验。

title: From Rashomon Theory to PRAXIS: Efficient Decision Tree Rashomon Sets
summary: Standard machine learning pipelines often admit many near-optimal models. These "Rashomon sets" pose a range of challenges and opportunities for uncertainty-aware, robust decision making. They allow users to incorporate domain knowledge and preferences that would otherwise be difficult to specify directly in an objective, and they quantify diversity among valid models for a given training dataset and objective function. However, computation of Rashomon sets, even for simple, interpretable model classes such as sparse decision trees, continues to require immense memory and runtime resources. We present PRAXIS, an algorithm to approximate this Rashomon set with orders of magnitude improvement in runtime and memory usage. We validate that PRAXIS regularly recovers almost all of the full Rashomon set. PRAXIS allows researchers and practitioners to scalably model the Rashomon set for real-world datasets. Code for PRAXIS is available at https://github.com/zakk-h/PRAXIS

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRAXIS算法，能够以数量级更优的运行时和内存开销近似计算Rashomon集合（机器学习中所有近优模型构成的集合），并在稀疏决策树等可解释模型上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 标准机器学习流程中常存在大量近优模型（Rashomon集），这些集合对不确定性感知和鲁棒决策具有重要意义，但现有计算方式需要极大的内存和运行时资源，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出PRAXIS算法，通过近似方法高效计算Rashomon集合，显著降低计算资源需求。
AI.result: PRAXIS能够在运行时和内存使用上实现数量级的提升，并能恢复几乎完整的Rashomon集合。
AI.conclusion: PRAXIS使研究人员和从业者能够可扩展地在真实数据集上建模Rashomon集合，推动不确定性感知和鲁棒决策的实际应用。

title: Quantifying the Salience of Geo-Cultural Values for Pluralistic Safety Alignment
summary: Safe global deployment of AI models requires alignment with human values that vary across cultures. Yet rater pools in safety evaluation datasets remain largely geographically homogeneous, failing to capture geo-cultural differences. Further, it remains unclear whether such differences persist after controlling for demographics such as age, gender, and ethnicity. Through a meta-analysis of safety datasets, we find that most do not report geo-cultural information, and those that do lack a unified methodology to jointly analyze geo-cultural and demographic correlates. Using the Inglehart-Welzel dimensions of cross-cultural variation, we demonstrate via multilevel modeling that cultural zone membership explains variance in safety ratings beyond standard demographics (p<0.05 across 6 datasets). Moreover, our analysis indicates that roughly 10% of items in the datasets we examined are culturally sensitive: likely to be misclassified as safe without adequate cultural representation. We evaluate LLMs as both rater surrogates and triage tools, finding that current LLMs do not reliably stand in for raters, though they can help prioritize culturally sensitive items for human annotation. Our findings motivate more culturally pluralistic safety evaluation and offer practical takeaways to support it.

AI.tldr: 本文通过元分析发现，现有AI安全评估数据集大多缺乏地理文化信息，且文化因素对安全评分的影响远超年龄、性别等标准人口统计学变量。约10%的数据项具有文化敏感性，当前LLM无法可靠替代人工评估者，但可作为文化敏感项筛选工具。
AI.motivation: AI模型的安全部署需要与跨文化的人类价值观对齐，但现有安全评估数据集的地理分布高度同质化，未能捕捉地域文化差异，且不清楚在控制人口统计学变量后文化差异是否仍然存在。
AI.method: 对安全数据集进行元分析，使用Inglehart-Welzel跨文化变异维度，通过多层次建模分析文化区域归属对安全评分的影响，并评估LLM作为评分替代和分类工具的效果。
AI.result: 文化区域归属在6个数据集中均显著（p<0.05）解释了超越标准人口统计学的安全评分方差；约10%的数据项具有文化敏感性，容易被误分类；当前LLM无法可靠替代人类评分者，但可用于筛选文化敏感项。
AI.conclusion: 研究呼吁AI安全评估应更具文化多元性，并提供了支持这一目标的实用建议。

title: Minimal intersection radius for $n$ growing, non-homogeneous ellipsoids in $\mathbb{R}^d$
summary: In this paper, we compute the Minimal Intersection Radius (MIR) of growing, non-homogeneous ellipsoids in arbitrary ambient dimension. We provide a geometric method to find the MIR using techniques from convex optimization, a secondary method using second-order cone programs, and show that the MIR can be phrased as an LP-type problem, where the computation from convex optimization acts as a certificate. We implement these methods and benchmark them using different convex solvers, and with or without the LP setting. We also provide a comparison with similar but different problems that appeared in the literature, and show that finding the MIR is, in general, not equivalent to finding the minimal enclosing ellipsoid.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非均匀椭球族的最小交集半径（MIR）问题，提出了基于凸优化、二阶锥规划及LP型问题的三种求解方法，并通过实验对比了不同求解器的性能，同时证明了MIR问题与最小包围椭球问题不等价。
AI.motivation: 计算增长且非均匀椭球族的最小交集半径，并探索其与经典几何优化问题的关系。
AI.method: 1) 基于凸优化的几何方法（作为证书）；2) 基于二阶锥规划的方法；3) 将MIR问题表述为LP型问题。通过多种凸求解器进行基准测试。
AI.result: 实现了三种方法并通过不同求解器进行了性能对比，发现MIR问题与最小包围椭球问题通常不等价。
AI.conclusion: 给出了MIR问题的完整求解框架，明确了其与经典问题的区别，为后续几何优化研究提供了新视角。

title: Error Bounds for a Diffusion Model-Based Drift Estimator
summary: Parameter estimation in stochastic differential equations is a classical statistical problem of much importance in many scientific fields. Recent work of Tapia Costa et al. (2026) introduced a novel technique for estimating the drift when the diffusion parameter is known, using discrete samples from multiple trajectories. Their method treats drift estimation as a denoising problem, and leverages tools from (conditional) score-matching diffusion models. Although their experiments showed promising results across different drift classes, the question of theoretical guarantees for their estimator was left unanswered. In this note, we address this gap by exploiting techniques from diffusion model theory. More concretely, we derive an explicit risk bound for the time-averaged mean-squared error of said drift estimator. Our bound decomposes the risk into the (i) Euler-Maruyama discretization, (ii) score/denoiser approximation, (iii) noise initialization, and (iv) sampling variance, revealing the trade-offs between the different hyperparameters and sources of error in the estimator.

AI.tldr: 本文为Tapia Costa et al. (2026)提出的基于扩散模型的漂移估计器提供了理论保证，推导了时间平均均方误差的显式风险界，并将其分解为离散化、分数近似、噪声初始化和采样方差四个部分。
AI.motivation: Tapia Costa等人的漂移估计方法在实验中表现良好，但缺乏理论保证，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型理论中的技术，推导出漂移估计器在时间平均均方误差下的显式风险界，并将风险分解为四项：Euler-Maruyama离散化误差、分数/去噪器逼近误差、噪声初始化误差和采样方差。
AI.result: 得到了漂移估计器的显式风险上界，揭示了不同超参数和误差来源之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 为基于扩散模型的SDE漂移估计方法提供了严格的理论保障，并明确了各类误差的贡献与权衡。

title: Anti-Windup in PID Control: Review, Analysis, and New Tuning Directions
summary: Actuator saturation is a fundamental nonlinearity that significantly degrades the performance of PID-controlled systems by inducing integrator windup, leading to overshoot, slow recovery, and even instability. Although numerous anti-windup strategies have been proposed, their practical tuning remains largely heuristic and suboptimal in many industrial scenarios. This paper presents a comprehensive comparative study of classical and advanced anti-windup techniques for PI-controlled first-order-plus-dead-time (FOPDT) processes under a wide range of operating conditions. The analysis includes dynamic and instantaneous back-calculation, conditional integration, and adapted schemes. In addition, a novel hybrid anti-windup strategy is proposed, combining conditional integration with dynamic back-calculation to improve responsiveness during saturation, whilst preserving smooth recovery dynamics. Moreover, a key contribution of this work is the development of systematic tuning rules for the tracking time constant in back-calculation schemes, specifically optimised for load-disturbance rejection. These rules are derived from an extensive optimisation study that considers the saturation ratio, controller aggressiveness, and disturbance characteristics. The resulting guidelines provide simple yet effective formulas that achieve near-optimal performance without requiring complex computations. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed methods significantly outperform commonly used heuristic rules, particularly in disturbance rejection scenarios, and provide clear, practical recommendations for selecting and tuning anti-windup strategies in industrial applications.

AI.tldr: 本文针对PI控制FOPDT过程中的执行器饱和与积分饱和问题，系统比较了多种抗饱和策略，并提出了一种结合条件积分与动态反馈计算的新型混合抗饱和方法，同时开发了基于优化的跟踪时间常数整定规则，显著提升了扰动抑制性能。
AI.motivation: 执行器饱和导致的积分饱和问题会引发超调、恢复缓慢甚至不稳定，现有抗饱和策略在实际调参中大多依赖启发式方法，缺乏系统优化，性能难以保证。
AI.method: 1）系统比较了动态/瞬时反馈计算、条件积分及改进方案；2）提出混合抗饱和策略（条件积分+动态反馈计算）；3）基于广泛优化研究，开发了针对扰动抑制的跟踪时间常数系统整定规则。
AI.result: 所提方法在扰动抑制场景中显著优于常用启发式规则，提供的整定公式简单有效，可实现近最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文为工业应用中抗饱和策略的选择与调优提供了清晰实用的指导，混合策略在响应速度与恢复平滑性之间取得了良好平衡。

title: Uncovering Temporal Framing in the News
summary: Temporal language does more than place events on a timeline. In news discourse, references to the past, present, and future can function as rhetorical devices that shape interpretation and persuasion. Here, we study temporal framing, defined as the persuasive use of time-related language to structure meaning rather than to report chronology. We propose a taxonomy of eight temporal frames grounded in prior work on temporality and framing, and we realize it through expert annotation of a multilingual news corpus. The resulting dataset includes 458 English and German news articles, with over 2K temporally framed sentences and approximately 3K temporal framing annotations identified from a corpus of more than 20K sentences. We analyze frame prevalence, co-occurrence patterns, and lexical cues, and evaluate temporal framing detection using supervised fine-tuning and zero-shot classification. Our experiments show that temporal framing is learnable at the sentence level, with supervised models substantially outperforming zero-shot approaches. We publicly release the corpus to support future research on temporal framing: https://mbzuai-nlp.github.io/temporal-framing/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间框架（temporal framing）的概念，即新闻中利用时间相关语言进行说服而非单纯报告时间顺序。作者构建了八类时间框架分类体系，通过专家标注构建了包含458篇英德新闻文章、超过2000个时间框架句子的数据集。实验表明，时间框架检测在句子级别是可学习的，监督模型显著优于零样本方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多将时间语言视为单纯的时间定位工具，忽略了其在新闻话语中作为修辞策略的说服功能。作者旨在系统研究时间语言如何被用作框架（framing）手段来塑造读者对事件的解读。
AI.method: 1. 基于前人关于时间性和框架研究的理论基础，提出八类时间框架分类体系；2. 通过专家标注，对英德双语新闻语料进行人工标注；3. 使用监督微调和零样本分类两种方法进行时间框架检测实验。
AI.result: 构建了包含458篇英德新闻文章的数据集，识别出超过2000个时间框架句子（约3000个标注实例），语料来源超过20000个句子。监督模型在句子级别的时间框架检测上显著优于零样本方法。
AI.conclusion: 时间框架在新闻话语中是一种可学习的修辞策略，监督学习方法能有效检测。作者公开数据集以推动该方向后续研究。

title: Coupling Language Models with Physics-based Simulation for Synthesis of Inorganic Materials
comment: Accepted to the AI for Accelerated Materials Design (AI4Mat) Workshop at Neurips 2025
summary: Modern generative machine learning (ML) models can propose novel inorganic crystalline materials with targeted properties; however, synthesis planning of these materials remains difficult due to the complexity of the associated physical processes and limited availability of computational tools. We introduce a novel hybrid framework to evaluate Large Language Models (LLMs) in inorganic synthesis planning by combining thermodynamic databases with simplified kinetics models to approximate realistic synthesis conditions. As a case study, we focus on the niobium-oxygen system, which features multiple industrially relevant oxide phases with well-characterized data. In computational simulations, we compare LLM-generated synthesis routes with classical path-planning algorithms, showing that the implicit priors in LLMs can yield more viable strategies. In our evaluation setting, classical search methods serve primarily as a foil rather than a direct competitor. This illustrates the relative complexity of the problem and highlights where the LLM's implicit priors add value.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合框架，通过结合热力学数据库和简化动力学模型来评估大语言模型在无机合成规划中的能力。以铌-氧系统为案例，发现LLM生成的合成路径比经典路径规划算法更有效，其隐式先验知识能提供更有价值的策略。
AI.motivation: 现代生成式ML模型可以提出具有目标特性的新型无机晶体材料，但由于相关物理过程的复杂性和计算工具有限，这些材料的合成规划仍然困难。作者希望利用LLM的隐式先验知识来改进合成路径规划。
AI.method: 提出一种混合框架，将热力学数据库与简化动力学模型相结合，以近似真实的合成条件来评估LLM。以铌-氧系统为案例（包含多个工业相关氧化物相），将LLM生成的合成路线与经典路径规划算法进行对比。
AI.result: 在计算模拟中，LLM生成的合成路线比经典路径规划算法产生更可行的策略。经典搜索方法主要作为对比基准，而非直接竞争者，凸显了问题的相对复杂性以及LLM隐式先验的价值。
AI.conclusion: LLM的隐式先验在无机合成规划中能提供超越传统算法的价值，该框架为评估LLM在材料科学中的应用提供了可行方法。

title: Quantized Reasoning Models Think They Need to Think Longer, but They Do Not
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is widely used to deploy large language models efficiently, but its effect on reasoning models is not well understood. Across math, coding, and science QA, we find that aggressive PTQ reduces accuracy while increasing chain-of-thought (CoT) length. Surprisingly, we show that in up to 52% of the quantized models' failures, models reach the right answer in intermediate reasoning steps but do not output it as a final answer. To understand why quantization leads to this increase in overthinking errors, we measure the token-level KL divergence between quantized and full-precision output distributions. Positions with high KL divergence correlate strongly with high next-token entropy, and at these positions quantized models disproportionately sample overthinking markers such as "wait", "but", and "alternatively". We show that simply introducing a training-free logit penalty on a curated set of overthinking markers can reduce CoT length by 12--23% while preserving or improving accuracy across 5 models (1.5B-32B parameters), 3 quantization methods, and 5 benchmarks, yielding a favorable Pareto frontier of accuracy against reasoning cost compared to penalizing other token sets. Overthinking errors produced by quantized models are particularly reduced by up to 58%.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，对推理模型进行激进的后训练量化（PTQ）会在降低准确率的同时延长思维链（CoT）长度。高达52%的量化模型失败案例中，模型在中间推理步骤得到正确答案却未作为最终输出。量化模型在KL散度高、熵值高的位置过度采样"wait"、"but"等过度思考标记。引入无训练的对数概率惩罚可减少12-23%的CoT长度，将过度思考错误降低58%，在准确率和推理成本间形成更优帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 后训练量化广泛用于大模型高效部署，但其对推理模型（如数学、编程、科学问答任务）的具体影响尚不清楚，尤其需要探究量化如何影响模型的推理行为和最终准确性。
AI.method: 1. 评估不同量化程度对推理模型准确率和CoT长度的影响；2. 分析量化模型失败案例中"过度思考"错误的比例；3. 通过token级KL散度分析量化模型与全精度模型输出分布的差异；4. 提出一种无训练的对数概率惩罚方法，对一组"过度思考标记"（如wait, but, alternatively）施加惩罚。
AI.result: 激进量化降低准确率并延长CoT长度；52%的量化模型失败案例属于过度思考错误；高KL散度位置与高熵位置相关，量化模型在此处过度采样过度思考标记；所提惩罚方法可减少12-23% CoT长度，降低58%过度思考错误，在5种模型、3种量化方法、5个基准上优于其他标记惩罚方案。
AI.conclusion: 后训练量化会导致推理模型出现过度思考行为，造成准确率下降和推理成本增加；通过简单的标记级对数概率惩罚可有效缓解这一问题，在不牺牲准确率的前提下实现更高效的推理。

title: Toward Agentic Governance: What Shapes LLM-Agent Intervention in Public Forums?
summary: LLM agents are increasingly used in moderation-relevant public forum workflows, where their choices to answer, acknowledge, repair, or decline are routinely challenged by users, platforms, and regulators. The same agent often returns different responses on identical content, so any defense based on the agent's behavior cannot be reliably reproduced. The variation is structural. Four deployment choices typically invisible to the operator each shift the agent's response rate, and their combinations can produce substantially different interventions on the same forum posts. The four choices are (1) which model version is currently served, which can change between calls without notice; (2) the model's weight-release status (open-weight, with weights publicly downloadable, vs. closed-weight, with weights held by the provider); (3) which provider serves the request; and (4) which system-prompt policy is in force. Across LLMs spanning both open-weight and closed-weight families, we find that the previously reported tendency to decline more on visible than hidden challenges aligns with the open/closed weight boundary in our panel more than with access surface. Every closed-weight cell declines more on visible challenges; every open-weight cell reverses this or shows no gap. Auditable forum-agent governance requires awareness of all four choices, not just the model name, since each independently shifts behavior.

AI.tldr: LLM代理在论坛审核中存在行为不稳定性，四种部署选择（模型版本、权重开放状态、提供商、系统提示策略）会独立且显著改变其响应模式，其中开放/封闭权重对可见/隐藏挑战的拒绝行为有结构性影响。
AI.motivation: LLM代理在公共论坛审核中扮演重要角色，但其行为存在不可复现的结构性变异，需要厘清影响因素的来源以确保审核的可审计性和公平性。
AI.method: 系统性地操控四种部署变量（模型版本、权重开放状态、提供商、系统提示策略），对开放权重和封闭权重家族的多个LLM进行对比实验，测量其对可见与隐藏挑战的拒绝率差异。
AI.result: 封闭权重模型在可见挑战上拒绝率更高；开放权重模型则相反或无显著差异。四种部署选择各自独立影响行为，且权重开放/封闭状态是比访问界面更稳定的行为预测因子。
AI.conclusion: 论坛代理的可审计治理必须关注所有四种部署选择，而非仅模型名称，因为每个因素都会独立改变代理行为。

title: MINTS: Minimalist Thompson Sampling
summary: The Bayesian paradigm offers principled tools for sequential decision-making under uncertainty, but its reliance on a probabilistic model for all parameters can hinder the incorporation of complex structural constraints. We introduce a minimalist Bayesian framework that places a prior only on the location of the optimum, while eliminating nuisance parameters through profile likelihood. This yields a generalized posterior that naturally accommodates structural constraints. As a direct instantiation, we develop MINimalist Thompson Sampling (MINTS). For multi-armed bandits with mean constraints, we establish near-optimal non-asymptotic regret guarantees and sharp almost-sure asymptotic regret characterizations. In particular, MINTS attains the classical Lai--Robbins constant in the unstructured setting and automatically adapts to unimodal structure, achieving the sharp constant determined only by the immediate neighbors of the optimal arm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种极简贝叶斯框架（MINTS），仅对最优参数位置设置先验，通过轮廓似然消除冗余参数，在满足结构约束的同时实现近乎最优的遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯方法依赖对所有参数的概率建模，难以融入复杂结构约束。本文旨在设计一种既能保留贝叶斯决策优势、又能自然容纳结构约束的极简框架。
AI.method: 提出MINTS（Minimalist Thompson Sampling）：仅对最优位置设先验，利用轮廓似然消除冗余参数，得到广义后验分布；基于该后验进行汤普森采样。
AI.result: 在带均值约束的多臂老虎机问题上，MINTS实现了近最优的非渐近遗憾界和尖锐的几乎必然渐近遗憾刻画；在无结构设置下达到经典Lai-Robbins常数，在单峰结构下自动适应并达到由最优臂紧邻臂决定的锐利常数。
AI.conclusion: 该极简贝叶斯框架有效兼顾了贝叶斯决策的优势与结构约束的灵活性，MINTS算法在理论和实证上均展现了最优或近最优性能。

title: ProbRes: Volatility Learning for Probabilistic Time-Series Forecasting
summary: Probabilistic time series forecasting has attracted increasing attention in financial applications due to the need to quantify risk and uncertainty in future observations. We propose ProbRes, a post-hoc probabilistic calibration method that explicitly learns and incorporates volatility dynamics into probabilistic forecasting, enabling effective handling of heteroskedastic data. During training, ProbRes employs two architecture-agnostic modules to separately model the conditional mean and conditional volatility. At the inference stage, it generates predictive distributions by resampling normalized residuals. ProbRes is applicable to both univariate and multivariate time series and remains robust under a wide range of error distributions, including non-Gaussian innovations with conditional heteroskedasticity. Theoretical results demonstrate ProbRes's validity and experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that ProbRes accurately captures predictive distributions and produces well-calibrated prediction intervals.

AI.tldr: ProbRes是一种后验概率校准方法，通过显式学习和建模波动率动态来改进概率时间序列预测，适用于异方差数据。
AI.motivation: 在金融应用中，量化未来观测的不确定性和风险至关重要，但现有概率预测方法难以有效处理异方差数据（波动率随时间变化的数据）。
AI.method: 提出ProbRes后验校准方法：(1) 训练阶段使用两个架构无关模块分别建模条件均值和条件波动率；(2) 推理阶段通过重采样标准化残差生成预测分布；(3) 适用于单变量和多变量时间序列。
AI.result: 理论证明ProbRes的有效性；在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法能准确捕捉预测分布并生成校准良好的预测区间，且对非高斯误差分布和条件异方差具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ProbRes是一种通用、鲁棒的概率时间序列后验校准方法，能有效处理异方差数据，提升预测分布的质量和校准性。

title: AI-Based KPI Prediction Methods in Future 6G Networks: A Survey
comment: Submitted to IEEE Communications Surveys and Tutorials, 30 pages
summary: The evolution from 5G to 5G-Advanced and the vision of 6G demand unprecedented levels of network performance, in which meeting stringent network Key Performance Indicators (KPIs), including capacity, latency, coverage, and reliability, is critical to supporting emerging applications such as autonomous driving, industrial automation, and immersive communications. Traditional reactive network management is insufficient in this context, driving the need for predictive, data-driven approaches. Machine Learning (ML) has emerged as a key enabler, enabling the forecasting of KPI trends from diverse data sources and thereby enabling proactive, AI-native automation in mobile networks. This survey provides the first comprehensive and systematic review of data-driven KPI prediction methods for future 6G networks. We introduce a multi-dimensional taxonomy that classifies prediction approaches by KPI type, data source, the network protocol stack at which the KPI is predicted, prediction horizon, model family, and prediction objective. Using this taxonomy, we analyze the state of the art across various KPIs, highlighting representative methods ranging from classical statistical models to deep learning and reinforcement learning. We further discuss enabling system aspects, including data collection and learning architectures, and examine deployment challenges, including data availability, scalability, privacy, and sustainability. Finally, we outline open research directions spanning new KPI definitions, probabilistic and explainable predictions. This survey aims to provide researchers and practitioners with a structured understanding of the KPI prediction landscape and a roadmap toward predictive network automation in future 6G systems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统综述了面向未来6G网络的数据驱动KPI预测方法，提出了包含KPI类型、数据源、协议栈层次、预测时域、模型家族和预测目标的多维分类法，并讨论了数据采集、学习架构及部署挑战，最后展望了新的KPI定义、概率性和可解释性预测等研究方向。
AI.motivation: 从5G到5G-Advanced再到6G，网络性能要求空前严苛（容量、时延、覆盖、可靠性等），传统反应式网络管理已无法满足需求，亟需预测性、数据驱动的自动化管理方法，而机器学习为此提供了关键使能技术。
AI.method: 提出了一个多维分类法，涵盖KPI类型、数据源、网络协议栈层次、预测时域、模型家族和预测目标六个维度；基于此分类法系统分析了从经典统计模型到深度学习、强化学习等各类预测方法。
AI.result: 系统梳理了各类KPI预测方法的现状，涵盖了数据收集与学习架构等使能系统方面，并识别出数据可用性、可扩展性、隐私和可持续性等部署挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为研究人员和从业人员提供了KPI预测领域的结构化理解，并为未来6G系统中实现预测性网络自动化提供了路线图；开放方向包括新KPI定义、概率性预测和可解释性预测。

title: Bridging Reasoning Trajectories in On-Policy Distillation via Near-Future Guidance
summary: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) improves large language model reasoning by training a student model on trajectories sampled from its own policy under teacher supervision. Although OPD operates on trajectories, its learning signal remains token-level: it identifies deviations through high-loss tokens and repairs them through local reverse-KL correction. We show that this "trajectory-sampled but token-learned" mechanism cannot reliably bridge student trajectories toward teacher trajectories. About 30% of high-loss tokens fall into the low-divergence regime, indicating that many are surface-form mismatches rather than real reasoning forks. Moreover, even truly divergent tokens are difficult to repair with isolated token-level supervision, since reasoning failures often unfold as short-horizon distributional drift. We propose Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD), which uses near-future trajectory information to identify real divergent states and distribute guidance across multiple future tokens. Experiments show that suppressing non-divergent high-loss tokens improves standard OPD from 47.8% to 48.2% average accuracy, while TOPD further improves performance to 52.2%, with gains on AIME24 from 60.0% to 63.3% and AIME25 from 46.7% to 53.3%.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有 On-Policy Distillation (OPD) 方法存在"轨迹采样但token级学习"的矛盾，约30%的高损失token来自表面形式不匹配而非真正推理分歧，且即使真正分歧也难以通过孤立token监督修复。提出 Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD)，利用近未来轨迹信息识别真正分歧状态并跨多个未来token分配引导，在多个推理基准上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有OPD方法的学习信号停留在token级别——通过高损失token识别偏差并用局部反向KL散度修复，但这种"轨迹采样但token级学习"机制无法可靠地将学生轨迹引导向教师轨迹。高损失token中约30%属于低散度区域（表面形式不匹配而非真正推理分叉），且真正的分歧token也难以通过孤立的token级监督修复，因为推理失败往往表现为短视的分布漂移。
AI.method: 提出TOPD（Trajectory-aware OPD），利用近未来轨迹信息识别真正分歧状态，并将引导信号分配到多个未来token上，从而克服token级监督的局限性。
AI.result: 抑制非分歧高损失token可将标准OPD从47.8%提升至48.2%的平均准确率；TOPD进一步将性能提升至52.2%，其中AIME24从60.0%提升至63.3%，AIME25从46.7%提升至53.3%。
AI.conclusion: TOPD通过引入轨迹感知机制有效解决了OPD中token级学习信号的局限，显著提升了大语言模型在复杂推理任务上的性能。

title: From Noise to Control: Parameterized Diffusion Policies
summary: We propose Parameterized Diffusion Policy (PDP), a framework for learning diffusion policies conditioned on low-dimensional, continuous parameters embedded in a learned behavior manifold. By constructing this manifold so that distances between latent representations reflect the semantic similarity between physical trajectories, we transform diffusion from a mechanism for stochastic diversity into a precise and optimizable tool for behavior steering. Our approach enables smooth interpolation between known strategies and efficient adaptation to novel constraints without updating policy weights. We demonstrate that PDP significantly improves adaptation performance on complex multimodal benchmarks in both simulated and real-robot experiments compared to standard diffusion policies, particularly in scenarios requiring the synthesis of novel behaviors.

AI.tldr: 提出参数化扩散策略（PDP），通过构建行为流形使潜在空间距离反映轨迹语义相似性，将扩散模型从随机多样性工具转变为可优化的行为引导工具，实现无需更新权重即可平滑插值与适应新约束。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散策略虽能生成多样化行为，但缺乏精确控制与可优化性，难以在复杂多模态场景中高效适应新约束或合成未见行为。
AI.method: 构建一个低维连续参数嵌入的"行为流形"，使流形中潜在表示的间距对应物理轨迹的语义相似度；在此基础上训练扩散策略，使扩散过程可基于该参数空间进行插值与优化。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实机器人多模态基准任务上，PDP相比标准扩散策略显著提升了适应性能，尤其在需要合成新行为的场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PDP将扩散模型从随机采样机制转变为精确、可优化的行为控制工具，在零样本适应与行为插值方面具有显著优势。

title: LithoGRPO: Fast Inverse Lithography via GRPO Reinforced Flow Matching
summary: In semiconductor manufacturing, lithography projects circuit layouts onto silicon wafers through an optical mask. As circuit features shrink below the wavelength of light, optical diffraction causes the printed patterns to deviate from their intended layouts. Inverse Lithography Technology (ILT) addresses this challenge by generating optimized masks that enhance the fidelity of pattern transfer onto wafers. While ILT resembles an image synthesis task, its reliance on explicit physical metrics for mask evaluation limits the applicability of existing generative models. We introduce LithoGRPO, an ILT framework that integrates the flow-matching paradigm with GRPO-based reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning, enabling efficient exploration of diverse masks for a given target layout. Unlike purely generative or optimization-based approaches, RL in LithoGRPO exploits the explicitly defined, physics-based reward function of ILT, enabling optimization under complex, process-aware constraints. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first framework that unifies flow matching and RL for mask optimization. To improve RL sampling efficiency, we propose a fast shot-counting algorithm for manufacturability evaluation, achieving over 130x speedup while preserving the mask ranking of the traditional shot-count metric. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LithoGRPO achieves state-of-the-art performance over both optimization-based and learning-based methods, while maintaining efficient mask generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LithoGRPO，一种将流匹配与GRPO强化学习结合的光学邻近效应修正框架，用于半导体制造中的光刻掩模优化，在保持高效生成的同时实现了最先进的性能，并提出了一种快速评估算法提升采样效率130倍以上。
AI.motivation: 半导体制造中，随着电路特征尺寸缩小至光波长以下，光学衍射导致印刷图案偏离设计版图。虽然逆光刻技术(ILT)可以解决这一问题，但现有生成模型难以直接应用，因为ILT依赖显式的物理指标评估掩模质量。
AI.method: 将流匹配(flow-matching)范式与基于GRPO的强化学习微调相结合，利用ILT中物理驱动的奖励函数进行优化，并设计了快速掩模可制造性评估算法提升采样效率。
AI.result: 快速计数算法实现130倍以上加速，同时保持与传统指标一致的掩模排序；在多种方法（优化方法和学习方法）中达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个将流匹配与强化学习统一应用于掩模优化的框架，证明了基于物理奖励的RL微调能有效提升ILT性能。

title: Global Patterns in Student Stress and Academic Performance: A Machine Learning Study Using PISA 2022
summary: Machine learning was applied to examine whether stress-related factors influence student performance in a consistent way across the world. The main goal of this project is to confirm or reject the existence of a similar global pattern by generalizing the findings that already exist in this field. We focused on various psychological indicators such as anxiety score, test anxiety, math anxiety, math confidence, wellbeing, and sense of belonging, along with several non-psychological factors for context. Machine learning was chosen due to the extremely large size of the PISA 2022 dataset and its ability to capture complex relationships that simpler methods may overlook. The analysis was conducted across six continents by splitting the dataset into six separate case studies. Feature engineering was performed manually for each region, while the same baseline models were trained to ensure a fair comparison. The results show that the negative effect of stress on performance is present and fairly consistent across all continents. Although some error remains, partly because stress is not the only factor shaping academic outcomes, the overall pattern is clear. Africa stood out as an outlier due to lower average educational and wellbeing levels and a higher proportion of missing data, yet even there the negative relationship remained observable.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用机器学习分析PISA 2022大规模数据，验证压力相关因素（如焦虑、幸福感等）对学生学业表现的影响是否在全球六大洲存在一致模式。结果表明，压力对学业表现的负面影响在全球范围内具有一致性，非洲因教育水平较低和缺失数据较多而呈现离群特征，但负面关系仍然可观测。
AI.motivation: 已有研究指出压力因素影响学生表现，但尚不清楚这种影响是否在全球范围内具有一致的规律。本研究旨在通过大规模跨国数据，验证是否存在全球性的统一模式，从而将已有发现推广至更广泛的背景。
AI.method: 采用机器学习方法分析PISA 2022数据集，对焦虑得分、考试焦虑、数学焦虑、数学自信、幸福感、归属感等心理指标以及若干非心理因素进行建模。将数据按六大洲划分为六个独立的案例研究，对每个区域手动进行特征工程，并使用相同的基线模型进行训练以保证公平比较。
AI.result: 压力对学业表现的负面影响在六大洲均存在且表现出一致性。非洲地区因平均教育和幸福感水平较低、缺失数据比例较高而成为离群点，但压力与表现的负面关系仍然可观测。模型存在一定的误差，因为压力并非影响学业成果的唯一因素。
AI.conclusion: 压力对学生表现的负面效应在全球范围内具有跨区域的稳健性和一致性，验证了全球模式的普遍性。未来研究可进一步探索其他影响因素以减少误差，并针对非洲等特殊地区改进数据质量。

title: A Unified Variational Design of Predictive Mirror Descent in Convex Games under Stochastic Feedback
summary: Mirror descent provides a geometric framework for learning in games, but its last-iterate behavior can fail in weakly stable regimes, where the dynamics may exhibit rotational or recurrent transients. Predictive mirror methods mitigate this issue by modifying the feedback entering the mirror update, yet standard predictive variants are typically introduced algorithmically and analyzed one at a time. This letter gives a variational route to predictive feedback by constructing a stochastic mirror differential game with an auxiliary memory state. Its stage cost couples two Fenchel terms: a strategic term evaluated at a predicted profile and a corrective term driven by realized feedback. The resulting equilibrium feedback induces two-channel predictive mirror dynamics in general mirror geometry. Under local mirror regularity, a quantitative local Bregman growth condition, and bounded Brownian diffusion, we establish finite-horizon local terminal-time bounds in expectation and with high probability, together with an exit-probability estimate for the localization neighborhood. The result provides a unified variational construction of the induced predictive-memory mirror flow together with a local stochastic certificate for last-iterate performance near stable equilibria.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建一个带有辅助记忆状态的随机镜像微分博弈，为预测性镜像方法提供了变分路径。在局部镜像正则性、局部Bregman增长条件和有界布朗扩散下，建立了有限时域局部终端时间界和高概率退出概率估计，统一了预测记忆镜像流的变分构造及其在稳定均衡附近的最后迭代性能保证。
AI.motivation: 镜像下降法在学习博弈中提供了几何框架，但其最后迭代行为在弱稳定区域可能失效，出现旋转或循环暂态。现有的预测性镜像方法虽然通过修改反馈缓解了这一问题，但标准变体通常是算法性引入且逐一分析，缺乏统一的变分视角。
AI.method: 构造一个随机镜像微分博弈，引入辅助记忆状态；阶段成本耦合两个Fenchel项：预测轮廓处的策略项和由实际反馈驱动的修正项；由此诱导出一般镜像几何下的双通道预测镜像动力学。
AI.result: 在局部镜像正则性、局部Bregman增长条件和有界布朗扩散下，建立了有限时域局部终端时间界的期望和高概率保证，以及定位邻域的退出概率估计。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个统一的预测记忆镜像流变分构造，以及在稳定均衡附近最后迭代性能的局部随机保证。

title: Bayesian meta-learning for modeling Alzheimer's disease progression
summary: Predicting whether an individual with Alzheimer's disease will experience mild or severe disease progression is essential for personalized treatment. Typically, practitioners seek to predict the distribution of a discrete disease score, conditional on an individual's current MRI volume and their historical disease trajectory. Classical statistical regression models and single-task neural networks are not well-suited for this purpose because fitting separate models is infeasible (since each individual typically has few observations), while ignoring individual-level correlation leads to poor generalization. Meta-learning, in contrast, provides a natural avenue to dynamically predict distributions without retraining and model nonlinear relationships between the outcome and covariates. Motivated by this, we propose a Bayesian meta-learner that is trained on multiple individuals but tailors the predictive disease score distribution to each individual's historical data. Our model predicts on unseen individuals without retraining, scales linearly with the number of historical observations, and is guaranteed to be less overconfident when predicting long-term disease scores compared to its deterministic counterpart. On real-world data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) database, our model achieves performance competitive with both single-task models and deterministic meta-learners, while substantially improving performance when predicting long-term disease progression.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种贝叶斯元学习模型，用于基于个体历史数据和MRI影像预测阿尔茨海默病的疾病进展（轻度或重度），无需重新训练即可适应新个体，并在长期预测中优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统统计回归和单任务神经网络难以有效处理个体观测数据少、个体间相关性差异大的问题，而元学习提供了一种自然的方式来动态预测疾病评分分布，无需重新训练即可建模非线性关系。
AI.method: 提出一个贝叶斯元学习器，在多个个体的训练数据上学习，但针对每个个体的历史数据定制化预测疾病评分分布。模型无需重新训练即可预测新个体，计算复杂度随历史观测数线性增长，并且相比确定性模型在长程预测中更不容易过度自信。
AI.result: 在ADNI真实数据上，该模型在性能上与单任务模型和确定性元学习器相当，但在预测长期疾病进展时显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯元学习模型能够有效利用群体知识来个性化预测个体疾病进展，特别是在长期预测中具有更好的校准性和鲁棒性，为阿尔茨海默病的个性化治疗提供了有力支持。

title: Detecting Cyber Attacks in Power System AGC Using a Drifted Ornstein-Uhlenbeck Process
summary: The Automatic Generation Control (AGC) system, reliant on real-time measurements over communication networks, is susceptible to stealthy false data injection attacks (FDIAs), risking equipment damage and economic losses. We propose a robust FDIA detection method using maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) of a drifted multivariate Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (OU) process. Independent of load observability, in various cyberattack scenarios, the proposed FDIA detection method delivers accurate and rapid detection of sophisticated FDIAs, outperforming traditional unknown input observer (UIO) methods, which miss detections, and Long Short-Term Memory Autoencoder (LSTM-AE) approaches, which suffer from prolonged detection times.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最大似然估计的多元Ornstein-Uhlenbeck漂移过程检测方法，用于电力系统AGC中针对隐蔽虚假数据注入攻击的鲁棒检测，该方法在检测精度和速度上均优于传统UIO和LSTM-AE方法。
AI.motivation: AGC系统依赖通信网络进行实时测量，容易遭受隐蔽的虚假数据注入攻击，可能导致设备损坏和经济损失，现有方法存在检测遗漏或检测时间过长的问题。
AI.method: 利用漂移多元Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程的最大似然估计进行FDIA检测，不依赖负载可观测性。
AI.result: 该方法能够准确、快速检测复杂的FDIAs，优于UIO（漏检）和LSTM-AE（检测时间长）方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MLE-OU方法在多种网络攻击场景下均能实现高效、精确的隐蔽攻击检测，具有较好的鲁棒性和实用性。

title: Which Institutional Frameworks Do Chatbots Assume? Auditing Jurisdictional Defaults in Multilingual LLMs
summary: LLMs increasingly answer questions about taxes, labor protections, healthcare, education, pensions, and administrative procedures, where usefulness often depends on the applicable jurisdiction. Multilingual users may write in their most comfortable language rather than one associated with the country or region whose rules apply. We ask whether deployed LLMs use input language as a default jurisdictional signal when prompts omit any country or region. Prior multilingual audits show that prompt language can shift cultural, political, or normative outputs; we examine which legal-administrative framework models supply when jurisdiction is underspecified. We evaluate seven LLMs developed in the United States or China on 60 underspecified legal-administrative prompts in English and Mandarin Chinese under three system-prompt conditions, yielding 2,520 manually annotated responses. Across models and conditions, Chinese input more often produces China-specific answers, while English input more often produces U.S.-specific, comparative, or generic answers. Prompts requiring a single answer further increase jurisdiction selection: pooled across models, 74.5% of English-input responses adopt a U.S. framework, while 53.3% of Chinese-input responses adopt a China framework. This directional pattern appears in all seven models. We describe this deployment-level pattern as institutional-framework misselection risk: a fluent answer may rely on a legal-administrative context the user did not intend, especially when their preferred language differs from the relevant jurisdiction. LLM interfaces should not route institutional advice by input language alone; when location is absent, they should request it or state the jurisdictional scope of the answer.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了7个中美大语言模型在60个未指定管辖权的法律行政问题上，使用英文和中文输入时产生的2520条回复。结果显示，中文输入更常产生中国专属答案（53.3%），英文输入更常产生美国专属或通用答案（74.5%），揭示了模型存在"制度框架误选风险"——模型默认依据输入语言而非用户意图来推定适用司法管辖区。
AI.motivation: LLM在回答税务、劳动法、医疗等法律行政问题时，答案的有用性高度依赖于适用的司法管辖区。多语言用户可能用最舒适的语言而非相关国家/地区的官方语言提问。研究旨在回答：当提示中未明确指定国家或地区时，部署中的LLM是否会自动将输入语言作为默认的管辖信号？
AI.method: 选取7个中美开发的大语言模型（如GPT、Claude、Gemini等），设计60个未指定管辖权的法律行政提示词（英文和中文版本），在三种系统提示条件下进行测试，共产生2520条回复，并由人工标注员对答案适用的司法框架进行分类。
AI.result: 中文输入更常产生中国专属答案，英文输入更常产生美国专属、比较性或通用答案。当提示要求单一答案时，英文输入74.5%采用美国框架，中文输入53.3%采用中国框架。该方向性模式在所有7个模型中一致出现。
AI.conclusion: LLM存在"制度框架误选风险"：流畅的答案可能依赖于用户未曾意图的法律行政语境，尤其是当用户偏好的语言与相关司法管辖区不一致时。LLM界面不应仅依据输入语言来路由制度建议；当位置信息缺失时，应主动询问或明确说明答案的管辖范围。

title: From "Weak" Signals to Strong Models: Preference Delta Aggregation with LoRA Merging
summary: Training strong large language models (LLMs) requires high-quality supervision, which is often scarce. Recent work shows that paired preference data from weak-weaker model pairs (e.g., Qwen3 4B over 1.7B), despite the limited quality of individual responses, can provide an effective supervision signal through relative quality deltas, which we term a "weak" signal. This motivates a key research question: can multiple "weak" signals be constructively aggregated for improving strong models (e.g., Qwen3 8B)? To this end, we propose Preference Delta Aggregation (PDA), the first framework that derives a preference delta from each weak-weaker model pair, instantiates it as a LoRA adapter learned through preference optimization, and aggregates the resulting deltas via LoRA merging. To further mitigate directional interference during LoRA merging, we introduce Geometric Alignment Merging (GAM), a geometry-aware merging method that aligns adapter subspaces before aggregation, enabling more robust composition of diverse deltas. Evaluations on knowledge reasoning and agentic search benchmarks show that aggregating multiple "weak" signals pushes performance beyond any single signal, with further gains as additional signals are incorporated. Correspondingly, PDA with GAM improves the strong model by 6.8 and 7.3 points on average for knowledge reasoning and agentic search, respectively. It outperforms all single-delta and multi-delta baselines, exceeding the best single-delta baseline by 2.1 and 4.3 points. Further analysis attributes these gains to the effective composition of complementary capabilities encoded across distinct preference deltas.

AI.tldr: 本文提出偏好增量聚合（PDA）框架，通过将多个"弱"偏好信号（来自弱-更弱模型对）转换为LoRA适配器并聚合，同时引入几何对齐合并（GAM）方法解决合并过程中的方向干扰，从而有效提升强模型性能。
AI.motivation: 高质量监督信号稀缺，而弱-更弱模型对提供的偏好数据虽单个质量有限，但相对质量增量可提供有效信号。研究能否通过聚合多个"弱"信号来改进强模型。
AI.method: 提出PDA框架：从每个弱-更弱模型对中提取偏好增量，通过偏好优化实例化为LoRA适配器，再通过LoRA合并进行聚合。同时提出GAM方法，在聚合前对齐适配器子空间以缓解方向干扰。
AI.result: 在知识推理和智能体搜索基准上，PDA+GAM使强模型分别平均提升6.8和7.3分，超越所有单增量和多增量基线，分别高出最佳单增量基线2.1和4.3分。
AI.conclusion: 多个弱偏好信号的有效聚合可以提升强模型性能，且随着信号数量增加效果持续增强，增益源于不同偏好增量编码的互补能力的高效组合。

title: A Pre-Training Analogue of Grokking in Language Models: Tracing Delayed Grammatical Generalization
summary: Grokking, the phenomenon in which neural networks generalize long after fitting their training data, has been studied in supervised settings on many epochs. LLM pre-training instead involves next-token prediction over an unlabeled corpus, with limited data repetition and no explicit train/validation split. To address this, we propose an exposure-based framework that enables the study of grokking-like dynamics during LLM pre-training. We ground our evaluation in BLiMP minimal pairs, which provide controlled grammatical contrasts. For every BLiMP minimal pair, we identify a critical phrase, the smallest continuous span that captures the grammatical contrast and the phenomenon-relevant context. Examples whose critical phrase appears in the pre-training window are assigned to the proxy-train split; the remaining examples are assigned to the proxy-validation split. Across five grammatical phenomena, we observe delayed generalization. Analyzing pre-training checkpoints before and after generalization shows that grammatical concept vectors become more predictive of grammatical acceptability and occupy a higher-dimensional subspace after generalization. We also find that attention from the critical token to the relevant context token is concentrated in a small number of heads.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于暴露度的框架，用于研究LLM预训练中类似"顿悟"的延迟泛化现象，采用BLiMP最小对和关键短语划分代理训练/验证集，观察到五种语法现象均存在延迟泛化，且泛化后语法概念向量更具预测性并占据更高维子空间。
AI.motivation: "顿悟"现象（Grokking）已在监督学习的多次epoch训练中被广泛研究，但大规模语言模型（LLM）的预训练是下一词预测任务，数据重复有限且没有明确的训练/验证集划分，因此需要一种新的框架来研究LLM预训练中类似顿悟的延迟泛化动态。
AI.method: 提出基于暴露度的框架：利用BLiMP最小对中的关键短语，根据该短语是否出现在预训练窗口来划分代理训练集和代理验证集。具体来说，对每个BLiMP最小对，识别出捕获语法对比的最小连续片段（关键短语），暴露在预训练窗口中的样本归入代理训练集，其余归入代理验证集。
AI.result: 在五种语法现象上均观察到延迟泛化现象。泛化后的语法概念向量对语法可接受性的预测能力更强，且占据更高维的子空间。此外，关键token到相关上下文token的注意力集中在一小部分注意力头上。
AI.conclusion: 提出的暴露度框架可以有效地将"顿悟"现象的研究拓展到LLM预训练场景，延迟泛化在LLM预训练中确实存在，且与语法概念向量的表征变化和注意力集中模式有关。

title: Prompts for Public-Sector LLMs Should Be Governed as Commons
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: This paper argues that prompts used to deploy large language models (LLMs) in public-sector settings should be treated as governed artefacts rather than private, transient inputs. Prompts encode role instructions, decision framings, and value claims; prompt choice can materially shift outputs even when model weights and input records are held fixed. Existing governance tools, including model and dataset documentation, organisation-level policies, and post-training alignment, rarely make the local prompt collections used in deployment transparent, contestable, or auditable. We propose Prompt Commons: a versioned, community-maintained repository of prompt templates with provenance metadata, licensing, and moderation logs. Using a pilot dataset collected with community partners in a large North American city (443 human prompts; 3,317 after augmentation), we illustrate three governance states (open, curated, veto-enabled) and a negotiation-oriented ensemble method that aggregates stakeholder prompts into compromise recommendations. We close with falsifiable implications and an evaluation agenda for prompt-layer governance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出公共部门部署LLM时使用的提示词应被视为受治理的工件，而非私人临时输入，并提出Prompt Commons——一个版本化、社区维护的提示词模板库，支持溯源、许可和审核日志，通过三种治理状态和协商式集成方法实现提示层的可问责治理。
AI.motivation: 现有治理工具（模型文档、组织政策、后训练对齐）很少使本地提示词集合透明化、可质疑或可审计，但提示词编码了角色指令、决策框架和价值主张，其选择会实质性地改变输出结果。
AI.method: 提出Prompt Commons：版本化、社区维护的提示词模板库，包含溯源元数据、许可和审核日志。基于北美某大城市社区合作伙伴的试点数据集（443个人工提示词，扩增至3,317个），展示三种治理状态（开放、策展、否决启用）和一种协商导向的集成方法（聚合利益相关者提示词生成折衷建议）。
AI.result: 通过试点数据集展示了三种治理状态（开放、策展、否决启用）以及协商导向的集成方法，该集成方法能聚合不同利益相关者的提示词并生成折衷建议。
AI.conclusion: 公共部门的提示词应作为受治理的工件对待；提出可证伪的含义和评估议程为提示层治理的未来研究奠定基础。

title: An Improved Lower Bound for the Three-Dimensional Blaschke--Lebesgue Problem from Spectral and Dual Perspectives
summary: The Blaschke--Lebesgue problem asks for convex bodies of minimum volume among all convex bodies of prescribed constant width. In the plane, the minimizer is the Reuleaux triangle, whereas the corresponding three-dimensional problem remains open and is also known as Meissner's conjecture. In this paper, we establish the lower bound $(4π/33)d^3 \simeq 0.380799\,d^3$ for the volume of any three-dimensional convex body of constant width d. This improves upon Chakerian's lower bound, approximately $0.364916\,d^3$, although it remains below the volume of the conjectured minimizers, Meissner's tetrahedra, whose volume is approximately $0.419860\,d^3$. The proof is based on a support-function formulation, spectral estimates via spherical harmonics, and Bochner's formula. We also show that the resulting lower bound can be interpreted as a Lagrange dual bound for the associated concave quadratic minimization problem. This dual viewpoint suggests possible routes toward sharper lower bounds.

AI.tldr: 本文针对三维常宽凸体的Blaschke--Lebesgue问题，通过支撑函数、球谐分析和Bochner公式，将体积下界从约0.364916d³提升至约0.380799d³，并揭示了该下界与Lagrange对偶问题的联系。
AI.motivation: Blaschke--Lebesgue问题在三维情形（即Meissner猜想）长期未解，现有下界（Chakerian下界）较弱，需要更紧的下界逼近最小体积。
AI.method: 采用支撑函数表述，结合球谐函数进行谱估计，并利用Bochner公式进行几何分析；进一步将问题转化为凹二次极小化问题，通过Lagrange对偶解释下界。
AI.result: 建立了三维常宽凸体体积的新下界 (4π/33)d³ ≈ 0.380799d³，优于Chakerian的0.364916d³，但仍低于Meissner四面体的0.419860d³。
AI.conclusion: 该下界可作为对偶界，为未来改进下界乃至最终解决Meissner猜想提供了新的分析框架和优化路径。

title: Identifiable Markov Switching Models with Instantaneous Effects and Exponential Families
summary: Temporal systems often exhibit non-stationary behaviour, such as seasonal climate variation or glucose fluctuations in patients with type-1 diabetes. One way to model non-stationarity is through discrete latent regimes, i.e., stationary segments of time. Such systems induce a Markov Switching Model (MSM), a class of Hidden Markov Models with autoregressive dependencies among latent regimes and observed variables. Identifying latent regimes is challenging in the presence of frequent regime switches and nonlinear and non-Gaussian dynamics, particularly when there are instantaneous effects between the variables, e.g., due to slow rates of measurements. In this work, we establish the identifiability of both latent regimes and regime-dependent causal structures under temporal regime dependencies, nonlinear lagged and instantaneous effects, and independent noise from the exponential family. Our identifiability theory subsumes non-temporal mixtures of causal models. Furthermore, we introduce FlowMSM, a regime detection framework that can be paired with any stationary causal discovery method to recover regime-dependent causal structures. Experiments on synthetic benchmarks and a financial economics dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach to detect latent regimes and discover causal structures from non-stationary time series.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非平稳时间序列中的隐状态切换问题，提出了FlowMSM框架，证明了在非线性、非高斯及含瞬时效应条件下隐状态和因果结构的可辨识性，实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 非平稳时间序列（如气候、血糖数据）中存在隐状态切换（离散潜在阶段），现有方法在处理频繁切换、非线性非高斯动态及变量间瞬时效应时难以识别隐状态及因果结构。
AI.method: 建立隐状态及状态依赖因果结构在指数族噪声、非线性滞后与瞬时效应下的可辨识性理论，提出FlowMSM框架，可与任意平稳因果发现方法结合，检测隐状态并恢复因果结构。
AI.result: 在合成数据和金融经济学数据集上，FlowMSM有效检测隐状态并发现因果结构，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FlowMSM为非平稳时序数据的隐状态检测与因果发现提供了理论保证与实用框架，拓展了马尔可夫切换模型的应用范围。

title: Physics-Guided Recurrent State-Space Neural Networks for Multi-Step Prediction
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Accepted at IFAC World Congress 2026
summary: State-space models are traditionally based on physical knowledge, but multi-step predictions from these physical models can be poor due to model inaccuracy. Black-box deep learning has shown promise as an alternative. However, these methods rely on the availability of large datasets and potentially available physical knowledge is neglected. We propose the PG-RSSNN, a physics-guided recurrent state-space neural network that incorporates recurrent structures to enable the use of non-saturating activation functions in multi-step prediction. It mitigates the vanishing gradients and eliminates the risk of numerical divergence in training seen in existing structures that feed back state estimates. Results across multiple systems with various physical model imperfections, from linear state-space models with Gaussian noise to a robotic arm and a cascaded water tank system, show that the proposed PG-RSSNN maintains stable training behavior, and improves multi-step predictions, as compared with black-box neural networks and physics-only models, even with limited training data and when physical models are only partially known.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PG-RSSNN，一种融合物理知识的递归状态空间神经网络，通过递归结构使用非饱和激活函数进行多步预测，解决了梯度消失和数值发散问题，在多种系统上相比纯物理模型和黑盒神经网络，即使数据有限且物理模型不完整时，也能实现更稳定的训练和更好的多步预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于物理知识的状态空间模型因模型不准确导致多步预测效果差；而黑盒深度学习方法需要大量数据且忽略了可用的物理知识。因此需要一种既能利用物理知识又能保证多步预测稳定性的方法。
AI.method: 提出PG-RSSNN（物理引导的递归状态空间神经网络），通过引入递归结构，允许在多步预测中使用非饱和激活函数，从而缓解梯度消失问题，并消除现有反馈状态估计结构中训练时数值发散的风险。
AI.result: 在线性状态空间模型（含高斯噪声）、机器人手臂和级联水箱系统等多个具有不同物理模型缺陷的系统上，PG-RSSNN相比黑盒神经网络和纯物理模型，在训练数据有限且物理模型仅部分已知的情况下，仍能保持稳定的训练行为并改善多步预测性能。
AI.conclusion: PG-RSSNN有效结合了物理知识与深度学习架构，在数据稀缺和物理模型不完善的条件下显著提升了多步预测的稳定性和准确性，优于纯物理模型和纯数据驱动方法。

title: Isolating LLM Lexical Bias: A Curation-Free Triangulated Metric for Preference-Stage Learning
summary: Various language domains have undergone remarkable changes in recent years; these shifts are largely attributed to the advent of Large Language Models and their misalignment with natural language usage. These misalignments are thought to partly originate in the preference-learning stage, e.g. Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback, which generally makes models more useful but simultaneously may introduce systematic lexical bias. In terms of lexical behavior, this is visible in a model's preference for certain formats or the overuse of words (delve, furthermore), even when such patterns are not present in base model outputs. Research on lexical misalignment induced during preference training is constrained by reliance on manual curation. We address this, by introducing the Triangulated Preference Shift score, a metric that triangulates between human gold standards, base models, and instruct variants to isolate shifts induced specifically by preference learning, without manual curation. We provide data across six model families, anchor the results in the literature, and illustrate the general approach's utility by analyzing whether preference learning shifts models toward what could be interpreted as a "language of prestige". The metric provides an initial automated method to quantify behavioral shifts attributable to preference tuning, and thus, may help inform model alignment and development of trustworthy AI.

AI.tldr: 提出 Triangulated Preference Shift (TPS) 评分，无需人工标注即可自动量化偏好学习阶段（如RLHF）导致的词汇偏差（如过度使用"delve""furthermore"等词汇），并在六个模型家族上验证了该指标的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究依赖人工标注来识别偏好训练中的词汇偏差，缺乏自动化、可量化的评估方法。
AI.method: 设计 Triangulated Preference Shift (TPS) 评分，通过三角化对比人类黄金标准、基础模型和指令变体之间的词汇分布，隔离偏好学习带来的词汇偏移。
AI.result: 在六个模型家族上进行了实验验证，并将结果与文献中的发现进行了锚定，展示了该方法可用于分析偏好学习是否使模型趋向"声望语言"。
AI.conclusion: TPS提供了一个自动化的初始方法，用于量化偏好调优导致的行为偏移，有助于理解模型对齐过程并开发可信赖的AI。

title: The Deterministic Horizon: When Extended Reasoning Fails and Tool Delegation Becomes Necessary
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. 4 figures. 51 pages including appendices
summary: Extended chain-of-thought reasoning can degrade performance on deterministic state-tracking tasks, not due to preference biases, but limits rooted in the information-theoretic capacity of decoder-only attention. We establish: (1) an Attention Bottleneck Theorem with a complementary achievability construction, bounding state-tracking capacity as $O(H \cdot \log(L/H) \cdot \sqrt{d_h})$; (2) a context-dependent error model yielding super-exponential accuracy decay; (3) the State-Space Jaccard metric distinguishing capability from preference failures; (4) a Deterministic Horizon $d^* \in [19, 31]$ beyond which tool delegation becomes necessary. Across 12 models and 8 task domains (including SWE-Bench, WebArena, and SQL-Multi), tool-integrated reasoning consistently outperforms neural chain-of-thought; on the primary model suite it reaches 86-94% accuracy versus 24-42% for neural chain-of-thought. Fine-tuning on optimal-length traces yields $<$5% improvement, confirming an architectural ceiling, and high cross-model correlation ($r = 0.81$-$0.91$) indicates these failures are architectural rather than training-specific. Our results provide principled guidance for when pure neural reasoning should yield to hybrid approaches in agentic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了解码器-only注意力机制在确定性状态追踪任务中存在信息论容量瓶颈，并提出了一个理论框架（注意力瓶颈定理、上下文相关误差模型、状态空间Jaccard度量）来解释为什么链式思维推理会退化。实验表明，工具集成推理显著优于纯神经链式思维（86-94% vs 24-42%），且这种失败源于架构限制而非训练问题，为混合智能体系统提供了理论指导。
AI.motivation: 揭示扩展链式思维推理在确定性状态追踪任务上性能退化的根本原因，区分其是偏好偏差还是架构限制，并为何时应放弃纯神经推理转向混合方法提供理论指导。
AI.method: 提出四个理论贡献：(1) 注意力瓶颈定理及可达性构造，界定状态追踪容量为 O(H·log(L/H)·√d_h)；(2) 上下文相关误差模型，推导出超指数级精度衰减；(3) 状态空间Jaccard度量，区分能力失败与偏好失败；(4) 确定确定性视界 d*∈[19,31]。在12个模型、8个任务域上进行了大规模实验验证。
AI.result: 工具集成推理在主要模型套件上达到86-94%准确率，而纯神经链式思维仅24-42%；最优长度轨迹微调仅带来<5%提升；跨模型高相关性(r=0.81-0.91)表明失败是架构性的而非训练特异的。
AI.conclusion: 解码器-only注意力架构存在固有能力天花板，在确定性状态追踪任务中，超过确定性视界后必须引入工具委托；纯神经推理应让位于混合方法，这为智能体系统的设计提供了理论基础。

title: InfoAtlas: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Statistical Dependence Estimate
summary: Measuring statistical dependency between high-dimensional random variables is a fundamental task in data science and machine learning. Neural mutual information (MI) estimators offer a promising avenue, but they typically require costly iterative optimization for each new dataset, making them impractical for real-time applications. We present InfoAtlas, a foundation model-like architecture that eliminates this bottleneck by directly inferring MI in a single forward pass. Pretrained on large-scale synthetic data with rich dependence patterns, InfoAtlas learns to identify diverse dependence structures and predict MI directly from the dataset. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that InfoAtlas matches state-of-the-art neural estimators in accuracy while achieving $100\times$ speedup, can flexibly handle varying dimensions and sample sizes through a single unified model, and generalizes effectively to complex, real-world scenarios. By reformulating MI estimation as an inference task, InfoAtlas establishes a foundation for real-time dependency analysis.

AI.tldr: InfoAtlas是一种类似基础模型的架构，通过单次前向传播直接推断互信息，无需迭代优化，在保持与最先进神经估计器相当精度的同时实现100倍加速。
AI.motivation: 传统神经互信息估计器需要针对每个新数据集进行耗时的迭代优化，无法满足实时应用需求。
AI.method: 采用基础模型架构，在大规模合成数据上预训练，学习识别多样化的依赖结构，通过单次前向传播直接预测互信息。
AI.result: 在精度上匹配最先进的神经估计器，速度提升100倍；单一统一模型可灵活处理不同维度和样本量；有效泛化到复杂现实场景。
AI.conclusion: 将互信息估计重构为推理任务，为实时依赖分析建立了基础。

title: ASE-26: a curriculum for agentic software engineering as a discipline
comment: 12 pages, 20 references. Companion paper to the ASE-26 curriculum deposited on Zenodo at doi:10.5281/zenodo.20468021. Part 1 of a planned series of two pre-prints on the curriculum and its conceptual core
summary: The work of a professional software engineer has begun to consist, increasingly, of directing agents rather than writing code, and the empirical evidence for the shift is now several years deep. Anthropic's Economic Index puts automation at 79 per cent of Claude Code interactions [2]; Handa and colleagues at Anthropic find AI exposure for Computer Programmer tasks at approximately 75 per cent of the role's distinct activities [3]; Brynjolfsson and colleagues at Stanford's Digital Economy Lab report a 13 per cent relative decline in employment for workers aged 22 to 25 in occupations most exposed to AI [4]. The shift is also unfinished, and the academic literature on agentic software engineering converges on the finding that the missing capability is not better models but structured practitioner discipline. This paper presents ASE-26, a comprehensive undergraduate curriculum for agentic software engineering as a discipline, deposited as a citable reference on Zenodo under CC BY-ND 4.0 [12]. The paper sets out the discipline framing the curriculum rests on, the conceptual contributions it makes (most importantly, the evolutionary spiral as the operational form of the co-evolution of intent and build), the twenty-one-module structure that organises the discipline for teaching, the pedagogical commitments that follow from grading work co-produced with an agent, what graduates leave with, and how the discipline as taught is designed to outlast the specific capabilities of today's models. The position the paper takes is that the practitioner skills the industry currently lacks are precisely the skills the discipline names, and that structured undergraduate curricula in agentic software engineering are the principal mechanism by which the gap closes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ASE-26，一个面向智能体软件工程（Agentic Software Engineering）的本科课程体系。核心观点是：当前行业缺少的不是更好的AI模型，而是结构化的实践者纪律（structured practitioner discipline）。论文在 Zenodo 上以 CC BY-ND 4.0 协议发布，包含21个模块、演化螺旋（evolutionary spiral）等概念贡献，并讨论了与智能体协作完成作业的评估方式。
AI.motivation: 软件工程师的工作正从写代码转向指挥AI智能体，已有多年实证证据（如Anthropic经济指数显示79%的Claude Code交互已自动化，年轻程序员岗位下降13%）。然而，这一转型尚未完成，现有文献表明缺失的能力不是更好的模型，而是结构化的实践者纪律。因此需要一套系统化的本科课程来培养相关技能。
AI.method: 论文以课程设计为核心贡献，包含：1) 支撑课程的理论框架（agentic software engineering作为学科）；2) 核心概念贡献，最重要的是"演化螺旋"（evolutionary spiral）作为意图（intent）与构建（build）协同演化的操作形式；3) 组织教学的21个模块结构；4) 与AI智能体协作完成作业后的评估与评分方式。
AI.result: 提出了ASE-26完整课程体系，说明毕业生将获得的能力，以及课程设计如何超越当前AI模型的能力局限（designed to outlast today's models）。论文认为，行业目前缺乏的实践者技能正是该学科所命名的技能，而结构化的本科课程是弥合这一差距的主要机制。
AI.conclusion: 智能体软件工程应成为一门独立的本科教学学科。当前行业的核心瓶颈不在模型能力，而在实践者的系统化训练。ASE-26课程旨在提供这种训练，并具备面向未来的持久性。

title: Accelerating Min-Max Optimization via Power-Law Stepsizes
summary:
We revisit the convergence guarantees of the Extragradient (EG) method for unconstrained biaffine min-max optimization. It is known that EG with a fixed stepsize achieves a $Θ(T^{-1/2})$ last-iterate convergence rate, which is slower than the optimal $\mathcal{O}(T^{-1})$ rate attainable by incorporating additional mechanisms such as anchoring. Motivated by recent advances showing that dynamic stepsizes alone can significantly accelerate gradient descent, we ask whether dynamic stepsizes can similarly accelerate the last-iterate convergence of EG.
  We present the first positive result in this direction. Specifically, we provide a deterministic dynamic stepsize schedule that accelerates the convergence rate of EG to $\mathcal{O}(T^{-2/3+\varepsilon})$ for any $\varepsilon > 0$. We also show that this rate is tight when the extrapolation and update steps of EG use the same stepsize. We then show that allowing different stepsizes for the extrapolation and update steps further improves the convergence rate to the near-optimal $\mathcal{O}(T^{-1+\varepsilon})$. Our analysis reduces stepsize scheduling to an optimization problem, whose solution leads to a stepsize schedule that follows (a discretization of) a power-law distribution. Our proposed stepsize schedules and analysis extend to other methods, such as Optimistic Gradient (OG), and suggest broader applicability to general min-max optimization problems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了外梯度法（EG）在无约束双仿射极小极大优化中的收敛性，提出确定性动态步长策略，将EG的末次迭代收敛率从Θ(T^{-1/2})加速到O(T^{-2/3+ε})，并通过解耦外推与更新步长进一步优化至O(T^{-1+ε})，接近最优。
AI.motivation: 现有EG方法使用固定步长只能达到Θ(T^{-1/2})的末次迭代收敛率，远慢于通过附加锚定机制实现的O(T^{-1})最优速率。受动态步长可显著加速梯度下降的启发，本文探索动态步长是否也能加速EG的末次迭代收敛。
AI.method: 将步长调度问题转化为优化问题，求解得出遵循幂律分布（的离散化）的确定性动态步长调度方案。进一步允许外推步长与更新步长不同，以提升收敛性能。
AI.result: 1) 相同步长下，EG收敛率达到O(T^{-2/3+ε})，且证明该界是紧的；2) 解耦外推与更新步长后，收敛率达到近最优的O(T^{-1+ε})。所提方法同样适用于乐观梯度法（OG）等。
AI.conclusion: 动态步长调度能够有效加速EG方法的末次迭代收敛，且步长解耦可进一步提升至接近最优速率。该框架具有扩展到更一般极小极大优化问题的潜力。

title: ShaplEIG: Bayesian Experimental Design for Shapley Value Estimation
comment: Accepted at the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Shapley values are a principled attribution measure widely used in interpretable machine learning, but their exact computation scales exponentially with the number of players, motivating a wide range of approximation methods based on value function evaluations of sampled coalitions. This raises the question of whether approximation accuracy can be improved by adaptively selecting coalitions for evaluation based on previous evaluations. This is particularly relevant in settings where the value function is costly and the number of evaluations is severely limited, such as retraining-based feature importance, data valuation, and hyperparameter importance. For this purpose, we propose ShaplEIG, a Bayesian experimental design approach that approximates the expensive value function using a Gaussian process surrogate and adaptively selects coalitions based on their expected information gain about the Shapley values. By the linearity of the Shapley values in the value function, we show that the expected information gain is available in closed form. Furthermore, we propose an efficient computation scheme that reduces the complexity from exponential to polynomial in the number of players via elementary symmetric polynomials. In extensive experiments across diverse costly applications, our method consistently improves sample efficiency in the low-budget regime over state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出ShaplEIG方法，利用贝叶斯实验设计和高斯过程代理，通过自适应选择联盟来高效计算Shapley值，在低预算场景下显著提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: Shapley值的精确计算复杂度随参与者数量呈指数增长，现有近似方法基于固定采样，在价值函数评估昂贵且预算有限（如重训练特征重要性、数据估值、超参数重要性）时效率不足，因此需要自适应采样策略来提升近似精度。
AI.method: 1) 用高斯过程代理近似昂贵的价值函数；2) 基于期望信息增益自适应选择联盟进行评估；3) 利用Shapley值在价值函数中的线性性质推导出期望信息增益的闭式解；4) 通过初等对称多项式将计算复杂度从指数降至多项式级别。
AI.result: 在多种昂贵的应用场景中，ShaplEIG在低预算区间内相比现有最先进基线方法持续提升了样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯实验设计结合高斯过程代理能有效提升Shapley值近似在有限评估预算下的准确性，且闭式解和高效计算方案使其具有实用价值。

title: How Far Do Auto-Interpretation Labels Generalize: A Controlled Study Across Languages, Scripts, and Rewordings
summary: Sparse autoencoder (SAE) features are increasingly used to interpret language models, with auto-generated natural-language labels serving as the primary interface for understanding what each feature represents. We ask whether these labels generalize: does a feature labeled for a concept actually track that concept across languages and scripts? Using Serbian digraphia as a controlled testbed -- the same language written in both Latin and Cyrillic via deterministic transliteration -- we first find that SAE feature sets activated by the same content in different languages, scripts, and wordings share substantial overlap (peak Jaccard similarity 0.57 vs.\ 0.13 random baseline), suggesting genuine cross-lingual semantic features. We then test whether auto-interpretation labels keep pace. They often do not: features whose labels describe semantic content miss the same meaning in Serbian up to $4\times$ more often than within English, and miss Serbian Cyrillic more than Serbian Latin -- two scripts that are deterministic transliterations of each other -- suggesting the failures track how well each form is represented in training. The gap grows with network depth, yet the labels give no indication that they fail. These results suggest that auto-interpretation labels may reflect a feature's behavior on well-represented inputs rather than the concept itself.

AI.tldr: 本文发现稀疏自编码器（SAE）的特征通常通过自动生成的标签来解释，但研究发现这些标签存在泛化问题：在塞尔维亚语的双文字（拉丁字母和西里尔字母）对照测试中，虽然特征集本身在跨语言、跨文字情况下具有显著的重叠（峰值Jaccard相似度0.57，对比随机基线0.13），但自动解释标签却常常无法捕捉这种一致性，尤其对训练数据中较少出现的文字形式（西里尔字母）表现更差。这表明自动解释标签反映的是特征在常见输入上的行为，而非真正的语义概念。
AI.motivation: 现有研究广泛使用稀疏自编码器（SAE）的特征来解释语言模型，通过自动生成的标签来表示特征的含义。但尚不清楚这些标签是否真正泛化，即标注了某个概念的标签是否在不同语言和文字中都能准确跟踪对应的概念。
AI.method: 利用塞尔维亚语的双文字系统（拉丁字母与西里尔字母可通过确定性转写相互转换）作为受控实验环境，首先比较SAE在不同语言、文字和措辞下激活的特征集的重叠程度，然后测试自动解释标签在这些条件下的表现。
AI.result: SAE特征集在不同条件下具有显著的重叠（峰值Jaccard相似度0.57 vs. 随机基线0.13），表明存在真正的跨语言语义特征。但自动解释标签的表现不佳：标签描述了语义内容的特征在塞尔维亚语中遗漏相同含义的次数比英语中多高达4倍，且遗漏塞尔维亚西里尔字母比拉丁字母更多。这种差距随着网络深度增加而增大。
AI.conclusion: 自动解释标签可能反映了特征在训练数据中代表性较好的输入上的行为，而非真正的语义概念本身，且标签本身并未给出它们失效的任何指示。

title: VESTA: Visual Exploration with Statistical Tool Agents
summary: Fitting quantitative models to data is a central step in scientific workflows, yet it remains one of the least automated. Recent agent-based systems leverage language and vision-language models (VLMs) to iteratively propose and refine statistical models, but these systems struggle on more challenging modeling tasks. To address these limitations, we introduce VESTA: Visual Exploration with Statistical Tool Agents, a framework that equips VLMs with a dynamically growing exploration toolkit to guide model refinement through data transformations, hypothesis-driven visualizations, and robust statistical tests. Unlike prior systems that rely on iterative critique alone, VESTA actively explores data before and during refinement by selecting or creating diagnostic tools, which accumulate in the model's context and can be reused later. We evaluate VESTA against established baselines in three toolkit configurations: no tools, static expert-written tools, and dynamic model-written tools. To support this evaluation, we introduce DAWN (Dataset for Automated Workflows and Numerical Modeling), a benchmark targeting distribution fitting and time series modeling with varying difficulty tiers, and culminating in real-world astronomy tasks including modeling initial mass functions and gravitational-wave chirp signals. We find that VESTA's dynamic tool creation outperforms prior agentic pipelines, with the largest gains on complex and domain-specific tasks. We further show that dynamically generated tools are substantially more sophisticated than those produced by existing visual tool-creation systems, covering more diagnostic categories per function and strongly preferring visual outputs that the VLM critic can reason over directly.

AI.tldr: VESTA 是一个框架，通过让 VLM 动态创建和积累数据分析工具（数据转换、可视化、统计测试），在复杂建模任务上显著优于传统基于迭代批评的智能体系统。论文还提出了 DAWN 基准测试集。
AI.motivation: 现有基于 VLM 的智能体系统在复杂建模任务上表现不足，依赖迭代批评但缺乏主动探索数据的能力，且工具集固定无法动态扩展。
AI.method: VESTA 框架：VLM 配备动态增长的探索工具箱，通过构建诊断工具（数据转换、假设驱动可视化、鲁棒统计检验）在模型精炼前后主动探索数据，工具会积累在上下文中供后续复用。
AI.result: 在三种配置（无工具、静态专家工具、动态模型生成工具）中，VESTA 的动态工具创建超越现有智能体系统，在复杂和领域特定任务上提升最大。生成的工具比现有视觉工具创建系统更复杂，覆盖更多诊断类别且偏好视觉输出。
AI.conclusion: 动态工具创建和积累是提升 VLM 建模能力的关键方向，主动探索比被动批评更有效，且生成的视觉工具便于 VLM 直接推理。

title: ARCA: Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment When Token Signals Degenerate
comment: Accepted to DEMO 2026: ICML Workshop on Decision-Making from Offline Datasets to Online Adaptation. Non-archival report
summary: Token-level credit assignment for language-model reinforcement learning is usually formulated as if the policy were fully trainable, while practical LLM-RL pipelines often rely on parameter-efficient fine-tuning, especially LoRA. We argue that this separation hides a structural failure mode. Under LoRA, the policy is restricted to a low-rank neighborhood of the reference model, so the per-token output-distribution differences used by common intrinsic credit signals, surprisal, entropy reduction, and policy divergence, can become degenerate after within-trajectory normalization, either approaching uniform weights or concentrating on a small set of task-agnostic positions. We formalize this behavior and propose measuring it directly with concentration diagnostics such as weight Gini and effective-token ratio. We then introduce \emph{Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment} (ARCA), a lightweight alternative that derives token salience from the adapter's own hidden-state residual, $\|h^{\text{adapted}}_t - h^{\text{base}}_t\|_2$. ARCA asks where the adapter actually changes the model, rather than where the output distribution appears uncertain or shifted, and requires no learned reward model, value head, or tree construction. In a compact MATH/Qwen3-1.7B GRPO sweep, ARCA exhibits the predicted non-degenerate middle-regime credit distribution under matched rollout budgets and remains competitive with rank-matched baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在LoRA微调下，基于token级输出分布差异的信用分配信号会退化，并提出ARCA方法，利用适配器隐藏状态残差分配信用，避免退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-RL中的token级信用分配通常假设策略完全可训练，但实际常用LoRA等参数高效微调。这种分离隐藏了结构性问题：LoRA限制了策略的表达能力，使得基于输出分布差异的信用信号（如surprisal、熵减等）退化。
AI.method: 提出ARCA（Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment），通过计算适配器隐藏状态与基础模型隐藏状态的L2范数残差来衡量token重要性，避免依赖输出分布差异，无需奖励模型、值函数或树结构。
AI.result: 在MATH/Qwen3-1.7B GRPO实验中，ARCA展现出预测的非退化中间区域信用分布，且在同等rollout预算下与基线方法竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: ARCA作为一种轻量级替代方案，能有效避免LoRA下信用分配的退化问题，并提供更稳健的token级信用信号。

title: AI From the Margins (AIM): Rethinking Participatory AI Design Through the Lived Experience of Minoritized Communities
comment: Under review at the AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES 2026)
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) can reproduce and amplify the structural inequities faced by minoritized communities. Participatory AI has been proposed as a response, but participation typically starts after problem definitions and success criteria have been set, leaving limited room for minoritized communities to reshape what an AI system is for. We propose AI From the Margins (AIM): a methodological stance that articulates the conditions under which lived experiences of minoritized communities can be elicited, centered, and carried forward to inform participatory AI design. AIM is not a fixed protocol; it articulates a set of preconditions that can be enacted through different techniques in different settings. We applied AIM in a Dutch healthcare context in eight sessions with 13 women and non-binary people of color and five municipal policy workers, namely through (1) narrative elicitation using the Biographic Narrative Interpretive Method (BNIM); (2) co-constructed rule-making; (3) participants' determination of whether, where, and how AI should be involved; and (4) translating lived experience into AI policy through dialogue with policymakers. In their reflections on the sessions, participants described the engagement as substantive and called for its continuation, demonstrating how preparatory orientation fundamentally grounded in lived experience shapes what participatory AI design is for.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"来自边缘的AI（AIM）"方法论立场，强调在参与式AI设计中，应以边缘化社区的亲身经历为基础，从问题定义阶段开始就让少数群体参与。通过在荷兰医疗保健场景中与13名有色人种女性和非二元性别者及5名政策工作者的8次会议实践，证明了这种前置性参与能根本性地改变参与式AI设计的方向和目标。
AI.motivation: 现有参与式AI设计往往在问题定义和成功标准确定后才让边缘化群体参与，这限制了他们的真实影响力。作者希望提出一种方法，让少数族裔社区的生活经验能在AI系统设计的最初阶段就被纳入并贯穿始终。
AI.method: 提出AIM方法论立场，并通过在荷兰医疗保健场景中的实践验证：采用传记叙事解释法（BNIM）进行叙事引导、共建规则制定、让参与者决定AI是否参与及如何参与、通过政策对话将生活经验转化为AI政策。共开展8次会议，13名有色人种女性和非二元性别者及5名市政政策工作者参与。
AI.result: 参与者在反馈中认为这种参与方式是实质性的，并呼吁继续开展。研究表明，基于生活经验的前置性准备阶段能根本性地重塑参与式AI设计的方向和目标。
AI.conclusion: AIM作为一种方法论立场而非固定协议，能够通过不同的技术在不同情境中实现。它阐明了边缘化社区的生活经验如何被引导、聚焦并贯穿参与式AI设计的条件，从而改变AI系统"为了什么"这一根本问题。

title: Adaptive Sharpness-Aware Minimization with a Polyak-type Step size: A Theory-Grounded Scheduler
summary: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) has established itself as a powerful and widely adopted optimizer for training machine learning models. By explicitly minimizing the sharpness of the loss landscape, SAM often improves generalization while delivering strong empirical performance. However, SAM and its variants, like most training algorithms, are sensitive to the choice of learning rate, which is typically selected through extensive hyperparameter tuning or predefined schedulers. In this work, motivated by recent advances on the effectiveness of stochastic Polyak step sizes for Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD), we derive Polyak schedulers tailored to SAM-style updates, yielding novel adaptive algorithms in both deterministic and stochastic settings. In the smooth setting, we prove linear convergence for strongly convex objectives and an $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ convergence rate for convex objectives in the deterministic case. In the stochastic setting, we establish analogous convergence guarantees up to a neighborhood of the optimum. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed Polyak schedulers achieve performance comparable to or better than carefully tuned SAM baselines, while substantially reducing the need for learning-rate tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM)优化器的Polyak学习率调度器，在确定性和随机性场景下自适应调整学习率，减少了超参数调优需求，并证明了理论收敛性。
AI.motivation: SAM及其变体对学习率选择敏感，通常需要大量超参数调优或预定义调度器。受随机Polyak步长在SGD中有效性的启发，作者希望为SAM设计自适应学习率调度器，减少调优负担。
AI.method: 推导了适用于SAM风格更新的Polyak调度器，分别针对确定性和随机性设置提出自适应算法。在光滑条件下，证明了强凸目标的线性收敛性和凸目标的O(1/T)收敛率；随机设置下证明了收敛到最优解邻域内的保证。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提出的Polyak调度器在性能上与精心调参的SAM基线相当或更优，同时大幅减少了对学习率调优的需求。
AI.conclusion: 基于Polyak步长的自适应调度器能有效替代传统SAM学习率调优方法，在保持或提升性能的同时降低超参数敏感性，理论上也提供了收敛性保证。

title: Doing well with less! On Sampling Techniques for Empirical Pairwise Loss Estimation/Minimization
summary: Many machine learning problems, including similarity learning, ranking, and clustering, rely on empirical pairwise loss functions whose quadratic computational cost quickly becomes prohibitive at scale. We demonstrate how a frugal approach that retains only a fraction of the available information on pairs can achieve estimation or optimization performance comparable to that obtained by using all pairs, by leveraging survey sampling techniques. A central finding, supported by both theory and experiments, is that such sampling plans must target pairs directly rather than individual observations. In particular, for pairwise losses between high-dimensional vectors such as embeddings in vision or graph learning, assigning higher inclusion probabilities to informative pairs using suitable auxiliary information yields performance close to full pairwise evaluation, providing a principled and theoretically grounded trade-off between accuracy and computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本文针对机器学习中成对损失函数计算成本过高的问题，提出通过调查抽样技术仅保留部分成对信息即可达到与全量计算相当的估计或优化性能，核心发现是抽样必须直接针对成对数据而非单个样本，利用辅助信息对高维嵌入中的信息对赋予更高包含概率，可在准确性与计算成本间实现有理论依据的权衡。
AI.motivation: 成对损失函数（如相似性学习、排序、聚类）的二次计算复杂度在大规模场景下不可承受，亟需一种既能降低计算成本又能保持性能的抽样策略。
AI.method: 采用调查抽样技术，直接针对成对数据进行抽样，利用辅助信息（如高维向量嵌入）为信息量更高的成对样本分配更高的包含概率，仅用部分成对数据替代全量计算。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验均表明，直接对成对数据抽样比逐个样本抽样更有效；在视觉或图学习的高维嵌入场景中，针对信息对赋权的抽样方案可获得接近全量成对评估的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种有理论依据且原则性的方法，可在保持估计/优化性能的同时大幅降低成对损失的计算成本，为准确性与效率的权衡提供了新思路。

title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
summary: Long-horizon search agents accumulate large amounts of retrieved content across many tool calls, making context-budget efficiency increasingly important. A minimal intervention is to mask stale observations from the context as the trajectory progresses, but it remains unclear when this form of context management helps and why. We study observation masking through a systematic sweep over various agent backbones (4B to 284B parameters) and three retrievers on offline and live-web agentic search benchmarks. We find that the accuracy gain from masking follows an asymmetric inverted-U shape when plotted against the model's accuracy without context management: a plateau under weak retrievers, a peak when a strong retriever meets a mid-capacity model, and a sharp collapse when the model is saturated. This pattern reflects the interaction between retriever recall and the model's implicit filtering capacity, rather than either factor in isolation. Mechanistically, masking implements a token-for-turn trade-off: it removes observations the model has largely stopped attending to and pages the agent rarely re-opens. The added turns help when they convert failures into successes, but they fail when masking removes evidence the model would otherwise have used. We therefore reframe context management as a regime-dependent intervention and provide a holistic perspective for analyzing context use in agentic deep search. We release our scaffold and trajectories here (https://github.com/i-DeepSearch/observation-masking) to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文研究长程搜索智能体中观察掩蔽（observation masking）这一最小上下文管理干预手段的效果。通过系统实验发现，掩蔽带来的准确率提升呈现不对称倒U形曲线，取决于检索器质量与模型隐式过滤能力的交互。掩蔽实现"token换turn"的权衡：移除模型已停止关注的观测，换取更多推理回合，但效果高度依赖具体场景。
AI.motivation: 长程搜索智能体在多次工具调用中积累大量检索内容，上下文预算效率日益重要。但观察掩蔽这一最小干预手段何时有效、为何有效尚不明确，本文旨在系统研究其作用机制与适用条件。
AI.method: 对多种智能体主干（4B到284B参数）和三种检索器进行系统扫描实验，在离线与在线网页搜索基准上评估。通过分析检索器召回率与模型隐式过滤能力的交互作用，揭示掩蔽效果的非线性模式。
AI.result: 掩蔽准确率增益呈不对称倒U形：弱检索器下效果平缓，强检索器配合中等容量模型时达到峰值，模型饱和时大幅下降。机制上，掩蔽移除了模型已停止关注的观测和很少重新打开的页面，用释放的token换取更多推理回合。
AI.conclusion: 上下文管理应被视为一种"状态依赖"的干预手段，其效果取决于检索器质量与模型能力的匹配程度。提供了分析智能体深度搜索中上下文使用的整体视角。

title: Weak Critics Make Strong Learners: On-Policy Critique Distillation for Scalable Oversight
summary: As large language models become stronger, weak supervisors may fail to provide reliable labels, preferences, or final judgments for complex outputs, limiting both weak-to-strong generalization and scalable oversight. We study a more tractable form of weak supervision: using a weak model as a critic rather than as a labeler or judge. Instead of solving the task or selecting the correct answer, the weak critic only needs to provide a non-misleading revision direction that helps the strong model better use its own knowledge. We call this setting *weak-critic strong oversight*. We first show that weak critiques can improve frozen strong models at inference time, and that critique quality is key to this improvement. We then propose progressive on-policy critique distillation (**OPCD**), which filters high-quality critiques and distills critic-guided behavior into the strong model through adaptive self-teacher signals. Experiments on reasoning and alignment benchmarks show that our method improves strong models over training epochs, suggesting an effective path for scalable oversight with weak supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的弱监督范式：弱模型作为评论家而非标注者或裁判，通过提供非误导性的修订方向来帮助强模型更好地利用自身知识。同时提出了渐进式在策略评论知识蒸馏（OPCD）方法，在推理和对齐基准上提升了强模型性能。
AI.motivation: 当大语言模型变强后，弱监督者无法为复杂输出提供可靠标签、偏好或最终判断，限制了弱到强泛化和可扩展监督。作者试图寻找更易处理的弱监督形式。
AI.method: 提出弱评论家强监督设置：弱模型不解决问题或选择答案，而是提供非误导性的修订方向。进一步提出渐进式在策略评论知识蒸馏（OPCD），通过过滤高质量评论并将评论家引导行为通过自适应自教师信号蒸馏到强模型中。
AI.result: 弱评论可以提升冻结的强模型在推理时的表现；评论质量是改进的关键；OPCD方法在推理和对齐基准上随训练轮次持续提升强模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为使用弱监督实现可扩展监督提供了一条有效路径。

title: When Softmax Fails at the Top: Extreme Value Corrections for InfoNCE
summary: InfoNCE is the standard contrastive learning objective, but its softmax form is not only a computational convenience: it also encodes a statistical assumption about how the top-scoring example is selected. Using extreme value theory, we show that this assumption is often misaligned with the normalized embedding setting used in modern contrastive learning. Motivated by this mismatch, we propose \textsc{WEINCE}, a simple modification of InfoNCE that uses anchor-wise online batch statistics to blend the usual softmax logits with an endpoint shortfall correction, adding no trainable parameters. Across five vision benchmarks, \textsc{WEINCE} yields consistent improvements in frozen-feature evaluation. These results show that a more faithful statistical treatment of hard negatives can improve contrastive objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文发现对比学习中的InfoNCE损失函数基于softmax的统计假设与归一化嵌入空间不匹配，提出WEINCE方法——通过在线批次统计对softmax进行端点短缺修正（无需额外参数），在五个视觉基准上持续提升冻结特征评估性能。
AI.motivation: InfoNCE的softmax形式隐含着关于最高得分样本如何被选中的统计假设，但在现代对比学习的归一化嵌入设置下，该假设与实际情况存在偏差，导致硬负样本的处理不够准确。
