AI.method: 提出WEINCE，利用锚点维度的在线批次统计，在原始softmax logits基础上混合一个端点短缺修正项，无需引入任何可训练参数。
AI.result: 在五个视觉基准数据集上，WEINCE在冻结特征评估设置下一致优于标准InfoNCE。
AI.conclusion: 对硬负样本进行更符合统计原理的处理能够有效改善对比学习目标函数的表现。

title: Institutional Trust and the Domestic AI Advantage: Evidence from DeepSeek and ChatGPT Users in China
summary: Public trust in generative artificial intelligence exhibits increasingly divergent patterns across national contexts, yet prevailing research largely overlooks the macro-structural forces underlying this divergence. This study argues that trust in AI is not merely a technical response to performance but a product of institutional refraction. We propose an ``Institutional Prism'' framework to demonstrate how institutional trust shapes user trust in domestic (DeepSeek) and global (ChatGPT) large language models. Drawing on Cognitive-Affective Trust Theory, we distinguish between cognitive and affective dimensions of trust and analyze survey data from 405 Chinese users. The findings show that higher institutional trust is positively associated with stronger affective trust in domestic AI models and shifts cognitive evaluations in a more favorable direction. While under lower institutional trust, this domestic advantage weakens. These findings reveal that institutional trust has emerged as a core dimension of AI trust formation. By linking micro-level psychological judgments with macro-level governance, this research contributes a new perspective to human-machine communication.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出“制度棱镜”框架，通过对405名中国用户的调查数据，分析了制度信任如何影响用户对国内（DeepSeek）和全球（ChatGPT）大语言模型的认知与情感信任，发现高制度信任会增强对国内AI模型的情感信任并改善认知评价，而低制度信任则削弱这一优势。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视了宏观结构力量在人工智能信任形成中的作用，缺乏对国家间信任差异的制度性解释。
AI.method: 基于认知-情感信任理论，提出“制度棱镜”框架，对405名中国用户进行问卷调查，分析制度信任对国内（DeepSeek）与全球（ChatGPT）大语言模型信任的影响。
AI.result: 高制度信任正向影响对国内AI模型的情感信任，并改善认知评价；低制度信任则使这一国内优势减弱。
AI.conclusion: 制度信任已成为AI信任形成的核心维度，为人类-机器传播研究提供了微观心理判断与宏观治理相连接的新视角。

title: Second-Order Optimality Conditions for Sparse Differentiable Optimization Problems via Limiting Second-Order Subdifferentials
summary: In this paper, we investigate a class of sparse optimization problems in which both the objective and constraint functions are Fréchet differentiable and possess locally Lipschitz continuous gradient mappings. More precisely, by utilizing the limiting (Mordukhovich) second-order subdifferential of the associated Lagrangian function, we establish new second-order necessary and sufficient optimality conditions for local optimal solutions. The obtained results are derived under mild assumptions and extend several existing results in the literature. In addition, we apply our theoretical developments to sparse multiobjective optimization problems and derive second-order sufficient optimality conditions for efficient solutions. Several examples are also presented to demonstrate the applicability and effectiveness of the proposed results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了目标函数和约束函数均为Fréchet可微且具有局部Lipschitz连续梯度映射的一类稀疏优化问题，利用Lagrange函数的极限(Mordukhovich)二阶次微分，建立了局部最优解的二阶必要与充分最优性条件。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中关于稀疏优化问题的最优性条件大多局限于一阶条件或较强的二阶可微假设，缺乏在较温和条件下（如仅需Fréchet可微和Lipschitz连续梯度）的二阶最优性条件。
AI.method: 利用极限(Mordukhovich)二阶次微分分析Lagrange函数，推导二阶必要与充分最优性条件，并推广到稀疏多目标优化问题的高效解最优性条件。
AI.result: 在较温和假设下建立了新的二阶必要与充分最优性条件，扩展了现有文献中的多个已有结果，并成功应用于稀疏多目标优化问题。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的二阶最优性条件具有较广的适用性，可有效处理非光滑稀疏优化问题，并通过实例验证了其有效性与实用性。

title: All Models are Wrong, Knowing Where is Useful: On Model Uncertainty in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) infers information about the environment from a learned dynamics model and bears the potential to address open problems such as data efficient and safe learning in robotics. However, inaccuracies of the learned dynamics model are typically exploited by the agent, substantially hampering the capabilities of MBRL methods. We present a framework for dealing with inaccuracies of probabilistic models through targeted handling of uncertainty that effectively mitigates model exploitation. We present recent successes in learning directly on hardware and safe exploration, and discuss future directions for uncertainty-aware MBRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过针对性处理不确定性来缓解概率模型不精确性问题的方法框架，有效减轻了模型利用（model exploitation）问题，并在硬件上直接学习和安全探索方面取得了成功。
AI.motivation: 基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）在学习动力学模型时存在模型不精确性问题，这些不精确性会被智能体利用（model exploitation），严重损害MBRL方法的性能。
AI.method: 提出一个通过针对性处理不确定性（targeted handling of uncertainty）来应对概率模型不精确性的框架，有效缓解模型利用问题。
AI.result: 在硬件上直接学习和安全探索方面取得了近期成功。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知的MBRL有望解决数据效率和安全性等开放问题，未来值得进一步探索。

title: ProtStructQA: A Denotation Threshold in Protein Structural Reasoning
summary: Protein-language systems are often evaluated by whether they generate plausible biological text, but a structural question has a sharper semantics: it denotes a measurement in a 3D coordinate system. We introduce ProtStructQA, an executable benchmark for protein structural question answering in which each natural-language question is generated from a hidden typed domain-specific language (DSL) program and the answer is obtained by executing that program on an AlphaFold-predicted structure. ProtStructQA releases 382.2K questions covering confidence, distances, predicted aligned error (PAE), solvent exposure, secondary structure, topology and contacts, and held-out compositions: a 330K active benchmark over 10K proteins from four species, plus a 52.2K hard-negative robustness pool. Without fine-tuning, we evaluate Qwen3 models from 0.6B to 8B under direct prompting, chain-of-thought, grammar-constrained executable voting, executable voting with chain-of-thought, and multi-turn ReAct-style tool use, and replicate the headline finding on Gemma-3-1B and Gemma-3-12B. We find a capability-dependent denotation threshold between Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B: below it, tool-mediated ReAct dominates because models often fail to produce executable denotations; above it, chain-of-thought flips from mostly harmful to strongly beneficial and becomes the strongest strategy on most splits. Parse-failure and family-level analyses show that the threshold is a transition from unparseable language to executable structural denotation, while grammar and execution remain selectively valuable for PAE and secondary-structure queries. ProtStructQA reframes scientific QA as compilation from language to measurement and provides a diagnostic testbed for when language models can map words to executable 3D structural measurements.

AI.tldr: 提出ProtStructQA基准，将蛋白质结构问答转化为从自然语言到可执行DSL程序的编译任务，发现模型存在能力依赖的"指称阈值"：低于该阈值时工具辅助方法占优，高于阈值时思维链成为最优策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的蛋白质语言系统评估侧重于生成看似合理的生物学文本，但结构性问题具有更精确的语义——它对应3D坐标系中的具体测量值。需要一种能够准确评估模型将自然语言映射到可执行结构测量能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建ProtStructQA基准：每个自然语言问题由隐藏的领域特定语言(DSL)程序生成，通过在AlphaFold预测结构上执行该程序得到答案。包含382.2K个问题，涵盖置信度、距离、PAE、溶剂暴露、二级结构、拓扑和接触等维度。在Qwen3(0.6B-8B)和Gemma-3模型上测试多种策略（直接提示、思维链、语法约束可执行投票、可执行投票+思维链、ReAct风格工具使用）。
AI.result: 发现能力依赖的指称阈值出现在Qwen3-1.7B和Qwen3-4B之间：阈值以下，工具辅助的ReAct策略占主导（模型难以生成可执行指称）；阈值以上，思维链从大多有害转为强烈有益，成为多数任务的最优策略。语法约束和可执行投票对PAE和二级结构查询有选择性价值。
AI.conclusion: ProtStructQA将科学问答重新定义为从语言到测量的编译过程，为评估语言模型将词语映射到可执行3D结构测量的能力提供了诊断性测试平台。

title: SDR: Set-Distance Rewards for Radiology Report Generation
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has rapidly advanced reasoning in vision--language models. However, for chest X-ray report generation, the standard rewards (i.e. exact-match accuracy and step-level processes) are incompatible because the reports consist of unordered and orthogonal findings, rather than a causal reasoning chain. We address this gap with a set-based view: each report is split into sentences and embedded by a frozen sentence transformer, yielding unordered embedding sets. We propose the use of set-to-set distances between generated and reference embeddings as continuous, permutation-invariant rewards. Across two datasets and three vision--language models (Qwen3-VL-2B/4B, Gemma3-4B), post-training with set-to-set distance based rewards via GRPO consistently outperforms supervised fine-tuning and exact-match GRPO on all headline metrics (BERTScore, RadGraph F1 and CheXbert F1 by average \%6.80, \%7.82 and \%4.45 relative improvements respectively). The same set distances also enable test-time best-of-$N$ selection: scoring candidates by their distance to training-report embeddings outperforms random selection on our trained models as well as three closed-source LLMs (Mistral-Small, Gemini-2.5 Flash-Lite, GPT-4o-mini) with on average \%16.4 relative improvement on BERTScore. Used as a streaming signal, they support a more efficient form of test-time scaling: pruning low-scoring candidates mid-generation reduces generated tokens by over 50\% while preserving the Findings quality of full best-of-$N$ selection. Together these results establish set-distance rewards as a unified signal for both post-training and test-time scaling in chest X-ray report generation. Our code is publicly \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Set-Distance-Rewards-CXR-BFDA}{available}.

AI.tldr: 提出使用集合距离（set-to-set distance）作为奖励信号，用于胸部X光报告生成的强化学习后训练和测试时扩展。该方法将报告拆分为句子并用句子Transformer编码为无序嵌入集合，以集合间距离作为连续、置换不变的奖励。在多个视觉语言模型上，该方法在BERTScore、RadGraph F1和CheXbert F1上分别取得平均6.80%、7.82%和4.45%的相对改进，同时支持测试时最佳N选及中间剪枝高效生成。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习奖励（如精确匹配和逐步推理）不适用于胸部X光报告生成，因为报告由无序、正交的发现组成，而非因果推理链。需要一种能处理无序集合特性的奖励信号。
AI.method: 将每个报告分割为句子，用冻结的句子Transformer嵌入，形成无序嵌入集合。使用集合间距离（set-to-set distance）作为连续、置换不变的奖励信号，用于GRPO后训练和测试时最佳N选及中间剪枝。
AI.result: 在两个数据集和三个VLM上，集合距离奖励的GRPO后训练优于SFT和精确匹配GRPO，BERTScore、RadGraph F1和CheXbert F1分别提升6.80%、7.82%和4.45%。测试时最佳N选优于随机选择，平均BERTScore相对提升16.4%。中间剪枝可减少50%以上生成token同时保持质量。
AI.conclusion: 集合距离奖励可作为胸部X光报告生成中后训练和测试时缩放的统一信号，有效解决报告的无序集合特性带来的奖励设计挑战。

title: Inner Product Aware Quantization: Provably Fast, Accurate, and Adaptive Algorithms
summary:
Quantization is a fundamental tool used to compress datasets, neural network weights, and memory usage in a range of computational tasks. Many downstream applications of vector quantization perform inner products with arbitrary inputs. This motivates the study of inner product aware quantization schemes that approximately preserve inner products with unseen vectors -- in contrast to simply minimizing the mean-squared error.
  In this work, we formulate objectives that capture natural desiderata and develop adaptive and unbiased quantization methods that approximately preserve inner products with worst-case and average-case inputs. An analysis of these objectives shows a tight connection with the well-studied notion of Adaptive Stochastic Quantization (ASQ).
  We develop provably fast exact and approximate algorithms for our objectives. Our theoretical results inspire efficient practical algorithms that perform well across a variety of workload distributions. They also lead to practical algorithms for standard ASQ which are 2-10$\times$ faster than prior state-of-the-art methods while maintaining quality. These theoretical and empirical results contribute towards making adaptive quantization techniques more efficient and tractable in practical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文关注内积感知的量化方案，提出自适应、无偏的量化方法以近似保留与未见向量的内积，理论分析与自适应随机量化（ASQ）紧密关联，并开发了快速算法，在保持质量的同时比现有方法快2-10倍。
AI.motivation: 许多下游应用（如神经网络、数据集压缩）中，向量量化后进行内积运算是常见需求。然而传统量化方法仅最小化均方误差，未能针对内积保留进行优化，导致量化后的向量与未见向量做内积时精度下降。因此，需要设计内积感知的量化方案。
AI.method: 1) 形式化内积保留的优化目标（最坏情况与平均情况）；2) 证明与自适应随机量化（ASQ）的紧密联系；3) 开发可证明快速的确切与近似算法；4) 提出高效实用算法，适用于多种工作负载分布。
AI.result: 理论分析揭示了内积感知量化与ASQ的深层联系；提出的算法在保持量化质量的前提下，比现有最先进方法快2-10倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文的理论与实证结果使自适应量化技术在实际场景中更加高效和可行，为内积感知的量化提供了新的理论基础和实用工具。

title: Beyond Access: Guided LLM Scaffolding for Independent Learning in Undergraduate Statistics
comment: 10 pages, conference: Proceedings of the 34th International Conference on Computers in Education. Asia-Pacific Society for Computers in Education
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly entering students' learning practices, but their educational value depends on whether they support reasoning or enable task completion without engagement. This study examines guided LLM use in an undergraduate Probability and Statistics course, focusing on the gap between assigned access and actual interaction quality. In a four-week quasi-experimental summer program, students were organized into three balanced conditions: no LLM access, unrestricted LLM access, and guided LLM access. The guided condition used the same LLM platform as the unrestricted condition, but students received explicit training and rules promoting reasoning-focused help-seeking, stepwise hints, verification, and ethical use. All quizzes and the delayed final exam were completed without LLM or external assistance, allowing us to distinguish AI-supported practice performance from independent learning. Results show that guided use was associated with clearer learning-oriented interaction patterns than unrestricted access, especially in prioritizing reasoning over final answers and requesting stepwise support. Guided-LLM students showed stronger no-help quiz performance during the intervention phase, whereas unrestricted access appeared more useful for assisted practice completion than for consistently improving independent performance. Available time measures did not support a simple duration-based explanation, and self-assessment calibration suggested better alignment between perceived and demonstrated understanding in the Guided-LLM condition. Overall, LLM access alone appears to be an incomplete educational intervention. For Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED), the central design challenge is to scaffold how students use LLMs so that these systems function as partners in reasoning rather than answer-getting tools.

AI.tldr: 本文通过一项为期四周的准实验研究，对比了无LLM访问、无限制LLM访问和引导式LLM访问三种条件下，本科生在概率与统计课程中的学习效果。结果表明，引导式LLM使用能促进学生以推理为导向的交互模式、提高独立测验成绩，而无限制访问虽有助于练习完成但未能稳定提升独立学习表现。研究强调，仅仅提供LLM访问是不够的，关键在于如何引导学生将其用作推理伙伴而非答案获取工具。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM已越来越多地进入学生学习实践，但其教育价值取决于它是否支持学生的推理过程，而非简单地帮助他们完成任务。目前研究中存在一个关键空白：分配的访问权限与实际使用质量之间存在差距。本研究旨在探究不同LLM使用方式（特别是引导式使用）对学生学习行为和效果的影响。
AI.method: 在为期四周的准实验夏季项目中，学生被分为三组：无LLM访问组、无限制LLM访问组和引导式LLM访问组。引导式组使用与无限制组相同的LLM平台，但额外接受了明确训练和规则，强调以推理为导向的求助、逐步提示、验证和伦理使用。所有小测验和延迟期末考试均在无LLM或外部辅助下完成，以区分AI辅助练习表现与独立学习效果。
AI.result: 引导式使用比无限制访问更有利于形成清晰的学习导向交互模式，尤其是在优先考虑推理而非最终答案、请求逐步支持方面。引导式组在干预期内无辅助测验中表现更强，而无限制访问更多体现在辅助练习完成上，未能稳定提升独立表现。时间测量不支持简单的时长解释，且引导式组在自我评估校准方面表现更好，即感知理解与实际掌握之间更一致。
AI.conclusion: 单纯的LLM访问是不完整的教育干预措施。对于人工智能教育（AIED）而言，核心设计挑战在于如何构建学生使用LLM的框架，使其成为推理过程中的伙伴，而非获取答案的工具。

title: A first-optimize-then-reduce framework for optimal control with the shifted proper orthogonal decomposition
summary: Overcoming the Kolmogorov barrier for constructing efficient reduced-order models (ROMs) for transport-dominated problems remains a challenge. This has impeded their use as computationally cheap surrogates for partial differential equations (PDEs) associated with optimal control problems. Since such problems require multiple computations of the full PDE, employing their reduced-order surrogates instead could speed up the overall optimal control problem. Motivated by this idea, in this paper we explore the use of a nonlinear model-order reduction technique, namely, the shifted proper orthogonal decomposition (sPOD) in an optimal control context. In doing so, we explore the framework of first-optimize-then-reduce (FOTR) where an optimality system for the full PDE problem is constructed first, followed by approximating the optimality system with reduced-order models. We consider this framework for a linear quadratic optimal control problem constrained by a 1D linear advection equation and compare the computational performance of the sPOD method against the use of the standard POD.

AI.tldr: 本文探索将非线性模型降阶技术 (sPOD) 应用于最优控制问题中的传输主导PDE，采用先优化后降阶 (FOTR) 框架，以克服标准POD在处理传输主导问题时的科尔莫戈罗夫障碍，并通过1D线性对流方程约束的线性二次型最优控制问题验证其计算性能。
AI.motivation: 标准POD在处理传输主导问题时存在科尔莫戈罗夫障碍，导致降阶模型效率低下。而最优控制问题需要多次求解完整PDE，若能使用高效的降阶替代模型，可大幅加速整体计算。因此需要探索能克服该障碍的非线性降阶方法。
AI.method: 采用先优化后降阶 (FOTR) 框架：先构建完整PDE问题的最优性系统，再用降阶模型逼近该系统。具体使用移位本征正交分解 (sPOD) 这一非线性模型降阶技术，并以标准POD作为对比基线。实验场景为1D线性对流方程约束的线性二次型最优控制问题。
AI.result: 通过1D线性对流方程约束的线性二次型最优控制问题，对比了sPOD与标准POD方法的计算性能。
AI.conclusion: sPOD方法在最优控制问题的FOTR框架下具有潜力，可能比标准POD更有效地处理传输主导问题，从而加速最优控制计算。

title: SALSA: Speech Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activation Vectors
summary: Speech-aware large language models often generalize poorly to out-of-domain settings. We propose SALSA (Speech-Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activations), a lightweight adaptation method that learns layer-wise steering vectors. Unlike commonly used steering approaches that rely on contrastive activation differences, SALSA directly optimizes steering vectors using a supervised objective. Across children's speech, multilingual speech, and Mandarin-English code-switching benchmarks, SALSA substantially improves performance over zero-shot inference and speech in-context learning baselines, achieving up to 46.8% relative improvements over zero-shot. Analysis further demonstrates that steering the encoder, particularly the later layers, is more effective than steering the LLM backbone. These findings suggest that steering improves downstream ASR performance by adapting higher-level acoustic and phonetic representations to better align with the pretrained language model representation space, rather than by modifying the decoder itself.

AI.tldr: 提出SALSA方法，通过学习层级的导向向量来提升语音感知大语言模型在跨领域场景下的性能，在儿童语音、多语种语音和中英混合语音基准上最高提升46.8%。
AI.motivation: 语音感知大语言模型在域外场景泛化能力差，现有导向方法依赖对比激活差异，缺乏直接优化的监督目标。
AI.method: 提出SALSA方法，通过监督目标直接优化层级的导向向量，而非使用对比激活差异的常见导向方法。
AI.result: 在儿童语音、多语种语音和中英混合语音基准上，相比零样本推理和语音上下文学习基线，最高实现46.8%的相对提升。
AI.conclusion: 导向编码器（尤其是后层）比导向LLM主干更有效，表明导向通过调整高层声学和语音表示以更好地对齐预训练语言模型表示空间来提升ASR性能。

title: Doing What They Say, Not What They Reason: Locating the Faithfulness Gap in LLM Agents
comment: submitted to COLM social simulation with LLM workshop
summary: Do LLM agents act on the reasoning they state? This question of process fidelity is central to using LLMs in social simulation, yet it is hard to measure where no reference for correct behavior exists. We study it in acontrolled setting, a Texas Poker simulator with a verifiable reference action for every decision by decomposing the faithfulness gap into two steps: reasoning-conclusion and conclusion-action. The two steps behave oppositely.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM智能体是否按照其陈述的推理进行行动（过程忠诚度问题），通过在可控的德州扑克环境中将忠诚度缺口分解为"推理-结论"和"结论-行动"两个步骤，发现这两步呈现相反的行为模式。
AI.motivation: 在社会科学模拟中使用LLM时，智能体是否真正按照其陈述的推理行动（过程忠诚度）是一个核心问题，但缺乏可验证的参考标准来测量。
AI.method: 在可控的德州扑克模拟器中，将忠诚度缺口分解为两个步骤：推理到结论（reasoning-conclusion）和结论到行动（conclusion-action），每个决策都有可验证的参考动作。
AI.result: 推理-结论和结论-行动这两个步骤表现出相反的行为模式。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体的推理忠诚度并非单一维度问题，而是需要在不同环节分别评估，两个步骤的相反行为揭示了过程忠诚度的复杂性。

title: Accurate Large-sample Uncertainty Quantification using Stochastic Gradient Markov Chain Monte Carlo
summary: Tuning algorithms such as stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics (SGLD) for approximate sampling and uncertainty quantification remains challenging, particularly in the practically relevant settings when the batch size is large or the model is misspecified. Existing theory that provides tuning guidance relies on continuous-time limits or strong statistical assumptions, which can become quantitatively inaccurate in these regimes. We address these shortcomings by proposing new discrete-time approximations to SG(L)D with and without momentum, which enables accurate predictions of the stationary covariance, iterate average covariance, and integrated autocorrelation time. Moreover, we prove quantitative, non-asymptotic error bounds showing that these estimates are sufficiently accurate for practical tuning and uncertainty quantification. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our theory yields improved tuning guidance across a range of models and data-generating distributions where existing approaches fail, including when using the $β$-divergence rather than log-loss to obtain statistically robust inferences.

AI.tldr: 本文针对SGD和SGLD（含动量版本）在批量大或模型误设时调参困难的问题，提出了新的离散时间近似方法，能准确预测平稳协方差、迭代平均协方差和积分自相关时间，并给出了非渐近误差界，在现有方法失效的场景下提供了更优的调参指导。
AI.motivation: 现有SGD/SGLD调参理论依赖连续时间极限或强统计假设，在大批量或模型误设的实际场景中定量不准确，缺乏可靠的离散时间指导。
AI.method: 提出新的离散时间近似来刻画SG(L)D（含动量版本），推导平稳协方差、迭代平均协方差和积分自相关时间的解析预测，并证明非渐近误差界保证预测的准确性。
AI.result: 理论预测在数值实验中与真实行为吻合，在批量大、模型误设以及使用β散度替代对数损失进行鲁棒推断的场景下，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的离散时间近似为SGD/SGLD提供了实用且理论上可证的调参工具，扩展了不确定性量化方法的适用范围。

title: Engineering Students' Self-Efficacy, Perceptions, and Performance in a Flipped CS1 Course
comment: Preprint. To appear in the Proceedings of the 2026 IEEE Frontiers in Education Conference (FIE)
summary: This full research paper investigates how engineering students' course-related beliefs relate to exam performance in a flipped introductory programming course. Understanding factors that influence student learning and performance has long been a focus of computing education research. While prior studies have identified psychological and contextually relevant predictors of success, much of this work has examined students majoring in computer science. Yet introductory programming courses now serve many students from other disciplines, whose beliefs and motivations may differ. To examine these relationships in an engineering-focused CS1 context, we analyze survey and exam data from 602 students. An exploratory factor analysis identified three latent factors: self-efficacy, attitudes toward learning, and perceived programming difficulty. Self-efficacy was positively associated with exam performance, while perceived difficulty was negatively associated. Differences in reported beliefs were also observed across demographic groups, even when performance outcomes were similar. These findings align with and extend prior research, highlighting the role of self-efficacy in achievement and persistence in computing education.

AI.tldr: 本研究基于602名工程专业学生的调查与考试数据，探究翻转课堂入门编程课程中学生的课程相关信念（自我效能感、学习态度、感知编程难度）与考试成绩之间的关系。发现自我效能感与成绩正相关，感知难度与成绩负相关，且不同人口学群体在信念上存在差异。
AI.motivation: 以往研究多关注计算机科学专业学生的心理与情境预测因素，但入门编程课程现在服务于来自其他学科（如工程）的学生，其信念与动机可能不同，因此有必要专门针对工程专业学生探究信念与表现的关系。
AI.method: 对602名工程专业学生进行问卷调查和考试数据收集，采用探索性因子分析提取三个潜在因子（自我效能感、学习态度、感知编程难度），并分析这些因子与考试成绩的关联以及不同人口学群体间的差异。
AI.result: 自我效能感与考试成绩呈正相关，感知编程难度与考试成绩呈负相关；不同人口学群体在报告信念上存在差异，即使成绩表现相似。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果与以往研究一致并有所拓展，强调了自我效能感在编程教育中对学业成就和坚持性的重要作用，提示教育者需关注工程专业学生的信念差异。

title: Decision-calibrated prediction sets for robust power system operations
summary: Robust optimization offers a tractable approach to balance operating costs and reliability in power systems dominated by weather-dependent renewable uncertainty, but its performance depends critically on the uncertainty set. Standard data-driven approaches often calibrate uncertainty sets to attain predictive coverage, which can produce unnecessarily large sets and costly operating decisions. In contrast, we introduce decision-calibrated prediction sets and embed them as uncertainty sets in robust optimization problems; these are conditional multivariate prediction sets where calibration is defined in terms of the reliability of downstream decisions, rather than in terms of the coverage. First, we learn these conditional prediction sets as sub-level sets of norm-based score functions represented by partially input-convex neural networks, capturing contextual information and multivariate dependence while preserving convexity and tractability in downstream robust formulations. Second, inspired by conformal risk control, we calibrate a score-threshold parameter that sets the volume of the uncertainty set, thereby controlling the expected violations of downstream operational constraints. We apply our approach to 15-minute-ahead reserve scheduling with network-constrained deliverability, which we formulate as a robust DC optimal power flow problem with affine recourse. Numerical experiments show that decision-calibrated sets attain prescribed constraint-satisfaction targets within about three percentage points, whereas standard coverage-based calibration systematically exceeds these targets by more than eleven percentage points, leading to larger sets and higher operating costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出决策校准预测集（decision-calibrated prediction sets）替代传统覆盖校准的 uncertainty set，将其嵌入鲁棒优化框架中解决电力系统调度问题。相比传统方法，该方法能更精准地控制下游运行约束的违反率，降低运行成本，并在15分钟前瞻备用调度实验中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动的鲁棒优化通过校准 uncertainty set 来达到预测覆盖，但这往往导致集合过大、运行决策成本过高。本文旨在通过决策层面的校准（而非预测覆盖校准）来平衡可靠性与运行成本。
AI.method: 1) 将决策校准预测集作为鲁棒优化的 uncertainty set；2) 使用部分输入凸神经网络（PICNN）表示基于范数的得分函数，生成条件多变量预测集，保持凸性和可解性；3) 借鉴 conformal risk control 校准得分阈值参数，控制 uncertainty set 的体积，从而约束下游运行约束的期望违反率。
AI.result: 在15分钟前瞻备用调度（含网络约束可传送性）的鲁棒DC最优潮流问题中，决策校准集将约束满足目标控制在约3个百分点的误差内，而传统覆盖校准系统性地超出目标超过11个百分点，导致集合更大、运行成本更高。
AI.conclusion: 决策校准预测集能更高效地约束下游决策的可靠性，优于传统覆盖校准方法，在电力系统鲁棒优化中具有显著优势。

title: Switched Event-Triggered Adaptive Control of Reaction-Diffusion PDE-ODE with Neural Operator Implementation
summary: This paper develops a switched event-triggered adaptive boundary control for a class of reaction-diffusion PDE-ODE cascade systems, where the system and input matrices in the ODE as well as the spatially-varying reaction coefficient in the PDE are uncertain. A two-step backstepping transformation is constructed to derive the continuous-time control law. Then a novel dynamic event-triggered control strategy for the PDE-ODE cascade is proposed based on a switched event-triggering mechanism, ensuring global exponential stability of the closed-loop system in place of the exponential convergence commonly achieved with backstepping-based classical dynamic ETC, while inherently excluding Zeno behavior. To address the uncertainties in the PDE-ODE cascade, adaptive update laws are developed, leading to time-varying gain kernels that are adaptively scheduled through the event-triggered control mechanism. Furthermore,to facilitate efficient real-time implementation, deep neural operators (DeepONet) are employed to approximate the backstepping kernels as mappings from the estimated parameters to kernel functions, thereby eliminating the need to repeatedly solve kernel PDEs online. Through a Lyapunov analysis that incorporates the effects of the event-triggering mechanism, parameter adaptation, and kernel approximation errors, we prove the $L^2$ global asymptotic regulation of the resulting closed-loop system. In summary, the key contributions of the paper are threefold: (i) developing an adaptive DeepONet-based framework for reaction-diffusion PDE-ODE cascade systems; (ii) extending the existing adaptive event-triggered control design for reaction-diffusion PDEs to the case with more complex uncertainties; and (iii) generalizing switched dynamic ETC with global exponential stability to PDE-ODE cascades. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated through numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一类具有不确定参数的反应扩散PDE-ODE级联系统，提出了一种基于切换事件触发机制的自适应边界控制方法。通过两步反推变换、动态事件触发策略、自适应更新律以及DeepONet近似核函数，实现了系统的全局指数稳定和L²全局渐近调节，并避免了Zeno行为。
AI.motivation: 现有针对PDE-ODE级联系统的边界控制大多假设参数已知或采用连续时间控制，且事件触发控制主要面向纯PDE系统。本文旨在解决参数不确定下PDE-ODE级联系统的自适应事件触发控制问题，同时提升控制器实际部署的计算效率。
AI.method: 采用两步反推变换构建连续时间控制律；提出基于切换机制的动态事件触发策略（区别于经典动态ETC）以实现全局指数稳定；针对不确定性设计自适应更新律，使增益核随时间变化并通过事件触发自适应调度；引入DeepONet近似反推核函数，避免在线重复求解核PDE。
AI.result: 通过融合事件触发机制、参数自适应和核函数近似误差的Lyapunov分析，证明了闭环系统的L²全局渐近调节；数值仿真验证了方法的有效性；实现了比经典动态ETC更强的全局指数稳定性（而非仅指数收敛），并排除了Zeno行为。
AI.conclusion: 本文三大贡献：(i) 为反应扩散PDE-ODE级联系统开发了自适应DeepONet框架；(ii) 将自适应事件触发控制从纯PDE扩展到更复杂的不确定PDE-ODE级联；(iii) 将具有全局指数稳定性的切换动态ETC推广到PDE-ODE级联系统。该方法兼顾了稳定性、自适应性和计算效率。

title: Short-form Text Rewriting with Phi Silica
summary: Short-form text rewriting is a constrained variant of paraphrasing in which limited context and high semantic density leave little room for variation. While large language models perform well on general paraphrasing, small language models (SLMs) often struggle with semantic fidelity and hallucination robustness in short-form settings. In this work, we present an empirical study of adapting an SLM, Phi Silica, for short-form rewrite through dataset curation, prompt distillation, parameter-efficient fine-tuning, and evaluation. We curate a dataset of short presentation-style text from public slide decks and use GPT-5-chat both to generate rewrite supervision and to conduct LLM-as-a-judge evaluation. Our results show that finetuning improves semantic fidelity, reduces hallucinations, and increases preference win rate against GPT-5-chat rewrites. The findings suggest that targeted adaptation for SLMs can substantially narrow the gap to cloud models and provide practical guidance for adapting SLMs to precision-critical rewrite tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数据集构建、提示词蒸馏、参数高效微调等方法，将小型语言模型Phi Silica适配到短文本改写任务，结果表明微调能显著提升语义保真度、减少幻觉，并缩小与云端大模型的差距。
AI.motivation: 短文本改写因上下文有限、语义密度高，对模型在语义保真度和幻觉鲁棒性上提出更高要求。大型语言模型在通用改写中表现良好，但小型语言模型在此类场景中往往表现不佳，本文旨在探索如何通过适配方法提升SLM在短文本改写上的能力。
AI.method: 以Phi Silica作为基础SLM，通过以下步骤进行适配：(1) 从公开幻灯片中收集短演示文本构建数据集；(2) 使用GPT-5-chat生成改写监督信号并进行LLM-as-a-judge评估；(3) 应用提示词蒸馏与参数高效微调（PEFT）技术进行模型优化。
AI.result: 微调后的Phi Silica在语义保真度、幻觉减少以及相对于GPT-5-chat改写的偏好胜率方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 针对性的适配方法能显著缩小SLM与云端大模型在短文本改写任务上的性能差距，为SLM在精度敏感的改写任务中的应用提供了实用指导。

title: TAPS: Target-Aware Prefix Tree Selection for Diffusion-Drafted Speculative Decoding
summary: Using a diffusion model for parallel drafting is a promising approach for speculative decoding. By predicting tokens at multiple future positions in a single forward pass, diffusion drafters substantially reduce drafting latency. However, this shifts the bottleneck to verification: verifying a single sequence limits acceptance length, while verifying large draft trees incurs excessive target-model latency. We identify a key mismatch in existing draft-tree methods: existing diffusion-tree methods rank nodes by the marginal probability, ignoring that verification is prefix-conditioned. As a result, they may verify unreachable descendants of rejected prefixes, increasing latency with limited acceptance gains. To address this, we propose TAPS, a target-aware prefix selection method that turns diffusion marginals into path-conditioned acceptance estimates. TAPS then selects a compact prefix-closed subtree under a fixed verification budget, improving the acceptance-cost tradeoff rather than simply expanding the draft tree. Experiments across diverse datasets and model families demonstrate that TAPS achieves up to 7.9x lossless end-to-end speedup over vanilla autoregressive decoding, outperforming state-of-the-art DFlash and DDTree by 1.36x and 1.74x respectively. Our work is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TAPS-EMNLP2026-53DD

AI.tldr: TAPS是一种目标感知前缀选择方法，通过将扩散模型的边际概率转化为路径条件接受估计，在固定验证预算下选择紧凑的前缀封闭子树，从而改进了推测解码中的验证效率，实现了最高7.9倍的无损端到端加速。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散草稿模型在并行生成多个未来token时，验证阶段成为新的瓶颈。现有方法按边际概率对节点排序，忽略了验证是基于前缀条件的，导致可能验证已被拒绝前缀的不可达后代，造成延迟增加而接受增益有限。
AI.method: 提出TAPS方法，将扩散模型的边际概率转化为路径条件（前缀条件）的接受估计，然后在固定验证预算下选择紧凑的前缀封闭子树，优化接受-成本权衡而非简单扩展草稿树。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和模型家族上，TAPS相比原始自回归解码实现最高7.9倍无损端到端加速，比最先进的DFlash和DDTree分别快1.36倍和1.74倍。
AI.conclusion: TAPS通过目标感知的前缀选择方法有效解决了扩散推测解码中验证阶段的瓶颈问题，验证了路径条件估计相比于边际概率排名在草稿树构建中的优越性。

title: Adaptive Order Policies for Masked Diffusion
summary: Masked diffusion models have seen great success in capturing data distributions over discrete sequences in domains such as text and proteins. These models generate data by iteratively unmasking tokens starting from a fully masked sequence, with the unmasking order typically chosen at random or using a heuristic based on denoiser probabilities. In this work, we propose a scheme for learning the unmasking order using an additional lightweight policy network on top of a diffusion model. Our proposed loss reweights terms in the masked diffusion loss according to policy probabilities, and results in a policy that prefers positions where the denoiser is more likely to be correct. We study this loss in two settings: (i) training solely the policy while using a frozen pre-trained denoiser, and (ii) training the policy and denoiser jointly with the weighted loss to allow for mutual adaptation. We demonstrate that our approach outperforms common heuristics on problems that are sensitive to token ordering, such as combinatorial tasks and proteins.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过轻量级策略网络学习掩码扩散模型中解掩码顺序的方法，在组合任务和蛋白质生成等敏感任务上优于常见启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的掩码扩散模型通常使用随机或基于去噪概率的启发式方法来确定解掩码顺序，这些方法可能不是最优的。作者希望通过学习解掩码顺序来提升模型在顺序敏感任务上的表现。
AI.method: 提出在扩散模型基础上附加一个轻量级策略网络来学习解掩码顺序。损失函数根据策略概率对掩码扩散损失中的各项进行重新加权。研究两种训练设置：(i) 仅训练策略网络，冻结预训练的去噪器；(ii) 联合训练策略网络和去噪器，实现相互适应。
AI.result: 在组合任务和蛋白质生成等对token顺序敏感的问题上，该方法优于常见的启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习解掩码顺序而非使用固定启发式方法，可以有效提升掩码扩散模型在顺序敏感任务上的生成质量。

title: An LLM-based Chain-of-Response Counter-Scam System
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at IJCAI 2026
summary: The rapid evolution of online scams, driven by transnational networks and mass produced social engineering scenarios, has exposed the speed limitations of conventional detection, necessitating tighter interagency coordination. While LLMs show promise in scam identification, their role in accelerating integrated response frameworks remains underexplored. We propose Counter Scam, a unified LLM based multiagent framework that orchestrates end to end response from initial detection to crime investigation. The framework first proposes safe data guidelines, emphasizing nonpublic scam data and secure dataset construction via scam specific NER. Developed with insights from 37 stakeholders to reduce delays and improve analytical efficiency, the system integrates CSRA for multiagent mitigation, CSRT comprising nine role aligned NLP tasks, and CSRD, a corpus of 185,300 scam cases and 38,587 knowledge entries. Experiments show that fine tuned sLLMs surpass commercial models by more than 10% across all CSRT tasks and achieve a 0.24 F1 improvement in scam specific NER. These results demonstrate the framework's capability to enable rapid and collaborative mitigation of online scams.

AI.tldr: 提出Counter Scam框架，基于LLM的多智能体系统，从检测到调查全流程自动化应对网络诈骗，集成安全数据指南、CSRA多智能体缓解、CSRT九项NLP任务和CSRD大规模数据集，实验表明微调sLLM在全部任务中超过商业模型10%以上。
AI.motivation: 网络诈骗快速演变（跨国网络、规模化社会工程），传统检测方法速度受限，亟需跨机构协同；LLM在诈骗识别方面有潜力，但在加速集成响应框架方面的作用尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出Counter Scam统一LLM多智能体框架：1）安全数据指南+诈骗专用NER构建安全数据集；2）基于37名利益相关者洞察开发；3）集成CSRA（多智能体缓解）、CSRT（九项角色对齐NLP任务）、CSRD（185,300诈骗案例+38,587知识条目）。
AI.result: 微调sLLM在全部CSRT任务中超越商业模型10%以上，诈骗专用NER的F1提升0.24。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具备实现快速、协作式在线诈骗缓解的能力，验证了LLM多智能体在端到端反诈骗响应中的有效性。

title: S3TS: Stochastic Scenario-Structured Tree Search for Advanced Planning Under Uncertainty
summary: Effective scheduling in the energy sector is essential to ensure the reliable operation of electrical grids and their connected assets by, for instance, optimizing the dispatch of generation units and storage systems. An effective planning strategy must (a) accommodate advanced and potentially non-linear system models -- exploiting the increasing data availability of modern grids, and (b) explicitly handle uncertainties arising, for instance, from the integration of renewable energy sources. While existing approaches can address either non-linearity (e.g., Monte Carlo Tree Search) or uncertainty (e.g., stochastic mathematical optimization), there is a lack of planning techniques capable of addressing both challenges simultaneously. To bridge this gap, we propose a Stochastic Scenario-Structured Tree Search (S3TS) algorithm that explicitly represents uncertainty through scenario trees while enabling the integration of advanced non-linear models. We evaluate S3TS on a simulated demand response signal publication problem, largely mimicking the imbalance settlement mechanism in Belgium. The results demonstrate near-optimal performance in linear, analytically tractable settings, with costs within 14% of the mathematically optimal solution conditioned to the scenario trees. In highly non-linear scenarios, S3TS significantly outperforms baseline methods, achieving cost reductions of up to 51% and 5.4% compared to a myopic algorithm and deterministic MCTS, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出S3TS算法，结合情景树与树搜索，同时处理能源调度中的非线性和不确定性，在比利时需求响应模拟中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有调度方法要么能处理非线性（如MCTS），要么能处理不确定性（如随机数学优化），但缺乏能同时应对两者的规划技术。
AI.method: 提出随机情景结构化树搜索（S3TS）算法，通过情景树显式表示不确定性，同时整合先进的非线性模型。
AI.result: 在线性可解场景中，S3TS成本距离数学最优解在14%以内；在高度非线性场景中，相比贪婪算法和确定性MCTS，成本分别降低51%和5.4%。
AI.conclusion: S3TS能够有效弥合现有方法在同时处理非线性和不确定性方面的空白，是能源领域调度规划的有力工具。

title: On the Limits of LLM Adaptability: Impact of Model-Internalized Priors on Annotation Task Performance
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 (Oral & Spotlight); PMLR vol. 306. 9 pages, 4 figures
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for zero-shot annotation and LLM-as-a-judge tasks, yet their reliability hinges on how model-internalized priors interact with user-provided instructions. We investigate three dimensions of this interaction: (1) how an LLM's familiarity with data and task definitions affects performance, (2) the extent to which additional information in prompts can correct zero-shot errors ("decision stickiness"), and (3) model susceptibility to misaligned task definitions. Through experiments on toxicity detection across diverse datasets (spanning social media, gaming, news, and forums) using both dense and mixture-of-experts models, we find that nearly two-thirds of zero-shot errors are resistant to correction, with an overall rescue rate (fraction of initial errors corrected by prompting) of only 34.8%. High-confidence errors prove especially resistant to correction. When given misaligned definitions, LLMs follow them while maintaining confidence levels unchanged from the aligned condition. Crucially, we introduce Definition-Specific Familiarity (DSF), which measures alignment between a model's internal concept and the task definition. After controlling for dataset-level confounds, DSF shows a positive association with model performance (partial r = +0.41), while three distinct memorization metrics (ROUGE-L, BERTScore, and embedding cosine similarity) all fail to show a positive association. These findings show the limitations of prompt-based correction in annotation tasks, highlighting the importance of definition alignment over text-level memorization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM在零样本标注任务中，模型内在先验与用户指令的交互作用。发现近三分之二的零样本错误难以通过提示修正（修正率仅34.8%），高置信度错误尤为顽固；当提供错误任务定义时，模型会遵循定义但置信度不变。引入定义特定熟悉度（DSF）指标，其与模型性能正相关（偏相关系数+0.41），而三种记忆化指标均不显著，表明定义对齐比文本记忆更重要。
AI.motivation: LLM被越来越多用于零样本标注和LLM-as-a-judge任务，但其可靠性取决于模型内部先验与用户指令的交互方式。现有研究对以下问题的理解不足：模型对数据和任务的熟悉度如何影响性能、提示中的额外信息能在多大程度上纠正零样本错误（即“决策粘性”）、以及模型对错误任务定义的敏感程度。
AI.method: 通过毒性检测任务，在社交媒体、游戏、新闻和论坛等多领域数据集上，使用密集模型和混合专家模型进行实验。分析三个维度：模型对数据和任务定义的熟悉度、提示信息对零样本错误的纠正能力（决策粘性）、模型对错误任务定义的敏感性。引入定义特定熟悉度（DSF）指标，并对比三种记忆化指标（ROUGE-L、BERTScore、嵌入余弦相似度）。
AI.result: 零样本错误中近三分之二无法通过提示修正，整体救援率仅34.8%；高置信度错误尤其难以纠正。当提供错误定义时，模型会遵循但置信度不变。DSF与模型性能显著正相关（偏相关系数+0.41），而三种记忆化指标均未显示正相关。
AI.conclusion: 提示驱动的修正方法在标注任务中存在显著局限性，定义对齐（Definition-Specific Familiarity）比文本级记忆化更能预测模型性能，未来应更注重任务定义与模型内部概念的对齐。

title: EnergyMamba: An Uncertainty-Aware Graph-Enhanced Selective State Space Model for Energy Consumption Prediction
summary: Energy consumption prediction is essential for efficient grid management, demand-side optimization, and sustainable energy planning. Although advanced machine learning methods have been employed for better prediction performance, existing works have two key limitations: (1) they usually formulate this task as a purely time-series prediction problem without explicitly modeling the spatial dependencies among different regions, and (2) they fail to provide reliable predictions with uncertainty estimates under abnormal situations such as extreme weather events. To advance existing research, we propose EnergyMamba, an uncertainty-aware spatiotemporal learning framework for accurate and reliable energy consumption prediction, which comprises two key components: (i) a novel Graph-Enhanced Selective State Space Model (GE-Mamba) that injects spatial context learned from the grid topology into the temporal dynamics, enabling coupled spatiotemporal modeling, and (ii) an Adaptive Sequential Conformalized Quantile Regression (AS-CQR) module, which includes locally adaptive normalization and an online feedback mechanism to dynamically calibrate prediction intervals under potential distribution shifts. We evaluate EnergyMamba on four large-scale real-world datasets from Florida, New York, and California. Results show EnergyMamba achieves around 5% improvement in prediction accuracy and 6% improvement in uncertainty quantification over 15 state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出EnergyMamba框架，结合图增强状态空间模型（GE-Mamba）和自适应序列分位数回归（AS-CQR），实现时空建模与不确定性量化，在三个州的大规模数据集上取得约5%的精度提升和6%的不确定性量化改善。
AI.motivation: 现有能源消耗预测方法存在两个关键局限：(1) 仅将预测视为纯时间序列问题，未显式建模不同区域间的空间依赖；(2) 在极端天气等异常情况下无法提供带不确定性估计的可靠预测。
AI.method: 提出EnergyMamba框架，包含两个核心模块：(i) GE-Mamba，将电网拓扑学习的空间上下文注入时序动态中，实现耦合时空建模；(ii) AS-CQR，包含局部自适应归一化和在线反馈机制，动态校准分布偏移下的预测区间。
AI.result: 在佛罗里达、纽约和加州四个大规模真实数据集上，相比15个基线方法，预测精度提升约5%，不确定性量化提升约6%。
AI.conclusion: EnergyMamba通过显式建模空间依赖和动态校准不确定性，实现了更准确和可靠的能源消耗预测，尤其能应对异常情况下的分布偏移问题。

title: FLaG: Fine-Grained Latent Grouping for Hallucination Detection
summary: Hallucinations in large language models (LLMs) arise from heterogeneous failure mechanisms, making reliable detection difficult for any single global uncertainty score. In this work, we formulate hallucination detection as a mechanism-aware evidence aggregation problem, where diverse representation- and token-level signals must be interpreted under multiple latent explanations. We propose FLaG, a lightweight hallucination detection framework that models correctness through a set of latent evidence groups. Each instance is softly associated with multiple groups via an energy-based routing mechanism, and group-conditional reliability signals are combined through a principled log-marginal aggregation. This design enables FLaG to capture heterogeneous hallucination patterns while remaining invariant to decision thresholds and evaluation metrics. The framework operates as a frozen-model head, requires no modification to the underlying language model, and incurs minimal computational overhead. We further provide a theoretical perspective that connects FLaG to optimal evidence aggregation under heterogeneous error mechanisms, showing that the Bayes-optimal test statistic necessarily admits a log-marginal form and that FLaG constitutes a tractable approximation with a controllable error bound. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and LLM backbones demonstrate that FLaG consistently achieves SOTA performance, while exhibiting robust transfer across datasets and models, and remaining effective under limited supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出FLaG框架，通过机制感知的证据聚合与潜在解释组建模，实现无需修改底层模型的轻量级幻觉检测，理论证明其接近贝叶斯最优，实验达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: LLM的幻觉源于异构的失败机制，单一全局不确定性分数难以可靠检测，需要机制感知的聚合方法。
AI.method: 通过一组潜在证据组建模正确性，每个实例通过基于能量的路由机制软关联多个组，再通过对数边缘聚合组合组条件可靠性信号，实现轻量级冻结模型头设计。
AI.result: 在多个基准和LLM骨干上一致达到SOTA性能，跨数据集和模型迁移鲁棒，在有限监督下仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: FLaG通过机制感知的证据聚合有效捕获异构幻觉模式，理论上有界近似贝叶斯最优检验统计量，实用中轻量高效且泛化性强。

title: The Main Barrier to AI Adoption in the Public Sector is Lack of Training: How a Structured Method Increased Productivity in Two Brazilian Government Cases Without Incidents
summary: The adoption of generative artificial intelligence in the public sector has been treated predominantly as a technological problem, with the expectation that productivity gains would follow from the availability of increasingly capable models. This paper argues, drawing on two auditable cases in the Brazilian Public Service, that the determining barrier to adoption observed in these units was not technological but training-related, and describes the four-layer structured pedagogical methodology developed by the author. The method was applied in two units with distinct institutional profiles: the Sectoral Internal Control Office of the Federal District Department of Health (SES/CONT) throughout 2024, and the Internal Control Unit of the Federal District Department of Economic Development, Labor and Income (UCI/SEDET) throughout 2025. In both cases, the official indicators from the Electronic Information System of the Federal District Government (SEI-GDF), verifiable by third parties, recorded substantial gains: average processing time fell by 18.2% at SES/CONT and by 50% at UCI/SEDET, with UCI also recording a 92% increase in technical-report production, the issuance of 288 formal recommendations to public managers, and the analysis of cases totaling USD 104.3 million in financial volume. In neither unit did internal control mechanisms identify any information-security incident, sensitive-data leakage, or formal compliance challenge from external oversight bodies during the period examined. The analysis is consistent with the hypothesis that the method is portable across agencies with distinct mandates, operates within protocols designed to comply with international and national data-protection law and with the principles of public administration, and is accessible to public entities under budget constraints, since it used free AI models.

AI.tldr: 本文基于巴西公共服务的两个可审计案例，论证了生成式AI在公共部门应用的主要障碍不是技术问题，而是培训问题。作者提出的四层结构化教学方法在两个不同机构中得到验证，SEI-GDF系统官方数据显示流程处理时间分别下降18.2%和50%，报告产量提升92%，且未出现信息安全事件。
AI.motivation: 当前公共部门将生成式AI采纳主要视为技术问题，认为模型能力提升自然会带来生产力增长。作者对此提出质疑，认为实际障碍在于培训而非技术。
AI.method: 作者开发了一种四层结构化教学方法，在两个不同机构（卫生局内控办公室和经济发展局内控部门）中应用，使用免费AI模型，并遵循国际和国内数据保护法律及公共行政原则。
AI.result: SES/CONT处理时间下降18.2%；UCI/SEDET处理时间下降50%，技术报告产量提升92%，发出288条正式建议，分析项目总金额达1.043亿美元。两个机构均未出现信息安全事件、敏感数据泄露或合规问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不同使命的机构间具有可迁移性，在预算受限条件下可被公共实体采用（因使用免费AI模型），且符合数据保护法规和公共行政原则。

title: Retraction based regression methods on Riemannian manifolds
summary: Geodesic regression generalizes classical regression models to manifold-valued data by replacing affine models in Euclidean spaces with geodesic models on Riemannian manifolds. In this paper, we set up a framework for regression based on retractions instead of the Riemannian exponential map and its corresponding retraction-based distance. The associated optimization problem is posed on a subset of the tangent bundle which is why we additionally construct retractions on the tangent bundle induced by retractions on the underlying manifold. Our approach yields a more flexible formulation which is applicable beyond settings where the exponential map can be computed efficiently. As a proof of concept, we apply the developed framework to the (n-1)-dimensional p-norm sphere using the retraction by normalization to define the regression problem. The resulting optimization problem is solved using the Riemannian steepest descent method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于回缩（retraction）而非黎曼指数映射的测地线回归框架，将回归模型扩展到更一般的流形设置，并在p-范数球面上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统测地线回归依赖黎曼指数映射和测地距离，但指数映射在有些流形上计算成本高甚至难以获得解析形式，因此需要一种更灵活、适用性更广的替代框架。
AI.method: 用回缩映射（retraction）替代黎曼指数映射，并引入基于回缩的距离函数；进一步在切丛上构造回缩，将优化问题定义在切丛子集上；在p-范数球面上以归一化回缩为例，使用黎曼最速下降法求解。
AI.result: 成功构建了基于回缩的测地线回归框架，并在p-范数球面上验证了该方法的可行性，扩展了回归模型的可应用流形范围。
AI.conclusion: 基于回缩的回归框架比传统指数映射方法更灵活，适用于指数映射计算困难的流形，具有更广的应用前景。

title: A No-Regret Framework for Adaptive Incentive Design
summary: Incentive design studies how a central authority can influence strategic agents through payments, subsidies, or taxes, so that individual objectives align with collective welfare. This paper introduces a No-Regret Adaptive Incentive Design (RAID) framework for nonlinear games with continuous action spaces and private agent costs. In this framework, the authority (planner) designs incentives that regulate the Nash equilibrium toward a socially optimal action profile, while simultaneously learning agents' unknown preferences from repeated strategic responses. We formulate the RAID problem and construct a least-squares estimator whose strong consistency requires only diminishing excitation. Leveraging this weak excitation requirement, we propose a switching incentive policy that alternates between probing (exploration) and estimate-based (exploitation) incentives. The resulting policy achieves an $O(t^{-0.5})$ parameter estimation rate and accumulates $O(t^{0.5}\log t)$ squared social-cost regret, almost surely. We further extend the framework to an endogenous-noise response model, where standard least-squares estimation is biased due to an error-in-variables correlation between the noise and agent responses. We utilize a repeated-sampling estimator and corresponding switching policy that retain the same almost-sure convergence and regret rates. Numerical experiments validate the effectiveness and predicted convergence rates of the method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个无遗憾自适应激励设计(RAID)框架，用于解决非线性博弈中连续动作空间和私有代理成本的问题。该框架通过交替使用探测激励和基于估计的激励，实现了参数估计率O(t^{-0.5})和平方社会成本遗憾O(t^{0.5} log t)，并扩展到了内生噪声响应模型。
AI.motivation: 激励设计研究中央权威如何通过支付、补贴或税收影响策略性代理，使个体目标与集体福利一致。现有方法难以处理非线性博弈、连续动作空间和未知的私有代理成本，因此需要一种能够同时学习代理偏好并设计最优激励的框架。
AI.method: 构建最小二乘估计器(仅需递减激励即可实现强一致性)，提出交替切换激励策略(探测探索与基于估计的利用)，并针对内生噪声模型引入重复采样估计器及相应切换策略。
AI.result: 所提出的切换策略几乎必然实现O(t^{-0.5})的参数估计率和O(t^{0.5} log t)的平方社会成本遗憾。数值实验验证了方法的有效性和预测的收敛率。
AI.conclusion: RAID框架成功解决了连续动作空间和非线性博弈中自适应激励设计的核心挑战，并在内生噪声模型下保持了相同的最优收敛速率，为实际激励设计提供了理论保证。

title: Do Text Edits Generalize to Visual Generation? Benchmarking Cross-Modal Knowledge Editing in UMMs
comment: Published at ICML 2026; Code and data available at https://github.com/gxx27/UniKE
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for general-purpose multimodal intelligence. As they are deployed in real-world applications, effectively updating internal knowledge becomes critical. While knowledge editing has matured for text-only models, it remains unclear whether edits that successfully modify textual outputs also transfer to image generation in UMMs. To study this question, we introduce UniKE, the first benchmark for cross-modality knowledge editing in UMMs, comprising 2,971 edit subjects spanning attribute and relation edits. Using VQA-based visual verification, we reveal a striking modality gap: text-side efficacy can reach approximately 92%, whereas the best overall VQA accuracy under direct image generation is only 18.5%. We further propose Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing, which explicitly activates edited knowledge before generation and improves overall VQA accuracy for all evaluated model-editor pairs, with gains up to 18.6 percentage points. Mechanistic analysis shows that this gap is associated with partial alignment between edited textual representations and the conditioning pathways for visual generation, where edits sufficient for text outputs may remain too weak or misaligned to steer image synthesis. These findings show that textual knowledge edits do not guarantee reliable cross-modality transfer and motivate modality-aware editing methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/gxx27/UniKE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniKE基准，发现统一多模态模型中文本知识编辑成功但跨模态迁移至图像生成时效果大幅下降（文本成功率92% vs 图像18.5%），并提出推理增强参数编辑方法缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识编辑方法在纯文本模型中已成熟，但统一多模态模型中修改文本输出能否有效迁移到图像生成尚不清楚，存在跨模态知识编辑的评估空白。
AI.method: 1) 构建UniKE基准（2971个编辑实例，涵盖属性与关系编辑）；2) 提出推理增强参数编辑（Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing），在生成前显式激活编辑知识。
AI.result: 文本侧编辑成功率约92%，但图像生成VQA准确率仅18.5%；推理增强方法提升所有模型-编辑器组合的准确率，最高提升18.6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 文本知识编辑无法保证可靠跨模态迁移，需发展模态感知的编辑方法。

title: Threshold-Based Exclusive Batching for LLM Inference
summary: Mixed batching (MB)--interleaving prefill and decode in a single batch--has become the standard scheduling strategy for large language model (LLM) inference due to its efficiency in maximizing compute and memory utilization. However, through controlled experiments, we find that prefill-decode interference inflates MB's per-step marginal cost above that of pure decode. On the high-bandwidth H200 (4.8 TB/s), this occurs only when decode tokens exceed 80% of the batch; however, on the bandwidth-constrained RTX PRO 6000 (1.792 TB/s), this threshold plummets to just 20%. Consequently, the optimal choice between MB and exclusive batching (EB) fundamentally depends on GPU memory bandwidth, model size, and workload composition. We derive a closed-form condition for this EB-MB performance crossover, along with asymptotically optimal phase-switching thresholds and memory-safe batch sizing for EB. Optimized EB achieves up to 41.9% higher throughput on bandwidth-constrained GPUs, while MB retains its advantage on high-bandwidth hardware with larger models. Our hybrid scheduler EB+ applies this condition online to dynamically switch between EB and MB without manual intervention. Under non-stationary traffic with distribution or concurrency shifts, EB+ attains the highest or near-highest throughput in every setting, outperforming MB by up to 36.4%.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM推理中的混合批处理（MB）与前/解码干扰问题，发现GPU内存带宽决定MB与独占批处理（EB）的性能拐点，并提出动态混合调度器EB+，在带宽受限GPU上提升吞吐量达41.9%。
AI.motivation: 传统认为MB总能最大化计算和内存利用率，但作者通过实验发现prefill和decode之间存在干扰，导致MB的边际成本高于纯decode，因此需要重新审视MB与EB的最优选择。
AI.method: 通过控制实验发现带宽受限时MB性能下降的阈值；推导出EB-MB性能交叉的闭式条件、渐进最优的阶段切换阈值以及EB的内存安全batch大小；设计在线混合调度器EB+，根据条件动态切换EB和MB。
AI.result: 优化后的EB在带宽受限GPU上吞吐量提升高达41.9%；非平稳流量下EB+最高吞吐量优于MB最多36.4%。
AI.conclusion: MB与EB的选择取决于GPU内存带宽、模型大小和工作负载组成；EB+能动态适应非平稳流量，在多种设置下达到最优或接近最优吞吐量。

title: Modeling Spectral Energy Shifts in Spatio-Temporal Graph Anomaly Detection
summary: Graph anomaly detection methods aim to distinguish anomalous nodes. While prior methods characterize anomalies through increased variation in the spectral energy distributions, they overlook those that result in decreased variation, i.e., camouflaged anomalies that appear normal. We show that this type of anomaly persists across multiple datasets and remains undetectable by existing spectral approaches. To address this limitation, we propose a node-level spectral energy formulation that is fully compatible with message passing and enables the detection of camouflaged anomalies. Building on this formulation, we introduce an energy-aware graph learning framework that models spectral shifts through energy-driven message passing in both static and time-series graphs. Besides, our unified architecture extends to temporal settings without introducing specialized sequence modules, enabling efficient learning under long sliding windows. Extensive experiments on large-scale benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于节点级谱能量公式的图异常检测框架，能够检测被现有谱方法忽略的伪装异常（即那些导致谱能量分布变化减少的异常节点），并通过能量驱动的消息传递机制在静态和时序图中建模谱偏移，在大型基准测试上验证了其有效性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有图异常检测方法主要关注那些导致谱能量分布变化增加的异常节点，但忽略了那些导致变化减少的伪装异常（看起来正常的异常节点）。研究表明这类异常在多个数据集中普遍存在，且现有谱方法无法检测到它们。
AI.method: 提出节点级谱能量公式，与消息传递完全兼容；构建能量感知图学习框架，通过能量驱动的消息传递在静态和时序图中建模谱偏移；统一架构扩展到时间设置，无需专门序列模块即可在长滑动窗口下高效学习。
AI.result: 在大型基准数据集上的大量实验验证了该方法在检测伪装异常方面的有效性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法成功解决了现有谱方法无法检测伪装异常（谱能量变化减少的异常）的局限性，且具备良好的时序扩展能力。

title: Question Type, Cognitive Load, and CEFR Alignment: Evaluating LLM-Generated EFL Grammar Drill Exercises
comment: Under review for the the 34th International Conference on Computers in Education (ICCE 2026)
summary: This study evaluates the pedagogical viability of LLM-generated English as a Foreign Language (EFL) learning content. Utilising log data from Japanese junior high school students practicing on a grammar drilling application, we analysed how different question modalities impact student performance and whether theoretical localised CEFR difficulty tiers accurately predict empirical task difficulty. Results reveal a clear performance hierarchy: multiple-choice questions carried the lowest cognitive load, cloze tasks posed the greatest barrier to active recall, and drag-and-drop exercises incurred the heaviest time penalties. Furthermore, learner data validated the CEFR-J grammar framework, showing a steady decline in accuracy and increased response times as proficiency levels advanced. These findings demonstrate that LLMs can successfully generate learning content, while highlighting the need for developers to strategically sequence question modalities to transition learners from passive recognition to active linguistic production.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了LLM生成的EFL学习内容的教学可行性，通过日本初中生的语法练习数据，发现不同题目类型（选择题、完形填空、拖拽题）对学生表现有显著影响，并验证了CEFR-J语法框架的难度层级。
AI.motivation: 验证大语言模型（LLM）生成英语作为外语（EFL）学习内容的教学可行性，探究不同题目模态对学生表现的影响以及理论难度层级与实际难度的一致性。
AI.method: 利用日本初中生在语法练习应用上的日志数据，分析不同题目类型（选择题、完形填空、拖拽题）对学生表现的影响，并评估CEFR-J难度层级与实际任务难度的一致性。
AI.result: 选择题认知负荷最低，完形填空对主动回忆障碍最大，拖拽题时间成本最高；CEFR-J难度层级得到验证，随着水平提高准确率下降、响应时间增加。
AI.conclusion: LLM能够成功生成学习内容，但开发者需要策略性地安排题目类型顺序，帮助学习者从被动识别过渡到主动语言产出。

title: Investment and Operational Planning for electricity markets with massive entry of renewable energy
summary: In wholesale electricity markets, electricity producers and the independent system operator (ISO) play a central role. The ISO is responsible for minimizing production costs while satisfying supply-demand balance and capacity constraints. In this paper, we study a continuous-time problem in which the ISO seeks to minimize the joint cost of operation and investment in an electricity network. The problem is formulated in terms of operational and investment control variables. We analyze the hierarchy between these controls and use the so-called Day-Ahead Problem to find an explicit form of the optimal operation. This allows us to reformulate the investment problem as a stochastic control problem with state constraints. We extend the results of state-constrained stochastic control to fit our setting. In particular, we use a version of the Pointing Inward Condition to fully characterize the value of the problem as the unique viscosity solution of a constrained HJB equation. We then assign a specific dynamic to the capacity-demand process and discuss how the assumptions for the HJB characterization result in a budget constraint for the planning. Finally, we run simulations for a three-node setting that resembles the Chilean market. We analyze short-, medium-, and long-term planning scenarios and discuss how to transition toward a system with high penetration of renewable energy.

AI.tldr: 本文研究电力批发市场中ISO的运营与投资联合优化问题，通过随机控制方法求解带状态约束的HJB方程，并在三节点场景中模拟分析了向高可再生能源系统转型的规划策略。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多将运营与投资问题分开处理，但二者在电力市场中高度耦合。本文旨在建立统一框架，同时优化运营调度与容量投资决策，以应对能源转型带来的长期规划挑战。
AI.method: 将问题建模为连续时间随机控制问题，利用日前问题导出运营控制显式解，进而将投资问题转化为带状态约束的随机控制问题；采用Po点向内条件（Pointing Inward Condition）推导受限HJB方程的粘度解刻画；最后在三节点电网模型中进行数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 成功将联合优化问题分解为运营与投资两个层次，给出了运营控制的显式解形式；证明了投资问题的值函数是受限HJB方程的唯—粘度解；模拟结果展示了不同时间尺度（短/中/长期）下最优规划路径，并量化了向高可再生能源占比转型所需的预算约束。
AI.conclusion: 本文为电力系统运营与投资的联合优化提供了严谨的理论框架，所提出的HJB方程粘度解方法可有效处理状态约束；数值案例表明该模型能指导真实市场（如智利）的能源转型规划，具有实际应用价值。

title: Large-scale Uncertainty Quantification for Latent Variable Models Using Subsampling Markov Chain Monte Carlo
summary: Stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics combined with Gibbs updates (SGLD--Gibbs) provides a highly scalable approach to approximate Bayesian inference in latent variable models. However, it remains unclear how to tune the algorithm's hyperparameters in a principled manner to ensure the uncertainty estimates are statistically meaningful. In this work, we address this gap in tuning guidance by developing a statistical scaling limit theory for SGLD--Gibbs. We derive a joint asymptotic limit for the global parameters and latent variables under appropriate space-time rescaling. We show that global parameters converge to a diffusion-type limit, while each latent variable converges to a jump process, reflecting the use of intermittent Gibbs updates. This joint jump-diffusion structure reveals how latent-variable randomness contributes to the stationary distribution of the global parameters. We leverage our results to propose explicit guidance on hyperparameter tuning for SGLD--Gibbs that ensures meaningful uncertainty quantification. Numerical experiments show that SGLD--Gibbs with our tuning guidance leads to better parameter estimates, uncertainty quantification, and predictive performance than stochastic variational inference.

AI.tldr: 本文为SGLD-Gibbs算法开发了统计尺度极限理论，推导了全局参数与潜变量的联合渐近极限，揭示了跳-扩散结构，并基于此提出了超参数调优指南，确保不确定性量化的有效性。
AI.motivation: SGLD-Gibbs是一种可扩展的贝叶斯推断方法，但如何原则性地调优其超参数以确保不确定性估计具有统计意义尚不清楚。
AI.method: 推导SGLD-Gibbs的联合渐近极限：全局参数收敛到扩散型极限，每个潜变量收敛到跳过程（反映间歇性Gibbs更新），形成跳-扩散结构。
AI.result: 揭示了潜变量随机性如何影响全局参数的平稳分布；提出了明确的超参数调优指南。
AI.conclusion: 按此指南调优的SGLD-Gibbs在参数估计、不确定性量化与预测性能上均优于随机变分推断。

title: LaSR: Context-Aware Speech Recognition via Latent Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in Speech Large Language Models (Speech LLMs) have significantly enhanced spoken language understanding and reasoning. However, their contextual awareness is limited, struggling to perform speech recognition that effectively reflects the speaker's intent and topical context. In this paper, we propose LaSR (Latent Speech Reasoning), a novel training paradigm featuring a context-aware reasoning trajectory that leverages the latent reasoning process. Instead of generating explicit intermediate tokens, LaSR aligns chain-of-thought (CoT) supervision around the acoustic feature region of the targeted word, and introduces latent reasoning periods for context information grounding and transcriptional transition. Furthermore, to effectively benchmark contextual recognition on specialized vocabulary, we propose Spoken Darwin-Science, a large-scale corpus focusing on academic terminologies. Preliminary experiments on Fun-Audio-Chat demonstrate that LaSR significantly improves terminology recognition without introducing additional latency and consistently outperforms standard supervised fine-tuning baselines. Our findings highlight the potential of latent reasoning in building efficient, context-aware speech assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaSR（潜在语音推理）训练范式，通过在声学特征区域对齐思维链监督并引入潜在推理周期，提升语音大模型在专业术语识别上的上下文感知能力；同时构建了Spoken Darwin-Science学术术语语料库用于评估。实验表明LaSR在不增加额外延迟的情况下显著提升术语识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有语音大模型（Speech LLMs）虽然具备较强的口语理解和推理能力，但其上下文感知能力有限，难以在语音识别中有效反映说话者意图和主题语境，尤其在专业词汇识别上表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出LaSR训练范式，核心包括：1）将链式思维（CoT）监督信号对齐到目标词汇的声学特征区域；2）引入潜在推理周期用于上下文信息锚定和转录转换。该方法不生成显式中间token，而是在潜在空间中进行推理。
AI.result: 在Fun-Audio-Chat数据集上的初步实验表明，LaSR显著提升了术语识别效果，且不引入额外延迟，持续优于标准有监督微调基线。
AI.conclusion: 潜在推理在构建高效、上下文感知的语音助手方面具有巨大潜力，LaSR为上下文感知语音识别提供了新的有效范式。

title: Acting with AI: An Interaction-Based Framework for Agentic Tort Liability
summary: Agentic AI systems can plan over multiple steps, use tools, and execute tasks over time. When such systems cause harm, tort law struggles to allocate responsibility because the harmful path may be neither fully chosen by the user nor specifically foreseen by the developer. This paper proposes an interaction-based framework for agentic torts, drawing on Michael Bratman's planning theory and on the common law's treatment of human-human concerted action. We distinguish three interaction types: autonomous drift, pure tool use, and collaborative planning. Pure tool cases remain governed by ordinary product-defect and warning doctrines; collaborative planning cases map onto the independent contractor control test, professional malpractice, and negligent misrepresentation; autonomous drift maps onto frolic and detour under respondeat superior and strict product liability. The framework treats the stateful interaction log as the primary evidentiary trace, allowing courts to infer where the human-AI trajectory departed from the authorized undertaking and where liability should attach. We resolve four incident-anchored cases, situate the account alongside strict-liability and insurance-based proposals, note its relationship to regulatory oversight, and propose a ``Reasonable Agent'' standard built around constraint verification, epistemic transparency, runtime grounding, and forensic logging.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Agentic AI系统造成损害时的责任分配难题，提出了一个基于交互类型的法律分析框架。该框架借鉴Bratman的规划理论与普通法中的联合行动原则，区分了自主漂移、纯工具使用和协作规划三种交互类型，并分别对应不同的侵权责任归责原则。
AI.motivation: 当Agentic AI系统（能够多步规划、使用工具、随时间执行任务的系统）造成损害时，传统侵权法难以分配责任，因为损害路径既非用户完全选择，也非开发者具体预见。现有法律框架无法有效处理这种人机交互产生的责任分配问题。
AI.method: 论文提出一个基于交互类型的法律分析框架：1）区分三种交互类型——自主漂移（autonomous drift）、纯工具使用（pure tool use）和协作规划（collaborative planning）；2）将每种类型映射到现有的普通法原则：纯工具→产品缺陷与警告原则，协作规划→独立承包商控制测试、专业过失与过失性虚假陈述，自主漂移→雇主责任中的"游荡与绕道"理论与严格产品责任；3）将有状态交互日志作为主要证据痕迹，用于推断人-AI轨迹何时偏离授权范围。
AI.result: 论文解决了四个以事故锚定的案例，将其框架与严格责任和基于保险的方案进行了比较，并提出了"合理Agent"标准，该标准围绕约束验证、认知透明度、运行时接地和司法取证日志四个方面构建。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为法院处理Agentic AI侵权责任提供了可操作的分析路径，通过区分交互类型来匹配不同的归责原则，利用交互日志作为证据基础，并提出了合理Agent标准作为规范性指引。

title: Rethinking the Role of Temperature in Large Language Model Distillation
summary: Reverse Kullback-Leibler (RKL) divergence is widely favored over forward KL (FKL) in large language models (LLM) distillation, yet this preference is largely based on comparisons that omit the temperature $τ$, overlooking its central role in softening teacher distributions and improving knowledge transfer. In this work, we revisit temperature in LLM distillation and show that it fundamentally changes the comparison between FKL and RKL. Our analysis reveals an asymmetric effect: temperature substantially enriches FKL with non-dominant token signals, whereas it mainly rescales RKL gradients, causing FKL to benefit much more from $τ$ scaling than RKL. This asymmetry overturns the standard empirical conclusion: although RKL outperforms FKL at $τ=1$, FKL consistently surpasses RKL at higher temperatures across instruction-following benchmarks. Moreover, the impact of temperature is not limited to FKL; it improves a broader family of distillation objectives, enabling simple KL-based methods to achieve competitive performance against recent state-of-the-art LLM distillation approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了温度参数τ在大语言模型蒸馏中的作用，发现温度对前向KL散度（FKL）和非对称反向KL散度（RKL）存在不对称影响：温度显著丰富了FKL的非主导token信号，而对RKL主要起梯度缩放作用。因此，在较高温度下FKL性能反超RKL，且温度能提升更广泛的蒸馏目标函数。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM蒸馏研究中普遍偏好反向KL散度（RKL）而非前向KL散度（FKL），但这些比较通常忽略了温度参数τ的影响。温度在软化教师分布和改善知识迁移中起关键作用，但以往研究未充分考虑其作用。本文旨在重新审视温度在LLM蒸馏中的重要性，揭示其对FKL和RKL的不对称影响。
AI.method: 通过理论分析揭示温度对FKL和RKL的不对称作用机制：FKL在温度升高时能获取更丰富的非主导token信号，而RKL的梯度仅被重新缩放。在多个指令遵循基准上进行实验验证，比较不同温度下FKL与RKL的性能表现，并将温度效应推广到更广泛的蒸馏目标函数族。
AI.result: 在τ=1时RKL优于FKL，符合传统认知；但在较高温度下，FKL持续优于RKL。温度不仅提升FKL，还能改善更广泛的蒸馏目标函数，使简单的KL方法能与最新的先进LLM蒸馏方法相竞争。
AI.conclusion: 温度参数从根本上改变了FKL与RKL的比较结果，推翻了"RKL在LLM蒸馏中始终优于FKL"的现有结论。研究者应重视温度对蒸馏目标的非对称影响，并考虑将温度提升用于更广泛的蒸馏框架中。

title: The Use of Computational Thinking Skills, Difficulties, and Strategies of Introductory Programming Students Solving Bebras Tasks
comment: The work was submitted and accepted at ICER 2026
summary: Computational thinking (CT) is regarded as a fundamental skill set everyone should learn. Identifying when and how CT skills are used is challenging but important to inform interventions supporting their development. Previous research has examined how students and experts apply CT skills when solving introductory computational problems. However, the extent to which higher education students in introductory programming courses do so in depth is underexplored. We address this gap by examining how those students apply CT skills when solving computational problems, the difficulties they encounter, and the strategies they employ. We collected plans and solutions to Bebras tasks (short problems introducing CS concepts and considered effective for eliciting CT skills) in an introductory programming course for non-CS majors. We gathered 241 submissions from 58 students across five tasks, along with post-task comments and reflections on strategies. We analyzed the data using descriptive statistics, applied an existing coding scheme to identify CT skills, and conducted thematic analysis to identify difficulties and strategies. Submissions varied in structure and level of detail. The most prevalent CT skills were algorithmic thinking, abstraction, and decomposition, while evaluation and generalization appeared much less frequently. CT skill presence was positively associated with correct answers. Students faced challenges in four areas, including understanding the tasks and making a plan, and reported various problem-solving strategies. Consolidating and extending prior research on CT skills and problem solving, our findings show that students in introductory programming apply CT skills but can struggle to solve problems systematically and explain their reasoning. Furthermore, Bebras tasks create opportunities for this population to engage CT skills and could be used in future research.

AI.tldr: 本研究调查了非计算机专业的大一编程学生如何运用计算思维（CT）技能解决Bebras任务。收集了58名学生的241份提交材料，发现最常用的CT技能是算法思维、抽象和分解，而评估和泛化较少出现。CT技能与正确答案正相关。学生在理解任务和制定计划方面存在困难。研究表明Bebras任务有助于培养CT技能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已探讨学生和专家在解决入门计算问题时的CT技能运用，但高等教育学生在编程入门课程中如何深入运用CT技能尚缺乏研究。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在非计算机专业学生的编程入门课程中，收集学生对Bebras任务的计划与解决方案（共58名学生241份提交），并结合任务后评论和策略反思。使用描述性统计、已有编码方案识别CT技能，并通过主题分析识别困难与策略。
AI.result: 提交材料在结构和详细程度上存在差异。最常见的CT技能是算法思维、抽象和分解，评估和泛化较少出现。CT技能与正确答案正相关。学生在理解任务和制定计划等四个方面遇到困难，并采用了多种问题解决策略。
AI.conclusion: 入门编程学生能运用CT技能，但难以系统性地解决问题并解释其推理过程。Bebras任务为这类学生提供了运用CT技能的机会，可用于未来研究。

title: Relax and Follow: L0-Path Computation with L0-Bregman Relaxations
summary: This work introduces L0PathBrex, a novel method for estimating the solution path of L0-regularized problems through the use of L0 Bregman relaxations (B-rex). Recently introduced and analyzed in the literature, these relaxations provide continuous reformulations of the original objective, are applicable to possibly non-quadratic data fidelity terms, and depend on a family of functions designed to preserve the global minimizers while eliminating part of the undesirable local minima. Given any numerical solver for the relaxation, the proposed approach dynamically constructs a collection of local minimizers that are candidates for the L0-solution path. It exploits warm-start strategies and identifies ranges of the regularization parameter for which each minimizer remains valid under the corresponding relaxation. Experiments on sparse least-squares and logistic regression problems demonstrate that L0PathBrex systematically outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across both synthetic and real-world datasets in terms of various evaluation metrics; additionally, the study investigates how the choice of the B-rex affects the quality of the estimated path in the sparse Poisson regression setting.

AI.tldr: 提出L0PathBrex方法，利用L0 Bregman松弛连续化L0正则化问题，动态构建候选局部极小点路径，在稀疏最小二乘和逻辑回归中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: L0正则化问题存在非连续、非凸、局部最优多的困难，现有方法难以高效估计其解路径，需要一种能生成连续松弛并保留全局最优解的方法。
AI.method: 利用L0 Bregman松弛（B-rex）对原问题进行连续化重构，通过热启动策略动态构建候选局部极小点集合，识别各极小点在松弛下有效的正则化参数区间，从而估计L0解路径。
AI.result: 在稀疏最小二乘和逻辑回归任务中，L0PathBrex在合成和真实数据集上全面优于现有基线方法；同时探究了不同B-rex选择对稀疏泊松回归路径质量的影响。
AI.conclusion: L0PathBrex能高效且准确地估计L0正则化问题的解路径，B-rex函数的选择对路径质量有显著影响，方法具有广泛适用性。

title: Perturbative methods for non-parametric instrumental variable
summary: We introduce a perturbative approach for nonparametric instrumental variable (NPIV) estimation. By drawing inspiration from perturbation theory in physics, we extend standard kernel ridge methods with systematic higher perturbation order corrections that significantly improve estimation accuracy. Spectrally, the perturbation introduces mixing between different eigenmodes of the expectation integral operator, which becomes especially useful when the integral equation is ill-defined. One source for such ill-definedness can be the curse of dimensionality. Our method performs across various dimensionality regimes, particularly when the dimensionality parameter $β$ which is defined through the number of samples $n$ and dimension $d$ as $n^β= d$, becomes large. Experimental results show that our first-order perturbative corrections can reduce prediction error by up to 99\% in high-dimensional ill-defined cases ($β> 0.7$) compared to standard ridge regression approaches. The performance improvement is maintained across a wide range of dimensions, with the advantage becoming more pronounced as dimensionality increases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于微扰理论（perturbation theory）的非参数工具变量（NPIV）估计方法，通过引入更高阶的微扰校正来改进标准核岭回归方法，在高维病态问题中预测误差可降低高达99%。
AI.motivation: NPIV估计中，当积分算子方程病态时（例如由维度灾难引起），标准核岭回归方法精度不足，需要更高精度的估计方法。
AI.method: 借鉴物理学中的微扰理论，在标准核岭回归基础上引入系统性的高阶微扰校正。谱分析上，微扰在期望积分算子的不同本征模之间引入混合，特别适用于积分方程病态的情形。
AI.result: 在高维病态情形（β>0.7）中，一阶微扰校正相比标准岭回归能降低高达99%的预测误差，且优势随维度增加而愈发显著。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不同维度场景下均表现良好，尤其在高维条件下具有显著优势，为NPIV估计提供了一种新的有效途径。

title: Skill or Skip? Learning Selective Skill Invocation in Agentic Tasks via Dual-Granularity Preference Learning
summary: Agent skills are callable procedural modules that provide reusable knowledge and execution policies for complex agentic tasks. However, existing methods mainly focus on selecting relevant skills or improving the skills themselves, while overlooking whether a relevant skill should actually be invoked at the current decision point. Unhelpful invocations may introduce irrelevant context and disrupt an otherwise correct execution process. To address this issue, we propose SelSkill, a dual-granularity preference-learning framework for selective skill invocation. SelSkill formulates skill use as a skill-or-skip decision, uses predictive uncertainty to prioritize candidate decision points, and constructs controlled invoke-skip preference pairs from shared trajectory prefixes. It further combines episode-level outcome preferences with step-level invocation preferences to capture both overall trajectory quality and the local effectiveness of skill invocation. On ALFWorld with Qwen3-8B, SelSkill improves task success by 10.9 percentage points and execution precision by 29.1 percentage points. On BFCL, it improves task success by 5.7 percentage points and execution precision by 29.5 percentage points. Zero-shot results on Tau-bench and PopQA further suggest that the learned invocation policy transfers to new domains with previously unseen skills.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SelSkill，一个双粒度偏好学习框架，用于选择性技能调用。该框架通过"技能or跳过"决策、预测不确定性优先候选决策点、构建受控调用-跳过偏好对，并结合回合级结果偏好与步骤级调用偏好，在多个基准上显著提升了任务成功率和执行精度，且零样本迁移表现良好。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注技能选择或技能改进，但忽略了在决策点是否应该真正调用该技能的问题。无益的技能调用会引入无关上下文，干扰正确的执行过程。
AI.method: SelSkill框架包含三个核心组件：(1) 将技能使用形式化为"技能or跳过"二元决策；(2) 利用预测不确定性对候选决策点进行优先级排序；(3) 从共享轨迹前缀构造受控的调用-跳过偏好对，结合回合级结果偏好（整体轨迹质量）和步骤级调用偏好（局部调用效果）进行双粒度学习。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld上，使用Qwen3-8B时任务成功率提升10.9个百分点，执行精度提升29.1个百分点。在BFCL上，任务成功率提升5.7个百分点，执行精度提升29.5个百分点。在Tau-bench和PopQA上的零样本结果证明该策略可迁移到包含未见技能的新领域。
AI.conclusion: SelSkill通过选择性技能调用有效解决了无益调用问题，显著提升了智能体任务执行的质量和精度，并且学习到的调用策略具有良好的跨领域迁移能力。

title: KACE: Knowledge-Adaptive Context Engineering for Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Context engineering can improve large language models without updating their weights, but mathematical reasoning exposes a key limitation: feedback accumulated in one growing prompt causes context bloat and limits the amount of learned guidance that can be used. Existing methods often conflate storage, what is learned across runs, with usage, what is included for a particular problem, and therefore inherit this prompt-size ceiling. We introduce Knowledge-Adaptive Context Engineering (KACE), which separates storage from usage through difficulty- and domain-based organization. Offline, a self-reflective learning loop distills training traces into an epistemic tree: a knowledge base of typed cards stratified by problem difficulty and epistemic domain. Each card is assigned to the difficulty-domain node corresponding to the failure from which it originated. At evaluation time, tiered self-consistency with per-tier agreement gates dynamically classifies each problem as easy, medium, or hard. Easy problems exit without retrieved cards, while harder problems retrieve only the matching branch of the tree. This tiered scheme matches or exceeds Best-of-N while using comparable compute, and it classifies problem difficulty with 78 percent pairwise concordance. The main empirical contribution is the construction and use of a difficulty- and domain-stratified knowledge base enabled by tiered self-consistency. On AIME 2025, KACE achieves 62.2 percent accuracy, a 10.4-point absolute gain over fixed Best-of-5 self-consistency at a comparable solver-call budget and a 5.6-point gain over the strongest learned-context baseline, Tiered + GEPA. We also observe consistent gains on MATH-HARD and the verifiable subset of OlymMATH.

AI.tldr: KACE 通过将存储与使用分离，构建难度-领域分层的知识树，并利用分层自一致性动态分类问题难度，在数学推理任务上显著提升大语言模型性能，超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文工程方法在数学推理中存在上下文膨胀问题，且混淆了跨运行的存储与单问题的使用，导致提示长度天花板限制了可用的学习指导量。
AI.method: 离线阶段通过自反思学习循环将训练轨迹蒸馏为认知树（按难度和领域分层的知识卡片库）；推理阶段使用分层自一致性（含逐层一致性门控）动态将问题分类为易/中/难，仅困难问题检索对应分支的卡片。
AI.result: AIME 2025 上准确率达 62.2%，比固定 Best-of-5 自一致性提升 10.4 个绝对百分点，比最强基线 Tiered + GEPA 提升 5.6 个百分点；问题难度分类成对一致率达 78%。
AI.conclusion: KACE 有效解决了上下文膨胀问题，验证了难度-领域分层知识库与分层自一致性结合的有效性，在数学推理上取得显著且一致的提升。

title: Are Algorithm Registers Transparent? Perspectives from Germany
summary: Algorithm registers are public-facing databases that display basic information about algorithms employed in public administration. While several such registers exist across Europe and globally, their capacity to deliver meaningful transparency remains contested. In Germany, the landscape is notably fragmented: no federal-level register exists, yet at least five state- and federal-level initiatives publish information about AI systems with varying scopes and objectives. A recent conceptual proposal by Alina Lorenz (2025), outlines technical and governance requirements for a national AI transparency register in Germany. We repurpose this proposal as an audit instrument, extracting structured checklists from the transparency goals and subgoals it formulates. The resulting checklists, translated from German into English, is made publicly available to support practitioners auditing existing registers or designing new ones. We apply this framework to conduct an external audit of the two main existing German transparency initiatives, MaKI and Lernende Systeme, evaluating the extent to which they fulfill the proposed goals. Our audit reveals that several adaptations are likely needed for these registers to serve as an useful transparency instrument. We further propose a visualization of register transparency levels and derive concrete action items for improving existing German platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Lorenz (2025)提出的德国国家AI透明度登记概念框架，将其转化为审计工具，对德国现有的两个主要AI透明度登记系统（MaKI和Lernende Systeme）进行外部审计，发现它们在实现透明度目标方面存在不足，并提出了改进建议和可视化方案。
AI.motivation: 德国缺乏联邦层面的AI算法登记系统，现有州级和联邦级倡议在范围与目标上碎片化严重，这些登记系统能否真正实现有意义的透明度仍存争议。作者希望通过系统化审计来评估现有系统的实际表现。
AI.method: 将Lorenz (2025)的概念性提案转化为可操作的审计工具，从中提取结构化检查清单；然后将该清单应用于对MaKI和Lernende Systeme这两个德国主要透明度登记系统的外部审计，评估其在透明度目标上的完成度。
AI.result: 审计发现现有德国AI透明度登记系统需要进行多项调整才能成为真正有用的透明度工具；同时提出了登记透明度水平的分层可视化方案，并推导出改进现有平台的具体行动项。
AI.conclusion: 德国现有AI透明度登记在实现有意义的透明度方面存在明显不足，需要系统性的改进；本文提供的审计工具和可视化方法可以为实践者评估现有登记系统或设计新系统提供支持。

title: Benchmarking Realistic Synthetic Instances Against a Large-Scale District Heating Network: A Multi-Objective Optimization Study for Berlin
summary: Decarbonizing urban energy systems requires optimization approaches capable of handling the operational complexity of large-scale district heating networks. However, existing studies typically focus on a single real-world network, limiting comparability and the transferability of insights. To address this, realistic synthetic instances provide controlled, reproducible environments for testing optimization algorithms independent of specific case studies while preserving key structural and temporal characteristics of real systems. Such instances enable systematic benchmarking, methodological development, and comparative studies across algorithms and modeling choices. In this work, we generate a suite of large-scale synthetic instances for multi-objective optimization of district heating systems. The instances are openly available as network topologies in JSON format and as mixed-integer programs (MPS files) for benchmarking. They are constructed via a transparent procedure that allows reproduction, extension, and transfer to other network-based problems. We apply the method to Berlins district heating network, the most complex in Western Europe, formulating a tri-objective mixed-integer model for unit commitment over up to 25 years with 4-hour temporal resolution.
