Trained from scratch on over 450 GB of deduplicated and filtered mC4 and OSCAR23 from CulturaX using fairseq, PortBERT leverages byte-level BPE tokenization and stable pre-training routines across both GPU and TPU processors. We release two variants, PortBERT base and PortBERT large, and evaluate them on ExtraGLUE, a suite of translated GLUE and SuperGLUE tasks. Both models perform competitively, matching or surpassing existing monolingual and multilingual models. Beyond accuracy, we report training and inference times as well as fine-tuning throughput, providing practical insights into model efficiency. PortBERT thus complements prior work by addressing the underexplored dimension of compute-performance tradeoffs in Portuguese NLP. We release all models on Huggingface and provide fairseq checkpoints to support further research and applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PortBERT，一个面向葡萄牙语的RoBERTa模型家族，在450GB数据上训练，兼顾性能与效率，在ExtraGLUE上达到或超越现有模型，并公开了训练和推理效率数据。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语NLP模型多追求规模与精度，忽视了训练与部署的效率。现有工作缺乏对计算-性能折中的系统研究，PortBERT旨在弥补这一空白。
AI.method: 基于RoBERTa架构，使用fairseq在450GB经过去重和过滤的mC4与OSCAR23（CulturaX）数据上从头训练；采用byte-level BPE分词，支持GPU和TPU混合训练；发布base和large两个版本。
AI.result: 在ExtraGLUE（GLUE与SuperGLUE的翻译版）上，两个变体均达到或超越现有单语和多语言模型；同时给出了训练时间、推理时间和微调吞吐量等效率指标。
AI.conclusion: PortBERT证明了在葡萄牙语NLP中，通过精心设计可以在保持竞争性能的同时显著提升效率，为计算-性能折中提供了实用参考。模型已开源。

title: Coordination Graphs for Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted at the Reinforcement Learning Conference (RLC) 2026. 40 pages (12 main + 28 appendix), 5 figures, 16 tables, 7 theorems
summary: Constrained Multi-agent reinforcement learning (CMARL) faces two intertwined challenges: the joint action space grows exponentially with the number of agents, and additional requirements couple agents in ways that reward structure alone does not capture. We introduce Coordination Graphs for Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (CG-CMARL), a framework that addresses both challenges by combining coordination graphs with Lagrangian duality. The system decomposes the joint problem into pairwise regions, each served by a set of shared Q-functions, one for the primary objective and one for each of the constraints, so that the number of learned models is independent of the number of agents. At execution time, Max-Sum message passing coordinates actions across the factor graph, while a Lagrangian multiplier controls the objective--constraint tradeoff, allowing a single trained model to trace a Pareto front without retraining. We provide convergence guarantees under mild conditions, together with a compositional error bound that decomposes into separate interpretable sources, each traceable to a specific design choice and independently controllable. Experiments on cooperative navigation tasks (where teams of up to 10 agents must coordinate to reach target positions while satisfying pairwise constraints) show that our method produces Pareto fronts dominating established baselines trained at fixed reward-shaping ratios, while scaling to team sizes where centralized approaches become intractable.

AI.tldr: 提出了CG-CMARL框架，通过结合协调图与拉格朗日对偶性，解决了多智能体强化学习中联合动作空间爆炸和约束耦合两大挑战。该方法将问题分解为成对区域，使用共享Q函数和Max-Sum消息传递协调动作，并通过拉格朗日乘子控制目标-约束权衡，单个模型即可追踪帕累托前沿，无需重新训练。
AI.motivation: CMARL面临两个相互交织的挑战：智能体数量增加导致联合动作空间指数级增长，以及额外约束以奖励结构无法捕捉的方式耦合智能体。现有方法难以同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 将联合问题分解为成对区域，每个区域由一组共享Q函数（一个用于主要目标，一个用于每个约束）服务。执行时使用Max-Sum消息传递协调动作，并通过拉格朗日乘子控制目标-约束权衡，使单个模型无需重新训练即可追踪帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 在合作导航任务（最多10个智能体）中，该方法产生的帕累托前沿优于使用固定奖励塑造比例训练的基线方法，并且能够扩展到集中式方法无法处理的团队规模。
AI.conclusion: CG-CMARL提供了收敛保证和组合误差界限，误差可分解为可解释的来源并独立控制，在可扩展性和性能上均优于现有基线。

title: Lagrangian Perturbation Diffusion Steering: Latent Reinforcement Learning for Generative Policies
comment: Accepted as a regular paper at ICML 2026
summary: Behavior cloning with high-capacity generative policies achieves strong imitation performance, but is often limited by demonstration coverage and distribution shift. Direct reinforcement learning fine-tuning can improve performance, but updating large action decoders is frequently unstable and sample inefficient. We propose Lagrangian Perturbation Diffusion Steering (LP-DS), a lightweight adaptation method that improves a frozen generative policy by learning a compact noise-space perturbation before decoding. LP-DS optimizes this perturbation with a Lagrangian trust-region objective, improving downstream value while constraining deviation from the latent prior. Across RoboMimic manipulation, OpenAI Gym locomotion, and Adroit dexterous manipulation benchmarks, LP-DS improves sample efficiency, success, and return while maintaining higher action-space entropy than unconstrained noise-space steering, with return improvements of up to 25% over prior baselines. Additional evaluations with flow-matching backbones, a large vision-language-action model, and physical Franka deployment show that LP-DS is not limited to compact diffusion policies or simulated benchmarks. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/lp-ds/home.

AI.tldr: 提出LP-DS方法，通过在冻结的生成式策略的噪声空间学习轻量级扰动（带拉格朗日信任区域约束），显著提升模仿学习的性能、样本效率和稳定性，在多个基准和真实机器人上验证有效。
AI.motivation: 高容量生成式策略的行为克隆受限于演示覆盖和分布偏移，而直接强化学习微调大动作解码器不稳定且样本效率低。需要一种轻量级、稳定的适应方法。
AI.method: LP-DS：在冻结的生成式策略的解码前，学习一个紧凑的噪声空间扰动（Lagrangian信任区域优化），平衡下游价值提升与潜在先验约束。
AI.result: 在RoboMimic、OpenAI Gym、Adroit基准上，相比基线方法回报提升最高25%，样本效率、成功率更优，且保持更高动作空间熵。在流匹配骨干、VLA模型及真实Franka机器人上同样有效。
AI.conclusion: LP-DS是一种通用、轻量级的生成式策略微调方法，不限于扩散策略或仿真环境，在多种场景下均能稳定提升性能。

title: A Primer in Post-Training Reasoning Data: What We Know About How It Works
summary: Post-training has become a primary driver of recent progress in large reasoning models, and reasoning data are often the key variable determining whether this stage succeeds. Work on post-training reasoning data has grown rapidly, yet this literature remains scattered across dataset papers, reinforcement-learning recipes, reward-model studies, benchmarks, and frontier system reports. This paper is the first primer to synthesize over 150 key public studies and system reports on post-training reasoning data. We organize the field around four questions: what data objects exist, what makes them useful, how they are constructed, and how they scale. Together, this organization provides an attribution framework for future reasoning-data releases and post-training recipes.

AI.tldr: 本文是首篇关于后训练推理数据的综述，整理了150余项研究，围绕数据对象、有用性、构建方式和扩展性四个问题组织框架。
AI.motivation: 后训练已成为大型推理模型进步的主要驱动力，推理数据是关键变量，但相关研究分散于数据集、强化学习、奖励模型、基准测试和前沿系统报告等多个领域，缺乏系统性梳理。
AI.method: 综述了150余篇关键公开研究和系统报告，围绕四个核心问题（数据对象、有用性、构建方式、扩展性）组织知识体系，形成归因框架。
AI.result: 构建了一个关于后训练推理数据的系统性归因框架，为该领域的未来数据发布和后训练方案设计提供了参考。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统性地整合了分散的后训练推理数据研究，提出的四问题框架有助于推动该领域的标准化和进步。

title: SIRI: Self-Internalizing Reinforcement Learning with Intrinsic Skills for LLM Agent Training
summary: Long-horizon LLM agents can benefit from reusable skills, yet existing skill-based methods often rely on external skill generators during training or persistent skill retrieval at inference, increasing engineering complexity, context length, and deployment latency. We propose Self-Internalizing Reinforcement learning with Intrinsic skills (SIRI), a three-phase framework that enables agents to discover, validate, and internalize skills without external skill generators or inference-time skill banks. SIRI first warms up the policy with GiGPO to acquire basic interaction ability and collect successful skill-free trajectories. It then performs self-skill mining, where the current policy summarizes compact skills from its own successful plain rollouts and validates them through paired skill-augmented and skill-free rollouts. Finally, SIRI distills only beneficial skill-guided action tokens into the plain policy using trajectory-level utility and action-level advantage. At inference, the agent runs with the original prompt only. On ALFWorld and WebShop with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, SIRI improves GiGPO from 0.908 to 0.930 on ALFWorld and from 0.728 to 0.813 on WebShop, outperforming prompt-based, RL-based, and memory-augmented baselines. Further analysis shows that our self-mining strategy can achieve performance comparable to distillation with closed-source large model. Our code is available at https://github.com/kirito618/SIRI.

AI.tldr: 提出SIRI框架，让LLM智能体通过自我内化技能（无需外部技能生成器或推理时技能库）来提升长程任务表现，在ALFWorld和WebShop上超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于技能的LLM智能体方法依赖外部技能生成器（训练阶段）或推理时持续技能检索，增加了工程复杂度、上下文长度和部署延迟。作者希望让智能体自主发现、验证并内化技能，避免上述问题。
AI.method: 三阶段框架：（1）用GiGPO预热策略，收集无技能成功轨迹；（2）自我技能挖掘：从成功轨迹中总结技能，并通过成对的有技能/无技能推演验证技能效用；（3）技能蒸馏：使用轨迹级效用和动作级优势，将有益技能引导的动作token蒸馏到基础策略中。推理时仅需原始prompt。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld（0.908→0.930）和WebShop（0.728→0.813）上超越prompt-based、RL-based和memory-augmented基线；自我挖掘策略性能接近使用闭源大模型的蒸馏方法。
AI.conclusion: SIRI通过自我内化技能有效提升了LLM智能体的长程任务能力，无需外部技能库或推理时检索，降低了部署复杂度。

title: When Data Is Scarce: Scaling Sparse Language Models with Repeated Training
summary: Scaling laws for dense LLMs under infinite data are well explored, but how sparsity interacts with limited data is not. In this work, we study sparse training in data-constrained regimes where limited unique tokens require multi-epoch training. Our experiments span models up to 1.92B parameters in the fitting set, sparsity up to 93.75%, unique data budgets up to 2.6B tokens, and total training tokens up to 41.6B over 16 epochs; we further validate extrapolation on held-out dense-equivalent models up to 7.68B parameters. We find that: 1. Sparse scaling in data-limited settings: We introduce a scaling law that models loss as a function of active parameters, unique tokens, data repetition, and sparsity, accurately predicting performance across compute and data budgets. 2. Delayed data saturation: sparse training postpones diminishing returns from repeated data, making multi-epoch training more effective. 3. Resource trade-offs: With fixed data, loss-optimal sparsity is moderate ~ 50%, while compute-optimal sparsity is higher and grows with data scale. Overall, sparsity is not just a tool for efficiency, but a mechanism for improving scaling trade-offs under data scarcity. Our code is available at: https://github.com/boqian333/sparse-dc-scaling.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了数据受限场景下稀疏训练（Sparse Training）的扩展规律，发现稀疏性不仅提升效率，还能改善数据稀缺时的扩展权衡，并提出一个预测损失的新缩放定律。
AI.motivation: 现有密集大语言模型在无限数据下的缩放定律已被充分研究，但稀疏性在有限数据下的交互机制尚不明确，尤其在数据受限（需多轮训练）的场景中缺乏系统性研究。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验（模型最高1.92B参数，稀疏度93.75%，数据预算2.6B tokens，总训练41.6B tokens，16个epoch），并在7.68B参数的密集等价模型上验证外推；提出了一个以激活参数、唯一token数、数据重复次数和稀疏度为变量的缩放定律。
AI.result: 1. 提出了数据受限下的稀疏缩放定律，能准确预测性能；2. 稀疏训练延迟了重复数据带来的边际收益递减，使多epoch训练更有效；3. 固定数据下最优稀疏度约50%，而计算最优稀疏度更高且随数据规模增长。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏性不仅是提升效率的工具，更是数据稀缺下改进扩展权衡的机制。

title: Multilingual Idioms in Sentences and Conversations Across High-, Medium-, and Low-Resource Languages
summary: Idiomatic expressions pose a major challenge for multilingual NLP because their meanings shift between figurative and literal usage, often requiring context for accurate interpretation. Prior work has focused on high-resource languages typically evaluates isolated idiom-meaning questions, overlooking realistic discourse. We introduce MIDI, a multilingual idiom dataset spanning 3 high-, 3 medium-, and 12 low-resource languages, curated by native speakers. Unlike previous datasets, MIDI provides idioms embedded in both sentence-level and conversational contexts, capturing both literal and figurative readings. Benchmarking state-of-the-art models shows that idiom comprehension degrades in low-resource languages and that, in all resource tiers, literal interpretations are substantially harder than figurative ones. Conversational context improves performance but does not eliminate these disparities. Through controlled tests and interventions on hidden representations, we further separate memorization from reasoning, exposing core limitations of current models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIDI多语言习语数据集，覆盖18种语言（含12种低资源语言），在句子和对话上下文中标注习语的字面与比喻用法。实验发现：低资源语言理解更差、字面义比比喻义更难、对话上下文有帮助但不足以消除差距，并通过表征分析揭示了模型在记忆与推理上的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有习语理解研究多聚焦高资源语言，且通常在孤立的句子层面评估比喻义理解，缺乏对真实语篇（尤其对话语境）以及低资源语言的关注。作者希望填补这一空白，系统评估多语言模型在不同资源层级、不同语境类型下的习语理解能力。
AI.method: 1) 构建MIDI数据集：覆盖3种高资源、3种中资源、12种低资源语言，由母语者标注，包含句子级和对话级上下文，同时标注字面义与比喻义；2) 对多个SOTA多语言模型进行基准测试；3) 通过控制实验和隐藏表征干预，分离模型的记忆行为与推理能力。
AI.result: 1) 低资源语言上习语理解显著退化；2) 所有资源层级中，字面义理解比比喻义更难；3) 对话上下文能提升性能但无法消除资源层级间的差距；4) 控制测试和表征分析表明模型存在记忆与推理的分离，暴露了当前模型的根本局限。
AI.conclusion: 多语言模型在习语理解上存在严重的资源层级不平等和语义类型差异，现有模型尚不能真正推理习语含义，尤其是字面用法和低资源语言场景。需要更多关注低资源语言和多义性语境理解的建模。

title: MOC: Multi-Order Communication in LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Despite the remarkable progress of Large Language Model (LLM) based Multi-Agent Systems, most research focuses on optimizing coordination topology while largely underexploring the equally critical problem: how to transmit and optimize messages among agents effectively? Current communication schemes typically rely on the direct concatenation of first-order neighbor responses, which induces a restricted evidence receptive field and leads to the dilution of crucial insights over multi-hop paths. To address these limitations, we propose the Multi-Order Communication (MOC) scheme, which reconstructs the inter-agent communication to capture multi-hop dependencies and incorporates a structural message consolidation strategy to ensure efficiency. Specifically, we formalize the communication mechanism to construct a structured multi-order evidence stream, and subsequently design a Semantic-Topological Merging algorithm to optimize semantic fidelity within token constraints. Extensive experiments across six diverse datasets and LLM backbones of varying parameter scales demonstrate that MOC consistently improves task performance and reduces communication costs. The code is available at https://github.com/yao-guan/MOC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多阶通信(MOC)方案，通过重构智能体间通信以捕获多跳依赖关系，并采用结构化的消息合并策略，在降低通信成本的同时提升多智能体系统任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统主要关注协调拓扑优化，但忽略了智能体间如何有效传输和优化消息这一关键问题。当前方案仅简单拼接一阶邻居响应，导致证据感受野受限且多跳路径上关键信息被稀释。
AI.method: 提出MOC方案：(1) 形式化通信机制，构建结构化的多阶证据流；(2) 设计语义-拓扑合并算法，在token约束下优化语义保真度。
AI.result: 在六个数据集和不同规模LLM骨干上的实验表明，MOC持续提升了任务性能并降低了通信成本。
AI.conclusion: MOC有效解决了多智能体通信中证据感受野受限和信息稀释问题，证明了结构化多阶通信在性能提升和成本降低方面的优势。

title: Fairness in two-player zero-sum games with bandit feedback
summary: We study two-player zero-sum games (TPZSGs) with bandit feedback under fairness constraints requiring every action to be played with probability at least $α/m$. Existing instance-dependent results target $\textit{pure}$ Nash equilibria, while fairness generically produces $\textit{mixed}$ equilibria, a harder learning target. Our key technical tool is a reparametrization: every fair strategy decomposes as $p = (α/m)\mathbf{1} + (1-α)\widetilde{p}$ with $\widetilde{p} \in Δ_m$, and substituting into the payoff form yields $p^{\top}Aq = \widetilde{p}^{\top}\widetilde{A} q$ for a fair payoff matrix $\widetilde{A} := (1-α)A + α\mathbf{1} c^{\top}$, where $c_j = \tfrac{1}{m}\sum_i A(i,j)$ is the column-mean vector. The fair game on $A$ is then equivalent to a standard zero-sum game on $\widetilde{A}$, so equilibrium existence, KKT structure, and LP basis stability reduce to classical results applied to $\widetilde{A}$. We derive the fair minimax value, fair Nash equilibrium, fair regret, and a clean dual representation showing the price of fairness is at most $α(1-1/m)$ and vanishes whenever the unconstrained equilibrium already has full support. Our main result is an $\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$ regret bound for an Explore-Then-Commit algorithm, $\texttt{Fair-ETC-TPZSG}$, applicable to general mixed fair equilibria, together with a discussion of why naive action elimination does not readily improve it. When the fair equilibrium has a single dominant action, equivalently when $\widetilde{p}^{\star}$ is a vertex of $Δ_m$, the bound sharpens to instance-dependent $\widetilde{O}(1/\widetildeΔ(α)^{2})$, where $\widetildeΔ(α)$ is the LP-margin gap.

AI.tldr: 本文研究带公平约束的两人零和博弈，通过重参数化将公平博弈转化为标准零和博弈，提出Fair-ETC-TPZSG算法，获得$\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$遗憾界，在均衡具有主导动作时可改进为实例相关的$\widetilde{O}(1/\widetilde{\Delta}(\alpha)^{2})$。
AI.motivation: 现有两人零和博弈的实例相关结果针对纯纳什均衡，但公平约束通常产生混合均衡，学习难度更大。
AI.method: 提出重参数化技巧：公平策略分解为$p = (\alpha/m)\mathbf{1} + (1-\alpha)\widetilde{p}$，将公平博弈转化为标准零和博弈在$\widetilde{A}$上的形式，进而利用经典理论分析均衡存在性、KKT结构和LP基稳定性。
AI.result: 导出公平最小最大值、公平纳什均衡、公平遗憾以及公平代价的上界$\alpha(1-1/m)$；提出Fair-ETC-TPZSG算法，获得$\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$遗憾界；当均衡有主导动作时，改进为$\widetilde{O}(1/\widetilde{\Delta}(\alpha)^{2})$。
AI.conclusion: 通过重参数化将公平约束下的混合均衡学习问题简化为标准零和博弈，为分析公平博弈提供了新工具，并给出了相应算法与理论保证。

title: On the Salience of Low-Probability Tokens for AI-Generated Text Detection: A Multiscale Uncertainty Perspective
summary: AI-generated text increasingly blends with human writing, raising practical risks such as misinformation, academic misuse, and corpora contamination. While statistical detectors are appealing for efficiency and generalization, they suffer from two key limitations. (i) Boilerplate dominance, boilerplate tokens shared across human and LLM writing can overwhelm discriminative signals. (ii) Brittle point estimates, relying on a single probability score yields unstable decisions under adversarial manipulations. To address these issues, we propose Uncertainty, a multiscale uncertainty estimator that focuses on informative low-probability tokens, which more clearly expose distributional discrepancies. Locally, it alleviates boilerplate dominance by averaging the log-probabilities of low-probability tokens; globally, it reduces brittleness by capturing the distributional shape of this low-probability region via Rényi entropy. We further extend the detector to Uncertainty++ via conditional independent sampling, yielding a more stable uncertainty estimation. Experiments across seven datasets and sixteen LLMs demonstrate high effectiveness, generalization, and robustness. Our code is available at https://github.com/guoyikai2000/Uncertainty-AIGT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Uncertainty，一种基于多尺度不确定性估计的AI生成文本检测方法，通过关注低概率token的分布差异来缓解模板词主导和点估计脆弱性问题，在多个数据集和LLM上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有统计检测器存在两个关键局限：(i)模板词主导——人类和LLM共有的高频模板词掩盖了判别信号；(ii)脆弱的点估计——依赖单一概率分数导致对抗攻击下不稳定。
AI.method: 提出Uncertainty多尺度不确定性估计器：局部上，通过平均低概率token的对数概率来缓解模板词主导；全局上，利用Rényi熵捕捉低概率区域的分布形状以降低脆性。进一步通过条件独立采样扩展为Uncertainty++以获得更稳定的估计。
AI.result: 在7个数据集和16个LLM上的实验表明，该方法具有高有效性、良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 关注低概率token（而非高频模板词）能更有效地暴露AI与人类文本的分布差异，多尺度不确定性估计为AIGT检测提供了一种高效、泛化且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: COMAP: Co-Evolving World Models and Agent Policies for LLM Agents
summary: Equipping language agents with world models enables them to anticipate environment dynamics and evaluate candidate actions before execution. However, existing textual world models are typically fixed after training, preventing them from adapting to the on-policy state-action distributions induced by an evolving agent. Meanwhile, agent-improvement methods often rely on external rewards or verifiers, limiting their applicability in realistic interactive environments. In this paper, we propose COMAP, a novel framework that co-evolves textual world models and agent policies through closed-loop interaction. At each decision step, the world model predicts future state feedback for candidate actions, and the agent performs future-aware reflection by estimating the reliability of this feedback and refining its action accordingly. The resulting on-policy trajectories are then used to update the world model via self-distillation, allowing it to better match the agent's evolving interaction distribution. Across embodied task planning, Web navigation, and tool-use benchmarks, COMAP consistently outperforms competitive baselines, e.g., +16.75% relative improvement with Qwen3-4B. Further analyses show that the co-evolutionary loop improves the world model's prediction accuracy over time and leads to more effective long-horizon decision-making. Our code is available at: https://github.com/loyiv/CoMAP.

AI.tldr: COMAP提出通过闭环交互共同进化文本世界模型和智能体策略，使世界模型能适应智能体不断变化的交互分布，并在具身任务规划、Web导航和工具使用基准上取得显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有文本世界模型训练后固定不变，无法适应演化中智能体带来的on-policy状态-动作分布变化；同时智能体改进方法通常依赖外部奖励或验证器，在真实交互环境中受限。
AI.method: 提出COMAP框架：每个决策步，世界模型预测候选动作的未来状态反馈，智能体通过估计反馈可靠性进行未来感知反思来优化动作；产生的on-policy轨迹通过自蒸馏更新世界模型，使其更好匹配智能体演化的交互分布。
AI.result: 在具身任务规划、Web导航和工具使用基准上，COMAP持续优于竞争基线，如基于Qwen3-4B获得+16.75%的相对提升。共同进化循环随时间提升世界模型的预测准确性，并带来更有效的长程决策。
AI.conclusion: 共同进化世界模型和智能体策略的闭环交互范式有效解决了世界模型分布不匹配问题，无需外部奖励即可实现自适应改进，为交互式智能体学习提供了新方向。

title: CRAFTQA: A Code-Driven Adaptive Framework for Complex Structured Data Reasoning
summary: Real-world scenarios involve massive heterogeneous structured data (e.g., tables, knowledge graphs), making effective reasoning over such diverse data increasingly important. Unified structured data question answering has emerged as a prominent research trend, aiming to answer natural language questions across different structured data types within a single framework. However, existing unified methods share a common limitation: they rely on a set of predefined functions, which restricts their ability to perform complex reasoning beyond these predefined operations. To overcome this fundamental limitation, we propose CRAFTQA, a novel adaptive code-driven framework comprising two core modules, CodeSTEP and CRAFT. The CodeSTEP module is a paradigm that generates a complete executable Python code sequence, which contains step-by-step code-based reasoning operations based on the question. The CRAFT module dynamically generates custom code functions for operations beyond the predefined function set, and seamlessly integrates with CodeSTEP to significantly enhance flexibility in handling complex reasoning. Comprehensive experiments on multiple structured datasets demonstrate that CRAFTQA achieves remarkable improvements in complex reasoning scenarios compared to existing unified methods.

AI.tldr: 提出CRAFTQA框架，通过动态生成Python代码（CodeSTEP模块）和自定义函数（CRAFT模块）来突破预定义函数的限制，实现跨异构结构化数据的复杂推理问答。
AI.motivation: 现有统一结构化数据问答方法依赖预定义函数集，无法处理超出预定义范围的复杂推理操作。
AI.method: 提出CRAFTQA框架，包含CodeSTEP（生成可执行Python代码序列进行逐步推理）和CRAFT（动态生成自定义代码函数，补充预定义函数之外的推理操作）两个核心模块。
AI.result: 在多个结构化数据集上的实验表明，CRAFTQA在复杂推理场景下相比现有统一方法取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 代码驱动的自适应框架能有效突破预定义函数的表达能力限制，提升对异构结构化数据的复杂推理能力。

title: Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses
summary: Search agents are often trained as policies over growing transcripts: the model must decide how to search while also remembering what it has seen, which evidence is useful, which constraints remain open, and which claims have actually been checked. We argue that this formulation puts too much routine state management inside the policy: reinforcement learning is forced to optimize both semantic search decisions and recoverable bookkeeping that the environment can maintain more reliably. We introduce Harness-1, a 20B search agent (retrieval subagent) trained with reinforcement learning inside a stateful search harness. The harness maintains environment-side working memory, including a candidate pool, an importance-tagged curated set, compact evidence links, verification records, compressed and deduplicated observations, and budget-aware context rendering. The policy retains the semantic decisions: what to search, which documents to keep or discard, what to verify, and when to stop. Across eight retrieval benchmarks spanning web, finance, patents, and multi-hop QA, Harness-1 achieves 0.730 average curated recall, outperforming the next strongest open search subagent by +11.4 points and remaining competitive with much larger frontier-model searchers. Its gains are especially strong on held-out transfer benchmarks, suggesting that reinforcement learning over explicit search state can produce retrieval behaviors that generalize beyond the training domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/pat-jj/harness-1.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Harness-1，一个20B参数搜索智能体，通过在状态化搜索框架内进行强化学习训练，将常规记账状态管理从策略中分离到环境侧，在8个检索基准上平均curated recall达0.730，比最强开源搜索子智能体高11.4个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有搜索智能体将策略训练为递增转录本上的决策策略，导致强化学习被迫同时优化语义搜索决策和可恢复的记账状态管理，后者本可由环境更可靠地维护。作者认为这种配方将过多常规状态管理放在策略内部，增加了不必要的学习负担。
AI.method: 提出Harness-1架构，包含：(1) 环境侧搜索框架（harness），维护候选池、重要性标记的策展集、证据链接、验证记录、压缩去重观测以及预算感知上下文渲染；(2) 策略仍负责语义决策：搜索什么、保留或丢弃哪些文档、验证什么以及何时停止。使用强化学习（20B参数）进行训练。
AI.result: 在8个检索基准上平均curated recall达0.730，比最强开源搜索子智能体高11.4个百分点。与更大规模的SOTA搜索模型相比保持竞争力，在留出迁移基准上表现尤为突出，表明强化学习结合显式搜索状态可泛化到训练领域之外。
AI.conclusion: 将记账状态管理从策略转移到环境侧，让强化学习专注于语义搜索决策，可以产生更强大且泛化能力更强的检索行为。Harness-1证明了这一思路的有效性，代码已开源。

title: Temporal Motif Signatures for Temporal Graph Neural Networks
summary: Real temporal interaction streams carry predictive structure in short-horizon motif patterns -- repetition, reciprocity, star diversity, triadic flow -- that vanilla temporal graph neural networks (TGNNs) often fail to expose to their edge scorers. We show this concretely on MOOC interaction prediction, where a small four-feature family of past-window star counts already delivers most of the lift over a strong static GNN. Across a wide set of real and synthetic temporal datasets we find that motif activity organizes consistently along three scale-stable axes (dyadic recency/reciprocity, star diversity, triadic flow), and we use this empirical structure to design a compact 13-coordinate, leakage-safe, candidate-local motif feature map h(u, v, t) that linearly embeds into any static or temporal encoder without architectural changes. A temporal Weisfeiler-Leman (WL) analysis places the augmentation relative to the first level of an anchored temporal-WL hierarchy and exhibits a candidate-anchored pair on which motif features distinguish. We demonstrate empirically that the same augmentation consistently lifts performance across heterogeneous tasks: TGB link-property prediction across all five baselines, edge classification on Bitcoin Alpha/OTC and MOOC, and graph-level classification of synthetic temporal generators.

AI.tldr: 本文发现时序图神经网络在捕捉短期循环模式（如重复、互惠、星形多样性、三元流）方面存在不足，提出了一种轻量级的13维 motif 特征映射，可嵌入任意静态或时序编码器，显著提升多种任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有TGNN无法有效暴露时间交互流中蕴含的短期motif模式（如重复、互惠等）给边缘评分器，导致预测性能受限。
AI.method: 通过实证发现motif活动沿三个尺度稳定的轴（二元时效/互惠、星形多样性、三元流）组织，设计了13维、无泄漏、候选局部化的motif特征映射h(u,v,t)，可线性嵌入任意静态或时序编码器。
AI.result: 在TGB链接属性预测任务上对所有五种基线一致提升，在Bitcoin Alpha/OTC和MOOC的边缘分类任务上表现优异，在图级分类任务上也有效。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的轻量级motif特征增强方法可广泛适用于不同架构的图神经网络，在不改变模型结构的前提下持续提升性能。

title: Cross-Environment Neural Reranking for Sample-Efficient Action Selection in Text-Based Agents
summary: Large language model agents achieve strong performance on text-based benchmarks but incur prohibitive inference costs, motivating the use of compact neural rerankers for action selection. We investigate whether a single lightweight model can perform action selection across multiple diverse environments, a capability that would eliminate per-environment model maintenance. Training DeBERTa-v3 (184M-434M parameters) jointly on ALFWorld, WebShop, and ScienceWorld with minority-class upsampling, we find that rebalanced two-environment joint training substantially improves over single-environment ALFWorld performance (net gain +0.412) while maintaining competitive WebShop performance (+0.214 vs. +0.249 single-environment). Three-environment training yields a mean combined net gain of +0.551 +/- 0.024 across 4 seeds, with per-environment results approaching specialized single-environment models while providing positive cross-domain transfer. Cross-environment adaptation is highly sample-efficient: fine-tuning on only 9.2% of target-domain data recovers 93% of full-data performance, and scaling model capacity yields limited benefits, indicating data diversity is the primary driver. Environment-aware LoRA adapter routing with PCGrad achieves a best-seed result of +0.611 (seed 42), with seeds 456 and 789 at +0.554 and +0.559, but exhibits high variance due to seed 123 collapsing to +0.263 (4-seed mean +0.497 +/- 0.158), representing a promising but currently unstable direction. Joint training with clean splits and data rebalancing is a key ingredient. We will release our three-environment benchmark of 51,580 training instances (41,740 raw unique states with minority-class upsampling) and all model checkpoints upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用轻量级神经网络排序器（DeBERTa-v3）替代大语言模型代理进行跨环境动作选择，通过联合训练和少数类上采样，实现多环境下的高效迁移，三环境联合训练平均净增益+0.551，且跨环境适应仅需9.2%目标域数据即可恢复93%性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型代理在文本基准任务上表现优异，但推理成本过高。为降低推理成本并消除为每个环境单独维护模型的负担，研究者希望验证一个轻量级模型能否跨多个异构环境执行动作选择。
AI.method: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和ScienceWorld三个环境上联合训练DeBERTa-v3（184M-434M参数），采用少数类上采样和干净数据集拆分。进一步探索了环境感知的LoRA适配器路由结合PCGrad梯度投影方法。
AI.result: 两环境联合训练相较单环境ALFWorld净增益+0.412。三环境联合训练4种种子平均净增益+0.551±0.024。跨环境微调仅需9.2%目标域数据即可恢复93%性能。LoRA+PCGrad方法最佳种子+0.611，但存在较高方差（种子123仅+0.263）。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练搭配数据重平衡是实现跨环境动作选择的关键要素，数据多样性相比模型容量是更主要的性能驱动因素。

title: Spatial Representation Learning Beyond Pixels: Unifying Raster Data and Vector Semantics for Human-Centric Geospatial Foundation Models
summary: Earth Observation (EO) has fundamentally transformed the monitoring of environmental processes and human activities up to planetary scale. Recent advances in self-supervised learning have given rise to Earth Observation Foundation Models (EOFMs), which leverage petabyte-scale unlabeled EO data to learn transferable representations across a wide range of downstream geospatial tasks. Despite these advances, current EOFMs remain largely confined to raster modalities, overlooking the rich, structured information encoded in openly-accessible vector data sources such as OpenStreetMap and Overture. Vector data provides explicit and compact representations of geographic entities, including geometry, topology, and semantic relationships, offering critical contextual signals that are often ambiguous or inaccessible in imagery alone. Raster and vector data thus represent complementary views of geographic space: raster data captures continuous physical and spectral patterns, while vector data encodes discrete objects and their relational structure and often represents more of the human rather than the physical systems (e.g. social or demographic data). However, existing geospatial representation learning paradigms treat these modalities in isolation, relying on imperfect and often lossy transformations to bridge them. This perspective paper calls for a paradigm shift toward joint Spatial Representation Learning (SRL) in an unified embedding space that integrate raster perception with vector-based reasoning. Building on emerging efforts in multimodal geospatial learning, we highlight conceptual foundations, technical challenges, and promising directions for aligning heterogeneous spatial data sources. We contend that such integration is essential for developing next-generation geospatial AI systems capable of more accurate, interpretable, and semantically grounded understanding of the Earth.

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁将遥感影像（栅格数据）与矢量数据（如OpenStreetMap）统一到联合嵌入空间中进行空间表征学习，以突破当前地球观测基础模型仅处理栅格数据的局限，推动下一代地理空间AI发展。
AI.motivation: 现有地球观测基础模型（EOFMs）仅处理栅格数据，忽略了矢量数据中丰富的几何、拓扑和语义信息，导致两种互补数据模态孤立学习，无法充分捕捉地理空间的物理特征与人类活动信号。
AI.method: 提出联合空间表征学习（SRL）范式，构建统一的嵌入空间，整合栅格感知与矢量推理，通过多模态地理空间学习方法对齐异构空间数据源。
AI.result: 指出了概念基础、技术挑战和有前景的方向，但本文为观点性论文，尚未提供实验验证结果。
AI.conclusion: 栅格-矢量联合表征是实现更准确、可解释、语义扎实的地理空间AI的关键路径，呼吁社区推动范式转变。

title: Physics-Informed Deep Learning for Entropy Prediction in Heterogeneous Systems: Thermodynamic and Information-Theoretic Case Studies
summary: Entropy production governs irreversibility and uncertainty in both physical and information-theoretic systems. While Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) successfully solve differential equations, current architectures remain inherently domain-specific. The extraction of domain-invariant entropy representations across fundamentally different physical laws remains unexplored. This paper introduces a unified Physics-Informed Deep Learning (PIDL) framework that simultaneously enforces differential equation residuals and information-theoretic bounds within a single neural architecture. We demonstrate this framework via two canonical studies: (i) a thermodynamic continuous stirred-tank reactor (CSTR) model solving governing ODEs, where a Softplus constraint strictly enforces the Second Law of Thermodynamics; and (ii) an information-theoretic financial market model solving the inverse Fokker-Planck PDE to infer latent drift and diffusion coefficients, guaranteeing diffusion positivity via a Softplus constraint while naturally inducing Shannon entropy. Three model variants are evaluated: two domain-specific baselines and one shared-encoder architecture. The PIDL framework guarantees absolute thermodynamic admissibility with zero Second-Law violations and exhibits exceptional data efficiency, retaining >90% predictive accuracy using merely 30% of available training data. Furthermore, a post-hoc Ruppeiner Riemannian geometric analysis of the learned entropy surface successfully identifies thermodynamic phase instabilities. This methodology provides a robust, domain-agnostic architecture for physics-constrained entropy modeling, advancing applications in sustainable process design and quantitative financial risk assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一物理信息深度学习框架，同时在热力学CSTR模型（Softplus约束保证第二定律）和金融Fokker-Planck模型中强制执行微分方程残差与信息论界，实现领域无关的熵建模，在30%数据下保持>90%预测精度，并用Ruppeiner几何分析识别热力学相不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有PINN架构是领域特定的，提取跨物理定律的领域不变熵表示尚未被探索。
AI.method: 提出统一的PIDL框架，在单一神经架构中同时强制执行微分方程残差和信息论界；分别用Softplus约束热力学第二定律和扩散系数正定性；采用两种领域特定基线与一种共享编码器架构进行对比。
AI.result: 零第二定律违规，绝对热力学可容许性；仅用30%训练数据即保持>90%预测精度；后验Ruppeiner几何分析成功识别相不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了鲁棒、领域无关的物理约束熵建模方法，可应用于可持续过程设计与定量金融风险评估。

title: Consistency Training while Mitigating Obfuscation via Rate Matching
summary: Large language models are often influenced by extraneous input features, such as cues revealing a user's preferred answer. Consistency training reduces this influence by training models to behave similarly across inputs with and without the extraneous feature. However, existing methods train for consistency over entire responses or internal activations, which also constrains whether the model verbalises said extraneous features. We show this leads to obfuscation, where the model learns not to mention a cue while remaining influenced by it, which may undermine monitorability. To address this, we introduce Rate Matching Consistency Training (RMCT), which trains for consistency over selected behavioural properties without constraining how this behaviour is expressed. RMCT matches the rate at which the model exhibits a target behaviour (e.g., following a bias cue) across input perturbations, rather than requiring paired inputs with and without the extraneous feature, extending consistency training to settings where the extraneous features cannot be removed. We evaluate RMCT on sycophancy reduction in two open-weight language models, achieving reductions in bias-following comparable to a standard consistency-training baseline on held-out bias types, while largely preserving the model's tendency to verbalise the bias cue. Further, we find that RMCT is more data-efficient at the expense of being less compute-efficient in our experiments. Overall, RMCT shows that consistency training can improve behavioural robustness without directly trading off against monitorability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Rate Matching Consistency Training (RMCT)，通过匹配行为比率而非完整输出的一致性来减少大语言模型受无关输入特征（如偏见过度提示）的影响，在降低偏见跟随的同时保留模型对偏见的表达能力，从而避免传统一致性训练导致的模糊化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的一致性训练方法通过在有无无关特征（如用户偏好提示）的输入上训练模型保持行为一致，但这会迫使模型不再提及这些无关特征，导致"模糊化"（obfuscation）——模型虽不提及提示但仍受其影响，削弱了模型行为的可监控性。
AI.method: RMCT不要求成对输入，而是通过匹配模型在有无无关特征扰动下表现出目标行为（如跟随偏见）的**比率**（rate）来训练。具体做法是计算模型在有/无偏见提示时展现偏见的概率，并优化使这两个比率接近，而不约束模型在具体表达方式上的一致性。
AI.result: 在两种开源大模型上的sycophancy（迎合偏见）减少实验中，RMCT在降低偏见跟随方面达到与标准一致性训练基线相当的水平，并且更好地保留了模型对偏见提示的语言表达能力。实验还发现RMCT更数据高效但计算效率较低。
AI.conclusion: RMCT证明一致性训练可以在不牺牲可监控性的前提下提升行为鲁棒性，为平衡模型安全性与透明性提供了新思路。

title: A Mathematical Conflict Framework for Contextual Data Modulation
summary: In this study, a generalized operator-based mathematical conflict framework is presented to explicitly represent structural discrepancies between raw data and contextual data. The proposed structure treats conflict as a local, directional, and context-sensitive quantity, integrating components such as weighting, scale behavior, and output mapping under a unified abstract operator. Without being reduced to a specific learning algorithm or optimization method, the framework is defined as a general structure adaptable to different classes of problems. While existing approaches typically treat conflict merely as an implicit side effect embedded within the optimization process, the proposed framework considers conflict as an independent, operator-based, and component-level mathematical object.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于广义算子的数学冲突框架，将冲突显式建模为局部、方向性和上下文敏感的独立数学对象，而非优化过程中的隐式副产品。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将冲突视为优化过程中隐含的副作用，缺乏对冲突的显式表达和独立建模，无法灵活适应不同问题。
AI.method: 提出基于广义算子的数学冲突框架，将冲突定义为局部、方向性、上下文敏感的量，整合权重、尺度行为、输出映射等组件于统一抽象算子下，不依赖特定学习算法或优化方法。
AI.result: 该框架可作为通用结构适配不同问题类别，将冲突提升为独立的、基于算子的、组件级的数学对象。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为冲突提供了显式、可泛化的数学表达，有望在多种任务中替代隐式冲突处理方式。

title: Linear Strategic Classification with Endogenous Improvements
summary: Strategic classification studies settings in which agents respond to a deployed classifier by modifying observable features at a cost. Classical models typically treat such responses as cosmetic: features may change, but true labels remain fixed. We study an improvement-aware variant in which strategic responses can induce genuine changes in outcome-relevant features. Agents choose post-deployment feature vectors strategically, and labels are then generated according to a stable conditional outcome law that preserves the relationship between features and outcomes. We formalize this problem for linear classifiers under a single-index qualification model and linear-decomposable costs. We show that the strategic-optimal classifier is obtained by a parallel shift of the Bayes-optimal decision boundary, and that it provides a better surrogate for the improvement-aware objective than the Bayes classifier. Since improvement-aware learning requires post-deployment labels, which are typically unavailable before deployment, we provide PAC-style guar- antees under an oracle model, propose a practical plug-in algorithm, establish its generalization bound, and evaluate it on synthetic and real-world datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种改进感知的策略分类问题，其中智能体的策略性行为能引发真实特征改善，而不仅仅是表面变化。作者在线性分类器和单指标资格模型下，证明了策略最优分类器是贝叶斯最优决策边界的平行偏移，并提出了实用算法与泛化保证。
AI.motivation: 传统策略分类假设智能体的响应是表面性的（特征变化但真实标签不变），忽略了策略性行为可能带来的真实改善。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究策略分类中智能体的改进行为如何影响最优分类器的设计。
AI.method: 论文在线性分类器、单指标资格模型和线性可分解成本的框架下形式化问题。推导出策略最优分类器是贝叶斯最优决策边界的平行偏移。在Oracle模型下提供PAC风格保证，提出实用的plug-in算法并建立泛化界。
AI.result: 策略最优分类器可通过对贝叶斯决策边界进行平行偏移得到；该分类器比贝叶斯分类器更优地逼近改进感知目标；提出的plug-in算法在合成和真实数据集上均有效。
AI.conclusion: 改进感知策略分类需要后部署标签，作者通过Oracle模型和PAC保证解决这一难题，为实际应用提供了理论支撑和可行算法。

title: Do Gender Cues Affect LLM Value Trade-offs? Evidence from a Controlled Decision Benchmark
summary: Large language models are increasingly used in value-sensitive decision settings, where irrelevant demographic cues should not alter judgments. We construct the Realistic Value Decision Benchmark (RVDB), a controlled benchmark that varies only the role-gender configuration while holding the scenario, ordered value pair, roles, candidate decisions, Value Distance, and Decision Severity fixed. Using a position-balanced evaluation across seven models, we test whether models preserve decision invariance under gender perturbations and whether their self-attributions reflect observed behavioral changes. We find that explicit gender cues induce bounded but systematic decision flips, including under an explicit gender-attribution prompt that asks models to report whether gender influenced their choice. Cross-gender role swaps reveal a consistent female-proposed-decision asymmetry, while models often attribute flipped decisions to No Influence or other non-gender factors. Further analysis shows that gender effects concentrate near less determinate value boundaries and under more severe decision contexts, suggesting that gender cues act as local boundary-shifting factors rather than global overrides of value reasoning. Value rankings remain largely stable, but ordered value-pair trade-offs shift unevenly across role-gender configurations. These results show that gender can enter LLM value trade-offs behaviorally while remaining obscured in self-attribution, motivating controlled behavioral audits beyond explanation-based evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了真实价值决策基准（RVDB），通过仅改变角色性别配置而控制其他变量，测试了大语言模型在价值敏感决策中是否受到性别线索的影响。发现性别线索会导致有限但系统性的决策翻转，且模型在自我归因中常否认性别影响，表明性别以隐性方式影响LLM的价值权衡。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型越来越多地应用于价值敏感决策场景，其中无关的人口统计线索（如性别）不应改变判断。然而，现有研究缺乏对性别线索如何影响LLM价值推理的系统性评估，尤其缺乏在控制其他变量条件下对决策不变性的严格测试。
AI.method: 构建了Realistic Value Decision Benchmark (RVDB)，该基准在保持场景、有序价值对、角色、候选决策、价值距离和决策严重性固定的前提下，仅改变角色性别配置。采用位置平衡评估方式，在7个模型上进行测试，并引入显式性别归因提示来检查模型的自我归因。
AI.result: 1) 显式性别线索导致有限但系统性的决策翻转，即使在显式性别归因提示下也是如此；2) 跨性别角色互换揭示了一致的"女性提议决策不对称性"；3) 模型常将翻转决策归因于"无影响"或其他非性别因素；4) 性别效应集中在价值边界不明确和决策语境更严重的场景；5) 价值排名基本稳定，但有序价值对之间的权衡在不同角色性别配置下呈现不均匀变化。
AI.conclusion: 性别能够以行为层面进入LLM的价值权衡，但在自我归因层面被掩盖。这促使我们需要超越基于解释的评估，采用受控的行为审计来检测模型中的隐性偏见。

title: AgentPLM: Agentic Protein Language Models with Reasoning-Augmented Decoding for Protein Sequence Design
summary: Protein language models (PLMs) are passive oracles: they generate sequences in a single forward pass with no mechanism to consult external biophysical feedback or redirect generation when a candidate violates thermodynamic or structural constraints. We introduce AgentPLM, which addresses this by equipping a pre-trained PLM with i) Reasoning-Augmented Decoding (RAD), which interleaves autoregressive generation with tool calls (ESMFold, FoldX, AutoDock Vina), and ii) Contrastive Agent Policy Optimisation (CAPO), a trajectory-level extension of direct preference optimisation that trains the policy end-to-end to learn when oracle feedback is informative rather than merely imitating high-fitness sequences. We evaluate AgentPLM on benchmark tasks spanning de novo enzyme design, antibody optimisation, thermostability, PPI interface design, and zero-shot fitness prediction with standardised oracle APIs and controlled sequence-identity splits. AgentPLM achieves state-of-the-art results with a gain in antibody top-10% hit rate over the strongest passive baseline, providing mechanistic evidence of online error correction without explicit backtracking.

AI.tldr: AgentPLM是一个将蛋白质语言模型与外部生物物理工具（ESMFold, FoldX, AutoDock Vina）结合的多智能体框架，通过推理增强解码（RAD）和对比智能体策略优化（CAPO）实现序列生成过程中的实时反馈校正，在酶设计、抗体优化等任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有蛋白质语言模型是"被动预言机"，生成序列时无法咨询外部生物物理反馈，导致可能产出违反热力学或结构约束的候选序列。
AI.method: 提出AgentPLM框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 推理增强解码（RAD），在自回归生成过程中交替调用外部工具（ESMFold、FoldX、AutoDock Vina）；2) 对比智能体策略优化（CAPO），基于轨迹级别的直接偏好优化训练策略端到端学习何时利用预言机反馈。
AI.result: 在从头酶设计、抗体优化、热稳定性、PPI界面设计和零样本适应性预测等任务上取得SOTA结果，抗体top-10%命中率相比最强被动基线有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AgentPLM提供了在线错误校正的机制性证据，无需显式回溯即可实现生成过程的实时约束感知，证明了将外部生物物理工具集成到蛋白质语言模型生成过程中的有效性。

title: Better with Experience: Self-Evolving LLM Agents for Evidence-Grounded Health Community Notes
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-augmented Community Notes offer a scalable path for timely, evidence-grounded correction of health misinformation on social platforms. However, they still reset at every post, leaving useful correction experience from prior cases unused. We introduce EvoNote, an agentic framework that enables health Community Notes generation to self-evolve through an evolving experience memory of prior misinformation correction episodes. Its core is fine-grained credit assignment: EvoNote grounds trajectory-level feedback in health-specific note qualities and distills it into action-level memory for claim analysis, evidence acquisition, and note writing. We evaluate EvoNote on MM-HealthCN, a 1.2K-instance multimodal benchmark of user-flagged health posts with human-written Community Notes and crowd-derived helpfulness labels. Under a human-validated hierarchical utility judge, EvoNote-generated notes are preferred over corresponding human-written notes in 89.6% of cases; on a separate set of Needs More Ratings posts without a crowd helpfulness verdict, EvoNote produces helpful notes for 82.0% of cases. It also reduces the median time needed to produce a candidate correction from over 13 hours in the human-note pipeline to under 2 minutes. Analyses link these gains to stronger evidence use and reusable correction strategies, positioning self-evolving note generation as a promising paradigm for health misinformation governance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoNote框架，通过演化经验记忆使健康社区笔记生成能够自我进化，在健康错误信息纠正中显著优于人类撰写的笔记（89.6%偏好率），并将生成时间从13小时缩短至2分钟以内。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM增强社区笔记虽能纠正健康错误信息，但每次发布都重新开始，无法利用先前纠正案例中的有效经验，缺乏自我进化能力。
AI.method: 提出EvoNote智能体框架，核心为细粒度信用分配：将轨迹级反馈归因到健康特定的笔记质量上，并蒸馏为行动级记忆，用于声明分析、证据获取和笔记撰写三个环节的自我进化。
AI.result: 在MM-HealthCN基准（1.2K多模态实例）上，EvoNote生成的笔记在89.6%案例中优于人类笔记；在无众包标签的新帖中，82.0%生成有帮助笔记；中位生成时间从13小时降至2分钟。
AI.conclusion: EvoNote通过更强的证据使用和可复用的纠正策略，将自我进化的笔记生成定位为健康错误信息治理的有前景范式。

title: Bridging the Sim-to-Real Gap in Semiconductor Visual Program Synthesis via Input Binarization
summary: Precise parametric control over circuit geometry is essential for semiconductor inspection, yet obtaining sufficient real training data remains costly. Although generative models such as diffusion models and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can augment training data, they cannot guarantee the nanometer-scale geometric accuracy required for metrology tasks. We propose a visual program synthesis framework in which a Vision-Language Model (VLM) converts inspection images into editable Domain-Specific Language (DSL) code describing circuit geometries, enabling controlled generation of training data with exact parameter manipulation. Because the VLM is trained solely on synthetic DSL-rendered data, a domain gap arises when processing real Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) images. We bridge this gap with an input binarization strategy that strips SEM-specific texture and noise, letting the model focus on geometric structure. On the MIIC dataset, binarized inputs improve the mean Dice coefficient from 0.4393 to 0.5256 over the raw-input baseline, demonstrating that simple texture abstraction substantially mitigates the sim-to-real gap.

AI.tldr: 提出视觉程序合成框架，利用VLM将SEM图像转为DSL代码实现可控训练数据生成，通过输入二值化策略缩小仿真到真实的领域差距，在MIIC数据集上Dice系数从0.4393提升至0.5256。
AI.motivation: 半导体检测中精确参数化控制电路几何形状至关重要，但获取足够的真实训练数据成本高昂；现有生成模型无法保证纳米级几何精度。
AI.method: 使用VLM将检测图像转换为可编辑的领域特定语言(DSL)代码，通过参数精确操控生成训练数据；采用输入二值化策略去除SEM特有的纹理和噪声，使模型聚焦于几何结构。
AI.result: 在MIIC数据集上，二值化输入将平均Dice系数从0.4393提升至0.5256。
AI.conclusion: 简单的纹理抽象策略能有效缓解仿真到真实的领域差距问题。

title: Fine-Tuning Diffusion Models for Molecular Generation via Reinforcement Learning and Fast Sampling
summary: Generating molecules that simultaneously satisfy drug-like properties and conform to the 3D structure of a target protein is a core challenge in structure-based drug design (SBDD). Existing generative approaches, however, often rely on costly post-hoc processing during Sampling or require carefully curated datasets during training, yet still achieve modest gains. These limitations are especially pronounced in multi-objective settings, where balancing conflicting criteria remains a core challenge. To address these challenges, We propose FTDiff, a reinforcement learning fine-tuning framework tailored for diffusion-based molecular generation under structural constraints. To ensure stable and sample-efficient optimization, FTDiff adopts a group relative policy optimization (GRPO) style strategy. Furthermore, FTDiff builds upon a time-free pretrained diffusion model and incorporates a fast sampling mechanism that reduces the number of denoising steps, significantly accelerating both training and inference while maintaining generation quality. By optimizing a fixed threshold-aware reward, FTDiff effectively guides the model to produce valid, diverse, and high- quality molecules that balance multiple drug design objectives. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that FTDiff consistently outperforms prior methods, without requiring expensive post-hoc optimization or intricate data engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FTDiff，一种基于强化学习（GRPO策略）的微调框架，用于结构约束下的扩散分子生成。它利用时间无关的预训练扩散模型和快速采样机制，通过固定阈值感知奖励优化，在不需昂贵后处理或精心数据工程的情况下，生成有效、多样且高质量的药物分子。
AI.motivation: 现有基于结构的药物设计生成方法在采样时需要昂贵的后处理，或在训练时需要精心策划的数据集，且在多目标优化（平衡冲突标准）方面表现有限，增益微小。亟需一种更高效、无需复杂数据工程和后处理的解决方案。
AI.method: FTDiff采用GRPO风格的强化学习策略进行微调；基于时间无关的预训练扩散模型；引入快速采样机制以减少去噪步数，加速训练和推理；使用固定阈值感知奖励函数来引导生成满足多目标药物设计性质的分子。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，FTDiff在生成有效、多样和高品质分子方面持续优于先前方法，且无需昂贵的后处理优化或复杂的数据工程。
AI.conclusion: FTDiff证明了强化学习微调与扩散模型结合在结构约束分子生成中的有效性，为多目标药物设计提供了一种高效、稳定的解决方案。

title: When Knowledge Is Not Free: Cost-Aware Evidence Selection in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) typically assumes that external knowledge is free, but many high-quality sources are paywalled, licensed, restricted, or otherwise costly to access. We introduce cost-aware RAG, a setting where retrieved evidence is assigned access-cost tiers and systems must answer under an explicit evidence-access budget. We instantiate this setting by augmenting MS MARCO v2.1 with access-friction tiers and evaluate budgeted evidence selection across general-domain and domain-specific QA benchmarks. Our results show that static selection is brittle: no fixed selector uniformly dominates, and larger budgets do not reliably improve answer quality, even when costly evidence is domain-matched. We then study agentic cost-aware RAG, where an LLM decides when to retrieve, which tier to access, and when to stop. Agents show strong promise as adaptive evidence-acquisition controllers, but their behavior remains highly model- and task-dependent. These findings suggest that cost-aware evidence acquisition is a central challenge for the next generation of RAG systems. All code and data are available at https://github.com/Mignonmy/Cost-Aware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出成本感知RAG（Cost-Aware RAG）范式，在检索证据引入访问成本层级和预算限制的条件下，研究如何高效选择证据。实验表明静态选择策略效果不佳，而基于LLM的智能体方法虽有潜力但行为高度依赖模型和任务。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG假设外部知识免费获取，但现实中高质量知识源往往有付费墙、许可限制或访问成本。现有RAG方法忽略了这一现实约束。
AI.method: 1. 在MS MARCO v2.1上构建访问成本层级（access-friction tiers）；2. 设计预算约束下的证据选择任务；3. 对比静态选择策略与基于LLM智能体的自适应选择策略。
AI.result: 1. 静态选择策略表现脆弱，没有统一的优胜策略；2. 更大的预算并不总能提升答案质量，即使昂贵证据与领域匹配；3. LLM智能体虽能自适应控制证据获取，但行为高度依赖模型和任务。
AI.conclusion: 成本感知的证据获取是下一代RAG系统面临的核心挑战，需要更鲁棒的自适应策略来在预算约束下平衡证据质量与成本。

title: LLM-Evolved Pattern Generators for Optimal Classical Planning
summary: Learned heuristics have recently become a competitive alternative to traditional domain-independent heuristics for satisficing planning. Existing approaches, however, focus on improving search guidance rather than guaranteeing admissibility, which makes them unsuitable for optimal classical planning. We present the first method for learning domain-dependent heuristics that are admissible by design and thus preserve the optimality guarantees of A* search. Instead of learning a direct mapping from states to heuristic values, we learn to construct abstractions that induce admissible heuristics. We use an LLM-driven evolutionary program-synthesis framework to obtain, for each domain, a program that produces a pattern collection for any task in that domain, and we combine the resulting patterns admissibly via saturated cost partitioning. Empirically, the learned programs encode interpretable domain-specific insights, run with negligible overhead at test time and yield heuristics that match the coverage of state-of-the-art domain-independent baselines on several domains while evaluating each state substantially faster.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个通过学习可容许启发式函数来保证最优规划的方法。使用LLM驱动的进化程序合成框架，为每个领域学习生成模式集合的程序，并通过饱和成本划分可容许地组合这些模式，在保持A*最优性保证的同时实现了与领域无关基线相当的覆盖率和更快的评估速度。
AI.motivation: 现有学习启发式方法虽然能提升搜索效率，但无法保证可容许性，因此不适用于最优经典规划。作者希望提出一种既能学习领域相关启发式、又能确保其可容许性（即不低估实际代价）的方法，从而在保持A*搜索最优性保证的前提下提升效率。
AI.method: 1. 不直接学习状态到启发值的映射，而是学习构建能导出可容许启发式的抽象（模式集合）。2. 使用LLM驱动的进化程序合成框架，为每个领域学习一个程序，该程序能为该领域内的任何任务生成模式集合。3. 通过饱和成本划分（saturated cost partitioning）可容许地组合所得模式。
AI.result: 1. 学习到的程序编码了可解释的领域特定洞察。2. 在测试时运行开销可忽略不计。3. 在多个领域上，其启发式函数的覆盖率与最先进的领域无关基线相当，且每个状态的评估速度显著更快。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合LLM驱动的程序合成与进化搜索，可以学习到既保证最优性又具有实际效率的领域相关可容许启发式，为最优规划中学习启发式方法开辟了新方向。

title: Hybrid Imbalanced Regression Through Unified Data-Level and Algorithm-Level Balancing
comment: 52 pages, 20 figures, accepted at Expert Systems with Applications
summary: Imbalanced learning is a critical challenge in machine learning, where underrepresented target values can bias models and degrade prediction performance on rare but important cases. Although extensively studied in classification, imbalanced regression remains relatively underexplored. Existing methods mainly focus on either data-level balancing, which may introduce noise and overfitting, or algorithm-level balancing, which often struggles with highly complex target distributions. To address these limitations, we propose a unified hybrid framework that integrates both data- and algorithm-level balancing strategies into a regressor-agnostic pipeline. The proposed framework consists of five stages: (1) adaptive bin partitioning to dynamically segment the target space based on local linear coherence; (2) target-conditioned representation learning using a Conditional Variational Autoencoder; (3) multistage data-level balancing through feature-space clustering and oversampling of minority clusters; (4) algorithm-level balancing using a novel Latent-Density Weighted Loss (LDWL) to emphasize rare samples in latent and target spaces; and (5) attention-based gated fusion for final regression. Experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently improves predictive performance compared to standalone regressors and existing imbalanced regression approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一混合框架，通过自适应分箱、条件变分自编码器表示学习、多阶段数据级平衡、潜密度加权损失和注意力门控融合五阶段，有效解决了分类中已充分研究但回归中仍相对未探索的不平衡学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有不平衡回归方法主要关注数据级平衡（易引入噪声和过拟合）或算法级平衡（难处理复杂目标分布），缺乏统一有效的混合框架。
AI.method: 提出五阶段统一混合框架：(1) 基于局部线性相干性的自适应分箱；(2) 基于条件变分自编码器的目标条件表示学习；(3) 特征空间聚类和少数类过采样的多阶段数据级平衡；(4) 潜密度加权损失（LDWL）实现算法级平衡；(5) 注意力门控融合进行最终回归。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该框架相比独立回归器和现有不平衡回归方法，一致地提升了预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合框架有效结合了数据级和算法级平衡策略，且不依赖于特定回归器，为不平衡回归问题提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Geometric Latent Reasoning Induces Shorter Generations in LLMs
summary: Large language models solve complex problems by generating lengthy chains of explicit reasoning tokens. While effective, this makes reasoning expensive, length-sensitive, and constrained to (discrete) natural language. While latent reasoning offers a continuous alternative, determining useful structures for intermediate latent states is an open challenge. In this paper, we formulate latent reasoning as a geometric path-approximation problem within the model's pretrained token-embedding space. We introduce Geometric Latent Reasoning (GLR), which uses a lightweight transition head to predict iterative direction updates in embedding space. Using textual chain-of-thought traces as anchors, GLR learns to approximate discrete reasoning trajectories while permitting continuous deviations from exact token embeddings. Evaluations on mathematical reasoning benchmarks using Qwen3 models reveal an emergent phenomenon: geometric latent reasoning induces substantially shorter generations without an explicit length objective. By replacing early explicit reasoning with continuous latent steps, models often reach correct answers using substantially fewer total generation steps. These findings suggest that continuous trajectories act as compact intermediate reasoning states, exposing a new tradeoff between latent computation budget, output length, and accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出几何潜在推理（GLR），将潜在推理形式化为嵌入空间中的几何路径逼近问题，使用轻量级过渡头预测迭代方向更新，在数学推理基准上实现更短的生成长度同时保持准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型通过显式推理token链进行推理，虽然有效但成本高昂、对长度敏感且受限于离散自然语言。潜在推理虽提供连续替代方案，但中间潜在状态的有用结构尚未明确。
AI.method: 将潜在推理形式化为预训练token嵌入空间中的几何路径逼近问题，使用轻量级过渡头预测嵌入空间的迭代方向更新，以文本思维链轨迹为锚点，学习逼近离散推理轨迹同时允许连续偏差。
AI.result: 在Qwen3模型的数学推理基准评估中，几何潜在推理展现出新兴现象：无需显式长度目标即可大幅缩短生成长度，用连续潜在步骤替代早期显式推理后，模型能用更少的总生成步骤得出正确答案。
AI.conclusion: 连续轨迹可作为紧凑的中间推理状态，揭示了潜在计算预算、输出长度和准确率之间的新权衡关系。

title: Food Noise & False Safety: A Systematic Evaluation of How LLMs Fail to Adapt to Eating Disorder Queries with Clinician Feedback
summary: Recent evidence shows that people with eating disorders (EDs) are increasingly seeking guidance, advice, and emotional support from Large Language Model (LLM)-based chat systems. Although these systems are not designed to provide clinical advice, their perceived expertise, neutrality and accessibility make them a frequent, albeit risky, source of support. This paper investigates potential patterns of interaction between users with EDs and LLMs, focusing on the potential harms arising from models that uncritically adapt to, and facilitate unsafe or self-harming user requests. We find, in consultation with clinical ED experts, that specific linguistic cues in prompts increase the likelihood of unsafe responses and, through systematically varying the degree of potential risk present in the user prompt, report the extent to which LLMs uncritically adapt to problematic, and potentially dangerous user inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了饮食障碍（ED）患者与大型语言模型（LLM）交互时可能产生的风险，发现LLM会不加批判地适应并促进用户的不安全或自伤请求，且提示中的特定语言线索会增加不安全回应的可能性。
AI.motivation: 饮食障碍患者越来越多地向LLM寻求指导和支持，但LLM并非设计用于提供临床建议，可能带来风险，因此需要系统性地研究这种交互模式中的潜在危害。
AI.method: 与临床ED专家合作，识别提示中增加不安全回应可能性的特定语言线索，并通过系统性地改变用户提示中的潜在风险程度，评估LLM不加批判适应问题性用户输入的程度。
AI.result: 提示中的特定语言线索会显著增加LLM产生不安全回应的可能性；LLM会不加批判地适应并促进危险的用户输入。
AI.conclusion: LLM在与饮食障碍用户交互时存在重大安全风险，需要针对此类脆弱用户群体设计更安全的交互机制和防护措施。

title: DAGGER: Gradient-Free Construction of Transiently Amplifying Networks under Hard Connectivity Constraints
summary:
Many networks not only support but also rely on transient non-normal amplification, an orders-of-magnitude increase in the activity of an otherwise stable system. Constructing such networks under hard sign/sparsity/diagonal constraints -- the regime relevant for biological connectomes and structured RNN initializations -- has so far required either gradient-based local search with thousands of inner-loop eigendecompositions or Schur-form direct construction in an abstract basis that breaks the constraints under projection.
  Here we introduce DAGGER (Directed Acyclic Graph Guided Edge Reweighting), a gradient-free single-pass algorithm. Given a stable signed sparse matrix, DAGGER produces an output with the same sign, sparsity, and diagonal. A single scalar $β$ controls a Wasserstein-2 budget that smoothly trades exact multiset preservation ($β= 0$) for amplification; peak amplification grows essentially without bound with $β$, empirically reaching $10^{10}$ before numerical overflow.
  DAGGER matches or exceeds gradient-based methods at multiset preservation in a single forward pass -- 30-100$\times$ fewer eigendecompositions than a typical gradient inner loop -- and at moderate $β$ beats them by orders of magnitude with connectivity exactly preserved. We develop the algorithm, compare it to the existing methods and on a downstream signal-detection task, and examine the diagnostics that show why DAGGER is structurally different from other amplifying networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAGGER算法，一种无需梯度的单次前向传播方法，能在保持符号、稀疏性和对角约束的前提下，为稳定稀疏矩阵引入瞬态非正态放大，放大倍数可达10^10，性能优于梯度基方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在硬约束（符号/稀疏性/对角）下构建非正态放大网络时，要么需要梯度基局部搜索（需数千次内循环特征分解），要么使用Schur形式直接构造但在投影后会破坏约束。需要一种更高效且保持约束的方法。
AI.method: DAGGER（有向无环图引导边重新加权）是一种无梯度单次前向算法。给定稳定有符号稀疏矩阵，通过单一标量β控制Wasserstein-2预算，在精确多重集保持（β=0）和放大之间平滑折中。
AI.result: DAGGER在多重集保持方面匹配或超越梯度基方法（特征分解次数减少30-100倍），在中等β下保持连接性时性能远超梯度方法数个数量级，峰值放大可达10^10。
AI.conclusion: DAGGER在结构与性能上与其他放大网络有本质区别，为生物连接组和结构化RNN初始化提供了高效可行的构建方案。

title: ResMerge: Residual-based Spectral Merging of Large Language Models
summary: Model merging offers a training-free way to combine multiple post-trained expert models, but merging experts obtained through reinforcement learning (RL) remains challenging. Existing spectral merging methods often assume that leading singular directions contain the main task signal, while lower-energy residual components can be compressed, selected, or attenuated to reduce interference. We find that this assumption does not hold for RL task vectors: after decomposing each task vector into a leading spectral head and a residual component, both parts can independently recover substantial behavior knowledge, while exhibiting different merging properties. The head is highly concentrated and informative but more prone to sharp cross-expert conflicts, whereas the residual component is more dispersed and provides a more stable basis for aggregation. Based on this observation, we propose ResMerge, a residual-based spectral merging framework for RL experts. ResMerge first constructs a stable residual backbone with Spherical Residual Consensus Adaptation, which estimates a reliability-weighted consensus direction on the Frobenius sphere. It then reintroduces leading-head information through a Lightweight Head Correction module gated by positive cross-expert agreement. Experiments across multiple RL expert groups and capability domains show that ResMerge better preserves expert capabilities than representative task-vector and spectral merging baselines. The implementation of ResMerge is publicly available at https://github.com/sunyd0303-cpu/ResMerge-release.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResMerge，一种针对RL专家模型合并的残差频谱融合框架。通过将任务向量分解为主谱头（高度集中但易冲突）和残差分量（分散且稳定），ResMerge先构建稳定残差骨干，再通过轻量级头部修正模块恢复主谱头信息，实验表明优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有频谱合并方法假设主导奇异方向包含主要任务信号，残差分量可被压缩或衰减以减少干扰。但作者发现RL任务向量中，主谱头和残差分量都能独立恢复大量行为知识，且性质不同——主谱头信息集中但易产生跨专家冲突，残差分量更分散、更稳定。因此需要专门针对RL专家合并设计新方法。
AI.method: 1) 将每个RL任务向量分解为leading spectral head（主谱头）和residual component（残差分量）。2) 残差骨干构建：采用Spherical Residual Consensus Adaptation，在Frobenius球面上估计可靠性加权的共识方向。3) 主谱头信息恢复：通过Lightweight Head Correction模块，仅引入正跨专家一致性的头部信息。
AI.result: 在多个RL专家组和能力域上的实验表明，ResMerge比代表性的任务向量合并基线和频谱合并基线更好地保留了专家能力。代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: RL任务向量的频谱分解性质与传统假设不同，主谱头和残差分量各自有不同合并特性。ResMerge通过分开处理二者，先构建稳定残差骨干再选择性引入头部信息，实现了更好的专家能力保留。

title: HLL: Can Agents Cross Humanity's Last Line of Verification?
summary: Multimodal agents are increasingly expected to operate interfaces on behalf of users, raising a central deployment question: can they truly substitute for humans in workflows that services deliberately protect against automation? CAPTCHA verification makes this question concrete. It is not merely a visual puzzle, but a human-verification boundary placed before account creation, content access, form submission, and other protected actions. We introduce \textbf{Humanity's Last Line of Verification (HLL)}, a controlled benchmark that uses interactive CAPTCHA verification to evaluate whether agents can cross this boundary through grounded, human-like interaction rather than recognition alone. HLL covers diverse CAPTCHA interactions and exposes agents to controlled realism stressors, including cluttered webpages, harder task variants, and trace-conditioned validation of the solving process. We evaluate eight frontier multimodal agents in a closed-loop GUI environment. The results show that current agents remain brittle at this human-substitution boundary: performance varies sharply across verification types, degrades under realistic interface conditions, and drops further when correct answers must be supported by valid action traces. By exposing gaps in localization, action calibration, state tracking, and process consistency, HLL provides a concrete testbed for measuring how close multimodal agents are to acting as human substitutes in protected real-world workflows. Our code is available at https://github.com/XinhaoS0101/HLL

AI.tldr: 本文提出HLL基准，通过交互式CAPTCHA验证测试多模态智能体能否像人类一样跨越自动化防护边界。实验发现当前智能体在定位、动作校准、状态追踪和流程一致性上存在明显缺陷，性能随验证类型和界面复杂度变化剧烈，远未达到可替代人类的水平。
AI.motivation: 多模态智能体被期望替代人类操作界面，但许多服务（如CAPTCHA）故意设置自动化防护。现有研究多关注识别CAPTCHA，而非在真实GUI环境中通过完整人机交互过程完成验证。本文旨在系统评估智能体能否真正跨越这一"人机验证边界"。
AI.method: 构建HLL基准，包含多种交互式CAPTCHA验证场景，引入三类现实压力因素：杂乱的网页布局、更难的任务变体、以及基于操作轨迹的验证。在封闭式GUI环境中评估8个前沿多模态智能体。
AI.result: 当前智能体性能随验证类型变化剧烈，在真实界面条件下性能下降，且当要求正确答案必须有有效操作轨迹支撑时性能进一步降低。智能体在定位、动作校准、状态追踪和流程一致性方面存在显著短板。
AI.conclusion: HLL为衡量多模态智能体在受保护真实工作流中作为人类替代品的成熟度提供了具体测试平台。当前智能体远未达到可靠替代人类完成CAPTCHA验证的水平。

title: Trust Region On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) is a fundamental technique for efficient post-training of large language models (LLMs), with broad applications in agent learning, multi-task enhancement, and model compression. However, OPD training becomes unstable when the teacher and student distributions differ substantially, as teacher supervision on student-generated tokens may yield unreliable policy gradients and even cause optimization failure. This work addresses reliable on-policy token-level supervision through credit assignment strategies, and proposes Trust Region On-Policy Distillation, TrOPD. It features the following characteristics: 1) Trust-Region On-Policy Learning: TrOPD performs OPD only in regions where the teacher provides reliable supervision, mitigating the optimization difficulty of the K1 reverse-KL estimator under distribution mismatch. 2) Outlier Estimation: For outlier regions, we explore gradient clipping, masking, and forward-KL estimation to reduce the adverse effects of unreliable supervision. 3) Off-Policy Guidance: The student continues generation from teacher prefixes and uses forward KL to imitate off-policy guidance, encouraging on-policy exploration toward reliable regions. Experiments show that TrOPD consistently outperforms SoTA OPD baselines, including OPD, EOPD, and REOPOLD, across mathematical reasoning, code generation, and general-domain benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrOPD（Trust Region On-Policy Distillation），通过信任区域策略蒸馏、异常值估计和离策略引导三种机制，解决教师-学生分布差异导致的在线策略蒸馏不稳定问题，在数学推理、代码生成等任务上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）中，当教师和学生分布差异较大时，教师对学生生成token的监督会产生不可靠的策略梯度，导致优化失败。现有OPD方法缺乏可靠的token级监督机制。
AI.method: 1) 信任区域在线学习：仅在教师提供可靠监督的区域进行OPD，缓解分布不匹配下反向KL估计的优化困难；2) 异常值估计：对异常区域采用梯度裁剪、掩码和前向KL估计降低不可靠监督影响；3) 离策略引导：学生从教师前缀继续生成，使用前向KL模仿离策略引导，鼓励向可靠区域探索。
AI.result: 在数学推理、代码生成和通用领域基准测试中，TrOPD持续优于SoTA的OPD基线方法（OPD、EOPD、REOPOLD）。
AI.conclusion: TrOPD通过信任区域机制和双重估计策略有效解决了分布不匹配下OPD的不稳定问题，为LLM后训练提供了一种更鲁棒的蒸馏框架。

title: Who Annotates in NLP? A Large-scale Assessment of Human Annotation Reporting between 2018 and 2025
summary: Human annotation is the empirical foundation of much NLP research, from dataset construction to model evaluation, but papers often leave unclear who produced the annotations and how the annotation process was controlled. We provide the first large-scale, task-level audit of human annotation reporting across major NLP venues, asking which annotation details are documented, which are missing, and how reporting varies across time, topic, venue, and intended use of human judgment. We introduce a unified taxonomy of annotation-reporting practices and validate an LLM-assisted extraction pipeline against Annotated-gold, a human-adjudicated gold standard of 41 papers and 72 annotation tasks, where the best model reaches human-comparable agreement with adjudicated labels, with Krippendorff's alpha of 0.606 versus 0.585 for human-human agreement. Using this pipeline, we construct Annotated-llm, a dataset covering ACL-venue papers from 2018-2025, with 2,667 extracted annotation tasks from 1,603 papers, and find that papers frequently report operational details such as recruitment strategies, annotator expertise, and annotation volume, but often omit details needed to assess annotation validity, including training, language proficiency, compensation, socio-demographics, adjudication, and agreement values, especially in model-evaluation studies. Our results show that annotation reporting in NLP has improved over time but remains uneven, and they establish a scalable framework and bare-minimum reporting recommendations for making human annotation more reliable, reproducible, and interpretable.

AI.tldr: 本文首次大规模审计了NLP论文中人工标注的报告质量，构建了标注报告实践的统一分类体系，开发了基于LLM的提取流程，分析了2018-2025年ACL会议论文，发现操作细节常被报告，但训练、语言能力、薪酬、人口统计等关键信息常被遗漏，尤其在模型评估研究中问题更突出。
AI.motivation: 尽管人工标注是NLP研究的经验基础，但论文中标注者的身份和标注过程控制常模糊不清，缺乏系统性审计来了解哪些标注细节被报告、哪些被遗漏，以及报告质量如何随时间、主题、发表地和用途变化。
AI.method: 提出了标注报告实践的统一分类体系；开发了LLM辅助的标注信息提取流程，并在人工裁决的黄金标准数据集Annotated-gold（41篇论文、72个标注任务）上验证，最佳模型与人类裁决者的一致性（Krippendorff's alpha=0.606）达到了人类间一致性水平（0.585）。最终构建了Annotated-llm数据集，覆盖2018-2025年ACL会议论文的2,667个标注任务（1,603篇论文）。
AI.result: 论文常报告招募策略、标注者专业知识和标注量等操作细节，但常遗漏评估标注有效性所需的关键信息，包括培训、语言能力、薪酬、社会人口统计、裁决过程和一致性值。这些问题在模型评估研究中尤为严重。标注报告质量随时间有所提升，但仍不均衡。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可扩展的标注报告分析框架，并提出了最低限度的报告建议，以使人工作业更加可靠、可复现和可解释。

title: Beyond One-shot: AI Agents for Learning in Field Experiments
summary: Organizations routinely run experiments for A/B testing, yet the data generated from one experiment is underutilized to inform subsequent intervention design. Significant barriers exist to extracting actionable knowledge from prior experimental data to inform new interventions. We study whether tool-augmented agentic AI can automatically learn from experimental data to generate new interventions in subsequent experiments. Through two-stage field experiments in healthcare prescription messaging (693,139 patient visits), we compare a Human + Chatbot method (Stage 1: behavioral experts with conversational AI co-designing 13 message variants, 444,691 patient visits) against a Tool-Augmented Agentic AI method (Stage 2: AI autonomously extracting principles from Stage 1 data to generate 17 new variants, 248,448 patient visits). The Agentic AI method, equipped with analytical tools, structured Data-Information-Knowledge-Wisdom (DIKW) reasoning agents, and transparent evidence chains, produces superior interventions: the best AI-generated message achieved a 69.8% CTR (+6.5 percentage points over baseline). Critically, our results suggest that the value comes from domain-specific experimental data, not from general reasoning ability: frontier LLMs operating without experimental data failed to predict which interventions would succeed. The field experiments also revealed that general-purpose behavioral theories used for intervention design do not extend uniformly to specific healthcare contexts, motivating an agentic AI approach to theory audits at field-experiment scale. Our research shows that tool-augmented AI can learn from experimental data and generate improved domain-relevant interventions, transforming behavioral experimentation from one-shot evaluation into a scalable system for cumulative design learning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了工具增强的智能体AI能否自动从实验数据中学习以生成新的干预措施。通过在医疗处方信息传递领域进行两阶段现场实验（693,139次患者就诊），对比了人类+聊天机器人方法（阶段1）与工具增强的智能体AI方法（阶段2）。结果显示，AI生成的最佳消息实现了69.8%的点击率（比基线高6.5个百分点），且其价值来自领域特定的实验数据而非通用推理能力。研究表明，工具增强的AI可以将行为实验从一次性评估转化为可扩展的累积设计学习系统。
AI.motivation: 组织常规进行A/B测试实验，但实验数据很少被用于指导后续干预设计。从实验数据中提取可操作的知識以指导新干预存在显著障碍。作者希望探究AI能否自动从实验数据中学习并生成改进的干预措施。
AI.method: 两阶段现场实验：(1) 阶段1——人类+聊天机器人方法：行为专家与对话式AI共同设计13种消息变体（444,691次患者就诊）；(2) 阶段2——工具增强的智能体AI方法：AI自主从阶段1数据中提取原则，生成17种新变体（248,448次患者就诊）。AI配备分析工具、结构化DIKW推理智能体及透明证据链。
AI.result: AI生成的最佳消息实现了69.8%的点击率（CTR），比基线高出6.5个百分点。未接入实验数据的前沿大语言模型无法预测哪些干预会成功。通用行为理论在特定医疗情境中并不均匀适用。
AI.conclusion: 工具增强的AI能够从实验数据中学习并生成领域相关的改进干预，将行为实验从一次性评估转变为可扩展的累积设计学习系统。研究还表明需要对通用行为理论进行基于现场实验规模的审计。

title: Beyond Sinusoids: A Morlet Wavelet Framework for Transformer Positional Encoding
summary: Standard positional encodings for transformers - sinusoidal and rotary (RoPE) - treat every position as equally local: they encode where a token is, but not how far its positional influence should extend. We propose that the Morlet wavelet, which simultaneously minimises uncertainty in position and frequency, is the natural basis for positional encoding, and introduce Morlet Positional Encoding (MoPE): each embedding dimension learns its own frequency and locality bandwidth from data. The main theoretical result is a unification: sinusoidal PE and the RoPE correlation kernel both emerge as limiting cases of MoPE when locality is switched off (sigma_i -> infinity). The phase of MoPE recovers the RoPE rotation angle exactly; the amplitude adds a learned Gaussian locality kernel that standard encodings lack. Empirically, MoPE combined with Energy-Gated Attention achieves +0.119 improvement over standard attention on TinyShakespeare, outperforming either component alone. Analysis of the learned parameters reveals that all 128 frequency-bandwidth pairs converge to the wavelet admissibility boundary - an empirical observation consistent with a companion result on energy gating, suggesting a reproducible property of character-level language signals that warrants further investigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出莫莱特位置编码（MoPE），用可学习频率和带宽的Morlet小波取代标准Transformer中的正弦/RoPE编码，理论证明正弦PE和RoPE是MoPE在带宽无穷大时的特例，实验表明MoPE+能量门控注意力在TinyShakespeare上提升0.119。
AI.motivation: 标准的位置编码（正弦和RoPE）对所有位置同等对待，只能编码"位置在哪里"，无法编码"位置的影响力范围应该多大"。作者希望引入一种能同时捕捉位置和频率信息、且能自适应学习每个维度局部性带宽的编码方式。
AI.method: 使用Morlet小波作为位置编码的基础，每个嵌入维度独立学习两个参数：频率和局部性带宽（sigma）。相位部分恢复RoPE的旋转角度，幅度部分增加了可学习的高斯局部性核。同时结合能量门控注意力（Energy-Gated Attention）进一步筛选有效信号。
AI.result: MoPE+能量门控注意力在TinyShakespeare上比标准注意力提升0.119。所有128个频率-带宽对都收敛到小波容许性边界，这一现象与能量门控理论一致，表明该性质可能是字符级语言信号的可复现特性。
AI.conclusion: MoPE统一了正弦PE和RoPE（二者是MoPE关闭局部性时的极限情况），并引入了可学习的局部性带宽。实验结果和参数分析表明，Morlet小波是位置编码的自然基础，为进一步优化Transformer的位置表示提供了新视角。

title: DECK: A Consistency x Confidence Taxonomy of LLM Hallucinations
summary:
Existing hallucination taxonomies classify LLM errors by what is wrong with the output -- memorised misconceptions, reasoning failures, fluent fabrications. These taxonomies are useful for diagnosis but cannot answer a different question: which uncertainty scorer would have caught this error? We propose a complementary taxonomy that classifies errors by their detectability signature -- the signal a scorer family would read.
  The DECK taxonomy is a 2x2 partition along inter-sample consistency and token-level confidence into four behavioural regimes (Drift, Entrenched, Confabulation, Knotted), each mapping to a specific scorer family (or families) that can detect it: black-box consistency scorers have signal in D and C, white-box token-probability scorers have signal in K and C, and only an LLM-as-a-Judge with independent pretraining can detect E. Cell membership is operationalised by a Youden's J optimal split on each scorer axis.
  Across three models and four datasets we validate the taxonomy two ways: by analysing scorer-pair disagreement, and by checking that external labels (SelfAware unanswerable, HaluEval adversarial, PopQA entity popularity) land in the predicted DECK cells, with model-scale and content-specific secondary-cell refinements.
  We further identify a universal blind spot of output-level UQ: on knowledge-gap inputs where the generator emits confident, repeatable fabrications, every output-level family collapses by construction. A linear probe on Llama-3-8B's hidden states also collapses to chance, giving preliminary evidence that the failure may persist at the activation level; richer internal-state methods (UQ heads, information-theoretic estimators) remain to be tested.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DECK分类法，根据可检测性特征将LLM幻觉分为四个行为区域（漂移、根深蒂固、虚构、纠结），每个区域对应不同的不确定性评分器家族，并识别出所有输出级不确定性评估方法共有的盲点——知识缺口输入。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉分类法只描述输出错误类型，无法回答"哪种不确定性评分器能检测该错误"的问题。作者需要一个面向错误可检测性的互补分类体系。
AI.method: 提出2x2的DECK分类法，按样本间一致性（inter-sample consistency）和词元级置信度（token-level confidence）两个维度，将错误分为四个行为区域，每个区域映射到特定评分器家族。使用Youden's J最优分割确定单元归属，通过评分器对不一致性和外部标签验证分类。
AI.result: 在三个模型和四个数据集上验证了DECK分类法的有效性；发现一个普遍盲点：当模型在知识缺口上生成自信且可重复的编造时，所有输出级不确定性评估家族失效；Llama-3-8B隐状态的线性探测同样无效。
AI.conclusion: DECK为选择合适的不确定性评分器提供了实用指导，但输出级UQ在知识缺口错误上存在根本性盲点，需探索更丰富的内部状态方法。

title: AGENTCL: Toward Rigorous Evaluation of Continual Learning in Language Agents
summary: Language agents spend substantial inference time solving individual tasks, yet the experience acquired in one episode is often underutilized in future episodes. Continual learning expects an agent to accumulate reusable experience across a stream of tasks, improve over time, and avoid interference from irrelevant experiences. Unfortunately, existing benchmarks struggle to evaluate continual learning in language agents rigorously. Most efforts focus on retrieval and reasoning over long-context conversations or documents, while recent lifelong-adaptation benchmarks often rely on naive task streams with limited analysis of cross-task relationships, making it difficult to understand what an agent learns and reuses over time. This paper presents an evaluation framework AgentCL for continual learning in agents, centered on controlled task streams and metrics for transfer gains. AGENTCL constructs compositional streams where earlier sub-solutions, evidence, or workflows are intentionally reusable in later tasks, and contrasts them with naive streams where such reusability is not guaranteed. We use the benchmark to evaluate non-parametric memory designs for continual learning. To diagnose how memory design choices affect continual learning, we develop MemProbe, a probing method that stores interactions, insights, and skills, while filtering unreliable experiences during consolidation. Empirical analysis across coding, deep research, and language understanding/reasoning tasks shows that naive streams offer limited ability to distinguish memory designs, whereas controlled streams more clearly distinguish their plasticity. Meanwhile, naive and held-out settings often yield limited gains and can expose memory-induced degradation. These results highlight the need for stronger memory designs that balance plasticity and stable reuse.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentCL评估框架，通过受控任务流和转移增益指标，系统评估语言智能体的持续学习能力，并开发MemProbe探针方法分析记忆设计对持续学习的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有基准难以严格评估语言智能体的持续学习能力——多数工作聚焦于长上下文对话/文档的检索推理，而近期终生适应基准依赖简单任务流且缺乏跨任务关系分析，导致难以理解智能体随时间学到了什么并如何重用。
AI.method: 提出AgentCL评估框架，构建可复用子解/证据/工作流的组合任务流（与不可重用的朴素任务流对照），设计转移增益指标；开发MemProbe探针方法，存储交互、洞察和技能，过滤不可靠经验进行整合。
AI.result: 在编码、深度研究和语言理解/推理任务上，朴素任务流难以区分不同记忆设计，而受控任务流能清晰区分其可塑性；朴素和保留设置中增益有限，且存在记忆导致的性能退化。
AI.conclusion: 需要更强的记忆设计来平衡可塑性与稳定重用，受控任务流是评估持续学习的关键，现有记忆设计在朴素设置中表现有限且可能带来负面迁移。

title: PALTO: Physics-Informed Active Learning for Tri-Gate FinFET Design Optimization for Vertical Power Delivery
summary: This paper demonstrates the effectiveness of machine learning-driven optimization for designing application-specific GaN tri-gate FinFETs in vertical power delivery systems. Conventional TCAD-based approaches are computationally intensive and insufficient for navigating the high-dimensional, nonlinear design space of advanced GaN devices. To address this, a physics-informed active learning framework is used to intelligently guide simulations, accelerating convergence while preserving accuracy. This ML-guided approach enables the discovery of optimal configurations by efficiently exploring key structural parameters -- most notably the GaN-to-AlGaN thickness ratio -- a long-standing focus of debate in device design. By systematically exploring key structural parameters, two optimized devices with aggressively scaled gate-to-drain lengths are identified. Single-fin, multi-channel simulations show that device~D2, with a thinner GaN channel relative to the AlGaN barrier, achieves higher drive current. However, in a 300-fin configuration, device~D1 outperforms device~D2 by delivering 3.3\,A at 0.49~ohm on-resistance -- approximately 2$\times$ better -- despite slightly higher parasitics. Both devices operate in a normally-off mode. Based on an application-specific figure of merit, device~D1 achieves 5\,pC$\cdot$ohm, demonstrating 2$\times$ greater switching efficiency than device~D2, while both designs outperform industrial benchmarks from different performance standpoints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息主动学习的机器学习驱动优化框架，用于设计应用于垂直功率传输系统的GaN三栅极FinFET。通过智能引导仿真，该框架高效探索高维非线性设计空间，发现两个优化器件D1和D2。其中D1在300-fin配置下以3.3A电流、0.49欧姆导通电阻和5 pC·ohm的开关效率表现出约2倍的性能优势，两款器件均优于工业基准。
AI.motivation: 传统TCAD方法计算强度大，难以有效探索GaN器件高维、非线性的设计空间，尤其是GaN与AlGaN厚度比这一长期争议的关键参数。
AI.method: 采用物理信息主动学习框架智能引导仿真，在保证精度的同时加速收敛，系统探索主要结构参数（特别是GaN/AlGaN厚度比），并基于应用特定的品质因数进行优化。
AI.result: 发现两个优化器件D1和D2。D2（薄GaN通道）在单鳍多通道仿真中驱动电流更高；但300-fin配置下D1表现更优：3.3A电流、0.49Ω导通电阻、5pC·ohm开关效率，性能约为D2的2倍，两款均优于工业基准。
