While defenses such as differential privacy and property unlearning have been proposed, the link between fairness constraints and distributional leakage remains unexplored. We propose Fair Fine-tuning (FFt): a trained model is fine-tuned on samples from the complementary distribution under an Equalized Odds (EO) constraint. We provide a complete theoretical characterization, proving the tight bound $\text{Adv}(\mathcal{A},M_f) \le Δ_{\text{EO}} \cdot W$, where $W$ quantifies how distinguishable the two training distributions are by their sensitive-attribute composition. We also establish a necessary condition for FFt to reduce adversarial advantage and prove tightness of the bound. We evaluate across six datasets spanning tabular (ACS Income, COMPAS, German Credit), image (UTKFaces), and NLP (Bias in Bios) modalities. Rehearsal-based FFt consistently reduces the adversarial accuracy gap below the detection threshold $τ!=!0.1$ across all settings; on ACS Income, the gap falls from $\sim!15%$ to under $4%$. Our work provides the first formal bound connecting a model's measured EO disparity directly to its adversarial advantage in the DIA game, opening a new avenue for unified fairness-and-privacy defenses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出公平微调（Fair Fine-tuning, FFt）方法，通过在互补分布上使用等几率差（EO）约束进行微调，建立了模型公平性差距与分布推断攻击（DIA）对抗优势之间的首个正式界限，证明对抗优势 ≤ Δ_EO · W，并在多个模态数据集上验证了其有效降低隐私泄露风险的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究关注差分隐私和属性遗忘等防御手段，但公平性约束与分布泄漏之间的关联尚未被探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立公平性与隐私保护之间的理论联系。
AI.method: 提出 Fair Fine-tuning (FFt) 方法：在等几率差（Equalized Odds, EO）约束下，对预训练模型在互补分布样本上进行微调。同时给出严格理论分析，证明对抗优势的上界为 Δ_EO · W。
AI.result: 在表格数据（ACS Income, COMPAS, German Credit）、图像（UTKFaces）和NLP（Bias in Bios）六个数据集上，基于重放的FFt持续将对抗准确率差距降至检测阈值0.1以下；在ACS Income上差距从约15%降至4%以下。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次建立了模型EO差距与DIA游戏中对抗优势之间的正式界限，为统一公平性与隐私防御开辟了新途径。

title: A Note on Stability for Orthogonalized Matrix Momentum with Client Sampling
summary: We study finite-sample generalization for a client-sampled distributed optimization scheme with matrix-valued parameters and orthogonalized momentum updates. The central quantity is the gap between the population and empirical objectives at the returned model when only a subset of clients participates in each round. Under independent heterogeneous client data, unequal local sample counts, and fixed aggregation weights, we derive a finite-round upper-tail guarantee from a coupled-neighbor stability recursion and a weighted concentration step. The bound keeps the client-selection counts through the amplification factor \(Y_i(\mathcal C)\); in the uniform full-participation full-batch regime, it yields \(\widetilde{\mathcal O}(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})\) scaling whenever the horizon-dependent amplification terms are controlled. The matrix-orthogonalization rule is required to be Lipschitz along paired trajectories, a condition satisfied by regularized polar-type maps and normalized finite-step Newton--Schulz orthogonalizers. For the unregularized matrix sign, the same argument requires coupled spectral separation, whereas Gaussian smoothing gives a finite-round smoothed variant. A one-dimensional counterexample shows why a gap, smoothing, or regularity condition is necessary.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了客户端采样分布式优化中矩阵参数与正交动量更新的有限样本泛化界，推导了有限轮次的上尾保证，并指出正则化、平滑性或谱分离条件是必要的。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式优化理论多假设全客户端参与或标量参数，缺乏对客户端采样、矩阵参数和正交动量更新的有限样本泛化分析。
AI.method: 采用耦合邻居稳定性递归与加权集中步骤，推导有限轮次的上尾保证；对矩阵正交化规则施加Lipschitz条件，并分析正则化极映射、Newton-Schulz正交化器及高斯平滑变体。
AI.result: 在均匀全参与全批量场景下得到\(\widetilde{\mathcal O}(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})\)缩放；无正则化矩阵符号情形需要耦合谱分离；一维反例表明间隙、平滑或正则条件不可缺。
AI.conclusion: 客户端采样矩阵分布式优化具有明确的有限样本泛化界，但必须辅以正则化、平滑或谱分离条件，否则存在反例证明界不成立。

title: OpenWebRL: Demystifying Online Multi-turn Reinforcement Learning for Visual Web Agents
summary: Building capable visual web agents requires long-horizon reasoning, precise grounding, and robust interaction with dynamic real-world websites. Despite rapid progress, the strongest systems remain largely proprietary, while open agents still depend heavily on supervised post-training over large collections of curated web trajectories. This dependence creates a major scalability bottleneck: high-quality demonstrations are expensive to collect, and static datasets offer limited coverage of the diverse, ever-changing open web. Although online RL has shown promise for text-based agents, its potential for training visual web agents directly on live websites remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we introduce OpenWebRL, an open framework for training visual web agents with online multi-turn RL on real websites. OpenWebRL covers the full training pipeline, including scalable live-browser infrastructure, supervised initialization, multimodal context management, trajectory-level success judging, and efficient multi-turn policy optimization. Using this framework, we train OpenWebRL-4B, which establishes a new open-source state of the art on challenging live-web benchmarks. With only 0.4K initialization trajectories and 2.2K open-ended RL training tasks, OpenWebRL-4B achieves 67.0% success on Online-Mind2Web and 64.0% on DeepShop, outperforming prior open agents of similar or larger scale and remaining competitive with proprietary systems including OpenAI CUA and Gemini CUA. Beyond strong benchmark performance, we systematically study the key design choices that make online RL effective for visual web agents, and analyze how RL improves agentic reasoning. Overall, our work offers a practical path toward building more capable, reproducible, and cost-efficient open web agents. We will release our training data, models, and code to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenWebRL，一个在线多轮强化学习框架，用于直接在真实网站上训练视觉web智能体，仅用少量数据（0.4K初始化轨迹+2.2K RL任务）训练出的4B模型达到了开源SOTA（Online-Mind2Web 67.0%, DeepShop 64.0%），与OpenAI CUA和Gemini CUA等专有系统竞争。
AI.motivation: 现有开源视觉web智能体严重依赖大规模人工标注的web轨迹数据进行监督微调，收集高质量演示数据成本高昂且难以覆盖动态变化的开放网络环境，存在严重的可扩展性瓶颈。虽然在线RL在文本智能体上已展现潜力，但在视觉web智能体上的应用尚属空白。
AI.method: 构建完整的在线多轮RL训练流程：可扩展的实时浏览器基础设施、监督初始化、多模态上下文管理、轨迹级成功判断、高效的多轮策略优化。
AI.result: OpenWebRL-4B在Online-Mind2Web上达到67.0%，在DeepShop上达到64.0%，超越同规模及更大规模的开源智能体，与OpenAI CUA、Gemini CUA等专有系统表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 在线RL训练能有效提升视觉web智能体的能力，为构建更强大、可复现、成本高效的开源web智能体提供了可行路径。

title: Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems: A New Foundation for Trustworthy Autonomous Infrastructure
summary: For decades, distributed systems have typically assumed that correct participants execute protocol-specified behavior with stable, externally defined, and deterministic semantics. Classical theory has extensively parameterized network timing, communication topologies, and failure domains, but this participant model has remained comparatively fixed. The integration of autonomous reasoning engines, stochastic model-driven agents, and policy-driven actors into cloud control planes, incident response systems, and financial infrastructure challenges the universality of this assumption. These agents often produce divergent reasoning paths, distinct operational traces, and heterogeneous internal representations while achieving semantically equivalent and correct outcomes. In this paper, we introduce Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems (PDDS) as a research and engineering model for coordinating heterogeneous environments where deterministic code, stochastic models, and autonomous agents coexist. We show that classical distributed computing models form a zero-ambiguity special case of this participant-general model. We do not argue that deterministic systems disappear; rather, deterministic execution can no longer serve as the universal participant assumption for autonomous infrastructure. Finally, we outline five architectural pillars of post-deterministic infrastructure: Protocol-Driven Development, Verifiable Agentic Infrastructure, Autonomous State Control Planes, Semantic Quorum Assurance, and Epistemic State Replication. Epistemic State Replication extends persistence and consistency models from data visibility to knowledge visibility, enabling agentic memory, Verifiable Semantic Rollback, and coherence across reasoning participants. We also define a taxonomy of failure classes that arise in this setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出后确定性分布式系统（PDDS）模型，用于协调包含确定性代码、随机模型和自主推理Agent的异构环境，挑战了传统分布式系统中参与者行为确定性这一根本假设，并定义了五大架构支柱和新的故障分类。
AI.motivation: 传统分布式系统假设所有参与者执行协议规定的、稳定的、确定性语义，但云控制平面、事件响应系统和金融基础设施中已广泛集成自主推理引擎和策略驱动Agent，这些Agent会产生分歧性推理路径但达成语义等价结果，因此需要新的模型来统一描述和协调这种异构环境。
AI.method: 引入PDDS（Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems）作为研究和工程模型，将经典确定性系统视为参与者通用模型的一个零歧义特例，提出五大架构支柱：协议驱动开发、可验证Agent基础设施、自主状态控制平面、语义仲裁保证和认知状态复制。认知状态复制将一致性模型从数据可见性扩展到知识可见性，并定义了新的故障分类体系。
AI.result: 建立了后确定性分布式系统的理论框架，证明了经典确定性模型是其特例；提出了认知状态复制机制，支持Agent记忆、可验证语义回滚和跨推理参与者的一致性；定义了新环境下的故障分类。
AI.conclusion: 确定性执行不能再作为自主基础设施的通用参与者假设，后确定性模型为混合了确定性代码、随机模型和自主Agent的分布式系统提供了新的理论基础和工程指导。

title: Shortcut to Nowhere: Demystifying Deep Spurious Regression
summary: Real-world regression often exhibits shortcuts: attributes that are spuriously correlated with continuous targets in training, yet unreliable under deployment shifts; regressing targets using such shortcuts may fail catastrophically at test time. Existing studies on spurious correlations focus primarily on classification, where labels are categorical and groups are naturally defined. However, many real-world tasks require continuous prediction, where hard label boundaries or discrete group-label pairs do not exist. We define Deep Spurious Regression (DSR) as learning from regression data with attribute-label confounding, addressing continuous spurious correlations, and generalizing to all attribute-label combinations at test time. Motivated by the intrinsic difference between classification and regression shortcuts, we propose to exploit the similarity among spurious attributes in both label and feature spaces, thereby accounting for nearby targets and related groups while calibrating both label and learned feature distributions across attributes. Extensive experiments on common real-world DSR datasets that span computer vision, environmental sensing, and large language model (LLM) regression verify the superior performance of our strategies. Our work fills the gap in benchmarks and techniques for studying spurious correlations in continuous prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了回归任务中的虚假相关性（spurious correlations）问题，提出了Deep Spurious Regression (DSR)框架，通过利用标签空间和特征空间中虚假属性的相似性来校准分布，在多个真实世界数据集上验证了方法的优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假相关性研究主要集中在分类任务（具有离散标签和自然定义的组），而许多真实世界任务需要连续预测，不存在明确的标签边界或离散的组-标签对。回归任务中的虚假相关性可能导致测试时灾难性失败，因此需要专门研究。
AI.method: 利用虚假属性在标签空间和特征空间中的相似性，同时校准跨属性的标签分布和学习的特征分布，从而考虑邻近目标和相关组。
AI.result: 在计算机视觉、环境感知和大语言模型回归等多个真实世界DSR数据集上的广泛实验验证了所提策略的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了连续预测中虚假相关性研究的基准和技术空白，为回归任务中的分布偏移问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Adaptive Auto-Harness: Sustained Self-Improvement for Agentic System Deployment on Open-Ended Task Streams
summary: Auto-harness systems such as A-Evolve, GEPA, and Meta-Harness improve LLM agents by optimizing prompts, skills, tools, memories, and supporting infrastructure from execution feedback, but they are typically evaluated on fixed offline benchmarks. Real deployments instead present open-ended task streams: histories grow without a fixed endpoint, heterogeneous tasks require different harnesses, and problem distributions shift over time. These challenges make a single repeatedly and densely updated harness brittle, causing performance degradation as accuracy peaks early and then declines. This motivates sustained harness construction with task-wise adaptation. We introduce Adaptive Auto-Harness, a framework and system for such streams. The framework decomposes the gap to an oracle harness into evolution loss and adaptation loss. The system addresses these losses with a stateful multi-agent evolver, a harness tree with solve-time routing, and human-steering hooks for cases where history lacks the needed signal. Across prediction-market, security-competition, and event-forecasting streams, Adaptive Auto-Harness outperforms five existing auto-harness baselines and ablations attribute gains to better construction, routing, or targeted human steering. Code is available in https://github.com/A-EVO-Lab/AdaptiveHarness .

AI.tldr: 提出Adaptive Auto-Harness框架，通过任务自适应、多智能体进化、工具路由树和人工引导机制，解决现有自动工具系统在开放任务流中性能退化的问题，在多个流式基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动工具系统（如A-Evolve、GEPA、Meta-Harness）虽能优化LLM智能体的各项组件，但仅在固定离线基准上评估。实际部署面临无终点任务流、异构任务、分布漂移等挑战，单一日志系统频繁更新导致性能先升后降，需要任务自适应的持续工具构建。
AI.method: 1）将系统与oracle之间的差距分解为演化损失和适应损失；2）提出状态化多智能体进化器；3）构建工具树（harness tree）实现求解时路由；4）引入人类引导接口以补充历史信号不足的情况。
AI.result: 在预测市场、安全竞赛和事件预测三个任务流上，Adaptive Auto-Harness超越五种基线方法，消融实验验证了工具构建、路由和人工引导各自的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 任务自适应的持续工具构建是应对开放任务流的关键，分解损失并分别解决（演化+适应）相比单一日志频繁更新更有效，适度人工干预能弥补历史信号不足。

title: FLARE: Diffusion for Hybrid Language Model
summary: Autoregressive (AR) large language models (LLMs) have achieved broad practical success, but sequential decoding remains a key bottleneck for low-latency deployment. Recent efficient-inference work has progressed along two axes: reducing the cost of each model invocation through efficient architectures, and reducing serial decoding steps through parallel generation. Hybrid attention backbones address the former, while diffusion language models (dLLMs) pursue the latter via iterative parallel denoising. Combining these advantages remains challenging: AR-to-dLLM conversion often fails to preserve seed-checkpoint capability, and hybrid-attention recurrent states and masking constraints make diffusion training and serving nontrivial. We present FLARE, a systematic conversion framework for hybrid-attention LLMs. Our analysis identifies transfer data quality as the primary determinant of capability preservation, outweighing loss formulation and attention-mask design. The resulting framework combines a token-equal AR-and-diffusion objective, hardware-aware kernels, and unified inference, enabling one checkpoint to support both AR-style verified decoding and diffusion-style parallel denoising. Starting from strong AR checkpoints with limited post-training data, FLARE is competitive with leading open-source dLLMs across model scales and delivers consistent throughput gains over open-source dLLM baselines in single-GPU concurrent serving. Our results further suggest that practical dLLMs are limited not only by decoding algorithms, but also by transfer data quality and the training inefficiency of current block-diffusion objectives, motivating joint design of data, objectives, architectures, and inference systems.

AI.tldr: FLARE提出了一种系统化的转换框架，将混合注意力架构的自回归大型语言模型转换为扩散语言模型，同时支持AR解码和扩散并行去噪，核心发现是迁移数据质量比损失函数或注意力掩码设计更能决定能力保留程度。
AI.motivation: 自回归LLM的序列解码是低延迟部署的关键瓶颈。虽然混合注意力骨干网络降低了单次模型调用成本，扩散语言模型通过迭代并行去噪减少了串行解码步骤，但将两者结合面临挑战：AR到dLLM的转换常无法保留种子检查点能力，且混合注意力的循环状态和掩码约束使扩散训练和服务变得困难。
AI.method: FLARE提出系统化转换框架，包含三个关键组件：(1) token等价的AR和扩散联合训练目标，(2) 硬件感知的算子实现，(3) 统一推理机制。通过分析识别出迁移数据质量是能力保留的首要决定因素。
AI.result: 在多个模型规模上与领先的开源dLLM相比具有竞争力，在单GPU并发服务中相比开源dLLM基线实现了一致的吞吐量提升。
AI.conclusion: 实际dLLM不仅受限于解码算法，还受限于迁移数据质量和当前块扩散目标的训练低效性，建议数据、目标、架构和推理系统应联合设计。

title: A Local Perturbation Theory for Cross-Domain Interference and Recovery in Multi-Domain RL
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training improves large language models (LLMs) on individual domains such as mathematical reasoning, code generation, question answering, and creative writing (CW), but training on one domain often degrades performance on others. Existing explanations based on catastrophic forgetting or global gradient conflict are incomplete: substantial interference can occur even when full-model gradients are nearly orthogonal. We show that single-domain RL produces sparse, small-magnitude parameter edits with weak overlap among top-changed neurons, while different domains still share substantial active computation routes on which update directions determine whether they act synergistically or conflict. Guided by this observation, we prove under a local perturbation model of multi-domain RL that later-domain training harms an earlier domain mainly through a second-order damage term, which under the observed sparse route structure concentrates in a low-dimensional shared conflict subspace. Moreover, a short domain refresh contracts the harmful component on this subspace, enabling selective recovery with limited collateral damage. Consistent with the theory, a brief Re-Math refresh after Code $\rightarrow$ Math $\rightarrow$ QA $\rightarrow$ CW recovers Math from 57.66 to 66.04 while largely preserving performance on the other domains, yielding the best average score of 66.39. Beyond refresh, a training-free rollback on a sparse proxy conflict coordinate set for the Math-QA pair partially restores Math, providing direct proxy-level evidence for localized damage. These results provide a localized mechanistic account of interference and recovery in multi-domain RL.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了多领域RL后训练中，单领域训练仅产生稀疏、小幅度参数编辑，但不同领域共享计算路径，导致第二阶损伤项在低维冲突子空间集中。通过短时领域刷新可压缩有害分量，选择性恢复性能，实验验证了该机制。
AI.motivation: 现有RL后训练在提升LLM单领域能力时会导致其他领域性能下降，现有解释（如灾难性遗忘、全局梯度冲突）不完整，因为即使梯度正交仍存在显著干扰。
AI.method: 通过分析单领域RL参数编辑的稀疏性，提出局部扰动模型，证明跨领域干扰主要源于共享计算路径上的二阶损伤项，该损伤集中在低维冲突子空间；提出短时领域刷新方法压缩有害分量。
AI.result: Code→Math→QA→CW训练后，简短Re-Math刷新将Math从57.66恢复至66.04，同时保持其他领域性能，平均分达66.39。训练无关的稀疏代理坐标回滚也部分恢复了Math性能。
AI.conclusion: 提供了多领域RL中干扰与恢复的局部化机制解释，证实了低维冲突子空间的存在及刷新恢复的有效性。

title: On the Scaling of PEFT: Towards Million Personal Models of Trillion Parameters
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) is usually treated as a cheaper alternative to full fine-tuning. We study a broader role: small trainable adapters as persistent local state on top of strong shared foundation models. In this framing, the base model provides shared competence while adapters carry instance-specific behavior such as preferences, skills, tool habits, and memory-like updates. We organize the problem around three scaling axes: Scale Up, where stronger shared priors make small local updates more useful; Scale Down, where we study how small adapters can be while remaining reliable; and Scale Out, where many persistent adapted instances coexist. MinT provides one infrastructure example for managing adapter identity, revision, provenance, evaluation, and serving residency. Together, the results suggest that PEFT can be a compact substrate for persistent personal models rather than only a budget substitute for full fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将参数高效微调（PEFT）重新定位为在共享基础模型上承载持久化本地状态（如偏好、技能、工具习惯和记忆）的轻量级适配器，而非仅仅作为全微调的廉价替代方案。通过三个维度（Scale Up、Scale Down、Scale Out）系统地研究了这一框架，并介绍了MinT基础设施用于管理适配器的身份、版本、溯源、评估和服务驻留。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常将PEFT视为全微调的低成本替代方案，但作者认为其潜力不止于此——小适配器可以作为持久化的本地状态，在共享强大基础模型之上承载实例级别的个性化行为（如用户偏好、技能、工具习惯和记忆更新），从而实现更灵活的个性化模型管理。
AI.method: 论文围绕三个缩放轴组织研究：(1) Scale Up——更强的共享先验使小规模局部更新更有用；(2) Scale Down——研究适配器在保持可靠性前提下能有多小；(3) Scale Out——研究大量持久化适配实例共存时的管理问题。并构建了MinT基础设施来管理适配器的身份、版本、溯源、评估和服务驻留。
AI.result: 研究表明PEFT可以作为一种紧凑的持久化个性化模型载体，而不仅仅是全微调的预算替代方案。MinT基础设施有效支持了适配器在多实例场景下的全生命周期管理。
AI.conclusion: PEFT应被重新理解为在共享基础模型上实现持久化本地个性化状态的紧凑基板，这一视角拓展了其应用价值，为构建大规模个性化AI系统提供了新的范式。

title: Learning Implicit Bias in Generative Spaces for Accelerating Protein Dynamics Emulation
summary: Generative emulators of protein dynamics produce plausible trajectories at a fraction of the cost of molecular dynamics, but they inherit their training distribution and tend to revisit known states rather than reach rare ones under long-horizon extrapolation. Inspired by classical enhanced sampling, we introduce an implicit, history-dependent bias in the generative space of a pretrained emulator. Specifically, a history-aware score estimator augments the frozen emulator with a distance-weighted bias that steers reverse-time sampling away from previously generated structures, regularized by an environment-support term. To preserve structural validity at long horizons, a score-based refinement step re-projects drifted samples onto the data manifold using the frozen emulator. Our experiments demonstrate that the method (i) raises diversity by $35\%$ on DynamicPDB-80; (ii) on $12$ zero-shot Fast-Folding proteins, the learned bias alone reaches the unbiased emulator's coverage up to ${\sim}15\times$ faster, and pairing it with refinement reaches the coverage up to ${\sim}37\times$ faster while covering ${\sim}3\times$ as many low-energy states. Code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 提出一种历史依赖的生成偏置方法，在预训练蛋白质构象生成模型中引入隐式增强采样，使长时程外推时能更高效地探索稀有状态，实验表明覆盖率提升最高37倍，多样性提升35%。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质生成模拟器虽然效率高，但会继承训练分布，在长时间外推时倾向于重复已知状态，难以到达稀有构象。受经典增强采样启发，作者希望在生成空间中引入历史依赖的偏置来改善这一问题。
AI.method: (1) 在冻结的预训练生成模拟器上，增加一个历史感知的分数估计器，通过距离加权偏置引导反向采样远离已生成结构；(2) 引入环境支撑项进行正则化；(3) 采用基于分数的精炼步骤，将漂移的样本重新投影回数据流形以保持结构有效性。
AI.result: (1) 在DynamicPDB-80上多样性提升35%；(2) 在12个零样本Fast-Folding蛋白上，仅用偏置即可比无偏置模拟器快~15倍达到相同覆盖率，结合精炼后快~37倍，且覆盖的低能状态数量约3倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功将经典增强采样思想融入预训练生成模型，在不重新训练模型的前提下显著提升蛋白质构象采样的多样性与稀有态覆盖效率，具有良好泛化能力。

title: Mos-Gen: A Generative Molecular Framework for Mosquito Insecticide Design
summary: Mosquito-borne infectious diseases cause more than 700000 deaths worldwide each year. The long-term use of conventional chemical insecticides has induced serious resistance problems, creating an urgent need to develop novel, highly effective, and ecologically sustainable alternatives. While existing artificial intelligence approaches in this domain have focused primarily on activity prediction and classification, they leave a critical gap in the de~novo generation of novel molecular scaffolds. In this study, we propose Mos-Gen, a motif-aware generative collaborative framework that couples the pretrained molecular representation model Uni-Mol with a variational autoencoder (VAE), specifically tailored for the design of disulfide-containing allicin derivatives as mosquito insecticides. Among the generated candidates, fourteen compounds -- comprising nine predicted positives and five predicted negatives -- were selected for chemical synthesis and experimental validation. The hit rate among the predicted positives reached 78%, whereas none of the predicted negatives exhibited mosquitocidal activity. These experimental results fully validated the high-precision screening capability of the Mos-Gen framework.

AI.tldr: 提出Mos-Gen框架，结合Uni-Mol预训练模型和VAE生成新型含二硫键大蒜素衍生物作为蚊虫杀虫剂，实验验证预测阳性命中率达78%。
AI.motivation: 传统化学杀虫剂长期使用导致严重抗药性问题，亟需开发新型高效生态友好替代品；现有AI方法仅能做活性预测和分类，缺乏从头生成新分子骨架的能力。
AI.method: 提出Mos-Gen框架：将预训练分子表征模型Uni-Mol与变分自编码器(VAE)耦合，构建基序感知的生成式协作框架，专门用于设计含二硫键的大蒜素衍生物。
AI.result: 从生成候选物中选出14个化合物（9个预测阳性+5个预测阴性）进行实验验证：预测阳性命中率78%，预测阴性均无杀蚊活性。
AI.conclusion: 实验充分验证了Mos-Gen框架的高精度筛选能力，填补了从头生成新型蚊虫杀虫剂分子骨架的空白。

title: A Theoretical Framework for Self-Play Theorem Proving Algorithms
summary: Self-play, a type of training algorithm that enables a model to self-improve, has recently shown promising empirical results in the context of formal theorem proving using Large Language Models (LLMs). (Dong & Ma, 2025) instantiate self-play with two cooperating agents: a prover, which proves theorems, and a conjecturer, which generates new theorems as a curriculum to the prover. In this paper, we provide a theoretical framework for understanding the self-improvement capabilities of self-play algorithms for theorem proving. First, we formalize the set of theorems as a graph, with nodes as theorems and edges between pairs of theorems with similar semantics. We introduce a set of primitive assumptions that characterize the guarantees of a trained prover and how a conjecturer can access the structure of the graph. Second, we show that if the underlying graph of theorems is well-connected, then a prover-conjecturer system, where the conjecturing algorithm is based on a reversible random walk, is sufficient to grow the set of proved theorems exponentially. Third, motivated by an issue encountered empirically by self-play algorithms, where the conjecturer tends to generate artificially complex and non-fundamental theorems, we propose a diversity measure for a training distribution of theorems generated by a conjecturer and an improved conjecturing algorithm that locally maximizes this diversity measure, by computing the diffusion similarity between neighboring theorems in the theorem graph. Finally, we describe a method to compute the diffusion similarity by using contrastive learning to embed nodes into Euclidean space and then computing the inner-product between embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本文为定理证明中的自我博弈算法提供了理论框架，形式化了定理图结构，证明了在良好连接的定理图上可逆随机游走的猜想器能使证明定理集合指数增长，并提出基于扩散相似度的多样性度量来改进猜想器算法。
AI.motivation: 自我博弈算法在形式定理证明中表现出良好的实证效果，但缺乏理论理解，需要建立理论基础来解释其自我改进的能力。
AI.method: 将定理形式化为图结构（节点为定理，边为语义相似关系），基于可逆随机游走设计猜想器算法，提出扩散相似度多样性度量，利用对比学习将节点嵌入欧氏空间并计算内积来实现。
AI.result: 理论上证明当定理图良好连接时，证明器-猜想器系统可使已证明定理集合指数增长；提出改进猜想器算法可局部最大化多样性度量。
AI.conclusion: 为自我博弈定理证明提供了理论基础，并提出解决猜想器生成非基础复杂定理问题的多样性改进方案。

title: Continual Learning as a Multiphase Moving-Boundary Problem
summary: Continual learning struggles to balance retaining past knowledge with absorbing new tasks. Stefan-CL elegantly resolves this stability-plasticity dilemma through the physics of melting. It frames consolidated knowledge as a protected "solid" and unused capacity as an adaptable "liquid." As the network learns, this boundary expands, governed by a "latent heat" tuning dial. By mathematically freezing the learned interior, Stefan-CL cuts forgetting to near zero, matching memory-heavy baselines without storing raw data, forging a beautiful, physics-grounded path for AI.

AI.tldr: Stefan-CL利用熔融物理机制（固-液边界扩展与潜热调控）解决了持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境，在不存储原始数据的情况下几乎完全消除了灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 持续学习面临核心矛盾：如何在吸收新任务的同时不遗忘旧知识（稳定性-可塑性困境）。现有方法要么牺牲旧知识，要么需要存储大量历史数据。
AI.method: 借鉴熔融物理：将已学知识视为受保护的"固体"，未用容量视为可适应的"液体"。学习过程中固-液边界不断扩展，通过"潜热"旋钮调控转换速率。数学上冻结已学习的内部结构。
AI.result: 遗忘率降至接近零，性能与需要存储原始数据的记忆密集型基线方法相当，且无需存储原始数据。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种优雅且物理基础扎实的持续学习新范式，为AI系统的持续学习开辟了新路径。

title: Task-Induced Representational Invariances Depend on Learning Objective in Deep RL
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has long served as a model for goal-directed animal behavior in neuroscience. Modern deep RL has shown remarkable success across many domains, further strengthening this connection. The ability to learn abstract representations of high-dimensional state spaces underlies much of this success. However, theoretical understanding of these learned representations remains limited, hindering direct comparisons between models and animal learning. We address this gap by analyzing deep RL representations through the lens of MDP reduction theory. Investigating canonical RL algorithms in a navigation task, we find that even when performance is comparable, the value-based method (DQN) learns representations that are invariant to MDP homomorphism symmetries, while the policy-gradient method (PPO) learns representations invariant to action symmetries. These differences emerge consistently across domains, have downstream consequences for transfer learning, and appear in LLMs in a prompt-dependent manner. Our findings provide a principled approach to comparing learned representations across RL algorithms, with demonstrated practical implications and possible insights for neural coding in the brain.

AI.tldr: 本文通过MDP约简理论分析深度强化学习表征，发现DQN学习MDP同态不变表征而PPO学习动作对称不变表征，这种差异影响迁移学习且在大语言模型中以提示依赖方式存在，为神经科学中动物行为建模提供了新视角。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习成功部分归因于学习高维状态空间的抽象表征能力，但理论理解有限，阻碍了模型与动物学习的直接比较。本文旨在通过MDP约简理论填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用MDP约简理论分析深度RL表征；在导航任务中比较DQN（基于价值）和PPO（基于策略梯度）算法的学习表征；分析表征对称性不变性；在迁移学习和LLM中验证下游影响。
AI.result: 性能相当时，DQN学习MDP同态对称不变表征，PPO学习动作对称不变表征；这种差异跨领域一致存在，影响迁移学习，并在LLM中以提示依赖方式出现。
AI.conclusion: 提供了比较不同RL算法学习表征的原则性方法，具有实际应用意义，并为大脑神经编码提供可能的见解。

title: G2LoRA: Gradient Orthogonal Low-Rank Adaptation Framework for Graph Continual Learning on Text-Attributed Graphs
summary: LLM-as-Aligner has emerged as a prevalent pre-training paradigm for Text-Attributed Graphs(TAGS), aligning graph and text modalities into a shared embedding space via CLIP-style contrastive learning. While effective on individual downstream tasks, we observe severe catastrophic forgetting when such models are sequentially fine-tuned on streaming tasks. Although parameter-efficient fine-tuning alleviates forgetting to some extent, it remains insufficient to resolve task interference and ineffective knowledge transfer. In this work, we study graph continual learning for LLM-as-Aligner models on TAGs, with the goal of mitigating interference while promoting positive transfer across tasks. This setting introduces two fundamental challenges: (1) heterogeneous downstream tasks induce shifting optimization objectives, hindering unified fine-tuning; and (2) graph and text encoders exhibit different sensitivities to adaptation, making uncoordinated updates prone to misalignment. To address these challenges, we propose G2LoRA, a continual learning framework for TAGs. G2LoRA unifies node-, link-, and graph-level tasks under a single graph--text alignment objective, and enables consistent optimization across domain/class/task incremental modes. To reduce task interference while encouraging positive transfer, G2LoRA performs category-aware gradient projection in structured subspaces, resolving conflicting updates and enabling conditional backward transfer to balance forward and backward knowledge flow. To further prevent cross-modal drift, G2LoRA introduces gradient magnitude modulation to coordinate update rates between graph and text encoders. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that G2LoRA consistently outperforms strong baselines across different backbone architectures, achieving superior continual performance and transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出G2LoRA，一个针对LLM-as-Aligner模型在文本属性图上的持续学习框架，通过统一多层级任务目标、类别感知梯度投影和跨模态梯度调节，有效缓解灾难性遗忘并促进正向知识迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-as-Aligner模型在流式任务顺序微调时存在严重的灾难性遗忘问题，参数高效微调虽能缓解但不足以解决任务干扰和知识迁移不足的挑战。
AI.method: G2LoRA包含三个核心组件：(1) 统一图-文本对齐目标，将节点、链接和图级任务统一为对比学习目标；(2) 类别感知梯度投影，在结构化子空间中解决冲突梯度并实现条件性反向迁移；(3) 梯度幅度调制，协调图编码器和文本编码器的更新速率，防止跨模态漂移。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，G2LoRA在不同骨干架构下均一致优于强基线方法，取得了优越的持续学习性能和可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一优化目标、结构化梯度投影和跨模态协调更新，G2LoRA有效解决了文本属性图上持续学习中的任务干扰和模态失调问题。

title: Beyond the Simplex: Balanced Prototype Geometry for Scorer-Agnostic Open-Set Recognition
summary:
Open-set recognition (OSR) requires a classifier to reject inputs from unseen classes which is essential in safety-critical settings such as medical imaging. Simplex based methods, which fix class prototypes at the vertices of a regular simplex and then reject via a distance-ratio score, perform well empirically but lack theoretical justification, and existing analysis applies only when the embedding dimension d is at least C-1, which is the regime in which a regular simplex exists.
  We give a theoretical account of simplex-ratio OSR that holds in every embedding dimension, including d < C-1. Our analysis centers on balanced equal-norm codes: prototype configurations with equal lengths and zero sum, which exist for all d >= 2 and include the regular simplex as a special case. For these codes we show that an auxiliary squared ratio score has sublevel sets that are exact unions of Euclidean balls, which in turn bracket the acceptance region of the operational score; and we prove a sharp dichotomy: the prototypes attain one-distance symmetry, behaving like a regular simplex, if and only if d >= C-1, with controlled degradation governed by an explicit defect parameter below that threshold. We further show the false-acceptance rate decays exponentially in d under natural isotropy assumptions, and that the operational score is globally Lipschitz with compact acceptance regions.
  Empirically, we study balanced prototype geometry as both an analytic tool and a representation-learning prior, rather than as a stand-alone state-of-the-art detector. Across CIFAR and MedMNIST open-set splits, the geometry provides useful structure, but OSR performance remains strongly dependent on the scoring rule: raw ratio scores typically underperform nearest-neighbor and logit-based alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文对基于单纯形比率的开集识别方法提供了完整理论分析，证明其适用于任意嵌入维度（包括d < C-1），并通过实验验证了几何结构作为分析工具和表示学习先验的有效性，但性能仍高度依赖于评分规则。
AI.motivation: 开集识别需要在安全关键场景（如医疗影像）中拒绝未知类别的输入。基于单纯形的方法经验表现良好但缺乏理论依据，且现有分析仅适用于嵌入维度d ≥ C-1的情况。
AI.method: 提出平衡等范数码（balanced equal-norm codes）框架，分析其几何性质：证明辅助平方比率分数的子水平集是欧几里得球的精确并集，建立原型几何的二分法（d ≥ C-1时达到单纯形对称性，低于阈值时存在显式缺陷参数），并分析假接受率的指数衰减特性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR和MedMNIST数据集上，平衡原型几何提供了有用结构，但原始比率分数表现不如最近邻和基于logit的替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架适用于所有嵌入维度，但实际开集识别性能强烈依赖于评分规则选择，几何结构更适合作为分析工具和表示学习先验而非独立的最优检测器。

title: Segment-driven Structural Induction and Semantic Alignment for Heterogeneous Tabular Representation
summary: Real-world domains often contain heterogeneous tables whose headers vary while their underlying attribute semantics are shared, making it difficult to induce domain-specialized semantics from table-local evidence alone. Existing encoders model parts of this problem, but often underuse column-level value distributions and apply uniform objectives across attributes with different semantic roles. We propose NAVI, a segment-centric pretraining framework that treats each header-value pair as the unit for aggregating schema-level structural evidence and column-level distributional evidence. We realize this design through Masked Segment Modeling and Entropy-driven Segment Alignment, which jointly enforce structured header-value coupling and semantic alignment across stable and instance-specific attributes. Experiments on heterogeneous in-domain tables show improved reconstruction, semantic consistency, and downstream utility across evaluation settings overall.

AI.tldr: 提出NAVI框架，通过Masked Segment Modeling和Entropy-driven Segment Alignment实现异构表格的段级预训练，有效利用列级值分布和头-值对语义对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理异构表格中表头变化但底层语义共享的问题，且未能充分利用列级值分布，对具有不同语义角色的属性使用统一目标。
AI.method: 提出NAVI框架，以头部-值对为单元聚合模式级结构证据和列级分布证据，通过Masked Segment Modeling（掩码段建模）和Entropy-driven Segment Alignment（熵驱动段对齐）联合学习。
AI.result: 在异构域内表格上，NAVI在重建、语义一致性和下游任务效用方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: NAVI通过段级预训练有效捕捉异构表格中的共享语义，验证了头-值对作为基本语义单元的可行性。

title: Private and Stable Test-Time Adaptation with Differential Privacy
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) can reduce error on new and different data by updating the model on these inputs during inference. However, these updates raise the issue of privacy w.r.t. the testing data, because the model parameters now depend on all past inputs. To control this privacy risk, we cast multiple popular TTA methods (Tent, EATA, SAR, DeYO, and COME) into differential privacy (DP) forms that apply per-sample gradient clipping and Gaussian noise for all updates. On ImageNet-C, our DP-TTA methods provide adequate privacy at small cost to accuracy, and in the low-privacy regime the clipping mechanism of DP can even improve the accuracy and stability of adaptation in the continual setting. These improvements to privacy and accuracy come at only modest computational overhead. These first results on private TTA raise awareness of the issue, inform the development of more private test-time updates, and identify per-sample clipping as an effective technique for improving the accuracy and stability of adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将差分隐私（DP）引入测试时自适应（TTA）领域，通过在多种主流TTA方法（Tent、EATA、SAR、DeYO、COME）中应用每样本梯度裁剪和高斯噪声来实现隐私保护。在ImageNet-C上的实验表明，DP-TTA在适度牺牲准确率的情况下提供了足够的隐私保护，且在低隐私机制下，裁剪机制甚至能提升自适应准确率和稳定性，计算开销仅适度增加。
AI.motivation: TTA方法在推理过程中利用测试数据更新模型，导致模型参数依赖于所有历史输入，引发测试数据的隐私泄露风险。现有研究未充分关注这一问题，作者旨在量化并控制TTA中的隐私风险。
AI.method: 将五种流行TTA方法（Tent、EATA、SAR、DeYO、COME）转化为差分隐私形式（DP-TTA），核心操作为：每样本梯度裁剪（per-sample gradient clipping）和添加高斯噪声，所有更新步骤均应用此机制。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-C数据集上，DP-TTA在提供足够隐私保护的同时仅造成较小的准确率损失；在低隐私机制下，每样本裁剪机制反而提升了自适应的准确率和稳定性；计算开销仅为适度增加。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次提出了私有化TTA的概念和实现方法，提高了对TTA隐私问题的认识，为开发更私密的测试时更新方法提供指导，并发现每样本裁剪是提升自适应准确率和稳定性的有效技术。

title: Randomized Least Squares Value Iteration itself is Joint Differentially Private
summary: As reinforcement learning (RL) increasingly applies to sensitive domains, such as health care and recommendation systems, privacy-preserving techniques have become essential to protect users' sensitive information. We investigate privacy-preserving RL under an episodic setting, focusing on algorithms based on randomized exploration, such as Randomized Least Squares Value Iteration (RLSVI). The overall goal is to study how randomized exploration interacts with the injected noise required by privacy mechanisms. In this work, we show a new privacy analysis that characterizes how the noise in RLSVI set for exploration simultaneously provides privacy protection. Specifically, we prove that RLSVI is $(\varepsilon(δ),δ)$-joint differentially private in tabular MDP as is with $\varepsilon(δ) = \frac{2AK}{H^2\log(2HSA)} + 2\sqrt{\frac{2AK\log(1/δ)}{H^2\log(2HSA)}}$, where $S$ and $A$ are the number of states and actions respectively, $H$ is the length of an episode and $K$ is the number of episodes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究强化学习中的隐私保护问题，证明了随机探索算法RLSVI在表格MDP中本身即满足联合差分隐私，无需额外添加噪声。
AI.motivation: 随着RL应用于医疗、推荐系统等敏感领域，保护用户隐私变得至关重要。现有隐私保护RL工作通常需要额外注入噪声，但RLSVI中的随机探索本身已包含噪声，本文动机是探究这种探索噪声是否能够同时提供隐私保障。
AI.method: 对RLSVI算法进行了全新的隐私分析，严格推导了其在表格MDP中的联合差分隐私界，证明了算法内置的随机探索噪声足以提供隐私保护，无需额外添加隐私噪声。
AI.result: 证明了RLSVI在表格MDP中是(ε(δ),δ)-联合差分隐私的，其中ε(δ) = 2AK/(H²log(2HSA)) + 2√(2AK log(1/δ)/(H²log(2HSA)))，S和A为状态和动作数，H为episode长度，K为episode数。
AI.conclusion: 随机探索与隐私保护之间存在内在协同关系，RLSVI的探索噪声可同时服务于隐私保护，为设计更高效的隐私保护RL算法提供了理论基础。

title: A Closer Look at In-Distribution vs. Out-of-Distribution Accuracy for Open-Set Test-time Adaptation
summary: Open-set test-time adaptation (TTA) updates models on new data in the presence of input shifts and unknown output classes. While recent methods have made progress on improving in-distribution (InD) accuracy for known classes, their ability to accurately detect out-of-distribution (OOD) unknown classes remains underexplored. We benchmark robust and open-set TTA methods (SAR, OSTTA, UniEnt, and SoTTA) on the standard corruption benchmarks of CIFAR-10-C at the small scale and ImageNet-C at the large scale. For CIFAR-10-C, we use OOD data from SVHN and CIFAR-100 in their respective corrupted forms of SVHN-C and CIFAR-100-C. For ImageNet-C, we use OOD data from ImageNet-O and Textures in their respective corrupted forms of ImageNet-O-C and Textures-C. ImageNet-O is nearer to ImageNet, as unknown but related object classes (like ''garlic bread'' vs. ''hot dog'' for food, or ''highway'' vs. ''dam'' for infrastructure), while Textures is farther from ImageNet, as non-object patterns (like ''cracked'' mud, ''porous'' sponge, ''veined'' leaves). We evaluate the accuracy and confidence of TTA methods for InD vs. OOD recognition on CIFAR-10-C and ImageNet-C. We verify the accuracy of each method's own OOD detection technique on CIFAR-10-C. We also evaluate on ImageNet-C and report both accuracy and standard OOD detection metrics. We further examine more realistic settings, in which the proportions and rates of OOD data can vary. To explore the trade-off between InD recognition and OOD rejection, we propose a new baseline that replaces softmax/multi-class output with sigmoid/multi-label output. Our analysis shows for the first time that current open-set TTA methods struggle to balance InD and OOD accuracy and that they only imperfectly filter OOD data for their own adaptation updates.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了开放集测试时自适应（Open-set TTA）方法在分布内（InD）识别与分布外（OOD）检测之间的权衡，发现现有方法在平衡两者上表现不佳，并提出了一种基于sigmoid/多标签输出的新基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集TTA方法主要关注提高已知类别的分布内准确率，但对未知类别的OOD检测能力研究不足，本文旨在系统评估并揭示两者间的权衡关系。
AI.method: 在CIFAR-10-C和ImageNet-C基准上评估了SAR、OSTTA、UniEnt、SoTTA等方法，使用SVHN-C、CIFAR-100-C、ImageNet-O-C、Textures-C作为OOD数据，并提出了sigmoid/多标签输出的新基线方法。
AI.result: 现有开放集TTA方法在InD准确率和OOD检测之间存在显著权衡，无法有效平衡；它们对OOD数据的过滤不完全，影响了自身的自适应更新效果。
AI.conclusion: 当前开放集TTA方法在平衡InD和OOD性能方面存在根本性缺陷，需要新的方法设计来同时兼顾两者的表现。

title: Why Do Time Series Models Need Long Context Windows?
summary: Modern deep learning models for forecasting groups of time series rely on increasingly longer observation windows. However, the benefit of increasing the window size is often simply attributed to capturing long-range dependencies, and broader discussion on how global forecasting models leverage input observations has been limited. In this paper, we show that forecasting groups of time series involves two objectives: (i) generative process identification (GPI), i.e., inferring the specific process generating the input sequence, and (ii) conditional forecasting (CF), i.e., predicting future values given input observations. From this perspective, optimal predictions can be interpreted as an average over plausible data-generating processes, weighted by their likelihood given the input window. This suggests another explanation for the benefits of long context windows: they reduce the uncertainty about which specific process is generating the input time series during operation. We prove that even for processes with memory length $P$, an input window size strictly larger than $P$ is necessary to achieve the minimum attainable error. Finally, we show how decoupling GPI and CF can improve computational scalability without compromising accuracy. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data validate our insights and their relevance for designing forecasting architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示时间序列全局预测模型利用长输入窗口不仅是为了捕捉长程依赖，更重要的是降低生成过程识别的不确定性；证明即使对记忆长度为P的过程，输入窗口必须严格大于P才能达到最小误差；并提出解耦生成过程识别与条件预测的方法以提升计算可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习时间序列预测模型倾向于使用越来越长的观察窗口，但对其为何有效缺乏深入理解，通常简单地归因于捕捉长程依赖。作者希望从更根本的角度解释长窗口的作用机制。
AI.method: 作者提出将时间序列组预测分解为两个目标：(1) 生成过程识别（GPI）——推断输入序列的具体生成过程；(2) 条件预测（CF）——基于输入观测预测未来值。最优预测可解释为对所有可能数据生成过程的平均，以其似然为权重。通过理论证明和实验验证这一框架。
AI.result: 理论证明即使过程记忆长度为P，输入窗口需要严格大于P才能达到最小误差；解耦GPI和CF可在不牺牲精度的情况下提升计算可扩展性；合成数据和真实数据实验验证了上述见解。
AI.conclusion: 长上下文窗口的价值不仅在于捕捉长程依赖，更在于减少对生成过程识别的不确定性；将GPI和CF解耦是设计高效预测架构的有效方向。

title: Evaluating Real-World Generalizability of Algorithm Selection Models
summary: Algorithm Selection (AS) aims to automatically identify the most suitable optimization algorithm for a given problem instance by leveraging measurable problem characteristics and historical performance data. In this study, we investigate the generalization ability of AS models across both synthetic and real-world optimization landscapes. We consider two widely used academic benchmark suites (BBOB and CEC) and two real-world problem sets (robotics trajectory optimization tasks and unmanned aerial vehicle path-planning problems). Through a systematic cross-benchmark evaluation, we analyze how AS models transfer between domains, identify where generalization succeeds or breaks down, and highlight the challenges that arise when applying AS in realistic, domain-specific contexts. Our findings provide insights into the robustness of current AS approaches and inform the development of more reliable, broadly applicable AS systems for real-world optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了算法选择（AS）模型在合成基准（BBOB、CEC）与真实世界优化问题（机器人轨迹优化、无人机路径规划）之间的泛化能力，通过交叉基准评估揭示了AS跨域迁移的成功与失败模式，为构建更可靠的实用AS系统提供了见解。
AI.motivation: 现有AS研究多局限于合成基准测试，缺乏对真实世界优化问题的系统验证，特别是AS模型在跨领域（合成 vs. 真实）泛化时的表现尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用系统性交叉基准评估方法，在两个学术基准套件（BBOB、CEC）和两个真实问题集（机器人轨迹优化、无人机路径规划）上训练和测试AS模型，分析其迁移和泛化能力。
AI.result: 揭示了AS模型在合成与真实域之间泛化成功与失败的具体模式，识别了跨域迁移中的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 当前AS方法的鲁棒性有限，需发展更可靠、更具广泛适用性的AS系统以应对真实世界优化需求。

title: Realistic noise synthesis reduces bias and improves tissue microstructure estimation with supervised machine learning
summary: Diffusion MRI enables non-invasive probing of tissue microstructure, but accurate parameter estimation is challenged by noise-related effects. In supervised machine learning frameworks trained on simulated data, discrepancies between the noise characteristics of simulated and acquired signals introduce a form of covariate shift, whereby the input signal distribution differs between training and inference. We investigated the impact of this mismatch on microstructure parameter estimation and propose a realistic noise synthesis (RNS) framework to mitigate it. RNS incorporates both the Rician expectation and the effective post-processing noise variance into simulated training signals. The Rician expectation was modelled using a noise standard deviation estimated with MPPCA, while the effective standard deviation was derived from spherical harmonic residuals of preprocessed data. The method was evaluated using the cylinder-zeppelin and the SANDI models on simulated datasets across multiple SNR levels and on in vivo diffusion data with repeated acquisitions. Sensitivity to noise misestimation was also assessed. Ignoring magnitude-induced noise effects during training produced systematic, SNR-dependent parameter bias, particularly at low SNR. Incorporating the Rician expectation substantially reduced bias to the level of noise-aware nonlinear least-squares fitting. Modelling the effective standard deviation further improved precision. Performance was largely independent of regression architecture but sensitive to accurate noise estimation. These findings demonstrate that realistic noise modelling in simulated training data mitigates signal-domain covariate shift and is essential for unbiased supervised microstructure estimation, particularly in low-SNR regimes associated with high b-values or high spatial resolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种真实噪声合成（RNS）框架，通过在模拟训练数据中引入Rician期望和有效后处理噪声方差，弥合模拟信号与采集信号之间的噪声差异，从而消除监督学习微结构参数估计中的协变量偏移，显著降低低信噪比下的参数偏差。
AI.motivation: 扩散MRI的微结构参数估计受噪声影响严重，监督学习框架中模拟数据与真实采集数据的噪声特性不一致（协变量偏移），导致参数估计有偏，特别是在低SNR场景下。
AI.method: 提出RNS框架：（1）使用MPPCA估计的噪声标准差建模Rician期望；（2）从预处理数据的球谐残差中提取有效后处理噪声方差。将这两者注入模拟训练信号，并在cylinder-zeppelin和SANDI模型上评估。
AI.result: 忽略幅度噪声效应导致系统性、SNR依赖的参数偏差；引入Rician期望大幅减少偏差，达到与噪声感知非线性最小二乘拟合相当的水平；进一步建模有效标准差提升了精度；方法对回归架构不敏感，但对噪声估计精度敏感。
AI.conclusion: 在模拟训练数据中引入真实噪声建模能够有效缓解信号域的协变量偏移，对于实现无偏的监督微结构估计至关重要，尤其是在高b值或高空间分辨率的低SNR场景下。

title: Ablating Archetypes: The Stability of Archetypal SAEs is an Artifact of Initialization and Metric Design
summary: Dictionary learning with sparse autoencoders (SAEs) produces overcomplete bases from neural network activations that are often interpretable and reduces polysemanticity. However, features from SAEs vary substantially across random seeds -- a problem known as instability. Archetypal SAEs (Fel et al., 2025) were proposed as a general dictionary-learning intervention for more reliable concept extraction, and report more stable dictionaries at the end of training. We demonstrate that the stability claimed by archetypal SAEs is a result of setting identical initialization across multiple runs. Through our analyses, we attempt to clarify two distinct notions in mechanistic interpretability that may be ambiguously used: stability is agreement between two independently trained models, whereas stabilization is the convergence of independently initialized runs toward a common solution. This distinction is critical for mechanistic interpretability of natural language processing (NLP), where feature stability is increasingly used as evidence that SAE features are reusable units of analysis. Experiments from archetypal SAEs share a deterministic k-means decoder initialization, setting inter-run dictionary distance to zero before training begins. When this initialization is removed, the archetypal constraint provides no stabilization advantage in our setting. We further identify a preprocessing-dependent cosine geometry issue that complicates interpretation of endpoint stability metrics. Overall, our study supports the value of studying SAEs within the larger dictionary-learning tradition while showing that stability claims require trajectory diagnostics and initialization ablations.

AI.tldr: 本文指出Archetypal SAEs声称的稳定性实际上源于跨多次实验使用相同的初始化，而非方法本身的优势。作者区分了"稳定性"（stability）和"稳定化"（stabilization）两个概念，并证明去除确定性初始化后，archetypal约束并未提供任何稳定化优势。
AI.motivation: SAE特征在不同随机种子下差异很大（不稳定性问题），而Archetypal SAEs声称能提取更可靠的词典。本文旨在检验该声称的有效性，并澄清可解释性中模糊使用的术语。
AI.method: 分析Archetypal SAEs的实验设置，指出其使用了确定性的k-means解码器初始化（跨运行相同），导致运行间的词典距离从训练开始即为零。作者通过去除该初始化进行消融实验，并指出预处理相关的余弦几何问题。
AI.result: 去除确定性初始化后，archetypal约束未提供任何稳定化优势。此外，预处理方式导致余弦几何问题，使端点稳定性指标的解读复杂化。
AI.conclusion: 稳定性声称需要轨迹诊断和初始化消融实验来验证。该研究支持将SAE放在更广泛的词典学习传统中审视，并强调了区分"稳定性"与"稳定化"的重要性。

title: Planar Symmetric Pattern Generation
summary: Generating objects with specific symmetries is essential in various real-world scenarios. However, adapting existing 2D continuous representations to enforce planar group symmetry remains a challenge, as the transformation of non-reflective group elements may disrupt continuity. To overcome this limitation, we propose a symmetrization framework for arbitrary planar groups. Our method transforms any 2D continuous representation into a symmetric one while preserving continuity. We provide the mathematical formulation of this representation, demonstrate its approximation capability for symmetric functions, and detail the construction methodology. We validate our approach through three visual design tasks (pattern design, paper-cutting design and stylized topology design) and one material design task. Experiments confirm that our representation enables effective symmetry control and demonstrate its broader applicability.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用对称化框架，可将任意2D连续表示转换为具有平面群对称性的连续表示，并用于视觉与材料设计任务。
AI.motivation: 现有2D连续表示难以适应非反射群元素（如旋转、平移）的变换，容易破坏连续性，导致难以生成具有特定平面群对称性的物体。
AI.method: 提出一种对称化框架，给出数学公式化定义，证明其对对称函数的逼近能力，并详细说明构造方法，使得变换后的表示保持连续性。
AI.result: 在图案设计、剪纸设计、风格化拓扑设计及材料设计四项任务上验证了有效性，实现了有效的对称性控制。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效处理任意平面群对称性，且具有广泛适用性，为对称约束下的生成任务提供了通用方案。

title: Beyond $\ell_2$-norm and $\ell_\infty$-norm: A Curvature-Inspired $\ell_p$-Norm Scheme for Deep Neural Networks
summary: The existing optimizers for deep neural networks (DNNs) typically rely on either the $\ell_2$ norm or the $\ell_\infty$ norm, resulting in optimizers that do not adapt well to substantial changes in curvature across parameter dimensions. Generally, the training process of DNNs often exhibits strong curvature anisotropy in the early period, whereas in the later period, the training process of DNNs tends to move toward flatter regions with weaker anisotropy. Particularly, optimizers based on the \(\ell_2\)-norm are usually dominated by high-curvature directions, restricting updates of optimizers along with lower curvature direction and thus leading to a slower convergence rate. While optimizers based on the \(\ell_\infty\)-norm are prone to oscillations in flatter regions, due to the coordinate-wise updates of the same magnitude. To address these two extreme cases generated by $\ell_2$ and $\ell_\infty$ norms, we propose a novel $\ell_p$-norm scheme with a dynamical value of $p$ and incorporate it into stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and SGD with momentum (SGDM), leading to two novel optimizers with better generalization performance: ${\ell_p}$-SGD (LPSGD) and ${\ell_p}$-SGDM (LPSGDM). Particularly, the resulting optimizers suppress the dominance of high-curvature directions in the early period by utilizing a large $p$ ($p>2$), followed by a gradual decrease of $p$ toward 2 to enable more stable and refined updates, where the latter process is motivated by the cosine annealing strategy. We establish theoretical guarantees of the resulting algorithms and analyze that both LPSGD and LPSGDM achieve an \(O(T^{-1/2})\) convergence rate for the nonconvex setting. Extensive experiments are conducted on benchmark datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-1K, with multiple DNNs such as VGG-11, ResNet-18, and ResNet-50.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于动态 $\ell_p$ 范数（$p$ 值从大到小动态调整）的优化器 LPSGD 和 LPSGDM，解决了 $\ell_2$ 范数优化器在早期受高曲率方向主导收敛慢，以及 $\ell_\infty$ 范数优化器在平坦区域易振荡的问题，理论保证 $O(T^{-1/2})$ 收敛率，实验在 CIFAR 和 ImageNet 上验证了优越的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 $\ell_2$ 和 $\ell_\infty$ 范数优化器无法适应 DNN 训练中曲率各向异性的动态变化：早期曲率各向异性强时 $\ell_2$ 被高曲率方向主导导致收敛慢，后期平坦区域 $\ell_\infty$ 等幅更新易振荡，缺乏能随训练阶段自适应调整的优化器。
AI.method: 提出动态 $\ell_p$ 范数方案，$p$ 值初始较大（$p>2$）压制高曲率方向，随后余弦退火策略逐步降低 $p$ 至 2 以实现稳定精细更新。将该方案集成到 SGD 和 SGDM 中，得到 LPSGD 和 LPSGDM 两种优化器。
AI.result: 理论证明 LPSGD 和 LPSGDM 在非凸设定下均达到 $O(T^{-1/2})$ 收敛率。在 CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet-1K 上使用 VGG-11、ResNet-18/50 等网络进行实验，验证了更好的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态 $\ell_p$ 范数有效平衡了早期优化速度与后期稳定性，相比固定 $\ell_2$ 或 $\ell_\infty$ 范数优化器具有更好的自适应能力和泛化性能。

title: How Hard Can It Be? Hardness-Aware Multi-Objective Unlearning
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific forget training data due to privacy, copyright or bias concerns while maintaining the model performance on the remaining retain data. Existing unlearning algorithms, such as optimizing a weighted combination of losses, have tried to achieve these objectives of improving forget quality and maintaining retain utility. However, they do not guarantee that these objectives can be improved by a specified extent for all forget and retain data. In this work, we address this limitation with a novel and theoretically-grounded approach from a constrained optimization perspective. Firstly, we identify that the hardness of reconciling both objectives can be quantified by the similarity between the forget data and the retain data. Next, we derive an unlearning algorithm (HAMU) with the overall goal of guaranteeing a specified improvement in forget quality while minimizing the retain utility cost/degradation by updating the model weights based on our hardness measure. Our hardness measure also informs users when retain utility degradation is unavoidable, i.e., both objectives cannot be improved simultaneously, and stopping should be considered. Our algorithm is applicable to non-convex models and is easily parallelizable, making it readily deployable in real-world scenarios. We empirically demonstrate HAMU's superior performance over baselines on both image and text datasets using large models. Our code is available at https://github.com/aoi3142/HAMU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于约束优化的机器遗忘方法HAMU，通过量化遗忘数据与保留数据的相似度来保证遗忘质量的同时最小化保留效用损失，并能在两者不可兼得时提示停止。
AI.motivation: 现有遗忘算法（如加权损失组合）无法保证对全体遗忘数据和保留数据都能达成指定程度的优化目标，缺乏理论保障和量化指标。
AI.method: 从约束优化角度出发，量化遗忘数据与保留数据的相似度作为"硬度指标"；基于该指标更新模型权重，在保证遗忘质量达到指定程度的同时，最小化保留效用的损失；当两者不可兼得时提示停止。
AI.result: 在图像和文本数据集上使用大模型进行实验，HAMU在遗忘质量和保留效用上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HAMU是一种具理论保障、可并行化、适用于非凸模型的实用机器遗忘算法，能够量化权衡边界并指导何时应停止遗忘操作。

title: Variational Learning for Insertion-based Generation
summary: Non-monotonic sequence generation methods, such as masked diffusion models, provide a flexible alternative to left-to-right autoregressive modeling by allowing tokens to be generated in non-fixed and prescribed orders. Despite their practical advantages, most existing non-monotonic models are order-agnostic and rely on a fixed-length grid, limiting their ability to support variable-length generation and adaptive insertion order. In this work, we introduce a probabilistic framework for learning insertion order in variable-length insertion models. We formalize a bijective correspondence between insertion trajectories and permutations, which enables an exact reparameterization of the data likelihood as a sum over permutations. Building on this result, we propose the Insertion Process (IP), a stochastic generative model that jointly learns where to insert, what to insert, and when to terminate, trained via permutation-based variational inference. Unlike prior fixed-canvas approaches, IP natively supports variable-length generation and learns data-driven preferences over insertion orders. Experiments on goal-conditioned planning and molecular string generation demonstrate that learning insertion order improves both modeling quality and generalization in domains without a canonical left-to-right structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出插入过程(IP)模型，通过排列变分推断联合学习插入位置、内容和终止条件，支持变长生成和自适应插入顺序，在规划和分子生成任务上优于固定顺序方法。
AI.motivation: 现有非单调序列生成方法（如掩码扩散模型）虽然灵活，但大多与顺序无关且依赖固定长度网格，无法支持变长生成和自适应插入顺序。本文旨在建立一个概率框架来学习变长插入模型中的插入顺序。
AI.method: 形式化了插入轨迹与排列之间的双射对应关系，实现数据似然的精确重参数化；提出插入过程(IP)——一种随机生成模型，通过排列基的变分推断联合学习插入位置、内容和终止条件。
AI.result: 在目标条件规划和分子字符串生成实验中，学习插入顺序在缺乏规范从左到右结构的领域中提升了建模质量和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 变长插入模型中学习数据驱动的插入顺序优于固定顺序方法，尤其适用于没有天然左右结构顺序的领域。

title: Rethinking Evaluation Paradigms in IBP-based Certified Training
summary: Deep neural networks achieve strong performance on many supervised learning tasks but remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Neural network verification provides mathematically rigorous robustness guarantees, yet at substantial computational cost. To mitigate this, certified training techniques optimise for verifiable robustness during training, typically inducing a trade-off between natural and certified accuracy controlled by method-specific hyperparameters. Because these metrics are inherently conflicting, the common practice of reporting a single configuration is problematic: it can mislead conclusions about overall performance and prevents unbiased assessments of the state of the art. We address this by evaluating certified training methods via Pareto front comparisons over the natural--certified accuracy trade-off. To enable fair, method-agnostic comparisons, we perform efficient automated multi-objective hyperparameter optimisation to identify a set of Pareto-optimal configurations for each method. This approach often uncovers substantial undertuning in previously reported configurations, yielding superior performance and establishing a new state of the art. Leveraging these fronts, we present the first comprehensive multi-objective comparison of certified training approaches, showing that prior advancements are less pronounced than assumed and revealing previously unreported performance complementarities.

AI.tldr: 本文针对认证训练（certified training）中自然精度与认证精度之间的权衡问题，提出使用Pareto前沿比较方法进行多目标评估，通过自动化超参数优化发现现有方法存在严重的欠调优问题，并建立了新的最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有认证训练方法在报告结果时通常只展示单一配置，但由于自然精度和认证精度本质上是相互冲突的目标，这种做法会误导对方法整体性能的判断，无法公正评估领域进展。
AI.method: 采用Pareto前沿比较方法评估认证训练方法在自然-认证精度权衡上的表现；通过高效自动化多目标超参数优化，为每种方法找到一组Pareto最优配置，实现公平且与具体方法无关的比较。
AI.result: 发现先前报告的配置存在显著的欠调优问题，优化后取得了更优性能并建立了新的最优水平。基于Pareto前沿的比较表明，先前声称的进展并不那么显著，并揭示了以往未被报道的性能互补性。
AI.conclusion: 应对认证训练方法进行多目标评估而非单一指标对比；自动化超参数优化能显著提升方法性能；领域内进展的实际幅度需基于Pareto前沿重新审视。

title: Edge-aware Decoding for Neural Asymmetric Routing
summary: Neural asymmetric routing models increasingly encode directionality through matrix representations and asymmetry-aware attention. The final routing action, however, is not a node in isolation but a directed transition chosen under the current partial route. This creates a representation--decision mismatch: pairwise cost information may be encoded upstream while the final candidate logit is still largely parameterized as context--node compatibility. We propose a decoder-design principle for neural asymmetric routing: the final score should explicitly expose transition-level quantities suggested by the problem's cost-to-go structure. We instantiate this principle with an edge-aware decoder that adds candidate-specific terms for the current directed edge, return-to-start closure, and static lightweight lookahead, while keeping the representation backbone fixed. On a controlled SVD/Sinkhorn asymmetric backbone, the decoder improves over the RADAR reference when trained on ATSP-100 and evaluated zero-shot on ATSP-100/200/500/1000, reducing the ATSP-1000 gap from $4.13\%$ to $2.73\%$. On ACVRP, the same score-level modification shows the same qualitative trend under a richer routing state. ATSP ablations and directed-transition diagnostics sharpen the mechanism: the strongest evidence concerns sensitivity to the current directed edge, while closure and static lookahead act as heuristic continuation cues. The results support a mechanism study: a key decoder-side signal in neural asymmetric routing is decision-time exposure of transition-level edge information.

AI.tldr: 本文指出神经非对称路由模型中存在"表示-决策不匹配"问题：最终路由动作不是孤立节点，而是在当前部分路径下选择的有向转移，但模型仍将候选logit参数化为上下文-节点兼容性。提出解码器设计原则：最终分数应显式暴露转移级信息。通过边感知解码器（加入当前有向边、返回起点闭合、静态轻量级前瞻项），在ATSP上4.13%→2.73%的gap改进，ACVRP同样验证。消融实验表明当前有向边感知最关键。
AI.motivation: 现有神经非对称路由模型虽然通过矩阵表示和非对称注意力编码了方向性，但最终决策仍然是基于上下文-节点兼容性的logit，而非基于转移级（transition-level）信息，导致表示与决策之间的不匹配。作者希望弥合这一鸿沟，提出显式暴露转移级信息的解码器设计原则。
AI.method: 提出边感知解码器（edge-aware decoder），在固定表示骨干网络的前提下，在最终分数中显式加入三项转移级信号：当前有向边的候选特定项、返回起点的闭合项、静态轻量级前瞻项。在SVD/Sinkhorn非对称骨干网络上进行实验，对比RADAR基线。
AI.result: 在ATSP-100上训练，零样本泛化到ATSP-100/200/500/1000，ATSP-1000的gap从4.13%降至2.73%。在ACVRP上同样验证了定性一致的改进趋势。消融实验表明当前有向边感知是最关键的信号，闭合和静态前瞻起启发式延续提示作用。
AI.conclusion: 神经非对称路由中，解码器端的关键信号是决策时刻显式暴露转移级的边信息。这支持了"表示-决策匹配"的设计原则，为神经组合优化模型的解码器设计提供了新思路。

title: VLBM: Variational Latent Basis Modeling for OOD Robust Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
summary: Out of distribution (OOD) events in multivariate time series forecasting are rare but often dominate real world risk, making average case forecasting insufficient for reliable deployment. Under standard average risk training on mixed ID/OOD distributions, optimization signals from rare OOD events can be overwhelmed by frequent in distribution (ID) patterns, so strong benchmark accuracy may not translate into reliability under high impact shifts. To address this issue, we propose VLBM (Variational Latent Basis Model), a theory guided latent forecasting framework that separates stable dynamics from OOD induced deviations. VLBM learns a shared latent basis that defines a low rank subspace for stable ID dynamics, explicitly decomposes inputs into basis subspace components and orthogonal residual components, and aligns a future aware posterior with a future blind prior so that test time latent inference depends only on historical input. Across 12 benchmark tasks spanning transportation, weather, power systems, and other real world domains, including newly constructed real world OOD traffic datasets, VLBM achieves state of the art OOD robustness and ID accuracy, with average MAE and MSE gains of 15.08\% and 7.74\% over the strongest baseline. On a synthetic simulation dataset, VLBM also consistently achieves the best performance and better tracks OOD pulse recovery. These results support latent structured forecasting as a principled route to robust prediction under mixed ID and OOD conditions. The code is available at https://github.com/leijieruilq/VLBM_OOD_forecast.

AI.tldr: 提出VLBM（变分潜在基模型），通过将时间序列分解为稳定的ID动态（低秩子空间）和OOD偏差（正交残差），实现混合ID/OOD分布下的鲁棒预测，在12个基准任务上平均MAE提升15.08%、MSE提升7.74%。
AI.motivation: 多变量时间序列预测中OOD事件虽罕见但主导真实世界风险，标准平均风险训练下OOD信号被频繁ID模式淹没，导致高精度模型在高影响偏移场景下不可靠。
AI.method: VLBM学习共享潜在基定义低秩子空间描述稳定ID动态，将输入显式分解为基子空间分量和正交残差分量，并通过对齐未来感知后验与未来无关先验，使测试时潜在推断仅依赖历史输入。
AI.result: 在涵盖交通、天气、电力等12个基准任务上（含新构建的真实OOD交通数据集），VLBM取得SOTA的OOD鲁棒性与ID精度，平均MAE和MSE较最强基线分别提升15.08%和7.74%；在合成仿真数据集上同样最优且更好追踪OOD脉冲恢复。
AI.conclusion: 潜在结构化预测是在混合ID/OOD条件下实现鲁棒预测的原则性路径。

title: TimeBlocks: Foundational and Continual Time-Series Blockbase -- Extended Version
comment: 15 pages. An extended version of "TimeBlocks: Versatile and Continual Time-Series Blockbase" accepted at SIGKDD 2026
summary: The ongoing digitization has led to a proliferation of time-series data streams that monitor a variety of processes, from which valuable insights may be obtained. Further, the emergence of successful foundational language models begs the question of whether it is possible to achieve time-series models with the foundational properties of handling multiple tasks, while being sufficiently lightweight to allow real-time data stream processing. Existing foundational time-series models are often large and only effective in offline settings without stringent time and computational constraints, and where repeated model calibration is not needed. However, when applied to data streams, these models are ineffective due to their size and lack of support for continual calibration, which compromise their ability to deliver accurate real-time responses, their durability, and their deployability in hardware-limited settings. We propose TimeBlocks to enable versatile time-series processing by facilitating the efficient building of lightweight models suitable for multiple tasks under variable conditions. In particular, the method maintains a pool of interchangeable and modular model blocks that can be used to construct new time-series models. When presented with specific time-series data, a routing strategy iteratively selects the most suitable blocks to construct a lightweight and accurate model for the data. We equip TimeBlocks with a method called StreamCore to build a representative small subset of the data stream, which preserves a guaranteed approximation of the stream over time, enabling continual model calibration. An experimental study on multiple data sets and covering multiple tasks shows that TimeBlocks enables to build models capable of outperforming existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TimeBlocks框架，通过模块化模型块池和流式数据核心集StreamCore，实现轻量级、支持持续校准的多任务时间序列实时处理，在多个数据集上优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基础时间序列模型通常过于庞大，仅适用于离线环境，无法在资源受限、需持续校准的数据流场景下提供准确、实时、持久的响应。作者希望构建一种轻量级、可处理多任务、支持持续校准的实时时间序列模型。
AI.method: 维护一个可互换的模块化模型块池；针对特定时间序列数据，通过路由策略迭代选择最合适的块来构建轻量模型；提出StreamCore方法构建数据流的小型代表性子集，保证对流的近似且支持持续模型校准。
AI.result: 在多数据集、多任务的实验研究中，TimeBlocks构建的模型在性能上优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TimeBlocks通过模块化设计和流核心集策略，成功实现了在数据流场景下轻量、多任务、可持续校准的时间序列处理，为实时时间序列分析提供了有效的新范式。

title: Hybrid Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Data-Efficient Polymerization Modeling with Incomplete Kinetics
summary: Accurate prediction of polymerization dynamics is essential for process design, control, and optimization. Yet, purely mechanistic models require labor-intensive parameterization of partially characterized kinetics, while purely data-driven models demand large, diverse datasets that are costly to obtain, particularly in early-design stages. We propose a hybrid Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE) framework for data-efficient modeling of free-radical polymerization. Using batch polymerization of methyl methacrylate (MMA) as a case study, the mechanistic mass balances are retained explicitly, and only the partially-characterized effective radical concentration governing monomer consumption is learned from data through a neural network surrogate, while established reactions such as initiator decomposition, propagation, and termination remain physically modeled. The hybrid NODE is evaluated against a discrete-time feedforward neural network and a purely data-driven NODE under sparse data conditions, with models trained on as few as ten measurements under both regular and irregular sampling. The hybrid NODE consistently achieves lower prediction errors and more physically consistent extrapolations than both purely data-driven baselines. In a generalization scenario with noisy data and unseen operating conditions, the hybrid NODE achieves an RMSE of 0.013, compared to 0.31 for the data-driven NODE and 0.68 for the discrete-time model, demonstrating that learning only a closure term rather than the full dynamics is sufficient for reliable prediction under limited data availability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合神经常微分方程（NODE）框架，仅学习部分表征的有效自由基浓度，而保留机理质量平衡，在稀疏数据条件下实现了比纯数据驱动模型更准确、更物理一致的聚合动力学预测。
AI.motivation: 纯机理模型参数化工作量大，纯数据驱动模型需要大量昂贵数据，尤其在早期设计阶段数据稀缺。因此需要一种数据高效的建模方法。
AI.method: 提出混合NODE框架：保留自由基聚合的机理质量平衡（如引发剂分解、链增长、终止等已建立反应），仅将部分表征的有效自由基浓度这一项用神经网络代理学习。
AI.result: 在稀疏数据（少至10个样本）下，混合NODE的预测误差和物理一致性均优于离散时间前馈神经网络和纯数据驱动NODE。在含噪声和未见操作条件的泛化场景中，混合NODE的RMSE为0.013，远低于纯数据驱动NODE的0.31和离散模型的0.68。
AI.conclusion: 仅学习封闭项而非完整动力学，足以在有限数据下实现可靠的聚合动力学预测。

title: EEG-FuseFormer: A Transformer-Driven Feature Fusion Framework for Seizure Onset Prediction
comment: IEEE International Instrumentation and Measurement Technology Conference (I2MTC) 2026
summary: Epilepsy is one of the most common neurological disorders globally, characterized by recurring seizures and significantly impacting the quality of life. Despite advancements in diagnostic techniques, the mitigation of risks faced by epilepsy patients remains challenging due to the unpredictability of seizure events. An accurate forecast of seizure onset helps to reduce risks in epilepsy patients. In this paper, we propose EEG-FuseFormer, a transformer-based feature fusion framework for seizure-onset prediction that combines intermediate features extracted from Convolutional Neural Networks-Long Short-Term Memory (CNN-LSTM) and ResNet-18 networks. The CNN-LSTM architecture captures both spatial and temporal features directly from the raw signal, whereas the ResNet-18 extracts features from the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) representation of the EEG signals. Fusion is carried out using a transformer encoder, and the final prediction is generated using fully connected dense layers. The CHB-MIT dataset was used to validate the proposed model. The results show that the proposed model achieves a mean recall of 98.85% and outperforms most of the state-of-the-art methods. This study evaluates the ability of the proposed feature fusion model to generalize in cross-patient testing scenarios. Fine-tuning pre-trained models on limited target patient data (target adaptation) within the cross-patient validation framework results in higher recall, precision, and F1-score metrics in comparison to the conventional cross-patient validation approach. Finally, the runtime-based computational complexity of the model is assessed across diverse hardware platforms to highlight the performance-complexity trade-off.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Transformer的特征融合框架EEG-FuseFormer，结合CNN-LSTM和ResNet-18提取特征，用于癫痫发作前预测，在CHB-MIT数据集上达到98.85%的平均召回率，优于大多数现有方法。
AI.motivation: 癫痫发作的不可预测性严重影响患者生活质量，现有预测方法准确性不足，需要更可靠的发作前预测模型来降低患者风险。
AI.method: 提出了EEG-FuseFormer框架：1) CNN-LSTM从原始EEG信号提取时空特征；2) ResNet-18从STFT频谱图提取特征；3) 使用Transformer编码器进行特征融合；4) 全连接层生成最终预测。
AI.result: 在CHB-MIT数据集上验证，平均召回率达98.85%，优于大多数现有方法。跨患者测试中，微调预训练模型（目标适应）相比传统跨患者验证方法获得了更高的召回率、精确率和F1分数。同时评估了不同硬件平台上的运行时计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: EEG-FuseFormer通过多模态特征融合和Transformer编码器有效提升了癫痫发作预测性能，在跨患者泛化方面表现良好，且通过目标适应策略可进一步提升性能。

title: Closing the Alignment-Maturity Gap in Federated Prototype Learning
summary: Learning discriminative visual representations from distributed, heterogeneous data is a fundamental challenge in Federated Learning (FL). Prototype-based methods address statistical heterogeneity by sharing class-level representations across clients but create a distance-dependent gradient pressure that is particularly severe during early training rounds: alignment pressure applied to immature global prototypes, aggregated from noisy local representations, generates large gradients that suppress the emergence of local discriminative structure. The result is a poorly organized embedding space and degraded recognition performance, particularly under severe non-IID conditions. We propose FedSAP, a framework that stabilises federated representation learning through two complementary mechanisms: a deterministic alignment curriculum that delays global alignment until local representations become stable and a geometry-driven proxy separation loss that enforces inter-class structure on the unit hypersphere using the existing prototype bank without introducing additional parameters or communication overhead. Together, these mechanisms produce compact, well-separated class clusters without altering the underlying communication protocol between federation's participants. Experiments across three benchmarks and varying degrees of heterogeneity show gains of up to 4 percentage points over the prototype-based baselines evaluated, with improvements most pronounced under high heterogeneity. The representational nature of our framework further enables a straightforward extension to semi-supervised settings, where unlabelled data is incorporated with minimal modification, underscoring the generality of scheduled alignment as a design principle.

AI.tldr: FedSAP通过在原型学习框架中引入确定性对齐课程和几何驱动代理分离损失，解决联邦学习中统计异质性导致的梯度压力问题，在非独立同分布下提升4个百分点。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中基于原型的方法在早期训练中，对不成熟的全局原型施加对齐压力产生大梯度，抑制局部判别结构的形成，导致嵌入空间组织不良和识别性能下降。
AI.method: 提出FedSAP框架，包含两个互补机制：1）确定性对齐课程——延迟全局对齐直到局部表示稳定；2）几何驱动的代理分离损失——利用现有原型库在单位超球面上强制类别间结构，无需额外参数或通信开销。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集和不同程度的异质性下相比基线方法提升高达4个百分点，尤其在高度异质性条件下改进最显著，并能轻松扩展至半监督场景。
AI.conclusion: 调度对齐作为一种设计原则具有通用性，FedSAP在不改变底层通信协议的情况下有效提升了联邦表示学习的判别性和鲁棒性。

title: Low-Pass Flow Matching
summary: Flow Matching typically relies on white noise sources, a choice often misaligned with the power spectra of natural data, which tend to decay with frequency. To address this, we introduce Low-Pass Flow Matching, a variant of Flow Matching based on an operator-modulated interpolant. This formulation induces a time-varying spectral bias that transitions from the source spectrum to a frequency-decaying bias as the path approaches the data. We validate our method on unconditional image generation tasks, including the scientific Galaxy10 dataset. Empirically, we show that our method is particularly effective when paired with adaptive ODE solvers, where it improves or preserves sample quality while substantially reducing sampling cost compared to standard baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出低通流匹配（Low-Pass Flow Matching），通过算子调制插值引入时变谱偏置，使源频谱平滑过渡到频率衰减偏置，在图像生成任务中（特别是科学数据集Galaxy10）结合自适应ODE求解器可显著降低采样成本并保持或提升样本质量。
AI.motivation: 标准Flow Matching使用白噪声（功率谱恒定）作为源分布，与自然数据中功率谱随频率衰减的特性不一致，导致生成过程与数据统计特性不匹配。
AI.method: 提出基于算子调制插值（operator-modulated interpolant）的低通流匹配方法，构建时变谱偏置，使得从源分布到数据分布的过程中，频谱偏置从白噪声谱逐渐过渡到频率衰减的低通偏置。
AI.result: 在无条件图像生成任务（含Galaxy10数据集）上，与自适应ODE求解器结合时，该方法在保持或提升样本质量的同时，显著降低了采样成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过匹配数据自然功率谱特性来设计生成路径，是提升Flow Matching采样效率和质量的有效方向。

title: On the Generalization in Topology Optimization via Sensitivity-Conditioned Bernoulli Flow Matching
summary: Surrogate models for topology optimization (TO) exhibit highly variable out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization under distribution shifts such as changing loads or boundary conditions, yet the source of this variability remains unclear. We hypothesize that OOD performance is governed by how much information the conditioning signal preserves about the adjoint sensitivity (reduced gradient) that drives classical TO. Modeling the TO pipeline as a causal Markov chain, the Data Processing Inequality establishes that, under this abstraction, the sensitivity field is an information-theoretically optimal conditioning signal for topology prediction. However, computing exact adjoint sensitivities can be expensive or unavailable in practice; we observe that certain physical fields can approximate sensitivities through monotone transformations. To formalize this, we introduce \textbf{pseudo-sensitivities} to characterize which fields enable generalization versus those that are information-poor. We then show that a sensitivity-conditioned Bernoulli flow-matching generator empirically confirms these predictions: conditioning on sensitivities yields state-of-the-art OOD performance, while increasingly distant physical fields degrade toward raw parameter conditioning. Results hold across structural TO benchmarks under load shifts and our new CFD-TO dataset under boundary-condition shifts such as multi-outlet configurations. Code and datasets are available at https://tum-pbs.github.io/topotransformer/ .

AI.tldr: 本文通过信息论视角揭示了拓扑优化中代理模型OOD泛化差异的根本原因，提出"伪灵敏度"概念，并验证了基于灵敏度条件的流匹配生成器在分布偏移下达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 拓扑优化的代理模型在分布偏移（如载荷或边界条件变化）下OOD泛化能力差异巨大，但原因不明。作者希望从信息论角度揭示这一差异的根源。
AI.method: 将TO流程建模为因果马尔可夫链，利用数据处理不等式证明灵敏度场是信息论最优条件信号；提出"伪灵敏度"概念形式化描述哪些物理场能近似灵敏度（通过单调变换）；设计基于灵敏度条件的伯努利流匹配生成器。
AI.result: 灵敏度条件化方法在载荷偏移的结构TO基准和新提出的CFD-TO数据集（边界条件偏移）上均达到SOTA OOD性能；远离灵敏度的物理场退化为原始参数条件化性能。
AI.conclusion: 灵敏度场是TO代理模型实现强OOD泛化的关键条件信号，伪灵敏度框架为选择有效条件信号提供了理论指导。

title: Coherent Off-Policy Improvement of Large Behavior Models with Learned Rewards
summary: Distilling expert demonstration data into large generative models using behavioral cloning is a scalable approach to learning capable policies for robotic control, particularly for dexterous manipulation. Reinforcement learning (RL) can be used as a means to finetune these policies further using additional experience. An open question is whether RL is more sample-efficient than collecting more human demonstrations. Prior work has finetuned large pretrained policies in a scalable fashion by applying RL to a smaller residual policy that corrects the pretrained model. However, for the typical sparse reward tasks, RL algorithms can struggle to optimize the behavior in a sample-efficient manner. We explore inverse reinforcement learning, where a dense reward function is learned from expert demonstrations, potentially reducing the challenge of RL finetuning. We specifically consider coherent imitation learning, an IRL method that facilitates improvement of the BC policy through using a specific reward formulation with theoretical guarantees. We show that our IRL method maintains or improves the performance of pi-0.5 on all six sparse manipulation tasks and achieves a $\geq 90\%$ success rate on five out of six complex manipulation tasks, outperforming RL-based baselines using sparse rewards. By ensuring our initial pretrained finetuning policy is optimal for our initial reward and critic, our method circumvents the initial drop commonly seen in RL finetuning and enables faster improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用逆强化学习（IRL）方法（具体为连贯模仿学习）来微调基于行为克隆（BC）预训练的大规模机器人操控策略，相较于传统稀疏奖励的强化学习（RL）微调，该方法在六个稀疏奖励的复杂操控任务中，有五个达到90%以上成功率，且避免了RL微调常见的初期性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 探索在稀疏奖励场景下，逆强化学习（IRL）是否比传统强化学习（RL）更高效地微调大规模预训练策略，以解决RL在稀疏奖励任务中样本效率低、难以优化的挑战。
AI.method: 采用连贯模仿学习（Coherent Imitation Learning）这一IRL方法，从专家演示中学习密集奖励函数，并用其对预训练的BC策略（pi-0.5）进行微调。通过确保初始微调策略在初始奖励和评论员下最优，避免RL微调常见的初期性能下降。
AI.result: 在六个稀疏奖励的复杂操控任务中，IRL方法维持或提升了pi-0.5的性能，其中五个任务取得了≥90%的成功率，优于使用稀疏奖励的RL基线方法。
AI.conclusion: IRL方法（连贯模仿学习）在稀疏奖励的机器人操控任务中，比传统RL微调更具样本效率，能够避免性能初始下降并实现更快提升，是一种有效的预训练策略微调方案。

title: Faster Synchronous On-Policy RL via Straggler-Aware Group Sizing
summary: Synchronous reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) provide stable and reproducible on-policy training, but they are highly vulnerable to stragglers, a single unusually long rollout can delay reward computation and parameter updates for the entire group. This problem becomes more severe as group size increases, creating a tension between the benefits of larger groups and the wall-clock cost of synchronization stalls. We propose Straggler-Aware Group Control (SAGC), a dynamic group-size controller that adapts the training group online based on observed rollout behavior. SAGC formulates group-size selection as an online constrained optimization problem, seeking to retain the benefits of larger groups while controlling the long-term rate of straggler events. Across synchronous GRPO and DAPO training, and on top of both vanilla and strong engineered baselines, SAGC consistently reduces straggler incidence and improves wall-clock efficiency while achieving competitive or better training reward. We further show that these gains transfer to final model quality: SAGC is competitive with or better than the strongest static group-size baseline on downstream reasoning benchmarks, and often produces shorter outputs without any explicit length penalty. These results position dynamic group control as a practical way to make synchronous on-policy RL more efficient and robust.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAGC（Straggler-Aware Group Control），一种动态群组大小控制器，通过在线自适应调整训练群组大小，缓解同步强化学习方法（如GRPO、DAPO）中由于落后节点导致的训练延迟问题，在保持训练效果的同时提升壁钟效率。
AI.motivation: 同步强化学习方法（如GRPO、DAPO）虽然训练稳定且可复现，但存在严重的落后节点（straggler）问题——单个异常长的rollout会延迟整个群组的奖励计算和参数更新，且群组越大问题越严重，在更大群组的收益与同步等待开销之间存在矛盾。
AI.method: 提出SAGC，将群组大小选择建模为在线约束优化问题，基于观测到的rollout行为动态调整训练群组大小，目标是保持大群组优势的同时控制落后节点事件的长期发生率。
AI.result: 在同步GRPO和DAPO训练中，无论是基于原始基线还是强工程基线，SAGC均能持续降低落后节点发生率、提升壁钟效率，同时达到有竞争力或更好的训练奖励。在推理基准测试上，SAGC与最优静态群组基线相比表现相当或更优，且通常能在无显式长度惩罚的情况下生成更短的输出。
AI.conclusion: 动态群组控制是一种使同步on-policy强化学习更高效、更鲁棒的实用方法。

title: Network Learning with Semi-relaxed Gromov-Wasserstein
summary: Estimating the generative mechanism of large-scale networks is a fundamental challenge in statistical machine learning. It requires the identification of the latent connectivity structure, which is in general an NP-hard combinatorial problem due to the absence of canonical node labels. We address this challenge by allowing for probabilistic couplings, thereby relaxing the assignment problem. Our estimation framework can be formulated as a semi-relaxed Gromov-Wasserstein objective and provides a low-dimensional representation of the generative structure. We solve this via a block-coordinate conditional gradient algorithm.
